Offense Traits (DC 14) | Swarm Attack (P) | 3d6 (10) | +Distraction | | ---------------------------------------------------------- | -------- | ------------ | Swarm Attack - A swarm does not threaten. These creatures cannot make attacks and must instead enter a creatures space to deal their damage automatically at the end of their turn. This allows them to damage multiple creatures if they are close together with a big enough swarm. Distraction - When a creature takes damage from an insect swarm, they are overwhelmed by the sheer number of creatures. They are staggered for one round (fort negates). THEY'RE IN MY EVERYTHING - While within a swarm, creatures are sickened 2 and have blurred vision. Exiting immediately ends both conditions. Species - Bugs come in all shapes and sizes, pick one. Scarab - Creatures hurt by swarm attack also start bleeding for d10 damage (fort negates). Ant - Ants crawl into every nook and cranny and never let go. Their swarm damage happens again at the end of the creatures turn if not hit with AoE, submerged in water, etc. Lose fly speed, gain 30 ft climb. Bee Poison - Deals an additional 2d6 poison damage with swarm attack (fort negates). Locust - Always focuses plant creatures first. Deal double damage to plant creatures. Spider - Gains the Venomous quality, applied on swarm attack. Lose fly speed, gain 30 ft climb. Weaknesses/Deep Lore Baited - While piranhas do attack living creatures, they prefer easier prey. If a fresh dead carcass is within range of their blood scent, piranhas will tear it to shreds before moving on. Medium or small creatures distract for one turn. Anything smaller only uses their movement. Anything larger than medium distracts for 1 more turn per size category. AoE Vulnerability - Takes 50% more dmg from any AoE effect. Other Traits Ability Scores - STR +0, DEX +3, LUK +0, INT -3, WIS +1, CHA +0 Deific Boons - Animal Instincts Senses - Scent 10 ft Speed - 5 Land Speed, 40 Fly Signature Skill - one eye open, quick scan Feats - Signature Skill Skills - +5 (+4 scent) +Perception, +9 +Athletics

entries.title: Dragonslayer Hound
entries.content: Clad in a bone-like exoskeleton armor, this dog sniffs you up and down before moving onto the next capture. It howls and the man next to your transforms into a dragon. The hound pounces on its quarry. Level 5 Medium Beast Defense Traits | AC | 19 | | | ------------------------------------------------- | -------------------------- | --- | | HP | 60 | | | Poise | 29 | | | Saves | Fort +6, Refl +10, Will +8 | | Evasion Resistance - Fire Offense Traits (DC 17) | Bite (P) | +8 | +4 vs Dragons | | -------------------------------------------------- | ---------- | ----------------- | | | 2d8+3 (12) | +Fire Fang | Multiattack - Whenever a dragonslayer hound takes fire damage, it gains access to this multiattack on its next turn. Make 3 bite attacks. Innate Techniques - Boiling Blood, Pack Attack, Jaws of the Beast 1/day - Blazing Beam, Feast (U3), Down to Earth (U3) Constant - Enhanced Jump Fire Fang Fire - On-hit with a bite attack, the foe is set Ablaze (reflex negates). Dragonslayer - A dragonslayer hound has very specialized combat training. It gets a +4 bonus to attack against Dragons, including dragon adjacent creatures or creatures with a draconic affinity. Flash Fire - A dragonslayer hound can redirect Fire effects, similar to how the Lightning Rod technique functions as an immediate action if the effect originates within 60 ft of it. Targeted spells such as Fire Blast are now centered on the hound while AoE spells like are Fire and Brimstone are directed towards the hound instead of their intended direction. Against dragon a breath weapon specifically, a dragonslayer hound can use this ability as an instant action. When it does so, it turns the effect into a line attack directed towards itself, regardless of the original direction and shape of the ability. Weaknesses/Deep Lore Wet Dog - A dragonslayer hound cannot use its Fire Fang ability while Wet or Frosty. Other Traits Ability Scores - STR +1, DEX +3, LUK +0, INT -3, WIS +3, CHA +0 Deific Boons - Animal Instincts Senses - Scent 15 ft Speed - 45 Land Speed Signature Skill - advanced tracking Swift Tracker - Dragonslayer hounds can always track while moving at full speed. If the hound's quarry is faster than them, they can match their speed while tracking. Find Quarry - Dragonslayer hounds can always smell when a creature is a dragon (as per its Dragonslayer ability), even if it is under the effect of a Polymorph. As a standard action, a dragonslayer hound can bark at a polymorphed dragon within 15 ft to automatically transform it back to its true form. Feats - Bodyguard, Signature Skill, Skill Focus Skills - +10 (+4 scent) +Perception, +12 (+2 scent, adv) +Survival, +10 (adv) +Acrobatics ![229.229 1.png|Sprite from the Infinite Fusion game by [Smogon]]

entries.title: Roadrunner Raptor
entries.content: This tall bird moves at incredible speed with its long legs. It's long neck gives it ample range to peck at its prey. Level 5 Medium Beast Defense Traits | AC | 19 | | | ------------------------------------------------- | -------------------------- | ----------- | | HP | 50 | | | Poise | 25 | | | Saves | Fort +5, Refl +10, Will +6 | Evasion | Offense Traits (DC 17) | Peck (P) | +8 | +4 GU | | -------------------------------------------------- | ---------- | ------------------ | | | 2d8+3 (12) | +Warpath | Multiattack - Make 2 melee attacks Innate Techniques - Bull Rush, Reckless Charge, Pack Attack, Rend Vision 1/day - Targeted, Feast Constant - Warpath Eat My Dust Air - Any space of dry land a roadrunner moves through during a Core Rules, How to Play/Actions/Common Actions/Full Round Actions/Charge or Dash kicks up dirt and other miscellaneous particles for 1 round. This provides Partial Concealment. Any non-roadrunner creature that moves through this cloud is Sickened 1 (fort negates). Weaknesses/Deep Lore Need for Speed - Whenever a roadrunner has its speed reduced by any means, its Eat My Dust ability is disabled and it is sad. Its speed is reduced to 0 during any turn it provokes an AoO from movement. Other Traits Ability Scores - STR +0, DEX +3, LUK +3, INT -3, WIS +1, CHA +1 Deific Boons - Animal Instincts Senses - Scent 5 ft Speed - 60 Land Speed Defy Gravity (Su) - A roadrunner can run along the air, but cannot run up into air unless it moves at half speed. At the end of its turn, it plummets if not on solid ground. Feats - Fleet Footwork, Gang Up, Matador, Blind Fight, Combat Reflexes Skills - +8 (+4 scent) +Perception, +10 +Stealth

entries.title: String Shot Spider
entries.content: You slap the webs off of your face, only to have an agitated spider staring you in the face. As you scream, it fires a sizzling string shot from its spinneret. Level 5 Large Beast Defense Traits | AC | 19 | | | ------------------------------------------------- | -------------------------- | --- | | HP | 70 | | | Poise | 28 | | | Saves | Fort +6, Refl +10, Will +6 | | Web Walker - A string shot spider cannot be Entangled by webs. they ignore the Difficult Terrain of webs. Offense Traits (DC 17) | String Shot (Poison) | +8 | 30 ft, +2 BE, cannot be used in consecutive rounds) | | --------------------------------------------------------------- | ---------- | ----------------------------------------------------------------- | | | 5d8 (22) | +Sticky Situation | | Bite (P) | +8 | 5 ft Reach | | | 2d8+3 (12) | +Venom | Innate Techniques - Dive, Pack Attack 1/day - Tumble, Feast, Unseen Predator, Sludge Bomb Constant - Rapid Recovery Sticky Situation Poison - A string shot spider is capable of using its spinneret as a projectile weapon. The strings are coated in powerful digestive enzymes that evaporate quickly. When they land a string shot, the creature is clumsy 2 as the web sticks to them and the surrounding terrain. At the start of each turn they are clumsy from this, they take an additional 2d6 (7) poison damage. A creature can Breakout as a swift action, removing the clumsy and caustic webs. Clumsy cannot removed unless webbing is removed. Weaknesses/Deep Lore Miracle of Life - String shot spiders try to capture some of their prey alive. They attach them to the walls and cover them in webs to lay their eggs inside of their skin. Such creatures are still alive, barely, but are unable to rest or recover from the defeated condition. Within a few days, the eggs are ready to hatch and they eat their way out of their host, forming an insect swarm, but it is large and has half as much hp. In the days leading up to the eggs hatching, a very skilled doctor can roll a DC 30 first aid check to carefully remove the eggs without killing the host. They are drained 15 and require days of bed rest before they can fully recover. Other Traits Ability Scores - STR +1, DEX +3, LUK +0, INT -3, WIS +1, CHA +0 Languages - None Senses - Nightvision Nest Disturbed - Spiders create intricate webs, and the string spider is no different. They cover most surfaces in their chosen home with webs. While in contact with one of these webs, they can tell when a non-spider creature moves into a webbed area, as though using tremorsense. Such environments are Difficult Terrain and entangle creatures that step into them (reflex negates). Breakout as a swift action. Silk Jump - By placing a web on a surface, a spider can avoid Fall Damage when they Jump. They can also suspend themselves in midair, and climb back up this thread to return to their original starting point. This thread can be cut with any slash or pierce damage. Speed - 45, 45 climb. Can climb along any surface. Deific Boons - Animal Instincts Feats - Bullseye, Blind Fight, Butterfly Sting Skills - +8 +Perception, +10 +Stealth, +10 +Acrobatics,

entries.title: Bee Rex
entries.content: The ground thumps and you wonder if this region has earthquakes. You hear the sound of a tree snapping and look up to see an enormous mix of dinosaur and insect crush a small tree underfoot. Level 6 Huge Beast Defense Traits | AC | 20 | | | ------------------------------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------ | --- | | HP | 91 | | | Poise | 32 | | | Saves | Fort +11 Stalwart, Refl +5, Will +7 | | Offense Traits (DC 18) | Stinger (P) | +10 | 30 ft, +2 BE, cannot be used in consecutive rounds) | | ----------------------------------------------------- | ---------- | ----------------------------------------------------------------- | | | 2d8+4 (13) | +Venom | | Bite (C) | +10 | +4 Grapple, +4 MV | | | 3d8+4 (17) | +Grapple On-hit | Multiattack - Whenever a bee rex is flanked, it gains access to this multiattack. It will purposefully attempt to position itself to get into such a position if it can, hopefully provoking AoOs for Blood for Blood procs. Make a bite attack and a stinger attack, but not against the same creature. Innate Techniques - Blood for Blood 1/day - Carnage King of the Jungle Poison - As a FRA the Bee Rex can unleash a mighty roar. Creatures within 60 ft are frightened for 2 rounds (will reduces to shaken 1). Creatures threatened by the t-rex also take 6d6 (21) sonic damage. Swallow Poison - 3d6 (10) poison Venomous - Stinger only Weaknesses/Deep Lore Don't Move - If a creature takes no action and it doesn't move on its turn, the bee rex can only perceive it with scent. Clumsy Titan - When the bee rex Dashes, it must move in a straight line. It cannot take the jump action or Climb. What's the Buzz? - A bee rex is taunted by any creature it sees attacking bees. Other Traits Ability Scores - STR +4, DEX -1, LUK +0, INT -3, WIS +1, CHA +0 Languages - None Senses - Nightvision, Scent (5 ft) Speed - 35 Deific Boons - Animal Instincts Feats - Maneuver Versatility, Combat Reflexes, Toughness Skills - +9 (+4) +Perception, +16 +Athletics, +6 +Stealth

entries.title: Frozen Mammoth
entries.content: A mammoth covered in frost trudges through the tundra. Each step a heavy thud even through the muffled snow. An entire group of them walks by and pays you no mind, so long as you keep your distance. Level 6 Huge Beast Defense Traits | AC | 20 | | | ------------------------------------------------- | -------------------------- | --- | | HP | 80 | | | Poise | 30 | | | Saves | Fort +11, Refl +6, Will +7 | | Resistance - Frost Offense Traits (DC 18) | Gore (P) | +9 | +4 MV | | ---------------------------------------------------------- | ---------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | | | 2d8+3 (12) | | | Stomp (C) | +9 | +4 MV, Only usable against Knocked Down creatures | | | 3d8+3 (16) | | | Earthbending (C) | +9 | 30 ft | | | 4d8+3 (21) | | Multiattack - Use Thunder Stomp and a Natural Attack Innate Techniques - Thunder Stomp 1/day - Earth Shatter, Icy Spears Special Attack: Ice Rush frost - Special: Can only be made as part of a charge attack. Adds 3d8 (13) cold damage. The path the mammoth takes and a 10 ft radius around the target is coated in an icy slippery surface. Weaknesses/Deep Lore Weakness - Crush 2 Territorial - Frozen mammoths typically live in remote cold regions of the world and must travel long distances to find adequate food sources in winter. During such times they are easily agitated, especially when eating. They will attack unprovoked Other Traits Ability Scores - STR +3, DEX +0, LUK +0, INT -2, WIS +1, CHA +1 Languages - Primordial (cannot speak) Deific Boons - Animal Instincts Speed - 30 Land Speed Senses - Scent (10 ft) Feats - Freedom of Movement, Bonded Mind, Take the Hit, Maneuver Versatility, Maneuver Master Skills - +9 (+4 scent) +Perception, +9 +History, +9 (+2 scent) +Survival, +11 +Athletics

entries.title: Badger Mole
entries.content: Crust The walls crash open next to you and an enormous fluffy creature emerges from this new opening to the earth. Level 7 Huge Beast Defense Traits | AC | 21 | | | ------------------------------------------------- | --------------------------- | --- | | HP | 76 | | | Poise | 30 | | | Saves | Fort +10, Refl +7, Will +10 | | Ligma - Offense Traits (DC 19) Claw (S) +10 2d6+3 (10) Earthbending (C) +10 5d10+3 (30) Innate Techniques - Thunder Stomp, 1/day - Crater, Practiced Earthbender - A badger mole can use its earthbending damage to replace the damage of any technique with the earth tag. Weaknesses/Deep Lore Music Lover - Badger moles will not attack any creature trained in the perform skill who is currently performing. Outside of combat, they can be calmed by a creature proficient in the perform skill such that the badger mole is willing to aid them in simple tasks. Other Traits Ability Scores - STR +3, DEX +0, LUK +0, INT -2, WIS +1, CHA +0 Languages - Understands, but cannot speak, primordial Speed - 30, Badger moles can earthbend as a standard action each turn to effectively give them a burrow speed equal to their land speed. Earthbending - As the Earthbending Style of the same name Deific Boons - Animal Instincts Sightless Blindsense - Scent (15 ft), Tremorsense (100 ft) Feats - Skills - +5 perception, +9 athletics

entries.title: Congodile
entries.content: A group of frogs ride on the back of a massive crocodile. They all hold on for dear life as the croc slides around the battlefield on its belly at high speeds. Level 7 Huge Beast/Beast Defense Traits | AC | 22 | | | ------------------------------------------------- | ----------------------------------------- | ----------------------------- | | HP | 126 | | | Poise | 37 | DR 20 vs Grapple/Drag | | Saves | Fort +10, Refl +12 (Evasion), Will +9 | | Offense Traits (DC 19) | Bite (C) | +10 | | | ---------------------------------------------------- | ---------- | ----------------------------------------------------------------------------- | | | 2d8+3 (12) | | | Tongue (C) | +10 | +4 Drag, +4 MV, +30 ft of Reach during turn | | | d6+3 (6) | | Multiattack - Make 5 tongue attacks Innate Techniques - Forbidden, Kidnap 1/day - Jaws of the Beast (U4) Constant - Long Stride Rolling - A creature dragged within the congodile's natural reach is also Knocked Down. Peanut Gallery Recharge - As a free action once each turn, one of the riding frogs can use their respective technique. Once used, it cannot be used again for 1 minute. - Jimmy - Lucky Star (U3) - Jayquan - Haste - Jiang - Wrath of Gold - Jaffar - Mind Maze - Frogger - Enfroggen Weaknesses/Deep Lore Wild Ride - A congodile is a creation of Frogg Saran. While united, these average beasts combine into a dangerous creature. If a creature Poise breaks a congodile, it can choose to throw off a particular frog instead of the attack's usual effects. When it does, the tossed frog turns into a giant frog. The congodile takes 10 true damage, loses one attack in its multiattack and a particular ability from Peanut Gallery depending on which frog gets tossed. Other Traits Ability Scores - STR +3, DEX +3, LUK +3, INT -3, WIS -2, CHA +0 Speed - 60 Land Speed, 60 Swim Blindsense - Scent (5 ft) Deific Boon - enlightened Amphibious Feats - Fleet Footwork, Freedom of Movement, Defensive Training, Divine Interference Skills - +7 (+4) +Perception, +14 +Acrobatics

entries.title: Corpse Creeper
entries.content: A crack in the wall of the cave splits open and a worm far too large to ever reasonably ever fit inside slides out. Several tongue-like tendrils wriggle around on its face until they snap to in the direction of your party. Level 7 Huge Beast Defense Traits | AC | 23 | | | ------------------------------------------------- | -------------------------- | ------------- | | HP | 90 | | | Poise | 32 | DRA 1 | | Saves | Fort +10, Refl +9, Will +8 | | Reactive Armor - A creeper can use its Nice Catch technique with its body armor. It can only hold onto one such weapon at a time. It must let go of a weapon (free action) before it can use this technique again. Offense Traits (DC 19) | Bite (P) | +10 | +4 boney, +4 Grapple, +4 MV | | ----------------------------------------------------------- | ----------- | --------------------------------------------------------- | | | 2d8+3 (12) | | | Heavy Object (C?) | +10 | Thrown | | | 3d12+3 (19) | | Multiattack - Make a bite and a grapple attack. Innate Techniques - Feast, Nice Catch 1/day - Fracture, Caustic Blood Constant - Power Lifter, Rapid Recovery Favored Enemy - A creeper's favorite stack is a set of tasty bones. It gets a +4 bonus to attack with its bite against any creature primarily made of bones, such as a skeleton or a Boner. Bone Crusher - When a creeper maintains a grapple and harms a creature, they burrow their tendrils into the creatures body and crush their bones. This inflicts drain 2 and causes them to internally bleed, dealing 2d6 damage each turn. Creatures get Disadvantage on checks to stop this bleeding. Serrated Tendrils - When a creature escapes a grapple from a creature, they are scraped by the tendrils on the way out. They bleed d6. Weaknesses/Deep Lore Belly Scratches - When Knocked Down, creatures get a +4 bonus to Attack against the creeper instead of +2. Other Traits Ability Scores - STR +3, DEX +0, LUK +0, INT -3, WIS +1, CHA +0 Compression Speed - Climb 40 Blindsense - Scent (15 ft) Tracking - Against a creature primarily made of bones, a creeper can track untrained, and automatically gets a result of 30 to do so, requiring no roll. Deific Boons - Animal Instincts Feats - Maneuver Master, Maneuver Versatility, Back to the Wall, Combat Step Skills - +10 +Perception, +12 +Athletics

entries.title: Shirshu
entries.content: This mix between bear and mole towers over you. It grunts and rapidly inhales through its nose as it inspects the item you presented, before it darts off to hunt for the items owner. Level 8 Huge Beast Defense Traits | AC | 23 | | | ------------------------------------------------- | --------------------------- | --- | | HP | 84 | | | Poise | 33 | | | Saves | Fort +13, Refl +10, Will +9 | | Offense Traits (DC 20) | Tongue (S) | +13 | | | ---------------------------------------------------- | ---------- | ------ | | | 2d6+3 (10) | +Venom | | Claw (S) | +11 | | | | 2d8+3 (12) | | Multiattack - Make 1 tongue and 1 claw attack Innate Techniques - Preparation, Break Free 1/day - Bestial Claw (U4), Burst of Speed Venom - On-hit character is dazed. Creature can save against the effect at the end of their turn. Creatures get advantage on saves against this venom if they have saved out of it once already in the last hour. Extend - As a swift action, increase the range of tongue attacks by 30 ft for the rest of the turn. Special Attack: Tongue Swipe: You can use your tongue attack on two creatures within 10 feet of each other. Weaknesses/Deep Lore Elite Tracking - Shirshu are practically extinct, with the few that still live existing in captivity. They are naturally gifted trackers and such talents are typically nourished by a knowledgeable captor. When presented with an item that has a creature's scent on it, very little can prevent the shirshu from finding its target. It can follow its scent across continents, under water, underground etc. If the creature currently exists on the same Plane, the shirshu will follow the most direct path to reach this creature, usually informing its master of the general distance (within a mile, dozens, hundreds or thousands of miles) via gestures. If the target is dead, it will lead you to its body. If the target went to another plane, it will bring you to the portal (potentially allowing you to continue the chase) or its last location before teleporting. Other strange circumstances can also completely prevent a shirshu from smelling anything related to a creature. Only through repeated exposure to powerfully smelling chemicals (such as perfume) can a creature evade a shirshu's scent. Such exposure requires enough to fully submerge a creature, typically increasing its price 10x for medium creatures. You must submerge yourself in this fluid every day. You can also choose to make yourself smell rancid for a similar effect that instead lasts for a week, provided you don't clean up. Such a scent can easily be obtained via smearing yourself in fecal matter or taking a dip in a sewer, but you yourself are always sickened 2 while this persists. Other Traits Ability Scores - STR +3, DEX +2, LUK +0, INT -3, WIS +1, CHA +0 Speed - 45 Sightless Blindsense - Scent (120 ft) Deific Boons - Animal Instincts Feats - Skill Focus, Signature Skill (survival), Combat Reflexes, Sentinel, Fighter's Lament Skills - +11 (+8) +Perception, +13 +Athletics, +27 +Survival

entries.title: Cherub
entries.content: Your date with this handsome lad is going terribly, but he suddenly perks up and things go great. You see a shimmer as a little baby with feathered wings gives you a wink, before disappearing. Level 0 Tiny Celestial Defense Traits | AC | 14 | | | ------------------------------------------------- | ------------------------- | --------------- | | HP | 20 | | | Poise | 20 | | | Saves | Fort +0, Refl +3, Will +3 | +4 vs Light | Resistance - Holy Wanderer's Gift Su - The cherub has a magical aura that prevents it from being seen by lesser creatures. You must have a +Perception bonus of at least +4 to see a cherub. This ability deactivates for 1 minute when a cherub takes or deals damage. Offense Traits (DC 12) | Shortbow (P) | +3 | Short, +4 Charming Arrow | | ------------------------------------------------------ | -------- | ---------------------------- | | | d6+3 (6) | +Charming Arrow | Innate Techniques - Splatter Charming Arrow charm - On-hit inflict charmed for 1 minute. The cherub can choose to not deal damage with the arrow to gain +4 attack. If the creature is DD (including if the cherub isn't visible thanks to Wanderer) the cherub can choose another creature within 30 ft of its target that it isn't currently in combat with to be the subject of the charm. When the cherub charms in this way, it lasts 24 hours. Weaknesses/Deep Lore Sucker for Love - Cherubs can easily be persuaded to assist creatures in facilitating romantic relationships, usually requiring no check. Other Traits Ability Scores - STR +0, DEX +3, LUK +3, INT +0, WIS +1, CHA +0 Languages - Common, Celestial Speed - 20 Land Speed, 20 Fly Deific Boons - Faith Provides Feats - Butterfly Sting Skills - +3 +Perception, +5 +Stealth, +2 +Deception

entries.title: Duedette
entries.content: A woman with completely white skin dressed in a quality suit comes knocking on your door insisting she speaks on behalf of another to repay your debts. Her long golden hair has a radiance that gently cascades down its length at regular intervals. Level 3 Medium Celestial Defense Traits | AC | 17 | | | ------------------------------------------------- | ------------------------- | --------------- | | HP | 44 | | | Poise | 23 | | | Saves | Fort +3, Refl +6, Will +8 | +4 vs Light | Resistance - Light, Holy Artemis' Gift Su - When a duedette takes the Total Defense action, it is also surrounded in a transparent barrier that automatically blocks all forms of ranged attacks. Offense Traits (DC 14) | Rapier (P) | +6 | Chink Magnet, +2 Topple | | ---------------------------------------------------- | --------------------------------------------------------------------- | ------------------------------- | | | d6+3 (6) | +Debtor's Bane | | Shine | +6 | | | | Inflicts Blinded On-hit, or Blurred Vision on a Graze | | Multiattack - Make 2 attacks with single light weapon and one shine attack Innate Techniques (CL 3) - Radiant Burst, Disc of Light (U2), Snap Back 1/day - Inheritor's Smite, Burst of Speed, On the Clock, Flame of Destiny Constant - Dancing Light (self) Shine - Duedettes have an unconventional Natural Attack that they can make as long as they have an empty hand. It is either made as a Ranged Attack with a range of 30 ft or a Melee Attack against a foe within their natural reach. It inflicts Blinded On-hit, or Blurred Vision on a Graze. Each condition only lasts 1 round. Repayment - When a creature harms the duedette, they can spend an immediate action to make a Shine attack against the creature. Debtor's Bane - Whenever a duedette does damage with a Melee Attack, it automatically reclaims money directly from the creature. The creature does not need to carry the money in order for the duedette to reclaim it, taking it from secret stashes, banks etc. They take up to 100g each time, and the money is transported to an intermediary point in Elysium before being redistributed to the creature owed the debt. They can only use this against a creature that has made some type of contract or agreement that requires monetary repayment. Weaknesses/Deep Lore Memo - When a duedette is Defeated, a bird erupts from their body that flies off to deliver a message to its superior of its demise. Can be easily intercepted with most forms of ranged attacks within 3 rounds. Past that it usually flies to high and too far for most creatures to catch it. Just Business - A duedette is forbidden from attacking creatures unprovoked, as they they were under the effects of Sanctuary. They are often permitted to use force when collecting debts, but will typically use it as a last resort. They can still fight in self-defense, however. Other Traits Ability Scores - STR +0, DEX +3, LUK +0, INT +1, WIS +3, CHA +0 Languages - True Speech Speed - 45 Land Speed Signature Skill - 5 steps ahead, intrusive thoughts Deific Boons - X to Doubt, Confession Feats - Skill Focus, Signature Skill Skills - +8 +Perception, +8 +Acrobatics, +12 (adv) +Insight, +6 (adv) +Linguistics, +6 +Planes, +6 +Local

entries.title: Boom Bot
