On-hit, this damage happens again at the end of the creatures turn unless they are wet, or otherwise remove the acid through some kind of washing.

entries.title: Elemental Assessor
entries.content: +Cantrips Tags: One elemental type Action: Standard | Range | 30 ft | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | 1 round | | Save | - | You fire a bolt of energy that rapidly changes color and consistency to match varying elements. Make a Ranged spell attack against a creature that deals d10+CL (5+CL) True Damage. If the creature possesses a Weakness to an elemental damage type, this spell instead deals that type of elemental damage, changing its tag as appropriate. If a creature has multiple elemental damage weaknesses, this spell does multiple damage types, amplifying its damage with each weakness they possess.

entries.title: Grasp of the Undying
entries.content: +Cantrips Tags: Necrotic Action: Standard | Range | 30 ft | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | 1 round | | Save | - | Make a Ranged Spell Attack against a creature with a bony spectral hand. Deals d10+CL (5+CL) necrotic damage and applies Bone Chilled for 1 round. If the target creature is within your natural reach, you can make this attack as a melee attack. If you are grappling a creature, you can cast this spell as an option to maintain this grapple.
entries.path: Techniques/Magical Techniques/+Cantrips/Combat Cantrips/Grasp of the Undying.md

entries.title: Gust
entries.content: +Cantrips Tags: Air, Upcast Action: Standard | Range | 60 ft | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | - | | Save | Fort | A gust of wind bursts from your staff to push a creature. The creature is knocked 5 ft directly away from you (fort negates). Upcast - Every 4 CLs, increase the distance gust knocks back by 5 feet.

entries.title: Icicle
entries.content: +Cantrips Tags: frost Action: Standard | Range | 30 ft | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | 1 round | | Save | - | You fire an icy projectile that briefly slows the target. Make a Ranged Spell Attack that deals d10+CL (5+CL) frost damage and embeds itself in the creature, decreasing the creatures speed by 15 for 1 round on-hit.

entries.title: Light it Up
entries.content: +Cantrips Tags: Fire, Light Action: Standard | Range | Reach | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | 1 minute | | Save | - | A mote of flame manifests in an empty hand, or attached to a staff/seal. As part of casting the spell, you can blow this flame onto a creature within reach by making a melee Spell Attack. Does d10+CL (5+CL) fire damage. On-hit the creature is made Glowing for 1 round. By adding the Concentration tag, you can hold the flame, using it to gently warm things, start fires and provide light (as per Torch).

entries.title: Living Roots
entries.content: +Cantrips Tags: Earth Action: Standard | Range | 30 ft | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | - | | Save | Reflex | Choose a creature that is standing on some form of dirt/earth/sand. Roots burst up from the ground and entangle the creature (reflex negates). They can remove this condition automatically as a standard action, or they can Breakout as swift action.

entries.title: Magic Missile
entries.content: +Cantrips Tags: Force, Upcast, outplay Action: Standard | Range | 60 ft | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | - | | Save | - | Launch a dart of magic that unerringly strikes an enemy to deal (CL) force damage. Upcast - Every 4 CLs, fire an additional dart at a different creature.

entries.title: Metronome
entries.content: +Cantrips Tags: Recharge Action: Swift | Range | Details vary | | -------------- | ------------ | | Target/AoE | - | | Duration | - | | Save | - | Wiggle your staff and cause a random effect from the following list. Roll a D6. 1. Bury yourself underground until the start of your next turn, effectively putting you in stasis against anything that isn't an earth-based attack. If you attack a foe on follow up turn, they are DD. 2. Confuse yourself. Immediately roll on confusion chart, then end the confusion. 3. Cause a banana peel to appear under a random creature within 30 ft of you. They are knocked down, (reflex negates). 4. Your tongue becomes long, powerful and elastic, allowing you to make a free drag attack with a range of 30 ft. 5. Move 60 ft in a straight line of your choosing elusive, stopping when you hit a solid surface. Creatures along the way take d6 (3) crush damage 6. You and an enemy within 30 ft of you are set ablaze (reflex negates for you both). You cannot cast this cantrip on consecutive turns.

entries.title: Shocking Grasp
entries.content: +Cantrips Tags: zap Action: Standard | Range | Reach | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | 1 round | | Save | - | Your staff transforms into electricity and coats your hand. Make a melee spell attack against a creature that deals d10+CL (5+CL) zap damage. The creature cannot make AoOs against you this turn On-hit. If the creature is wearing metal armor or is sufficiently metallic, get a +4 bonus to Attack. Medium armor and heavy armor are metallic by default.

entries.title: Stubbed Toe
entries.content: +Cantrips Tags: Earth Action: Standard | Range | 30 ft | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | 1 round | | Save | - | You cause the ground underneath a creature to react unfavorably to their movement. If the targeted creature moves at all on their next turn, a piece of the ground intercepts their movement. They take d10+CL (5+CL) bludgeoning damage and they have their speed is reduced by 15 until they spend a swift action bitching and moaning about it.

entries.title: Arcane Mark
entries.content: +Cantrips Tags: - Action: Standard | Range | Reach | | -------------- | -------------------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature or object | | Duration | - | | Save | - | You touch a surface, including one on a creature, and inscribe a symbol or a single word. The mark must fit a in 4x4 inch square. In order to use the spell on a creature, it must be willing, you must land a Melee Attack or you must make a successful +sleight of hand check. Dispel magic automatically succeeds on an arcane mark.

entries.title: Audio Book
entries.content: +Cantrips Tags: Concentration Action: Standard | Range | Reach | | -------------- | ----------------------- | | Target/AoE | 1 piece of written text | | Duration | - | | Save | - | You touch a book, scroll or other form of writing and give the text a faint glow. As long as you could read the text normally and you concentrate, the text is automatically read out loud. It is in your voice in a language that you can speak. After casting the spell, you can leave and go about your business and the spell continues to work its magic. You can dictate a starting point, and the pages flip all on their own, highlighting the text as it is read.

entries.title: Dancing Light
entries.content: +Cantrips Tags: Light Action: Standard | Range | Reach | | -------------- | ---------------------------- | | Target/AoE | 1 willing creature or object | | Duration | 1 hour | | Save | - | You conjure a tiny being of light. It gently floats around the target and gives off bright light and a 20-foot radius, and dim light in a 20 foot radius after that. Casting this spell again causes any other instances of it to end.

entries.title: Death Ward
entries.content: +Cantrips Tags: - Action: Standard | Range | - | | -------------- | -------------------------------------- | | Target/AoE | 20 ft radius burst, centered on caster | | Duration | 10 minutes | | Save | - | A rune appears on each willing creature inside of the area. All creatures that posses a death ward cannot kill creatures that were subject to the same casting of death ward by defeating them. This spell is most often used for organized duels and tournaments to prevent contestants from dying while going all out.

entries.title: Detect Pregnancy
entries.content: +Cantrips Tags: - Action: - | Range | 30 ft | | -------------- | ------------------ | | Target/AoE | 1 unoccupied space | | Duration | 1 minute | | Save | - | By holding your hand close to the creature, you can tell whether or not it's pregnant and how far along in it's pregnancy it is.

entries.title: Ghost Sound
entries.content: +Cantrips Tags: Figment Action: Standard | Range | 30 ft | | -------------- | -------------- | | Target/AoE | - | | Duration | Up to 1 minute | | Save | Will | You create a volume of sound that rises, recedes, approaches, or remains at a fixed place. You choose what type of sound is created when casting it and cannot change the sound. The sound mimics whatever you want. It can sound like a cafeteria, crowd, waterfall, lion roaring etc, but cannot produce intelligible speech, or sound like a specific person. It can be very loud, but cannot be loud enough to cause harm or otherwise affect anything physically. When exposed to the apparent location the sound originates from, a creature can roll a will save to realize it is fake.

entries.title: Innervate
entries.content: +Cantrips Tags: Recharge Action: Immediate | Range | 30 ft | | -------------- | -------------------------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature casting a spell | | Duration | - | | Save | - | You call upon the energy of all living things to empower you or an ally. You cast this spell in response to a spell being cast and it increases the spells CL by 1. A creature cannot be the target of this spell more than 1/day.

entries.title: Mage Hand
entries.content: +Cantrips Tags: - Action: -Standard | Range | 30 ft | | -------------- | ----- | | Target/AoE | - | | Duration | - | | Save | - | You create a ghostly ethereal hand that can pick up items and perform simple tasks such as opening doors, pulling up pants or tipping over buckets. It can carry up to 10 lbs and has a +0 bonus to +Athletics. The hand cannot do anything that takes longer than one turn to perform unless you add the concentration tag and focus on its actions with yours each turn. You can use the hand to perform a bully or shove combat maneuver with a bonus of +1.

entries.title: Mana Ramping
entries.content: +Cantrips Tags: Mana Burn Action: 1 minute | Range | Reach | | -------------- | -------------------------------------------- | | Target/AoE | 1 willing creature or multiple mana crystals | | Duration | - | | Save | - | You touch your staff to the target creature and drain the mana from them. They mana burn equal to their maximum mana-1. A mana crystal appears in the creature's possession with mana equal to the amount they mana burned -1. This makes it useless on most commoners. Mages typically use this to collect from themselves for the convenience of not needing to go through other adventuring guilds, craftsmen or churches to get the mana they need for their own projects. You can also use this spell to combine all mana crystals in your possession together. The smaller crystals are absorbed by the larger crystal and you add the mana values together. Note: The target of this spell must be willing. This means it cannot be used against creatures that have no will of their own, that lack intelligence or enemies that have been defeated.

entries.title: Prestidigitation
entries.content: +Cantrips Tags: - Action: Standard | Range | Details vary | | -------------- | ------------ | | Target/AoE | - | | Duration | - | | Save | - | With a flick of your wrist and some magic sparkles, you can create a variety of effects. | Heat | Increase the temperature of small areas/objects to be warm to the touch | | ------ | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ | | Chill | Decrease the temperature of small areas/objects to be cold to the touch | | Create | Generate crude creations out of small objects, like origami or board game pieces | | Color | Change the color of small areas/objects like pieces of paper or pencils |

entries.title: Providers Station
entries.content: +Cantrips Tags: - Action: 1 minute | Range | Reach | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | - | | Duration | Until Rest | | Save | - | Note: In order to cast this spell, you must have access to the night sky. When the spell is complete, you create an object or small facility that meets the bare minimum requirements for a particular task, trade, or skill, such as a furnace for heating pottery or a lockpick. This item will break if used for anything other than its intended purpose, and disappears after the spell's duration or if exposed to sunlight. You must create facilities that can fit within a 10ft cube. This spell does not provide fuel to run facilities. It may create objects with multiple parts, such as a series of vials and tubes for use in alchemy, but these cannot be separated from the facility without disappearing.

entries.title: Scribe
entries.content: +Cantrips Tags: - Action: Standard Focus: A writing utensil and something to write on | Range | Reac | | -------------- | ---------------------- | | Target/AoE | 1 piece of written tex | | Duration | - | | Save | - | You touch a book, scroll or other form of writing and give the text a faint glow. The utensil moves on its own to copy down the content you targeted onto the paper, parchment etc. that you provided as a focus. It copies down the text at a rate of about 1 page of an average book per minute in your handwriting. If you are trained in the +Linguistics skill, you can duplicate the handwriting.

entries.title: Spirit Animal
entries.content: +Cantrips Tags: Companion, Upcast Action: Standard | Range | Reach | | -------------- | ------ | | Target/AoE | - | | Duration | 1 hour | | Save | - | You create a small spectral animal of significance to you. This animal follows basic commands and can roll survival for Navigation using your bonus. It cannot interact with the physical world and disappears if it takes damage. Casting this spell again causes any other instances of it to end. Upcast - Every 2 CLs, increase the duration by another hour.

entries.title: Umbrella
entries.content: +Cantrips Tags: Dismissible Action: Swift | Range | - | | -------------- | ------ | | Target/AoE | Self | | Duration | 1 hour | | Save | - | You create a visible barrier above your head that shields you from the elements. You are protected from things such as rain and sunlight. Gain Cover from attacks that originate above you. Creatures that huddle next to you can also share this benefit. Certain effects that mimic weather can potentially be mitigated by this spell such as call cheese storm and solar eclipse. Average doorways are considered difficult terrain while this spell is active.

entries.title: +Cantrips
entries.content: The magic basics. Cantrips don't cost mana and essentially count as level 0 spells. Cantrips are separated into 2 categories: combat and utility.

entries.title: Alarming Sigil
entries.content: Level 1 Academy Tags: Sigil Action: Standard | Range | Reach | | -------------- | ------------------------------------ | | Target/AoE | 20 ft radius, emanating from a point | | Duration | Until Rest | | Save | - | You inscribe a magic rune on the surface of an object. Whenever a creature of at least tiny or larger size enters this area, the sigil triggers, creating one of 2 effects you decided on casting. In either case, you are mentally alerted and awakened if sleeping. Silent Alarm - Only you are mentally alerted. Loud Alarm - A loud sound starts to play and repeat, like beeping. Creatures within 300ft can hear it in ideal conditions.

entries.title: Amplify
entries.content: Level 1 Academy Tags: Upcast Action: Standard | Range | Reach | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | 10 minutes | | Save | - | The touched creature gains the ability to increase their volume much higher than what is normal. Good for getting the attention of crowds, shouting for lost friends and announcing for sports. Upcast - If your CL is at least 12... The spell doesn't increase your volume further, but rather allows your voice to carry extreme distances. You are capable of speaking to entire towns, large battlefields and small islands miles wide.

entries.title: Arcane Lock
entries.content: Level 1 Academy Tags: Dismissible Action: Standard | Range | Reach | | -------------- | -------------------------------------- | | Target/AoE | 1 object that can be opened and closed | | Duration | - | | Save | - | The spell can only be cast on medium (or smaller) sized objects, like a chest, an average door or a dresser. A visible padlock appears on the object decorated with magic sigils, usually near the point where it needs to be opened. While the lock persists, the object cannot be opened. As a standard action, a character can get rid of the lock and pop open the object with Brute Force or Thievery. The DC is a flat 23. Any previous instance of this spell disappears if cast again.

entries.title: Arcane Pocket
entries.content: Level 1 Academy Tags: - Action: Standard | Range | Reach | | -------------- | ----------------- | | Target/AoE | 1 pocket or pouch | | Duration | Until Rest | | Save | - | You create an extradimensional space that can store numerous small items. When you gaze inside you see nothing but a starry sky. It contains 3 inventory slots. The item need not fit into the entrance of the pocket/pouch. Any excess you attempt to put in spills back out immediately. As long as you know what you're looking for, you can effortlessly pull items out of the space without looking inside. If you turn the pouch/pocket inside out or this spell ends, all of the items spill out. This spell can be made permanent by sewing phase spider web into the fabric (3k gold). You no longer need to prepare a permanent arcane pocket and may cast it again freely. Any previous instance of this spell disappears if cast again.

entries.title: Embiggen
entries.content: Level 1 Academy Tags: Buff, Upcast Action: Standard | Range | - | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | Self | | Duration | 10 minutes | | Save | - | You increase to large size. If you are already large or larger, the spell has no effect. Upcast - If your CL is at least 8... You can target a creature within reach instead of yourself.

entries.title: Enhanced Jump
entries.content: Level 1 Academy Tags: Upcast Action: Swift | Range | - | | -------------- | ------- | | Target/AoE | Self | | Duration | 1 round | | Save | - | As part of casting the spell, you can take the jump action. Casting this spell allows the caster to jump as high and far as their movement speed. When you jump, you ignore fall damage from a fall of 30 ft or less. If you attack an enemy that is in midair during this time, your movement is elusive when falling after jumping up to them. Upcast - If your CL is at least 8... You can increase the duration of the spell to 10 minutes, and it gains the buff tag.

entries.title: Feather Fall
entries.content: Level 1 Academy Tags: Air, Upcast Action: Immediate | Range | 60 ft | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | 1 minute | | Save | - | Used to save people from deadly falls. The target gently falls 60 ft per round and safely lands on the ground. The spell ends early if the target lands. Upcast - If your CL is at least 8... Target up to 4 creatures within 30 ft of each other.

entries.title: Free Swim
entries.content: Level 1 Academy Tags: Buff, Water Action: Standard | Range | Reach | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | Until Rest | | Save | - | You gain a swim speed equal to your land speed and the amphibious quality, allowing you engage in underwater combat without a penalty.

entries.title: Gear Up
entries.content: Level 1 Academy Tags: Concentration, Upcast, Force Action: Standard | Range | Reach | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | - | | Duration | Until Rest | | Save | - | You create a magical copy of a non-magical shield or weapon that you think of that doesn't require ammunition, such as a light weapon or a 2h weapon. It deals force damage instead of its usual damage. If you have an open hand, you can cause the weapon to appear in your hand and you can make a simple attack with it as part of casting the spell. If you cast this spell while you have already conjured gear, the previous gear disappears. Upcast - Every 2 CLs, create an additional piece of equipment.

entries.title: Hidden Power
entries.content: Level 1 Academy Tags: 1 elemental damage type Action: Standard | Range | 30 ft | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | - | | Save | Reflex | Unleash a wave of elemental energy that homes in on a creature, dealing 2d6+2*CL (7+2xCL) damage (reflex halves). The damage type can be any elemental damage type and is chosen when cast.

entries.title: Dimensional Anchor
entries.content: Level 2 Academy Tags: Dismissible Action: Standard | Range | 60 ft | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | 10 minutes | | Save | - | You fire an anchor-shaped projectile a creature. Make a Ranged Spell Attack. On-hit, the target is Anchored. The DC to dispel this effect is 13+CL.

entries.title: Dispel Magic
entries.content: Level 2 Academy Tags: - Action: Standard | Range | 60 ft | | -------------- | ------------------------------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature, or 1 magical effect | | Duration | - | | Save | - | The spell can be used in two different ways. Dispel - You roll a Caster Level check to immediately end a magical effect. The DC is (11+CL of the effect). Counter Spell - You roll a caster level check to prevent a spell from being cast. This must be done as a prepared action in response to a spell being cast. The DC is (11+CL of the spell). If the spell the creature is casting has a higher caster level than your to dispel magic, you have Disadvantage on your caster level check. You can use dispel magic on supernatural features, labeled (Su). The creature's CL is treated as (lvl+2). Passive supernatural effects or prepared innate spells can be reactivated as a standard action.

entries.title: Mirror Images
entries.content: Level 2 Academy Tags: Figment, Buff, Recharge | Range | - | | -------------- | -------- | | Target/AoE | Self | | Duration | 3 rounds | | Save | - | 4 illusory copies appear within your space and mirror your actions. Increase your AC by 1 for every clone you still have. If this bonus AC prevents an attack from hitting or grazing you, you lose a clone. You can only cast this spell once every minute.

entries.title: Shrink Ray
entries.content: Level 2 Academy Tags: Dismissible Action: Standard | Range | 30 ft | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | Varies | | Duration | Until Rest | | Save | - | This spell has a different effect depending on what you target. - Ally - Creature shrinks down to the size of an action figure, only a few inches tall. It is unable to effectively damage creatures of small or larger size due to its diminutive nature. Their speed is reduced by 15. Any creature can say "big mode" to increase back to their normal size as a standard action. - Enemy - Requires a Ranged Spell Attack. The target creature shrinks to small size on-hit. If already small or smaller, no effect. - Object - Targeting an unattended object shrinks it down to 1/10th of its original size. Divide its weight by 100. The object can be no larger than 5x5x5 ft. No matter the target, shrink ray can only affect 1 creature or object at a time. If you cast the spell again then all previous instances of it end.

entries.title: Acceleration Sigil
entries.content: Level 3 Academy Tags: Sigil Action: Standard | Range | 30 ft | | -------------- | ------------------------------------------------------ | | Target/AoE | 1 space that doesn't have a creature within 5 ft of it | | Duration | 10 minutes | | Save | - | Place a glowing bright sigil on the ground. When a creature steps within 5 ft of it, it activates, launching them 60 ft in the direction they were moving. The creature is sent slightly into the air to fly over minor obstacles and takes 20 Poise damage in addition to any Fall Damage or other hazardous terrain the creature is flung into.

entries.title: Mage's Apprentice
entries.content: Level 3 Academy Tags: Companion, Mana Burn Action: Standard | Range | Reach | | -------------- | ----- | | Target/AoE | - | | Duration | - | | Save | - | Burn any amount of mana to summon a ghostly mage with (5*mana burn) HP. It follows your movement, including forced movement, to stay in your space at all times. The apprentice does not Threaten. It wields a singular staff. It is treated as a construct that shares all of your ability scores, AC and saves. It has half your Poise. It shares your LvL, but is always treated as a minion. During your turn, you can teach this apprentice one of the +Cantrips you know as a free action. It immediately casts this cantrip. It's CL is (your CL-10) minimum 1.

entries.title: Elemental Shield
entries.content: Level 4 Academy Tags: Buff and 1 elemental damage type Action: Swift | Range | - | | -------------- | -------- | | Target/AoE | Self | | Duration | 1 minute | | Save | - | While this spell is active, you are wreathed in an elemental damage type of your choosing. You gain resistance to this damage type. 1/turn when you take damage, you can cause the spell to retaliate as an instant action, dealing (CL) damage of your chosen damage type to the creature that did the damage.

entries.title: Plane Shift
entries.content: Level 4 Academy Tags: Teleportation Action: 1 minute Focus: A tuning fork | Range | - | | -------------- | ---------------- | | Target/AoE | Self+8 creatures | | Duration | | | Save | - | You concentrate for a minute on your destination, then appear in a location on another Plane. The recipients of this spell must be in physical contact with each other. You must have an idea of where you would like to go in order to use this spell. Roll a +Planes check and subtract your result from 40. That is how many miles you appear off course from your desired location. The minimum distance is 1 mile off course. Tuning forks are made out of material native to the plane. They are difficult to obtain without first visiting that plane or purchasing them from specialized vendors. This spell does not require line of sight.

entries.title: Academy
entries.content: The generic magic techniques available to all mages. Includes many generally useful spells, as well as spells that help branch into other technique trees like hidden power.

entries.title: Catapult
entries.content: Level 1 Alchemy (T) Tags: Upcast Action: Standard | Range | 60 ft | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | - | | Save | Reflex | The end of your staff manifests into a sling or catapult like device. You can load it with any handheld item weighing up to 10 lbs and launch it at a creature. The creature takes d8+CL (4+CL) damage and is also affected by the item catapulted (reflex halves and negates effect of item). The type of damage varies depending on the object thrown. The creature must also make any appropriate save against catapulted items if they fail their save. Even if a creature passes its save, the item is assumed to land in the creatures space, so if the item activates on impact, the creature may still have to deal with an explosion, grease or whatever other fun stuff gets tossed. Upcast - Every 2 CLs, increase the range of this spell by 5.

entries.title: Endothermic Touch
entries.content: Level 1 Alchemy (T) Tags: Prepared, Fire Action: Standard | Range | - | | -------------- | --- | | Target/AoE | - | | Duration | - | | Save | - | You are much better at conducting heat in a controlled manner. In general you can exist in hot environments comfortably. One of your limbs glows like heated metal and can be used to touch solid objects that are sources of large heat. Up to a 1 ft cube can be affected at a time. By maintaining contact with an object (one FRA) you can store its heat. Later you can choose to diffuse this heat into the air around you, or transfer it to another object. The effects of which depend on the object. Many things simply burn, but others like stone and metals can be softened. If used as a melee attack, it deals 2d6+CL (7+CL) fire damage. If you desire, you can immediately diffuse the heat as you touch the hot object continuously. You can affect a 1ft cube per round of contact. Prolonged exposure to heat bothers you less during this spell, but in enclosed spaces, your allies, and eventually even you, can be overwhelmed by heat.

entries.title: Fool's Gold
entries.content: Level 1 Alchemy (T) Tags: Upcast, Glamer Action: Standard | Range | Reach | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | Metal | | Duration | 10 minutes | | Save | - | You touch metal and give it a shiny new coat of paint, making it shimmer like gold. This changes nothing about the metals physical properties, only its appearance. You can affect a 1 ft cube of metal. A DC 10 +Nature check reveals the gold is fake. Upcast - For every 2 CLs, you can add 1 ft to the dimension of the cube you affect. (2 ft cube, 3 ft cube etc).

entries.title: Lab Rat
entries.content: Level 1 Alchemy (T) Tags: poly, baleful, Curse Action: Standard | Range | Reach | | -------------- | ------------------------------ | | Target/AoE | 1 willing or defeated creature | | Duration | - | | Save | - | Prepare a creature for transport, or prevent them from being a continued nuisance thanks to healing. The creature transforms into tiny white rodent that can fit in the palm of your hand. The creature is automatically transformed back into its original form when a creature says "ratatouille."

entries.title: Long Arms
entries.content: Level 1 Alchemy (T) Tags: Buff Action: Swift | Range | Reach | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | 1 minute | | Save | - | The target's arms lengthen, more closely resembling prehensile tentacles. Its natural reach increases by 5 ft.

entries.title: Rubbery
entries.content: Level 1 Alchemy (T) Tags: Prepared Action: - | Range | - | | -------------- | --- | | Target/AoE | - | | Duration | - | | Save | - | Your body is incredibly bouncy and flexible. - You gain Cat's Grace - You can take the jump action as a free action whenever you take fall damage. - You gain compression.

entries.title: Venom Transfer
entries.content: Level 1 Alchemy (T) Tags: Poison Action: Swift | Range | Reach | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | 1 round | | Save | - | You jab your staff into a creature that is currently envenomed and borrow some of the venom for yourself. Using the venom as a catalyst, you can charge your next attack this round with an additional d8 (4) poison damage. The envenomed creature you absorbed the venom from can immediately make a save to end the condition. If they fail, it does not advance the venom further and you cannot use this technique on them again to attempt to cure the venom. Note: You can also use this technique against a defeated creature that is venomous. They get no benefit or drawback from it.

entries.title: Belch
entries.content: Level 2 Alchemy (T) Tags: Prepared Action: - | Range | - | | -------------- | --- | | Target/AoE | - | | Duration | - | | Save | - | You keep a clever concoction brewing in your belly at all times, just waiting for the final ingredient. - The use potion action is elusive for you - Whenever you take the use potion action, you also let out a particularly nasty belch on a creature within your natural reach. They become sickened 1 (fort negates).

entries.title: Euphoric Cloud
entries.content: Level 2 Alchemy (T) Tags: Concentration, Persistent, Air Action: Standard Focus: A smoke pipe | Range | - | | -------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------- | | Target/AoE | 10 ft radius cube, at least one space of which must be adjacent to caster | | Duration | 1 minute | | Save | Will | You take a deep hit from your pipe. When you exhale a cloud of colorful fragrant smoke fills the area. The smoke does not obscure vision significantly enough to give Concealment. Any creature within the area is fascinated by its incredible colors and tantalizing aroma while it persists (will negates).

entries.title: Liquefy
entries.content: Level 2 Alchemy (T) Tags: Buff, poly, true, Water Action: Standard | Range | Reach | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | 1 minute | | Save | - | Transform target creature into a puddle of water. This prevents them from interacting with objects, unless they are buoyant enough to move as a puddle. As a liquid, they can slip into places they otherwise might not be able to. The spell ends if the liquefied creature takes fire damage, or if they form back into their previous shape as a standard action.

entries.title: Nauseating Trail
entries.content: Level 2 Alchemy (T) Tags: Poison, Persistent, Concentration Action: Standard | Range | - | | -------------- | ---------------- | | Target/AoE | It's complicated | | Duration | 3 rounds | | Save | Fort | Immediately dash and disengage, leaving behind a toxic trail in your wake. For the rest of your turn, spaces you move through are filled with a toxic gas that lingers. The gas spreads slightly up into the air, causing the spaces 5 feet above you to also be affected. Any creature that moves through one of these spaces experiences its stench and caustic properties. They take 3d8+CL (13+CL) poison damage and are sickened 1 (fort halves damage and negates sicken).

entries.title: Third Leg
entries.content: Level 2 Alchemy (T) Tags: - Action: Standard | Range | 60 ft | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | - | | Save | Fort | You cause a creature to grow an additional oversized and unwieldy limb. The creature is clumsy 2 (fort negates). This clumsy cannot be removed while the limb persists. The additional limb does not disappear over time and must be removed manually. - The limb can be safely removed with first aid. - A creature can also breakout as a swift action to remove the limb forcefully, inflicting drain 3.

entries.title: Alchemize
entries.content: Level 3 Alchemy (T) Tags: - Action: 1 minute | Range | Reach | | -------------- | -------------- | | Target/AoE | 1 metal object | | Duration | - | | Save | - | You instantly turn a hunk of metal into gold. The object can be no larger than a 3x3x3ft cube, and it must be something you are able to hold (in its entirety) in one hand. As long as the item you hold is mostly made out of metal, you convert it to gold equal to 60% of its total value. This spell can also be used to convert gold into base metals. Note: I'm currently thinking about the implications this spell has on world building. It's a complex web that makes you consider the value of metal, how the crafting system works and how the world replenishes resources consumed by magic.

entries.title: Blood to Ichor
entries.content: Crust Level 3 Alchemy (T) Tags: Poison, Companion, Recharge, Mana Burn Action: Standard | Range | 30 ft | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | - | | Save | Fort | Summon an ooze inside of a creature. The ooze immediately tries to melt its way out. The affected creature takes 2d8+CL (9+CL) poison damage (fort halves). The ooze then fights to aid you. It is Taunted by the creature it originally emerged from. This spell can only be cast 1/minute. Creature stats TBD

entries.title: Chimp Out
entries.content: Level 3 Alchemy (T) Tags: poly, chimeric Action: Standard | Range | 30 ft | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | - | | Save | Fort | Transform a creature so they become a more ape-like version of themselves (fort negates). They gain a Climb speed of 30, have their Land Speed reduced by 15 and are effectively silenced, only capable of making animal noises. They gain the following special attack. Special Attack: Poop Toss Poison - Make a thrown Natural Attack. The creature takes 2d6 (7) poison damage and becomes sickened 2 On-hit. Can be removed by eating a banana or using poop toss.

entries.title: Sludge Bomb
entries.content: Level 3 Alchemy (T) Tags: Poison Action: Standard | Range | 30 ft | | -------------- | ----------------------------------------------------------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature or 1 space10 ft radius, centered on a target | | Duration | - | | Save | Reflex | Toss a sizzling sphere of toxic goo that explodes on impact. Make a Spell Attack against a creature. On impact the projectile explodes, dealing 4d8+CL (18+CL) poison damage (reflex halves dmg). The original target has Disadvantage on their save and is envenomed On-hit. On a miss, the projectile still explodes in the creatures space. Upcast - For every 2 CLs, increase the range of this spell by 5 feet.

entries.title: Caustic Blood
entries.content: Level 4 Alchemy (T) Tags: Poison Action: Immediate | Range | 10 ft | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | - | | Save | Reflex | When a creature deals crush, slash or pierce damage to you, spray them with a nasty surprise. They take 3d8+CL (13+CL) poison damage (reflex halves).

entries.title: Caustic Surprise
entries.content: Level 4 Alchemy (T) Tags: Poison, Contingent Action: Standard | Range | - | | -------------- | -------------------------------------- | | Target/AoE | 10 ft radius burst, centered on caster | | Duration | - | | Save | Reflex | While this contingency is active, your skin seems to bubble and pop, with the frequency and intensity increasing as your hp depletes. When you die or are defeated, this contingency triggers and you briefly live on, ignoring these conditions. You are unable to take any actions, including dashing, other than movement while in this state, and you ignore all movement impairing effects. At the end of your next turn, your skin explodes in a caustic brine, dealing 5d8+CL (21+CL) poison damage to all creatures in range (reflex halves)

entries.title: Iron Man
entries.content: Level 5 Alchemy (T) Tags: Buff, Dismissible Action: Standard | Range | - | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | Self | | Duration | Until Rest | | Save | - | Your body undergoes a rapid transformation to be completely made of metal. You gain the following benefits… * You do not possess biology, and therefore cannot be envenomed, bleed, suffocated etc. Any non-permanent instance of these effects immediately ends on cast. Permanent instances are suppressed for the duration. * Resistance to all physical damage unless it originates from a weapon of adamantine or greater toughness * Resistance to all poise damage And the following drawbacks… * You are silenced * You speed is 30, but cannot be decreased or increased * You cannot swim, fly or hover. You automatically sink when submerged in water. * Your weight increases to be 100x heavier. If you have the anime theme song racial feature, it changes during this transformation.

entries.title: Alchemy (T)
entries.content: Effects that transform you, allies, objects or enemies. Also includes poison effects and things related to chemistry.

entries.title: Enchant Sapphire
entries.content: Level 1 Arcane Tags: - Action: 1 hour Material: 500g worth of sapphire jewels or jewelry | Range | Reach | | -------------- | ------------------------------- | | Target/AoE | 1 sapphire, or sapphire jewelry | | Duration | - | | Save | - | You cast a spell on a Sapphire jewel or jewelry, turning it into a consumable magic item. The effects vary based on where the item goes on the body. | Ring | You create a Ring of Recoil, which reflects 1 true damage on every instance of damage to the creature that inflicted it, if any. Once it has reflected 20 damage, the ring disintegrates. | | -------- | ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | | Necklace | You create a Necklace of Breathing, which automatically activates when you run out of breath, such as underwater or in outer space. As long as your airways are not obstructed, you can continue to breathe. After 20 minutes of cumulative use, the necklace disintegrates. The necklace is always used in 20 minute increments | | Jewel | You create a Jewel of Preservation, which sends a distress signal to up to 5 total friends and family members of your choice when you are Defeated, Dead, or fear for your life. They receive a brief telepathic message in your voice that describes your location to the best of your knowledge, and to please send help. They cannot respond to this message, and after the message is sent, the jewel disintegrates. |

entries.title: In Orbit
entries.content: Level 1 Arcane Tags: Force, Healing Action: Swift | Range | - | | -------------- | -------- | | Target/AoE | Self | | Duration | 3 rounds | | Save | - | 3 small pale white orbs emerge from your staff and float around you. At the end of each of your turns, an orb bumps into to a creature within your natural reach. A single creature can only be hit by 1 orb a turn, but can be affected by multiple over several turns. When an orb bumps into a creature, it pops. If multiple creatures are within your reach, multiple orbs pop. When all three orbs have popped, deal (3+CL) force damage to all creatures within your natural reach and gain (3+CL) temp hp.

entries.title: Magic Dart
entries.content: Level 1 Arcane Tags: Force, Upcast Action: Standard | Range | 60 ft | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | 1 minute | | Save | - | Make a ranged attack with a dart that deals 2d8+CL (9+CL) force dmg. The dart sticks inside of them, magnetizing other magic effects to it. Creatures get a +2 bonus to spell attacks against this creature within 1 minute. This dart can be removed as a swift action while wielding a Staff Component by making a DC (5+CL) Caster Level check. If the attack was a Crit, it cannot be removed. It is automatically removed if targeted with Dispel Magic. Upcast - Every 2 CLs, increase your attack bonus with the dart by 1.

entries.title: Scholars Shield
entries.content: Level 1 Arcane Tags: Prepared Action: - | Range | - | | -------------- | --- | | Target/AoE | - | | Duration | - | | Save | - | A shield made of vibrant magical force rotates around your body. You can take +Shield Actions, but only against spell attacks. Gets a few additional options * Can also be used to block force effects that normally automatically hit (such as lucky star and magic missile) as an immediate action * Can also be used to grant a +2 bonus to a +Saving Throw against a spell as an immediate action Special: This technique is compatible with the Shield Focus feat.

entries.title: Spell Blade
entries.content: Level 1 Arcane Tags: Force Action: Swift Focus: 1 Weapon Attack, Natural Attack or unarmed strike | Range | Reach | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | - | | Save | - | Make a melee spell attack that is enhanced with a layer of magical force, dealing CL force damage.

entries.title: Star Fall
entries.content: Level 1 Arcane Tags: Force Action: Standard | Range | - | | -------------- | -------------------------------- | | Target/AoE | 15 ft radius, centered on caster | | Duration | - | | Save | - | The skies darken above you and tiny motes of light pepper the heavens. You can call down stars on your foes. You automatically deal (CL) force damage to all enemies within 15 ft of you. Each time you hit an enemy with this spell, the damage increases by 3 for the next 2 rounds. Additional casts extend the duration of the increased damage, allowing it to ramp up in damage infinitely. Damage resets when you roll initiative.

entries.title: Star Sight
entries.content: Level 1 Arcane Tags: Prepared Action: - | Range | - | | -------------- | --- | | Target/AoE | - | | Duration | - | | Save | - | By spending a standard action concentrating each round, you gain a completely unobstructed view of the sky as though it was a clear night. You ignore things like environmental conditions, being indoors and underground, light pollution etc. You get +2 bonus on Navigation checks.

entries.title: True Strike
entries.content: Level 1 Arcane Tags: - Action: Standard | Range | - | | -------------- | ------- | | Target/AoE | Self | | Duration | 1 round | | Save | - | Channel power into your Staff Component. The next spell attack made with a spell cast from this staff gets +10 Attack. This effect dissipates at the end of your next turn.

entries.title: Wandering Stars
entries.content: Level 1 Arcane Tags: Pattern Action: Standard | Range | 30 ft | | -------------- | ------- | | Target/AoE | 1 enemy | | Duration | 1 round | | Save | Will | You unleash the beauty of the cosmos upon a creature as a group of stars swirl around them. They are fascinated for one round (will negates). When their fascination ends (including if they pass their save), you can spend an immediate action to make the stars move, provided you can see the target. You can direct the stars at another enemy within 20 ft. This can repeat indefinitely, but cannot effect the same creature more than once. If you do not spend an immediate action to redirect the spell, it ends.

entries.title: Arcane Arc
entries.content: Level 2 Arcane Tags: Force, Upcast Action: Standard | Range | - | | -------------- | ---------------------- | | Target/AoE | 30 ft line, 15 ft wide | | Duration | - | | Save | Reflex | Fire a wide projectile that affects an area in front of you, dealing 3d8+CL (13+CL) force damage to creatures it cuts (reflex halves). Upcast - Every 2 CLs, increase the range of the line by 5 ft. Every 4 CLs, increase how wide the arc is by 10 ft.

entries.title: Crystalline Explosion
entries.content: Level 2 Arcane Tags: Force, Upcast Action: Standard | Range | 30 ft | | -------------- | ------------------------------------------------------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature10 ft radius, centered on target creature | | Duration | - | | Save | Reflex | Make a Ranged Spell Attack by firing a magical crystal at a creature, dealing 3d8+CL (13+CL) force dmg. Regardless if it hits or misses, it explodes in the targets space, knocking down all creatures within 10 ft (reflex negates). If your attack lands, the target has Disadvantage on its save. If your attack is a Crit, the target gets no save against the knock down effect. Upcast - Every 2 CLs, increase your attack by 1.

entries.title: Nebula
entries.content: Level 2 Arcane Tags: Light, Force Action: Standard | Range | - | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 30 ft cone | | Duration | 3 rounds | | Save | - | Conjure a cloud of stardust that illuminates in a 20 ft radius. It obscures vision beyond 5 feet, granting Partial Concealment. Anything beyond 5 feet grants Total Concealment. At the end of the spell's duration, it ignites dealing 3d8+CL (13+CL) force damage to all creatures in the area.

entries.title: Center of the Universe
entries.content: Level 3 Arcane Tags: Buff, Force Action: Standard | Range | - | | -------------- | -------- | | Target/AoE | Self | | Duration | 3 rounds | | Save | - | Many glowing orbs immediately hover outwards and start rotating around you at a fixed distance of 15 ft. At the start and end of your turns, deal CL force damage to creatures that are exactly 15 ft away from you.

entries.title: Cosmic Cage
entries.content: Level 3 Arcane Tags: Concentration Actions: Standard | Range | 30 ft | | -------------- | ------------------------------------ | | Target/AoE | 10 ft radius, centered on a creature | | Duration | 1 round | | Save | Will | You create a cage like structure at the edge of the radius of this spell. Creatures can still see in and out of the cage, and still have line of effect. The cage provides no Cover. If a creature moves in or out of the cage, willingly or unwillingly, it is dazed for 1 round (fort reduces effect to staggered) and its movement is halted. A creature can only be affected by the spell once.

entries.title: Dark Matter
entries.content: Level 3 Arcane Tags: Force, Upcast Action: Standard | Range | 60 ft | | -------------- | ---------------------------------------------- | | Target/AoE | 5 ft radius, centered on a point on the ground | | Duration | - | | Save | Reflex | You mark a position on the ground and a dark shadow forms over it, indicating great danger to those nearby. At the start of your next turn, a chunk of condensed cosmic energy lands on this spot, dealing 4d12+CL (26+CL) force damage (reflex halves). If a creature's speed is zero (such as from being stunned or entangled) it has Disadvantage on its save. Upcast - Every 2 CLs, increase the spells range by 5 ft.

entries.title: Exasperating Evocation
entries.content: Level 3 Arcane Tags: Force Action: Standard | Range | 30 ft | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | 2 rounds | | Save | Reflex | Fire a magical projectile that homes in on a specific target and follows it around, damaging each time it passes through. The projectile moves 30 ft each round and stops when it reaches the target's space, dealing 3d8+CL (13+CL) force damage (reflex halves). If the target does not move out of range, it takes the damage repeatedly at the start of each of your turns. The projectile moves in a straight line from its starting position to the target. If it impacts solid terrain during its travel, it dissipates harmlessly. It cannot harm any creature other than the original target. Any attack resulting in a crit returns back to you to be fired again on later turns. Upcast - Every 4 CLs, the spell lasts an additional round.

entries.title: Floating Phalanx
entries.content: Level 3 Arcane Tags: Elusive, Force, Upcast, Martial Action: Standard Focus: 1 melee weapon | Range | 30 ft | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | - | | Save | - | You can cause 3 copies of a held melee weapon made entirely out of magic force to form slowly, float above your head and follow you at a fixed distance. You can launch them at targets of your choosing. Make a Ranged Spell Attack. It deals the damage of a standard melee attack but as force damage. You can fire any number of these weapons in a turn, but none can target the same creature more than once. You can also choose to hold any number of weapons for later turns, where they can be fired as a free action. Any attacks that result in a crit are not consumed and return for use next round. Upcast - Every 4 CLs, conjure an additional copy of the weapon to form above your head.

entries.title: Great Gavel
entries.content: Level 3 Arcane Tags: Force, Upcast Action: Standard | Range | Reach | | -------------- | ------------------------------------------------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature10 ft radius around target creature | | Duration | - | | Save | Reflex | Conjure an oversized gavel from the tip of your staff and slam it down onto a creature within reach as a melee Spell Attack. They take 4d10+CL (22+CL) force damage and are Knocked Down On-hit. Creatures (other than you and the original target) within a 10 ft radius of the target take this damage and are knocked down (reflex halves dmg and negates knockdown). If you Crit with the gavel attack, the creature is also made Clumsy 2. Upcast - Every 2 CLs, get +1 attack.

entries.title: Arcane Cannon
entries.content: Level 4 Arcane Tags: Force, Mana Burn Action: FRA | Range | 120 ft | | -------------- | --------------------------------------- | | Target/AoE | 10 ft radius burst, centered on a point | | Duration | 1 minute | | Save | Reflex | You form a literal cannon made out of shimmering magical force that is immobile and automatically comes loaded with mana from casting this spell. As part of casting the spell, you can fire the cannon, dealing 5d8+CL (22+CL) force damage in a 10 ft radius at the point of impact (reflex halves). These cannon shots count as siege weapons. You or any ally can spend 4 mana as a standard action to again fire the cannon at a new point (still using your CL). But the cannon can only fire once each round. You mana burn 4 mana while this spell is active. When the spell ends, the mana burn reduces to 1.

entries.title: Meteor Shower
entries.content: Level 4 Arcane Tags: Light, Force Action: Standard | Range | 60 ft | | -------------- | -------- | | Target/AoE | Varies | | Duration | 1 minute | | Save | Reflex | Call down ray(s) of light from the heavens onto your foes. The spell’s CL increases by 2 at night with a direct view of the night sky. 40 ft around the area the spell impact becomes bright light for one minute. Shower - Target a 30 ft line in the spells area. Creatures in the area take 5d8+CL (22+CL) force damage (reflex halves). Strike - Target a single creature. The creature takes 5d10+CL (27+CL) force damage and is blinded for 1 round (reflex halves and reduces blinded to Blurred Vision).

entries.title: Night Comet
entries.content: Level 4 Arcane Tags: Force, Upcast Action: Standard | Range | 30 ft | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | - | | Save | - | Make a Ranged spell attack as you fire a large dart of magic. The target takes 5d10+CL (27+CL) force damage. While cast in Darkness, this dart is invisible, making the target DD. If cast as a FRA, its damage dice increases to d12. Upcast - Every 2 CLs, increase range by 5 ft.

entries.title: Moonblast
entries.content: Level 5 Arcane Tags: Force, Recharge Action: Standard | Range | 60 ft | | -------------- | --------------- | | Target/AoE | Self+1 creature | | Duration | 1 round | | Save | - | You gently float into the air and the cradle yourself with energy that takes the shape of a full moon. You enter stasis until the start of your next turn. As a free action at the start of your next turn, launch the moon at an enemy within range. Roll a ranged spell attack to deal 6d8+CL (27+CL) force damage. The creature also gains weakness 5 to force damage for 1 minute.

entries.title: Singularity
entries.content: Level 5 Arcane Tags: Force, Persistent, Concentration Action: Standard | Range | 10 ft | | -------------- | --------------------- | | Target/AoE | A space on the ground | | Duration | 3 rounds | | Save | Fort | Choose a point in space to manifest a dark sphere with a selective gravitational pull. Immediately upon casting, and as a swift action each subsequent turn, 3 creatures (or objects weighing less than a ton) of your choosing within 100 feet of the singularity are pulled 30 feet closer (fort reduces to 10ft). Any creature in an adjacent space is considered touching it, dealing 2d8+CL (9+CL) force damage. Pulling objects can also be used as an attack form dealing 2d8+CL (9+CL) damage of an appropriate type (reflex halves).

entries.title: Wall of Force
entries.content: Level 5 Arcane Tags: Force Action: Standard | Range | 60 ft | | -------------- | ------------------------------------ | | Target/AoE | 20x20ft wall, anchored on the ground | | Duration | - | | Save | Reflex | You create a wall of shimmering force. It is transparent, giving you line of sight, but blocks line of effect and absorbs all attacks that attempt to pass through it. It has 50 hp and dissipates if this hp is lost. A creature can attempt to pass through the wall by making a reflex save as a swift action. Failure deals 2d8+CL (9+CL) force damage to them and prevents them from passing through. A wall of force can be destroyed with Brute Force with a DC of 40.

entries.title: Lunar Eclipse
entries.content: Level 6 Arcane Tags: Dark, Concentration, Recharge, Weather Action: 1 minute | Range | - | | -------------- | --------------------------------- | | Target/AoE | 5 mile radius, centered on caster | | Duration | 5 minutes | | Save | - | You alter the composition of the heavens in such a way to mimic the effect of a lunar eclipse. The radius of the spell is coated in darkness. All non-magical light sources are immediately extinguished and cease to function while in the spells area. Magical light sources that existed in the area previously, that are cast in the radius or are brought into its radius after the fact must at least match your CL or they fizzle. Lunar eclipse ends automatically if solar eclipse is cast in its range, cancelling each other out.

entries.title: The Skies Descend
entries.content: Level 6 Arcane Tags: Force, Recharge Action: Standard | Range | 60 ft | | -------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | | Target/AoE | 20 ft, centered on a point on the ground100 ft, centered on a point on the ground | | Duration | - | | Save | Reflex | You mark a position on the ground and a dark shadow forms over a 20 ft radius, and an bright and shining object hurtling towards it is visible from the sky. At the start of your next turn, a small star lands on this spot, dealing 7d8+CL (31+CL) force damage and dazes for 1 round (reflex halves dmg and reduces daze to Staggered). The star then sends a shockwave out to affect all other enemies within a 100ft radius. They are automatically treated as though they pass their save.

entries.title: Arcane
entries.content: The magic-y magic that has no real life analogue. Primarily focused around dealing force damage using projectiles, conjured weapons and S P A C E magic.

entries.title: Black Light
entries.content: Level 1 Brazzeria (T) Tags: Light Action: Standard | Range | - | | -------------- | ------------------------------------ | | Target/AoE | 5 ft radius aura, centered on caster | | Duration | 10 minutes | | Save | - | Your staff emits light, but it is a dim violet color. The radius of the spell turns darkness into dim light. More importantly, certain substances are highlighted while within this light. Bodily fluids and chemical spills are the most common substances, but savvy alchemists can create ink that also shows up under black light. Black light only functions in Dim Light or Darkness.

entries.title: Bookake
entries.content: Level 1 Brazzeria (T) Tags: - Action: Standard | Range | Reach | | -------------- | ------------------------- | | Target/AoE | 1 book, or similar object | | Duration | - | | Save | - | You apply the mark of Brazzeria and close the book. Between its pages ooze an incredibly effective gooey adhesive that keeps it closed. You can also choose to seal off only a specific section of a book, such as a chapter or a singular page. The caster must apply a password to the book that dispels the goo when spoken. A caster may roll arcana to Identify Magic Item to determine the password (15+CL). An application of universal solvent automatically dispels this effect. You can also roll a DC 40 athletics check to Brute Force it open.

entries.title: Cure Wounds
entries.content: Level 1 Brazzeria (T) Tags: Healing, Upcast Action: Standard | Range | Reach | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | - | | Save | - | Magically close wounds and replace lost blood. The creature gains 5+CL hp and is cured of fatigue. By adding Mana Burn equal to spell level you give it the overheal tag. Upcast - Every 4 CLs allows you to target an additional creature. You can move in between delivering the spell to reach more than one creature.

entries.title: Fasting
entries.content: Level 1 Brazzeria (T) Tags: Curse Action: 1 minute | Range | Reach | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | - | | Save | - | You lock the creature out from all kinds of physical intimacy. The target is physically unable to engage in intimate touch as a divine force repels all attempts to initiate such acts, as well as all attempts made against the target to initiate such acts. No other bodily functions are impaired by this spell. Any effects that have a saving throw with the lewd tag are rolled with advantage. When the spell is cast, a magical key is generated. Inserting this key into the chest of the corresponding creature is the only reliable way to end this spell (don’t lose it!). If the key is destroyed, they spell ends.

entries.title: Hand Holding
entries.content: Level 1 Brazzeria (T) Tags: - Action: 1 minute | Range | Reach | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 ally | | Duration | Until Rest | | Save | - | This spell creates a visible spectral golden hand that wraps around the bonded creature's hand. You can use effects with a range of reach on the ally you are bonded to, targeting them with its beneficial effects, as long as they are within 30 ft and you have line of sight. This functions both ways.

entries.title: Path of Glory
entries.content: Level 1 Brazzeria (T) Tags: Healing, Concentration, Persistent, Upcast Action: Swift | Range | - | | -------------- | ---------------- | | Target/AoE | It's complicated | | Duration | 1 minute | | Save | - | You bless the ground that you walk on. Your movement this turn leaves behind a glowing golden radiance in any space you moved through. Allies that exist in or move through one of these spaces restore 1 hp. This effect cannot happen more than once per turn. Upcast - Every 4 CLs, increase the healing by 1.

entries.title: Unnatural Lust
entries.content: Level 1 Brazzeria (T) Tags: Lewd, Upcast Action: Standard | Range | 30 ft | | -------------- | -------------------------------------- | | Target/AoE | 2 creatures within 30 ft of each other | | Duration | 1 round | | Save | Will | When you cast the spell, you choose two targets. The initial target you inflict the horny upon. The second target doesn't get affected by anything, but rather determines where this horniness is directed towards. The initial target must spend the entirety of its next turn moving towards the secondary target and then caressing, hugging, or kissing them (will negates). The target of this affection becomes clumsy 1. A creature gets a +4 to its save if it would not normally be sexually attracted to the secondary target. By succeeding on a +Monster Lore check against a creature, you can determine what an appropriate secondary target for this spell would be. Upcast - Every 2 CLs, increase the spells range by 5.

entries.title: Circle of Sealing
entries.content: Level 2 Brazzeria (T) Tags: Mana Burn Action: 1 minute | Range | Reach | | -------------- | --------------------------- | | Target/AoE | 1 defeated or willing fiend | | Duration | Until Rest | | Save | - | You move around to inscribe a circle on the ground, then infuse it with mana to cause a tangible but transparent barrier to appear, sealing the fiend inside of it. The fiend is unable to pass through this barrier, or go under/over it. It is anchored and siphoned while inside. Otherwise the fiend may act as they wish. If the barrier is ever damaged from the outside, it automatically breaks, and so care must be taken to protect trapped demons. Brazzerians usually use this spell to interact with the fiend to get to know them better to prepare for Brazzerian Purification. This spell functions only on fiends whose level is lower than (your CL-4)

entries.title: Detect Thots
entries.content: Level 2 Brazzeria (T) Tags: Concentration, Subtle Action: Swift | Range | 30 ft | | -------------- | --------------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature? | | Duration | 10 minute | | Save | Will (see text) | You detect thots. For the purposes of this spell, a thot is someone who (breathes :^) has had more than one sexual partner in their lifetime. Every turn as a standard action you can scan a creature you can see, automatically telling you their propensity for horniness on a scale of 1 to 5. You can also pry further to find out a rough approximation of the number of sexual partners the target has had (will negates). A passed save indicated the target can feel you rooting around in their head. Rough estimation: Zero, one, several, dozens, countless

entries.title: Exhibition
entries.content: Level 2 Brazzeria (T) Tags: Glamer, Upcast Action: Standard | Range | 30 ft | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | 3 rounds | | Save | Will | This spell functions differently if you target an ally or an enemy. Enemy You cause all of the creatures equipment to visually disappear, making them appear naked (will negates). For the duration of the spell the creature treats it as though they have no equipment, and cannot use anything dependent on equipment, such as shield actions, spell casting and weapon special attacks. At the end of each turn, the creature gets a new save to end the effect. They can still pick up new equipment to use, but not something on their person. They still get any passive bonuses to their equipment, such as AC from armor or poise from shields. Ally You can cast this spell on yourself or an ally as a swift action, and its duration increases to 1 hour. It instead only makes your ally appear as though they are naked or scantily clad, but still armed. They can still use any activated equipment. Upcast - If your CL is at least 8... You can target an additional creature.

entries.title: Head Pat
entries.content: Level 2 Brazzeria (T) Tags: Healing Action: Swift | Range | Reach | | -------------- | ------------------------------ | | Target/AoE | 1 creature other than yourself | | Duration | - | | Save | - | You roll a caster level check to immediately end a harmful status effect. The DC is (10+CL of the effect). For non-spell effects its (10+inflicting creature's LvL). If the status is removed, the creature heals 5 +HP. If you do not remove a status effect, it does not heal hp. This spell cannot be used in order to remove permanent status effects, like drain, exhaustion, a curse or an affliction.

entries.title: Simp
entries.content: Level 2 Brazzeria (T) Tags: Curse, Charm Action: Standard | Range | Reach | | -------------- | ------------------------------ | | Target/AoE | 1 defeated or willing creature | | Duration | - | | Save | - | You inflict the curse of the simp on a defeated or willing creature. The creature is permanently charmed. All interactions between you and the creature are inherently positive to the creature. Stepping on them is a massage, insulting them is advice etc. When the creature is asked about you, they have nothing but positive things to say and you can do no wrong. While they are not compelled to do anything that you ask necessarily, they do go out of their way to help in ways that don’t require much effort on their part, and they are very easy to convince. You get advantage on any skill check versus this creature. If you affect the creature with an effect that deals damage or otherwise harms them, then they get a will save against the curse (also applies if they see/find out you told someone else to do so). By going outside and touching grass, the curse ends.

entries.title: True Form
entries.content: Level 2 Brazzeria (T) Tags: - Action: Standard | Range | 30 ft | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | - | | Save | - | You roll a caster level check to immediately dispel a polymorph effect. The DC is (11+CL of the effect) or for non-spell effects (11+creature's lvl). If you are successful, the creature is staggered for one round and cannot use polymorph effects for 24 hours. If you cast this on a creature that is not currently hiding its true form, the spell rebounds and you stagger yourself for 1 round. If you cast this on a helpless or willing creature, it automatically succeeds. When used against a fiendish creature, increase your effective caster level by 5.

entries.title: Bondage
entries.content: Level 3 Brazzeria (T) Tags: Concentration Action: Standard | Range | 30 ft | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | 1 minute | | Save | Reflex | A golden chain is launched from your staff and wraps around a creature (reflex negates). While chained the creature cannot easily move beyond the spell's range and is clumsy 2. As a swift action, the creature can attempt an opposed +athletics check to drag you along with them. If you are untrained in athletics, use your CL as your bonus. If they succeed, you are pulled towards them the distance they move beyond the spells range (max 30 ft) and take 10 poise damage. If this poise breaks you, you are knocked down. You can also attempt this athletics check to yank the creature back.

entries.title: Ecstasy
entries.content: Level 3 Brazzeria (T) Tags: Lewd Action: Standard | Range | 30 ft | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | 2 rounds | | Save | Will | You fill a creatures mind with horny thoughts, causing them to shiver and writhe with pleasure. The creature is dazed for 1 round and staggered the round after (will reduces to stagger 1 round). If the target creature could reasonably be sexually attracted to the caster (aka, not gay) then the DC is increased by 1. If the caster is naked, or basically naked, the DC is increased by 1. These DC increases stack. A creature can only be targeted by a spell that makes them horny once every few minutes.

entries.title: Hell and Back
entries.content: Level 3 Brazzeria (T) Tags: Teleportation Action: 1 minute | Range | Reach | | -------------- | -------- | | Target/AoE | - | | Duration | See text | | Save | - | You generate a portal that leads to the demon realm for 1 minute. A maximum of a dozen creatures can go through the portal. At any point within the next 24 hours, you can spend another minute to recreate this portal to bring you back to your original position. The portal’s destination is always on stable ground in an area without any immediate natural hazards (you don’t spawn in lava pits). You must have an idea of where you would like to go in order to use this spell. Roll a +Planes check and subtract your result from 40. That is how many miles you appear off course from your desired location. The minimum distance is 1 mile off course. If you are interrupted during the cast time when attempting to recreate the portal or you stay for longer than 24 hours, you cannot use this spell to return back to the material plane and must find other means. This spell does not require line of sight.

entries.title: Regenerate
entries.content: Level 3 Brazzeria (T) Tags: Healing Action: 1 minute | Range | Reach | | -------------- | ------------------ | | Target/AoE | 1 willing creature | | Duration | - | | Save | - | You infuse a creature with incredible healing powers. They instantly regenerate damaged organs/limbs. Severed limbs in the creature's possession are automatically reattached. Destroyed or misplaced limbs are instead regenerated over 1 minute, during which the creature is stunned. The creature is drained 5 after casting. You can Mana Burn 3 to decrease the action to cast this spell to a standard action and it does not stun the target creature.

entries.title: Golden Shower
entries.content: Level 4 Brazzeria (T) Tags: Healing, Concentration, Persistent, Holy Action: Standard | Range | - | | -------------- | -------------------------------------- | | Target/AoE | 20 ft radius burst, centered on caster | | Duration | 1 minute | | Save | - | A fluffy yellow cloud appears 30 ft overhead and soothing droplets of gold rain wash over nearby allies, and burn nearby enemies. All allied creatures recover 4 hp each turn and all enemies take 4 holy damage each turn for 1 minute (totaling 40 healing or damage over the full duration). This healing/dmg occurs at the end of each of your turns. If an enemy is defeated by golden shower, they cannot die from this damage, and they no longer take holy damage from the rain. The cloud itself does not obscure sight.

entries.title: Grace of Champions
entries.content: Level 4 Brazzeria (T) Tags: Healing, Buff, Holy Action: Free | Range | - | | -------------- | -------- | | Target/AoE | Self | | Duration | 1 minute | | Save | - | You conjure a golden spectral champion of Brazzeria that mirrors your movements and enhances your actions. Whenever you target allies with a beneficial effect, you can choose to also heal them (or one of them for AoE effects) for d4+CL (2+CL), or 2d6+CL (7+CL) if they are within your natural reach. Whenever you target an enemy with a harmful effect, you can choose to also strike them with holy energy (or one of them for AoE effects), dealing d4+CL (2+CL) holy dmg, or 2d6+CL (7+CL) holy damage if they are within your natural reach. Either effect requires a swift action. The spirit will also protect you in your hour of need. If you fail a will save, you can choose to instead pass. If you are defeated, you can instead choose to drop to 1 hp. Either effect requires an immediate action and ends the spell.

entries.title: Holy Nova
entries.content: Level 4 Brazzeria (T) Tags: Holy, Healing Action: Swift | Range | - | | -------------- | -------------------------------------- | | Target/AoE | 30 ft radius burst, centered on caster | | Duration | - | | Save | Reflex | Unleash a quick burst of radiance to heal your allies and damage your foes. Allies heal (CL) hp and enemies take (CL) holy damage (reflex halves).

entries.title: Sacrificial Heal
entries.content: Level 4 Brazzeria (T) Tags: Healing Action: Standard | Range | Reach | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | - | | Save | - | Sacrifice any amount of your hp and transfer it to another creature. Also transfers this spell's mana cost to the target. If you choose to Mana Burn, you can even heal mana burn from the creature an amount equal to how much you burn.

entries.title: Waves of Ecstasy
entries.content: Level 5 Brazzeria (T) Tags: Lewd Action: Standard | Range | - | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 30 ft cone | | Duration | 2 rounds | | Save | Will | Functions as Ecstasy, but in a 30 ft cone.

entries.title: Power Word Cum
entries.content: Level 6 Brazzeria (T) Tags: Lewd, Recharge Action: Standard | Range | 30 ft | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | 2 rounds | | Save | - | You fill a creatures mind with horny thoughts, causing them to shiver and writhe with pleasure. The extent of which this affects them is determined by whether or not the creature is attracted to you. If the target creature could reasonably be sexually attracted to the caster (aka, different gender and not gay) then the creature is dazed for 1 round, then staggered the round after. If the creature isn't compatible (same gender and not gay etc) or doesn't experience horny (like mindless creatures and constructs) then it is staggered for 1 round.

entries.title: Brazzeria (T)
entries.content: Brazzeria embodies the struggle people face when their beliefs clash with reality and their desires clash with their duties. She has a reputation for normalizing what would otherwise be considered taboo in most other types of relationships. In the eyes of her followers, almost no evil is too great to be beyond redemption. As such, it isn’t uncommon to find her followers frequenting the same place as fiends on the mortal plane. It is a constant battle of wills; satisfying your deepest desires while avoiding the descent into deepest depths of profanity. Brazzeria spells are a mix between useful spells for battling fiends, healing and horny spells.

entries.title: Fog Cloud
entries.content: Level 1 Clairvoyance (T) Tags: Air, Water, Concentration, Upcast Action: Standard | Range | 60 ft | | -------------- | ----------------------------------------------- | | Target/AoE | 20 ft radius, centered on a point on the ground | | Duration | 1 minute | | Save | - | Cause a fog cloud to roll into the area and linger for a bit. Creatures outside of the fog cloud can only see 5 ft into it. Creatures inside of the fog cloud can only see 5 ft in front of them. Even still, such creatures have Partial Concealment. Creatures beyond 5 ft of fog have Total Concealment. Upcast - If your CL is at least 12... The fog becomes much thicker. Creatures treat it as difficult terrain. It can also soften falls.

entries.title: Lightning Rod
entries.content: Level 1 Clairvoyance (T) Tags: Prepared, Zap Action: - | Range | - | | -------------- | --- | | Target/AoE | - | | Duration | - | | Save | - | As an immediate action, you can choose to direct any effects with the zap tag to yourself, provided you are within range 30 ft the effect's origin or destination. You can use yourself as a target for any effects that require multiple creatures to chain zap effects and are immune to allied zap effects without reducing the number of creatures it effects.

entries.title: Rain Cloud
entries.content: Level 1 Clairvoyance (T) Tags: Water, Concentration Action: Standard | Range | 60 ft | | -------------- | -------------------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature or object | | Duration | 3 rounds | | Save | - | You cause a dark cloud to appear above the target and immediately it starts to poor on it, making it Wet. At the start of your next 2 turns, it moves up to 15 feet to the same target again. Any creature in a space underneath the cloud becomes wet. If you spend a standard action concentrating on the spell, you can change the target, or manually move it around 15 ft. This also extends the duration by 1 round. If the current target is Defeated, the creature takes total cover or otherwise leaves the battle, the cloud will instead move to target the nearest enemy.

entries.title: Shock Shield
entries.content: Level 1 Clairvoyance (T) Tags: Zap Buff Action: Free Focus: 1 shield | Range | - | | -------------- | -------- | | Target/AoE | Self | | Duration | 1 minute | | Save | - | Electrify a held shield. When you take the block action, the spell ends and you zap the attacker. The creature takes (CL) zap damage.

entries.title: Storm Cloud
entries.content: Level 1 Clairvoyance (T) Tags: Zap, Concentration, Persistent Action: Standard | Range | 60 ft | | -------------- | -------------------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature or object | | Duration | 3 rounds | | Save | - | You cause a dark cloud to appear above the target and it immediately shocks the target with a bolt of lightning for 2d8+CL (9+CL) zap damage (reflex halves). At the start of your next 2 turns, it moves up to 15 feet towards the same target again. Any enemy in a space underneath the cloud during this movement takes the same damage (reflex halves). If you spend a standard action concentrating on the spell, you can change the target, or manually move it around 15 ft. This also extends the duration by 1 round. If the current target is defeated, the creature takes total cover or otherwise leaves the battle, the cloud will instead move to target the nearest enemy.

entries.title: Storm Stomp
entries.content: Level 1 Clairvoyance (T) Tags: Air Action: Swift | Range | - | | -------------- | ------------------------------- | | Target/AoE | 5 ft radius, centered on caster | | Duration | - | | Save | Fort | You take a step forward and whip up winds around you knocking any creatures within range back 5 feet (fort negates).

entries.title: Achoo!
entries.content: Level 2 Clairvoyance (T) Tags: Air, Elusive Action: Standard | Range | Reach | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | - | | Save | Fort | Your nose twitches before you unleash a mighty sneeze.
