You knock yourself and a creature back 5 feet in opposite directions. They are staggered for one round and take 2d8+CL (9+CL) crush damage, or two rounds with 3d8+CL (13+CL) crush damage if they impact a solid surface (fort halves dmg and negates stagger). Upcast - Every 4 CLs, increase the range you knock you and your target back by 5 ft.

entries.title: Finger Gun
entries.content: Level 2 Clairvoyance (T) Tags: Air, Upcast Action: Standard | Range | 30 ft | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | - | | Save | Fort | You point your finger at someone and then snap your fingers with your thumb pointing towards the sky. You unleash a powerful concentrated stream of air at a creature, requiring a Ranged Spell Attack. The attack deals 3d8+CL (13+CL) crush damage. The creature is staggered for 1 round (fort negates). Upcast - Every 2 CLs, increase the spells range by 5 ft.

entries.title: Heavens' Vengeance
entries.content: Level 2 Clairvoyance (T) Tags: Buff, Zap, Upcast Action: Swift | Range | 30 ft | | -------------- | -------- | | Target/AoE | Self | | Duration | 1 minute | | Save | - | A dark cloud spawns above your head that crackles with electricity. It is angered whenever you take damage, and deals 3 zap damage to the creature that inflicted the damage if it is within 30 ft. This can only happen once each turn. Upcast - Every 2 CLs, increase the range the spell can retaliate from by 5 ft.

entries.title: Static Field
entries.content: Level 2 Clairvoyance (T) Tags: Buff, Zap Action: Swift | Range | - | | -------------- | -------- | | Target/AoE | Self | | Duration | 1 minute | | Save | - | While this spell is active, you crackle with electricity. Your melee attacks deal an additional 2 zap damage and apply a mark to enemies On-hit. As a standard action while this spell persists, you can end it with one big stream of electric current. Marked creatures you have line of effect to automatically take 3d8+CL (13+CL) zap damage, even if you can't see them. This gets rid of the mark and requires you to re-apply it for subsequent casts.

entries.title: Wind Wall
entries.content: Level 2 Clairvoyance (T) Tags: Air, Concentration Action: Standard | Range | 30 ft | | -------------- | -------- | | Target/AoE | Varies | | Duration | 1 minute | | Save | - | All ranged attacks passing through the wall take a -4 penalty to Attack unless they originate from a +Siege Weapon. Exceptionally small creatures such as insects cannot pass through the wall. The wall can also reasonably protect against things stopped by wind like swarms or harmful gases. Moving through the wall costs 15 ft of movement. Creatures that opt to stand inside of a wind wall are clumsy 2 until they exit. You can choose to make the wall in 2 shapes. Wall - 20x40 ft rectangle Castle - 10 ft cube

entries.title: Call Lightning Storm
entries.content: Level 3 Clairvoyance (T) Tags: Concentration, Upcast, Zap Action: Standard | Range | 60 ft | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | 1 minute | | Save | Fort | As part of casting the spell, and as a standard action every turn after, you call down a lightning bolt to strike a specific creature within 60 ft of you. The creature takes 2d8+CL (9+CL) zap damage (fort halves). If cast outdoors, the damage dice increases to d10. Upcast - Every 4 CLs, target an additional creature.

entries.title: Eye of the Storm
entries.content: Level 3 Clairvoyance (T) Tags: Buff, Air Action: Swift | Range | - | | -------------- | -------- | | Target/AoE | Self | | Duration | 1 minute | | Save | - | You surround yourself with a tempest that you can command. You get advantage on saves against air effects and +2 AC against ranged attacks. Spaces within your natural reach are considered difficult terrain. Harmful gasses, smoke, fog etc is blown directly away from you, clearing areas you move into. As a standard action while the spell persists, you can make an Ranged Attack against a creature within 30 ft with a gust of wind. This attack can be a Melee Attack if made against a creature within reach. It deals 2d8+CL (9+CL) crush damage and an equal amount of poise damage. If this breaks the creatures poise, you can choose to affect it as though you had successfully poise broke them with a shove or Topple.

entries.title: Lightning Bolt
entries.content: Level 3 Clairvoyance (T) Tags: Zap, Upcast Action: Standard | Range | 30 ft | | -------------- | -------- | | Target/AoE | See text | | Duration | - | | Save | Fort | Lightning erupts from your fingertips and bounces around the battlefield from enemy to enemy. You initially target a single creature, then the lightning bounces from that target to another target of your choosing (that you can see) within 5 ft. You affect a total of 2 creatures. Each creature affected takes 4d8+CL (18+CL) zap damage and is staggered for one round (fort halves damage and negates stagger). Upcast - Every 4 CLs, increase the number of creatures targeted by 1, and the distance they can be from each other by 5 ft.

entries.title: Storm Step
entries.content: Level 3 Clairvoyance (T) Tags: Air Action: Standard | Range | - | | -------------- | ------------- | | Target/AoE | Natural Reach | | Duration | - | | Save | Fort | The direction of the wind changes to briefly haste you. As part of casting the spell, dash and disengage. Creatures within your natural reach at the end of your turn take 3d8+CL (13+CL) crush dmg (fort halves) and poise damage.

entries.title: Suck
entries.content: Level 3 Clairvoyance (T) Tags: Air, Concentration Action: Standard | Range | Details Vary | | -------------- | ------------ | | Target/AoE | - | | Duration | - | | Save | - | You take a breath so deep that you can use it to inhale enormous quantities of air in a 40 ft radius around you. This is best used against clouds of smoke, fog or poison. As long as you concentrate, you can hold this air in your massive cheeks without any harm to yourself. When you cease concentration, you can exhale these gases as a 30 ft cone attack if they were harmful, inflicting whatever negative effect they had using your save DC. Regardless of what you exhale, the gas dissipates immediately after the attack.

entries.title: Temperamental Tempest
entries.content: Level 3 Clairvoyance (T) Tags: Air, Concentration, Persistent Action: Standard | Range | - | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 30 ft line | | Duration | 3 rounds | | Save | Fort | You create a tornado about the height of a man that rapidly moves around the battlefield tossing around foes. Immediately after casting and for an additional 2 rounds at the start of your turns, it barrels in a line of your choosing 30 feet. Enemies within its path are tossed in a random direction 10 ft, take 2d6+CL (7+CL) crush damage and are knocked down (fort negates dmg, knockback and knocked down).

entries.title: Rushing Winds
entries.content: Level 4 Clairvoyance (T) Tags: Air, Elusive Action: FRA | Range | - | | -------------- | -------------------- | | Target/AoE | 60 ft line, see text | | Duration | - | | Save | Fort | Fly rapidly in a direction 60 feet. Any creatures within 10 feet of you during this journey are blown in the direction of your movement 20 ft, take 6d8+CL (27+CL) crush damage and are knocked down (fort halves damage and negates push back/knockdown).

entries.title: Thunderlord's Decree
entries.content: Level 5 Clairvoyance (T) Tags: Zap, Recharge Action: Standard | Range | 60 ft | | -------------- | ----------- | | Target/AoE | All enemies | | Duration | 1 minute | | Save | Fort | Your shout echoes like thunder across the battlefield as you call down dozens of lightning bolts to strike all enemies you can see within range. Creatures take 6d8+CL (27+CL) zap damage and are staggered for 1 round (fort halves damage and negates stagger).

entries.title: Tempest
entries.content: Level 6 Clairvoyance (T) Tags: Recharge, Air, Weather Action: 1 minute | Range | - | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 mile | | Duration | 10 minutes | | Save | - | You bend the wind to your will, and you will it to destroy. Over the course of the cast time, the weather worsens, giving creatures the opportunity to run and hide. Wind speeds increase to the extent where even heavy objects get picked up and tossed around. All but the most sound structures are damaged and weak structures are outright destroyed within minutes. You gain a fly speed (60) while within the area of the spell and cannot be made Clumsy. Other flying creatures are automatically clumsy 4 and all ranged attacks have a -4 penalty to attack. Creatures without proper protection, that don't take shelter and lack proficiency in the +Athletics skill are whipped up by the winds and tossed 30 feet in a random direction every turn, taking 2d6+CL (7+CL) crush and poise damage. Creatures that take shelter are generally safe, while those that have protection and/or have athletics can roll checks (spell DC) each turn they move through an open area affected by this spell or they are tossed. In areas where numerous loose objects are plentiful, you can use a standard action to command the winds to blow them at your enemies. The objects deal 4d6 (14+CL) physical damage (reflex halves), with the AoE being determined by the size of the object (max huge). You are immune to the effects of the wind and any objects that might get tossed your way.

entries.title: Clairvoyance (T)
entries.content: Clairvoyance Clairvoyance is leader and mother to all cloud giants. She and her children dominate the mountainous northern region of the world plagued by all manner of windstorms and blizzards. She covets wealth in all of its forms and regularly uses her power and influence to steal from those that think they can live in her cold and desolate corner of the world. Clairvoyance’s spells are centered around the manipulation of wind, storms and lightning.

entries.title: Crimson Confession
entries.content: Level 1 Corruption Tags: Curse Action: 1 minute | Range | Reach | | -------------- | ------------------------------------- | | Target/AoE | 1 object with a size of up to 5x5x5ft | | Duration | - | | Save | Will | You touch an object and infuse it with a curse to help you keep track of creatures who mess with it. When you lay this curse you can name creatures that circumvent the curse out loud. Afterwords, if any creature touches or directly moves the object, including through gloves, telekinesis or a long stick, their skin turns a bright crimson color (will negates). If their skin was already crimson, they turn blue. Once a creature has passed their save against this effect, they are immune to further touches against the same cast. If you cast this spell on an object while you already have a crimson confession active, the previous one disappears. The creature must either admit to touching the object to the caster, or they must manually cover their body in paint of their previous skin color to remove the curse.

entries.title: Feast and Famine
entries.content: Level 1 Corruption Tags: Healing, Overheal Action: Standard | Range | 30 ft | | -------------- | ---------------- | | Target/AoE | Inanimate Plants | | Duration | - | | Save | - | You wave your staff in a circle to absorb the life from any inanimate plants in the area. You heal yourself for 4+CL hp and automatically end all bleed effects. This kills the plants. Note: This spell only functions if you are not in a form of desolate terrain. Desolate could include places like arctic terrain, desert the deep ocean or many urban areas. If it's iffy, you can always roll a Luck Check! (with a DC dependent on terrain)

entries.title: Fish out of Water
entries.content: Level 1 Corruption Tags: Curse Action: Standard | Range | 30 ft | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | - | | Save | Will | Curse a creature so they can no longer breath air, and must inhale water in order to breath. Unless there is a sizable water source nearby to submerge themselves in, cursed creatures must spend a swift action each turn to breathe, dunking their heads in puddles, or guzzling water. They must have some form of liquid on their person or nearby in order to do this otherwise they begin to suffocate. While suffocating, the creature is silenced. If they end their turn suffocating, they are drained 5. This spell has no effect on creatures that are aquatic, amphibious, or that do not need to breathe (such as a skeleton). In order to end this curse, a creature must drink a glass of iced tea. Note: If its iffy as to whether or not there's water sufficient enough to stave suffocation, roll a luck check for the victims, with a DC dependent on terrain.

entries.title: Life Drinker
entries.content: Level 1 Corruption Tags: Buff Action: Swift | Range | - | | -------------- | -------------------------------- | | Target/AoE | 15 ft radius, centered on caster | | Duration | 1 minute | | Save | - | You emanate an aura that absorbs energy from creatures attempting to heal. This aura follows you as you move. Creatures other than you are bone chilled while within this aura, and for 1 round after they leave it. Upcast - If your CL is at least 12... You also gain any healing you negate from the bone chill you inflict with this aura.

entries.title: Never Lucky
entries.content: Level 1 Corruption Tags: Upcast Action: Standard | Range | 30 ft | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | - | | Save | - | Cause a creature to be unlucky. They next time they roll an Attack or saving throw, they roll it at Disadvantage. Outside of combat, this has the subtle tag, but only affects skill checks, ability checks and luck checks. Upcast - If your CL is at least 8.. The creature's next 2 rolls are at disadvantage.

entries.title: Poison the Well
entries.content: Level 1 Corruption Tags: Curse, Upcast Action: 1 minute Focus: One gold piece | Range | Reach | | -------------- | -------------- | | Target/AoE | 1 water source | | Duration | - | | Save | - | You stand at the edge of a well and fill a coin with malefic energy. By dropping the coin into the well, it subtly causes it to become poisonous. Creatures that drink from it become drained 6 (fort halves). This curse can be removed by removing the coin from the well. Upcast - Weird scaling... At CL 4 - Affects small bodies of water, such as lakes and creeks. At CL 8 - Affects large lakes and 1 mile of river. At CL 16 - Affects an entire river, regardless of its length.

entries.title: Prisoner's Brand
entries.content: Level 1 Corruption Tags: Curse Action: 1 minute Focus: A drawing of the brand | Range | Reach | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | - | | Save | - | You touch the creature and apply the brand used as the focus component. It is slightly uncomfortable when applied, but does not cause damage. You are constantly aware of the direction of this creature. You can brand multiple creatures, but you cannot tell which creature is which. Petting an eagle removes this curse and its associated brand. Other types of freedom-related creatures can potentially suffice.

entries.title: Soggy Curse
entries.content: Level 1 Corruption Tags: Curse Action: 1 Standard Action | Range | 60 ft | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | - | | Save | Will | You place a curse on a creature whose power can only be used to minorly inconvenience a person. You cannot use this curse to provide any real form of mechanical benefit, like inflicting Status or Damage. Otherwise, the sky is the limit. This curse gets its name from the spiteful wizard who loved to inflict people with the curse of soggy socks. As such, this curse is removed by buying or making a new pair of socks.

entries.title: Enfeeble
entries.content: Level 2 Corruption Tags: Curse Action: Standard | Range | 60 ft | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | - | | Save | Will | With heavy arms, the creature struggles to bring the full force of their attacks and spells. Whenever the creature deals damage, that damage is decreased by 2 (unless it is true damage). Damage over time effects are not affected by this curse. While a non-minion creature within 60 ft is afflicted with this curse (and you are its caster), you get advantage on fortitude saves. In order to remove this curse, a creature must "sheathe" and "unsheathe" a weapon 3 times without doing anything else. In combat this requires a FRA.

entries.title: Harvester
entries.content: Level 2 Corruption Tags: Curse Action: 1 minute Focus: 1 inert mana crystal | Range | Reach | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | - | | Save | - | The curse of the harvester is a tool used by creatures to remotely collect mana. Because of the cast time, the creature must either be willing or defeated to be the target of this spell. You link a creature to the inert mana crystal used as a focus. You also specify a time of day. Every day at the specified time, the target is Mana Burned until they only have 1 mana left, as though they had donated mana. The harvester receives (this mana value-1), which they can use as they see fit. This curse can only be removed by destroying the inert mana crystal used as the focus for the initial casting. The harvest-ee can innately tell if a crystal is bound to them by looking at it, feeling it etc.

entries.title: Retributive Reparations
entries.content: Level 2 Corruption Tags: Curse Action: Standard | Range | 30 ft | | -------------- | ---------------------------- | | Target/AoE | 1 unattended handheld object | | Duration | - | | Save | Will | Curse an object to reject its owner, unless that owner is you. The first time a creature picks up this item it is inflicted with a curse (will negates). The curse causes them to be unable to separate from the item, unless it gives it back to you, and makes it exhausted them until it does. If the creature tries to use the item, like unlocking a door with a cursed key or swinging a cursed weapon, they become drained 5. The creature doesn't need to hold the item per se, but it does need to be on their person. If they try something clever like putting the key in a backpack, then taking the backpack off, the backpack defies logic and stays on, just like the key would. The creature can return the cursed item to you as a swift action, removing the curse. Alternatively, if you spend 1 week more than 1 mile away from this creature, the curse naturally fades.

entries.title: Violent Accident
entries.content: Level 2 Corruption Tags: Curse, Subtle Action: Standard | Range | 30 ft | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | - | | Save | Reflex | Note: You must speak directly to a creature to inflict this curse, or otherwise have its attention. You inflict an omen upon the creature. At some point within the next 24 hours, they will encounter a dangerous scenario that will deal 20 damage to them (reflex negates). The damage type could be something falling on them for crush damage, getting struck by lightning for zap damage etc. A creature trained in arcana that is the target of this spell can identify it (DC 17). If successful, it can diffuse the omen by treating you with kindness. If a creature trained in arcana witnesses the deadly effect of violent accident, they can make an arcana check to identify the origin of the effect. If they happened to be present when it was inflicted, they also are able to identify who cast it.

entries.title: Wither
entries.content: Level 2 Corruption Tags: Concentration Action: Standard | Range | 60 ft | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | 3 rounds | | Save | Fort | Cause a creature to atrophy over 3 rounds. This has no immediate effect, but at the start of the creatures turn it withers (fort negates). The first failure fatigues the creature and reduces their speed by 15. The second and third failure reduce their speed by an additional 15. This effect continues for three turns, regardless if the creature passes its save (unless it has Stalwart).

entries.title: Caught Red-Handed
entries.content: Level 3 Corruption Tags: Curse Action: Standard | Range | Unlimited | | -------------- | --------- | | Target/AoE | 1 corpse | | Duration | 2 weeks | | Save | - | Drawing upon the spiritual link between a corpse and its killer, you reach out across space to brand the killer of the corpse you targeted with this spell, creating a physical manifestation of the killer’s guilt. The killer’s right hand is stained a crimson red, and this stain can’t be removed (though it can be hidden by mundane means such as by wearing gloves). If the killer doesn’t have a right hand for some reason, the spell instead causes a red stain in the shape of a hand to appear elsewhere on the creature’s body (typically on the arm). This spell affects only the creature that directly killed the targeted corpse. Other individuals that contributed to the target’s death are unaffected. If the victim did not die from violence or died indirectly (for instance, if the creature died from suffocating after someone trapped it in a room filling with water), then the spell fizzles. Once a corpse has been the target for red hand of the killer, it can never act as the focus for another casting of red hand of the killer, causing the spell to fizzle immediately if tried.

entries.title: Corrupting Mist
entries.content: Level 3 Corruption Tags: Poison, Persistent, Concentration, Upcast Action: Standard | Range | 60 ft | | -------------- | ----------------------------------------------- | | Target/AoE | 20 ft radius, centered on a point on the ground | | Duration | 1 minute | | Save | Fort | You cause a purple or green mist to spread over and area. Creatures inside cough and wheeze, becoming sickened 1 the first round of exposure. If the creature is already sickened, then they instead take 3d8+CL (13+CL) poison damage (fort halves). You have Immunity to your own cast of corrupting mist. Upcast - If your CL is at least 12... You can increase the duration of the spell to 1 hour. Every round it persists, it spreads an additional 10 ft. It only spreads in one direction 180 degrees. To do the math for you... 100 ft per minute 6000 ft in an hour

entries.title: Empathy
entries.content: Level 3 Corruption Tags: Curse Action: Standard | Range | 60 ft | | -------------- | ----------------------- | | Target/AoE | 1 victim and one vessel | | Duration | - | | Save | Will | Choose two creatures within range and decide one to be the victim and the other to be the vessel. For the victim (will negates). Any time the vessel takes damage, the victim takes half that damage as True Damage. This damage does not reduce the damage the vessel takes, only adding an additional instance of damage to the victim. To remove the curse, the victim and the vessel must wear some type of footwear owned by the other. For unlucky souls to be empathetically bound to a creature that doesn't or can't wear footwear, they must kiss. Each requires a standard action (and cooperation). Example. Vessel takes 9 damage from an attack (after all damage modifiers like, saving throws and DR). So vessel takes 9 damage. Victim takes 4 true damage. BASICALLY, at no point is the damage reduces or split between the creature. One creature essentially takes damage every time another creature takes damage.

entries.title: Vulnerability
entries.content: Level 3 Corruption Tags: Curse Action: Standard | Range | 60 ft | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | - | | Save | Will | The curse softens hide, weakens bones and lowers the creatures pain threshold. While afflicted with this curse, a creature has weakness 2 to all damage (will negates). To remove this curse, a creature has to give themselves a paper cut or break a glass window.

entries.title: Curse of Blindness
entries.content: Level 4 Corruption Tags: Curse Action: Standard | Range | 30 ft | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | - | | Save | Will | The target's vision wanes permanently as the world disappears around it. It is blinded (will reduces effect to blurred vision for one round). Removed by consuming the raw eyes of a freshly killed creature.

entries.title: Mobile Home
entries.content: Level 4 Corruption Tags: - Action: 1 hour Focus: 1 proof of ownership to house/land (see note below) | Range | Reach | | -------------- | ------- | | Target/AoE | 1 house | | Duration | - | | Save | - | Give new life to your house! You spend the cast time of this spell wandering around your house, placing magic sigils on floors walls and ceilings. During this wandering you assign a passphrase to activate the magic. At the end of the cast time, you activate all of them and they fade away, causing the house to slowly animate. Whenever you speak the passphrase, the house grows legs, either literally from nothing, using the roots underneath the house or whatnot. Your house now functions as a rock, but it moves much more slowly (40 speed, or ~10 mph our of combat) and obviously has a lot more storage space, scaling with the size of your residence. Its +HP is (10*CL). If it is defeated, your house immediately crashes onto the ground, causing severe damage to anything inside. Creatures inside when this happens take 20 crush and poise damage. This also happens if your house is subject to an effect that dispels it. Your animated house has a INT score of +0, and it understands any languages you know. It can perceive the world around it as though it had eyes and ears, and can decide on its own whether or not it wants to let people into its doors, furniture, windows etc. It still obeys its master at the end of the day. While on the move, objects within the house may jiggle around as the house takes its giant steps, but they will not fall off their surfaces. Creatures can even comfortably rest within the moving house. When not in motion, the house's legs will sink into the ground, appearing in all ways as a normal house until it meddles with someone trying to get in or steal your things. It can perform the following action once each turn as a standard action, using your DC. Banish Su teleportation - Forcefully eject a creature out of the house (will negates). You can only have one Mobile Home activated at once. The homes may change, but the animating force of the home remembers you regardless of where it inhabits. Note: The spell asks you to have a deed of ownership to make it so you can't just steal people's houses with this spell. If you made it yourself, or obviously received it as some kind of gift/prize without documentation, that should suffice.

entries.title: Rotting Alliance
entries.content: Level 4 Corruption Tags: Curse, Upcast Action: Standard | Range | 60 ft | | -------------- | ----------- | | Target/AoE | 2 creatures | | Duration | - | | Save | Will | You curse 2 creatures with a rot that accelerates their demise when they exist near one another. When a creature with this curse exists within 15 feet of an ally that is also cursed during its turn, it takes 4d6 (14) necrotic damage and is drained 5. This is a persistent effect. Each cast of this spell is not mutually exclusive. Multiple castings of this spell have the potential to include more creatures in this effect. This curse is removed by the cursed creatures all signing their name on something like paper or parchment without damaging each other in the process, and then burning it. Upcast - Every 4 CLs, increase the number of creature's targeted by 1.

entries.title: Crystalline Prison
entries.content: Level 5 Corruption Tags: Curse Action: 10 minutes Material: 1000g of geodes per LvL of the target | Range | 30 ft | | -------------- | ------------------- | | Target/AoE | 1 helpless creature | | Duration | - | | Save | - | This spell used to seal people away, usually powerful individuals, so their mana can be harvested for large scale projects. When cast, you start a complex series of incantations to cover a creature in the material component of the spell, causing them to be Entombed permanently. Once complete the creature can do little more than wiggle slightly. They can hear muffled sounds from the outside, but not to an extent that what they hear is intelligible. The creature's weight doubles and they are frozen in whatever pose they were sealed in. Most details about the creature's appearance are lost on the rather crude rocky covering, making it hard to identify them. While in this state, they are treated as willing subjects for an Mana Donation.

entries.title: Ranni's Jar
entries.content: Level 5 Corruption Tags: Curse Action: Standard Focus: A mundane glass jar | Range | 30 ft | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | - | | Save | Will | This is a spell often used to capture people and keep prisoners. You pop open the jar and you suck a creature into it. They are shrunk down to diminutive size and imprisoned in the jar (will reduces to Sickened 1). The imprisoned creature has no ability to escape the jar via any kind of magic (including Teleportation) or attacking the jar from the inside. Any such effects automatically fizzles. They can still take any other kind of actions they wish (to heal, buff or communicate their imprisonment) but through no action of their own can they escape. While the creature inside has no way to escape, all it takes for them to return to their usual size and exact vengeance is to destroy the jar. The jar cannot be fortified to increase its durability, magically or otherwise. As such, it is easily broken. If the jar is unattended, any attack will suffice. If it is being held on someone's person, you must use +Sleight of Hand to steal it or Poise break the creature to knock it free and cause it to shatter. There are a handful of conveniences that make keeping the creature prisoner convenient. The top to the jar only functions for the creature kept inside, allowing the captor to slip in objects such as food or water. This also conveniently lets the creature breathe. The jar only muffles the sounds made from the inside, so special measures would need to be taken for rowdy or supernaturally loud prisoners.

entries.title: Creative Curse
entries.content: Level 6 Corruption Tags: Curse Action: Standard | Range | 60 ft | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | - | | Save | Will | You can inflict a curse upon a creature with very few limitations, listed below. - It cannot deal +HP damage - It cannot inflict a Status effect - It cannot match a pre-existing curse Spell - Once you inflict a particular type of curse with this spell, you cannot inflict it again, or anything similar (ie "you can't get within 10 ft of me" then the next time its "you can't get within 15 ft of me") You can choose to remove the curse at an instant action at any time, or apply a very convoluted method of removing the curse. Other than that, it requires a DC 40 +Medicine check, or some type of incredibly powerful GM Magic.

entries.title: Corruption
entries.content: Demons, fey, undead and all manners of evil mages manufacture malefic methods of harming their enemies and the world around them. The corruption tree focuses on making everybody else miserable. Curses are their favorite method of delivering this suffering. Curses are permanent debilitating status effects that sometimes have a degree of freedom over the types of curses are inflicted. All but the most powerful of curses have some finite, actionable and often unusual way to lift them (which can be found out by using the "identify affliction" function of +Medicine

entries.title: Blanket of Snow
entries.content: Level 1 Cryomancy Tags: - Action: Standard | Range | 60 ft | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | - | | Save | Reflex | A shadow appears beneath the target, and a blanket of snow falls upon them immediately after. The creature takes 2d8+CL (9+CL) crush damage and has to spend 30 ft of movement to dig themselves out of the snow (reflex halves dmg and getting buried). While buried, the creature has its speed reduced to 0, has resistance to fire damage and has Cover. Creatures they attack while buried also have cover.

entries.title: Frost Armor
entries.content: Level 1 Cryomancy Tags: Upcast Action: Swift | Range | - | | -------------- | ------- | | Target/AoE | Self | | Duration | 1 round | | Save | - | You cover yourself in a thin protective ice barrier. You gain resistance to the next instance of +HP damage that is not crush, slash or pierce. Once you take damage from any source, minus damage over time effects like bleed or self inflicted damage, the ice barrier shatters and frost armor ends. If you are ablaze when you cast this spell, instead of the usual benefits, put out the flames. Upcast - If your CL is at least 16... The resistance granted by this spell does not go away until you take crush, slash or pierce damage.

entries.title: Frost Breath
entries.content: Level 1 Cryomancy Tags: Frost, Upcast Action: Standard | Range | - | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 10 ft cone | | Duration | - | | Save | Fort | You exhale and fill the area with ice cold air. Creatures inside take 2d8+CL (9+CL) frost dmg and are made frosty (fort halves dmg and negates frosty). Upcast - Every 2 CLs, increase the size of the cone by 5 ft.

entries.title: Ice Skating
entries.content: Level 1 Cryomancy Tags: Buff Action: Swift | Range | Reach | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | 10 minutes | | Save | - | You coat the bottoms of your feet/footwear etc. with ice, allowing you to slide along cold terrain with ease. While moving across ice or snow, your gain a "skating speed" of 40 or equal to your Land Speed if it is faster. You ignore the negative aspects of moving across Frosty Terrain.

entries.title: Snow Fort
entries.content: Level 1 Cryomancy Tags: Concentration, Upcast Action: Swift | Range | 30 ft | | -------------- | ---------------------------- | | Target/AoE | 1 medium or smaller creature | | Duration | - | | Save | - | You cause a snowy barrier to appear to protect a creature. The barrier appears all around the creature, protecting them from all sides, but not from attacks with High Ground. They gain Cover as long as they do not move from their space. If you stop concentrating or if the fort is hit with fire damage, it crumbles. Upcast - Every 4 CLs, you can increase the size of creature you can protect, or number of smaller creatures you protect by 1.

entries.title: Snow Man
entries.content: Level 1 Cryomancy Tags: Companion, Mana Burn, Frost Action: Standard | Range | Reach | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | - | | Duration | Until Rest | | Save | - | You sculpt snow into a more friendly shape, and your new friend does his best to aid you. A snow man is an elemental that shares all of your ability scores, AC and saves. He has half of your max hp and 20+CL poise. He shares your LvL, but is always treated as a minion. He cannot wield weapons, and his only form of attack is a single snowball Thrown attack every turn that deals 2d4 frost dmg. If there is no snow present, he must take 3 true damage to throw this snowball. He has a 30 land speed, but when not moving along snowy or icy surfaces, his speed is 15. You mana burn equal to the mana spent on this ability. You can choose to burn any amount of mana, increasing snow man's damage by 2 for each additional mana burned. When the snow man is destroyed, or when the spell ends, the mana burn is removed (but it does not restore current mana).

entries.title: Snowball
entries.content: Level 1 Cryomancy Tags: Frost, Upcast Action: Standard | Range | 30 ft | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | - | | Save | Fort | You toss a snowball at a creature, aiming for their weak points. Make a ranged attack that does 2d8+CL (9+CL) frost damage. They also suffer one of the following effects (fort negates). Eyes - Creature has blurred vision for 1 round. Mouth - Creature is staggered for 1 round. Upcast - Every 2 CLs, increase range by 5 ft.

entries.title: Chill Metal
entries.content: Level 2 Cryomancy Tags: Frost, Concentration Action: Standard | Range | 30 ft (60 ft) | | -------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------ | | Target/AoE | 1 metallic object of up to one 5x5x5 ft cube, or one attended metal item | | Duration | - | | Save | - | Rapidly chill a metallic object. If it is not currently attended, it automatically happens. Creatures that touch this item for whatever reason are made Clumsy 1 by rapidly spreading frost. If the object is attended, then the creature can choose to drop the object as an instant action to negate the effects of the spell. If they do not drop the object or cannot, such as with metal armor, the creature takes (CL) frost damage and making them Clumsy 1 at the start of each of their turns and the item cannot be separated from them until heat is applied or you cease concentration. You can also use this spell to target a creature that is made of metal, functioning as though they cannot drop the object. Sometimes creatures have features that rely on heated metal. Such features are disabled while they are affected by this spell. If the caster is ever more than 60 ft away from a chilled creature, the spell ends.

entries.title: Creeping Ice
entries.content: Level 2 Cryomancy Tags: Frost, Concentration, Persistent Action: Standard | Range | 30 ft | | -------------- | --------------------------------------------------- | | Target/AoE | 5 ft radius, centered on a point in the air | | Duration | 3 round | | Save | Fort | You drain the heat from the air, coating an area in frost. The radius of the AoE increases by 10 feet each round on your turn. Creatures in the AoE at the time of casting or that enter/end their turn in the AoE take 2d8+CL (9+CL) cold damage and are staggered for 1 round (fort negates stagger).

entries.title: Frostbite
entries.content: Level 2 Cryomancy Tags: Frost Action: Standard | Range | Reach | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | 1 minute | | Save | - | You subject to creature to a cold winter's night over the course of a few seconds. Make a melee attack. On-hit, the creature takes 3d8+CL (13+CL) frost dmg and gains weakness 5 frost for 1 minute.

entries.title: Ice Lance
entries.content: Level 2 Cryomancy Tags: Upcast Actions: Standard | Range | Reach | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | - | | Save | - | Turn your staff into a deadly ice spike and make a melee Spell Attack against a creature that deals 3d8+CL (13+CL) pierce damage. If the target is entangled by a frost effect, has weakness to frost or is frosty, you make the attack with advantage and it does 3d10+CL (16+CL) pierce damage. Upcast - Every 2 CLs, increase your attack by 1.

entries.title: Powder Snow
entries.content: Level 2 Cryomancy Tags: Concentration, Upcast Action: Standard | Range | - | | -------------- | -------------------------------- | | Target/AoE | 20 ft radius, centered on caster | | Duration | 1 minute | | Save | - | Snowflakes permeate the air, chilling creatures to the bone. The spell leaves behind a cloud that persistently inflicts weakness 2 to frost damage to all creatures without frost resistance in the cloud. Your allies gain frost resistance while within the area of powder snow. Upcast - Every 2 CLs, increase the weakness by 1.

entries.title: Cold Feet
entries.content: Level 3 Cryomancy Tags: Frost Action: Standard | Range | - | | -------------- | -------------------------------------- | | Target/AoE | 10 ft radius burst, centered on caster | | Duration | - | | Save | Reflex | Call forth icicles underneath all of your foes. Each one is entangled and takes 4d8+CL (21+CL) cold damage (reflex halves dmg and negates entangle). A creature can Breakout of this effect as a standard action.

entries.title: Glacial Advance
entries.content: Level 3 Cryomancy Tags: Frost, Elusive, Upcast Action: Standard | Range | - | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 30 ft line | | Duration | - | | Save | Reflex | Unless your speed is 0, rapidly advance forward in a straight line riding along a tiny glacier, dealing 4d8+CL (18+CL) frost damage and an equal amount of poise damage to any creature you move through (reflex halves). If a creature is poise broken from this, they are pushed 15 ft away from the line in a direction of your choosing. The area of the spell becomes an icy slippery surface. Upcast - Every 4 CLs, increase the distance you travel by 5.

entries.title: Ice Beam
entries.content: Level 3 Cryomancy Tags: Frost Action: Standard | Range | 60 ft | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | - | | Save | - | Fire a ray of ice at a foe. Make a ranged spell attack. It deals 4d8+CL (18+CL) cold damage and makes them frosty and entangled on hit. If they are already frosty or entangled, they are instead entombed. Creature can Breakout as a swift action to escape entangle, or as a standard action if entombed.

entries.title: Icy Spears
entries.content: Level 3 Cryomancy Tags: Frost, Upcast Action: Standard | Range | 30 ft | | -------------- | --------------------------------------------------- | | Target/AoE | 2 creatures | | Duration | 1 minute | | Save | Reflex | You jam your staff into the ground and thin streams of ice advance towards your foes. Choose two creatures within 15 ft of each other. A series of pointed ice spears erupt from the ground directly beneath them, dealing 4d8+CL (18+CL) frost damage, as well as entangling them (reflex halves damage and negates entangle). Target can Breakout as a swift action. Pass or fail, the spaces occupied by the spears are considered impassible terrain until they are destroyed or melted. A successful reflex save also means the creature can choose any space within 5 ft of the spell effect to move to elusive. Larger creatures create more impassible terrain and dodge farther. If there are multiple creatures in the same space, you can target the larger creature and hit all creatures in the space, but you cannot target both the creatures to double up on damage. Upcast - Every 4 CLs, target an additional creature.

entries.title: Snowscape
entries.content: Level 3 Cryomancy Tags: Recharge, Weather Action: 1 minute | Range | - | | -------------- | --------------------------------- | | Target/AoE | 1 mile radius, centered on caster | | Duration | 1 hour | | Save | - | A bunch of clouds roll in and start to deposit large amounts of snow. Temperatures decrease and the area of the spell becomes difficult terrain after 1 minute. Certain gear can allow you to traverse snow unimpeded. Creatures cannot see beyond 100 ft. If you cast this spell in an area where snow is normally impossible, incredibly unlikely or out of season, the spells duration decreases to 1 minute. All weather inducing spells do not function underground.

entries.title: Blizzard
entries.content: Level 4 Cryomancy Tags: Frost, Air, Upcast Action: Standard | Range | - | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 30 ft cone | | Duration | - | | Save | Fort | Pelt your foes with a wave a frigid air in a wide area. Creatures take 5d8+CL (22+CL) cold damage and makes them frosty and entangled (fort halves dmg and negates entangle). If they are already frosty or entangled, they are instead entombed. Creature can Breakout as a swift action to escape entangle, or as a standard action if Upcast - For every 4 CLs, increase the size of the cone by 5 ft.

entries.title: Cryomancy
entries.content: Cryomancy Ice magic! Frequently slows and restricts movement.

entries.title: Fraudgg
entries.content: Level 1 Frogg Saran (T) Tags: Mind-Affecting Action: Standard | Range | Reach | | -------------- | ------- | | Target/AoE | 1 frog | | Duration | 8 hours | | Save | Will | You enchant a friendly frog to give off an aura of excellence, as though it were rich, famous or well renowned. People treat this frog as though it were a person of high importance, accommodating for its small stature whenever they can. You can give this frog a set of simplistic orders such as "enter that restaurant and buy a steak" or "pretend to be a lifeguard at the beach." It will dutifully perform these tasks to the best of its ability. Only creatures that directly interact with the frog get a save against the enchantment (ie the waiter or someone the lifeguard saves). Creatures who minions to you do not get a save. If you cast the spell again, the frog harms anyone or someone kisses the frog, the spell ends.

entries.title: Lucky Star
entries.content: Level 1 Frogg Saran (T) Tags: Force, Upcast Action: Standard | Range | 30 ft | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | - | | Save | - | You point at your foe and a star-shaped projectile unerringly falls upon them, dealing d20 force damage. Upcast - Every 4 CLs, the star bounces, affecting an additional creature within 10 ft of the previous.

entries.title: Oh my Frogg
entries.content: Level 1 Frogg Saran (T) Tags: Contingent, Mana Burn Action: 1 minute | Range | - | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | Self | | Duration | Until Rest | | Save | Will | This spell manifests itself as a rainbow box floating above your head with a question mark on it. Before you would normally be affected by a hostile (non-cantrip) spell, you change the nature of the magic into something completely different (will negates). The spell changes to another spell of the same level with you as the primary target or origin point of the spell, regardless of its typical range/targeting. Make saves as appropriate. You are considered "affected" by a spell when it either targets you or included in an AoE. This can only trigger in direct response to the spell being cast, not later being affected by it (like walking into a Wall of Fire). Some spells may have other restrictions like material components. Ignore them. Level 1 (d4) 1 - Time Shudder 2 - Charming Gaze 3 - Bloodbath (caster immediately takes bleed damage) 4 - Cure Wounds Level 2 (d4) 1 - Hysteria 2 - Dead Silent 3 - Detect Thoughts 4 - Mirror Images Level 3 (d4) 1 - Enfroggen 2 - Ice Beam 3 - Cosmic Cage 4 - Afterimage (afterimage always cosplays a frogg) Level 4 (d4) 1 - Call Cheese Storm 2 - Curse of Blindness 3 - That's All Folks! 4 - Sacrificial Heal (transfers CL hp) Level 5 (d4) 1 - Doom 2 - Rainbow Beam 3 - Telekinetic Thrust 4 - Inferno Sphere Level 6 (d4) 1 - Rod of Roasting 2 - Elden Memes 3 - Possess Body 4 - Invisibility

entries.title: Plague of Frogs
entries.content: Level 1 Frogg Saran (T) Tags: Upcast, Poison Action: Standard | Range | 60 ft | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | 3 rounds | | Save | Fort | You conjure a spectral frog that slowly jumps towards an enemy. Each round it moves 20 feet closer to the target. Once it moves into the targets space, it explodes in a cloud of toxic gas, dealing 2d8+CL (9+CL) poison damage (fort halves). If it survives its first turn without hitting its target, it deals an additional 10 damage when it explodes. The frog does not take into consideration difficult terrain, and will hop directly into the air towards a foe. It cannot pass through walls and will move around them if the target moves out of sight. During the frog's "turn" it will opt to move around any creature that is in between it and its target. If any creature enters the space of a frog, willingly or unwillingly, then it immediately explodes. Upcast - If your CL is at least 8... Add another frog that targets a different creature.

entries.title: Power Overwhelming
entries.content: Level 1 Frogg Saran (T) Tags: Buff Action: Swift | Range | 60 ft | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | 1 round | | Save | - | Cause the creature to surge with unbelievable power as their body rapidly deteriorates. They get a +4 bonus to all d20 rolls, non-Spell Attack damage rolls and CL. This bonus cannot be added to something twice. After the buff ends, they take 50% of their max hp in true damage. If the creature is not Defeated from this damage, they become Drained 2.

entries.title: Spontaneous Combustion
entries.content: Level 1 Frogg Saran (T) Tags: Fire Action: Swift | Range | - | | -------------- | -------------------------------------- | | Target/AoE | 30 ft radius burst, centered on caster | | Duration | - | | Save | - | Randomly set a creature ablaze. All enemies within 30 and yourself are suitable targets. You are always lit ablaze on a 1. Pro Tip: Consider using a dice larger than the number of creatures for uneven numbers and then re rolling unsuitable results.

entries.title: Tentacles for Arms
entries.content: Level 1 Frogg Saran (T) Tags: poly, chimeric Action: Free | Range | - | | -------------- | -------- | | Target/AoE | Self | | Duration | 3 rounds | | Save | - | One of your arms transforms into several muscular writhing tentacles, reaching for nearby creatures autonomously. At the end of each turn, they roll a grapple attack with a +4 bonus against a random creature within your natural reach, even if you are unable to act. If you do not threaten a creature, then they grapple you. You cannot willingly end a grapple made by the tentacles.

entries.title: Time Shudder
entries.content: Level 1 Frogg Saran (T) Tags: Concentration Action: Swift | Range | - | | -------------- | -------------------------------------- | | Target/AoE | 30 ft radius burst, centered on caster | | Duration | 1 minute | | Save | - | You emit waves of entropy, hindering or helping ALL creatures nearby (including you). Immediately upon casting and at the start of your turn unleash a pulse to determine the effects of the spell for one round. There is a 50% chance to Hinder and there is a 50% chance to help. Hinder - Creatures are staggered Help - Creatures gain an additional 30 speed and their movement is elusive

entries.title: Distortion
entries.content: Level 2 Frogg Saran (T) Tags: Teleportation Action: Standard | Range | 30 ft | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | 3 rounds | | Save | Will | You immediately cause a creature to look distorted, blinking in and out of existence and seeming to regularly warp back in time a fraction of a second (will negates). Every time the creature takes +HP damage, they immediately teleport 5 ft in a Random Direction. If this would put them in a solid object, they are set to 1 poise and are ejected to the nearest available unoccupied space. If you target an ally, you can reduce the cast time of this effect to a swift action, and it gains the buff tag. Upcast - Every 4 CLs, the distance of the teleportation is increased by 5 ft.

entries.title: Golden Move
entries.content: Level 2 Frogg Saran (T) Tags: Prepared Action: - | Range | - | | -------------- | --- | | Target/AoE | - | | Duration | - | | Save | - | Frogg is always watching out for you, protecting you when you need it most. Whenever you take the Total Defense action, you also turn into a solid golden version of yourself, putting you in Stasis. At the end of an enemy's turn, roll a d6. On a 6, this stasis ends, but the total defense does not. If you do not lose this stasis by your next turn, you don't get a turn, as though you had spent it doing nothing other than using total defense again. If you are not currently in combat, you can still turn golden, but it only lasts 6 seconds.

entries.title: Hysteria
entries.content: Level 2 Frogg Saran (T) Tags: Mind-Affecting Action: Standard | Range | - | | -------------- | -------------------------------------- | | Target/AoE | 30 ft radius burst, centered on caster | | Duration | - | | Save | - | You laugh maniacally and revel in the chaos. All creatures in the radius of the spell MUST make a simple attack against the nearest creature. If they do not have a means to attack, such as not being in range, then the spell does not affect them. The order that creatures make the attacks is as follows: The caster > their allies > neutral parties > their enemies. The caster is allowed to use a special attack instead of a simple attack.

entries.title: Laser Pointer
entries.content: Level 2 Frogg Saran (T) Tags: Light, Concentration Action: Standard | Range | 120 ft | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | 1 minute | | Save | Will | You use your finger to point at something and a little red light appears on the surface in the space of a creature. The creature is Fascinated by this tiny red light (will negates, mindless creatures and animal intelligence get a -2 penalty to this save). If the creature is not in combat then it follows the light with a playful curiosity, trying to catch it. The creature will not go anywhere it is incapable or that is inherently dangerous. You must spend a standard action each turn to maintain the light. When you do, you can move the light up to 30 feet a round to guide the creature's movement. If the creature is currently engaged in combat, they spend their move action following the light, but still have any other actions.

entries.title: Mind Maze
entries.content: Level 2 Frogg Saran Tags: Mind-Affecting Action: Standard | Range | 30 ft | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | 3 rounds | | Save | Will | You alter a target's perception to make it think it needs to move in specific directions around invisible walls in order to reach it's intended location. At the start of the creatures turn, it moves 15 ft in a random direction, even if that brings them to a very dangerous position, such as off a cliff. Aside from this movement, the creature is unable to move further. If something prevents the creature from moving, such as being Entangled, then it does not move.

entries.title: Reincarnate
entries.content: Level 2 Frogg Saran (T) Tags: Recharge Action: Standard | Range | Reach | | -------------- | ------------------------------ | | Target/AoE | 1 willing or defeated creature | | Duration | - | | Save | - | You transform a race into another random race. They are (usually) reborn as a completely different race. They replace all of their previous racial traits with the racial traits of the new race, making the same choices they had during character creation for things such as alternate racial features. Use the following chart determine what race the spell transforms the creature into. Campaigns where more races are present, feel free to add more options to the chart. If the race is incompatible with your campaign, then reroll until you find an appropriate race. Special: A Lunatic that casts reincarnate gains a luck dice 1/day. Special: The recharge part of the spell applies to a creature subject to reincarnation. A creature cannot be reincarnated for 1 year after being subject to this spell. Special: You can reasonably cast this on any creature, changing it into another similar type of creature (ogre into troll) for instance. This can create some complications even if LvL is adjusted, since creatures can get more/less powerful abilities. Choose carefully what gets changed or risk turning a bunch of lesser creatures into an army of powerful ones. | Dice Roll | Race | | --------- | ----------------------------------------------------- | | 1 | Amazon | | 2 | Anime | | 3 | Boner | | 4 | Cyborg | | 5 | Dwarf | | 6 | Eternal | | 7 | Elf | | 8 | Exalted | | 9 | Fairy | | 10 | Geniekin | | 11 | Goblin | | 12 | Human | | 13 | Hellion | | 14 | Orc | | 15 | Poplin | | 16 | Polymerization | | 17 | Shroomkin | | 18 | Shades | | 19 | Fallen | | 20 | Human, with primary mixed blood of your next roll |

entries.title: WonkaS
entries.content: Level 2 Frogg Saran (T) Tags: Teleportation Action: Swift | Range | 120 ft | | -------------- | ------ | | Target/AoE | Self | | Duration | - | | Save | - | You open up a portal underneath yourself and a random enemy within range you can see. The portal violently sucks the creature into it, forcing the creature to swap places with you. If the creature is Anchored, roll a new target.

entries.title: Confuse Ray
entries.content: Level 3 Frogg Saran (T) Tags: Light, Pattern, Persistent, Concentration Action: Standard | Range | 30 ft | | -------------- | ------------------------ | | Target/AoE | A single space, see text | | Duration | - | | Save | Will | A ray of light shines down on a point, and mysterious motes of light fly around and distort creatures' perception of the world around them. Any creature that starts its turn inside of, or moves into the ray of light becomes confused (will adds 4 to confusion rolls). You can direct this light as a standard action on subsequent turns, moving it 20 feet in a straight line. All creatures along its path are subject to its effect.

entries.title: Enfroggen
entries.content: Level 3 Frogg Saran (T) Tags: poly, baleful, Curse Action: Standard | Range | 30 ft | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | - | | Save | Will | You transform a creature into a frog. The caster is unable to attack, cast any spells that affect this frog or otherwise harm it in any way, even when magically compelled to do so. The creature gains the following qualities from the Polymorph List. | Mad Hops | Increase the distance the jump action brings you by 5 ft. You can jump vertically as high as you can jump horizontally. | | -------- | --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | | Tongue | You can make Drag attacks as melee attacks at range of 30 ft during your turn. | | Smol | Decrease to size tiny. Decrease reach to 0. | | Speed | Gain a Swim speed equal to Land Speed | Another creature must spend their standard action to kiss the frog to transform it back. The un-frogged creature is dazed on its next turn if they did not take at least 1 turn as a frog. They are charmed by the creature who kissed them for 8 hours. This secondary effect is a charm effect.

entries.title: Eye of Sneko
entries.content: Level 3 Frogg Saran (T) Tags: Curse Action: Free | Range | - | | -------------- | ---- | | Target/AoE | Self | | Duration | - | | Save | - | You change the pupils of your eyes to match that of the mysterious serpent Sneko, afflicting you with its curse. Whenever you spend mana, roll a d4. 1 - The mana cost is decreased by 2. Gain a luck dice that persists until the curse is removed. 2 - The mana cost is decreased by 1 3 - The mana cost is increased by 1 4 - The mana cost is increased by 2 You can choose to spend mana in excess to your current mana as long as you could potentially reduce the mana cost to your remaining mana or less. If the mana cost exceeds your remaining mana, you mana burn the excess. If the mana reduction exceeds the mana cost, you regain mana. To remove the curse, you must T-pose and perform no actions for 1 full round.

entries.title: Hot Potato
entries.content: Level 3 Frogg Saran (T) Tags: Fire Action: Standard | Range | 30 ft | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | 3 rounds | | Save | - | You cause a smoldering potato to appear in a creatures free hands, in their pocket, or otherwise lodged on their person. It is uncomfortable to the touch, but does not deal damage. It vibrates and pulses with greater intensity as time passes, culminating into a powerful condensed explosion on the 3rd round, dealing 6d12+CL (33+CL) fire damage to whoever is holding it. The potato must be possessed by someone, and can only be removed by the creature who currently has it giving it to someone else as a standard action, requiring its own successful Attack Roll roll or poise break, or else the transfer fails. For clarity... Turn 1 - Cast Spell Turn 2 - nothin' Turn 3 - Explodes violently at the end of your turn

entries.title: Taste the Rainbow
entries.content: Level 3 Frogg Saran (T) Tags: Force, Upcast Action: Standard | Range | 30 ft | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | - | | Save | - | You launch a beam of energy at a creature that rapidly changes between the seven colors of the rainbow. Make a Ranged Attack against a creature that deals 4d8+CL (18+CL) force damage, then roll to see which effect happens on-hit. | 1 | Confuse 1 round | | --- | -------------------------------------------------- | | 2 | Frightened 1 round | | 3 | Drained 1 | | 4 | Blinded 1 round | | 5 | Deal 15 Poise damage | | 6 | Fatigued | | 7 | Bounce to nearest enemy using the same attack roll | | 8 | Roll twice ignoring further results of 8 | Upcast - If your CL is at least 8... Fire an additional beam at a different creature.

entries.title: Call Cheese Storm
entries.content: Level 4 Frogg Saran (T) Tags: Concentration Action: Standard Material: 1000g of cheese, weighing at least 100lbs | Range | - | | -------------- | --------------------------------------- | | Target/AoE | 300 ft radius burst, centered on caster | | Duration | 1 minute | | Save | - | You make a cheesy sacrifice to the god of madness. He blesses you by generating a storm of cheesy goodness. Cheese wheels fall from the sky, damaging friend, foe and terrain alike. Any creature without some kind of cover from the harsh weather takes (CL) crush damage at the start of each of their turns. The effect on the surrounding terrain varies based on how durable it is. Many settlements will experience broken windows and plenty of casualties. But with great sacrifice comes great reward: This spell generates a mountain of edible cheese.

entries.title: Chimpanzee Bolt
entries.content: Level 4 Frogg Saran (T) Tags: Companion, Recharge Action: Standard | Range | 30 ft | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | 1 minute | | Save | - | You summon a chimpanzee, functioning as a medium sized harambe, and it immediately flies at high speeds towards the target of this spell. Make a ranged spell attack that deals 5d8+CL (22+CL) crush damage. Hit or miss, the chimp lands adjacent to the target. During the first turn you summon it, you can command it to better strategize. Every turn after it attacks creatures randomly until it is defeated, focusing on whatever creature is closest. This spell can only be cast 1/minute.

entries.title: Self-Destruct
entries.content: Level 4 Frogg Saran (T) Tags: Force, Recharge Action: Standard | Range | - | | -------------- | -------------------------------------- | | Target/AoE | 20 ft radius burst, centered on caster | | Duration | - | | Save | Reflex | You explode violently, setting yourself to 0 hp. All creatures within 20 ft of you take 20+(2xCL) force damage and are knocked back 20 feet (reflex halves). Caster gains a T2 affliction.

entries.title: Doom
entries.content: Level 5 Frogg Saran (T) Tags: Necrotic Action: Standard | Range | - | | -------------- | -------------------------------------- | | Target/AoE | 60 ft radius burst, centered on caster | | Duration | - | | Save | Fortitude | Drain the life from the world around you in a massive burst that has a rebound effect proportional to the number of creatures you hit with it. Deal 7d8+CL (31+CL) necrotic damage to creatures other than you in the spells radius. For every creature you hit, you take 2 true damage and gain 1 mana.

entries.title: Rain of Frogs
entries.content: Level 5 Frogg Saran (T) Tag: Concentration Action: Standard | Range | - | | -------------- | -------------------------------- | | Target/AoE | 30 ft radius, centered on caster | | Duration | 3 rounds | | Save | - | A bunch of storm clouds roll in, even while indoors, and rain hundreds of frogs upon the area. The situation grows more dire with each passing round at the start of your turn. Round 1 A mere frog drizzle. The area is considered difficult terrain to any non frog creatures. Creatures with at least T1 Deific Boons from Frogg Saran also ignore this difficult terrain. Round 2 A frog downpour. The area is considered impassable terrain for any non frog creatures. Any non frog creatures still in the area are entangled, unable to effectively move through the lake of frogs. Creatures with at least T2 Deific Boons from Frogg Saran also ignore this entangling. Round 3 A frognado. The frogs, and any creature in the area of the spell is lifted into the air and thrown 30 feet in a random direction. The frogs quickly dissipate afterwords. Any non-frog creatures and objects are staggered for 3 rounds and take 6d10+CL (33+CL) crush damage. Creatures with at least T3 Deific Boons from Frogg Saran also ignore damage/stagger (but not the knockback).

entries.title: Tastier Rainbow
entries.content: Level 5 Frogg Saran (T) Tags: Force, Concentration, Persistent Action: Standard | Range | - | | -------------- | ---------------------- | | Target/AoE | 30 ft line, 15 ft wide | | Duration | 3 rounds | | Save | Reflex | You launch a wave of rainbow of energy. All creatures in the area take 6d8+CL (27+CL) force damage, then roll a bonus effect for each individual creature (reflex halves the damage and negates the additional effect). The rainbow persists for three rounds, creatures that enter the area of the rainbow or end of their turn inside of it must make additional saves. You can walk on the rainbow as though it were a solid object without issue. | 1 | Confused 2 rounds Mind-Affecting | | --- | ---------------------------------------- | | 2 | Frightened 2 rounds fear | | 3 | Drained 2 | | 4 | Blinded 2 rounds | | 5 | Deal 30 poise damage | | 6 | Exhausted | | 7 | Charmed for 1 round | | 8 | Roll twice ignoring further 8s |

entries.title: Madness Consumes You
entries.content: Level 6 Frogg Saran (T) Tags: Recharge, Mind-Affecting Action: Standard | Range | - | | -------------- | -------------------------------- | | Target/AoE | 30 ft radius, centered on caster | | Duration | 3 rounds | | Save | - | All creatures in the radius of the spell become confused. All results of "confusion ends" are instead treated as "babble incoherently."

entries.title: Mystery Box
entries.content: Level 6 Frogg Saran (T) Tags: Recharge Action: Standard | Range | ??? | | -------------- | --- | | Target/AoE | ??? | | Duration | ??? | | Save | ??? | You form a direct conduit with Frogg Saran himself, allowing his magic to flow through you. Roll to select a random spell list, using the born again believer list, then cast a random spell of each spell level on that spell list (up to fifth level). Targets of these spells are chosen randomly from all legal targets. If a spell generates an area of effect then it chooses a creature randomly to center this effect on. If a spell does not have a suitable target then it fizzles, producing no effect. You do not need to concentrate on any of these effects. You are always considered a willing and available target for all effects that can affect your creature type. Frogs and frog-like creatures are fair game for this spell. A target is considered "legal" if its targeting is allowed. For example, if you roll the Frogg spell list and get lucky star, you count the number of creatures in range, then roll randomly to see who gets targeted. However, if you roll necromancy and get corpse explosion, but you don’t control any undead, there are no corpses within range and you aren't undead yourself, then that particular spell fizzles. You can only ever cast this spell once.

entries.title: Rod of Roasting
entries.content: Level 6 Frogg Saran (T) Tags: Fire, Healing Action: Standard Focus: 1 staff | Range | Reach | | -------------- | ------------ | | Target/AoE | 60 ft radius | | Duration | 3 rounds | | Save | Reflex | You plant your staff into the ground and it ignites in flames. The flames take the shape of a frog and start laughing maniacally, telling a joke or saying proverbs unfit for the current situation. At the end of each of your turns, the frog launches an intense fire blast at a creature the rod has line of sight to within 60 ft, chosen randomly between all creatures. Creatures takes 10d8+CL (45+CL) fire damage (reflex halves). Touching or trying to physically move the stick also triggers this effect on the creature that touched it. If you are the last one standing within a 60 ft radius of the rod when the spell ends, you refund the the mana cost of this spell, you gain a luck dice, your staff returns to you and you gain 60 temp hp.

entries.title: Frogg Saran (T)
entries.content: Ever since his rebranding from the god of death back in the old days, Frogg has grown a lot more popular. Frogg Saran is chaos incarnate. He is known to give blessings and curses in equal measure. Frogg Saran is a very active force in the world of Nack, worming his way into many peoples lives whether they like it or not. All this god seeks is to increase the amount of entropy in the universe. His followers start riots and revolutions merely to change the status quo. They reincarnate people for funsies just to see the reaction to their new body. Frogg spells are categorized by their randomness and propensity to inflict madness or strange behavior, generally favoring the caster.

entries.title: Rift Bolt
entries.content: Level 1 God Mode Tags: Force, Upcast, Teleportation Action: Standard | Range | 30 ft | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | - | | Save | - | Fire a ray of volatile energy at a creature that deals 2d8+CL (9+CL) force damage. On-hit you can decide to either teleport them 5 feet in a specific direction, or double that distance in a random direction. Upcast - Every 4 CLs, increase the distance you teleport the creature 5 ft (which is then doubled if randomized).

entries.title: Snap Back
entries.content: Level 1 God Mode Tags: Elusive Action: Standard | Range | 30 ft | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | - | | Save | Will | Reverse time ever so slightly, only doing so for 1 particular creature. They move back to the position they were in at the start of their last turn. If used on an enemy (will negates). If you are in combat, it has no effect on a creature that has not acted in combat.

entries.title: Steal Years
entries.content: Level 1 God Mode Tags: Concentration Action: Standard | Range | 30 ft | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | - | | Save | Will | You cause a creature to age rapidly and then you use that energy to bolster yourself. The target looks superficially old and you appear superficially in your prime, or even younger. The target is fatigued. As long as they are fatigued from this spell, you can spend an immediate action to Reroll a d20 roll.

entries.title: Tardiness
entries.content: Level 1 God Mode Tags: - Action: Standard | Range | 60 ft | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | - | | Save | Will | Delay a creature so that way their spot in initiative is moved to be dead last (will negates). If the creature has already acted in this round, it does not get an additional turn.

entries.title: Time Bomb
entries.content: Level 1 God Mode Tags: Force Action: Standard | Range | 60 ft | | -------------- | ------------------------------------ | | Target/AoE | 10 ft radius, centered on a creature | | Duration | - | | Save | Reflex | You cause a rapidly ticking down unstable looking clock to appear above a creatures head. At the end of that creature's turn, it explodes, dealing 2d8+CL (9+CL) force damage to all enemies within 10 ft (reflex halves dmg). You can place this time bomb on an ally or an enemy. The time bomb never damages allies.

entries.title: Blink
entries.content: Level 2 God Mode Tags: Buff, Teleportation, Recharge Action: Swift | Range | - | | -------------- | -------- | | Target/AoE | Self | | Duration | 1 minute | | Save | - | You sporadically blink out of the mortal plane into a private demiplane. At the end of your turn, roll a d6. On a 5 or 6, you blink out of existence, putting you in stasis until the start of your turn. When you reappear, the spell ends. This spell cannot be used in consecutive turns.

entries.title: On the Clock
entries.content: Level 2 God Mode Tags: Concentration Action: Standard | Range | 60 ft | | -------------- | ----------------------------------------------- | | Target/AoE | 20 ft radius, centered on a point on the ground | | Duration | - | | Save | - | Cause magic circle that resembles the face of a clock to appear on a surface. As long as you concentrate, enemies treat this area as difficult terrain, even if they attempt to jump/fly over it. Allied movement through this area is elusive.

entries.title: Portal Jump
entries.content: Level 2 God Mode Tags: Teleportation Action: Swift | Range | 30 ft | | -------------- | --------------------- | | Target/AoE | A point on the ground | | Duration | - | | Save | - | A portal opens up beneath you, bringing you to the target location. You cannot move, but you may take your turn from your new position. At the end of your turn, you fall back into the portal and return to the initial position. Other creatures cannot pass through your portal, even when they prepare actions.

entries.title: Spatial Rend
entries.content: Level 2 God Mode Tags: Concentration Action: Standard | Range | 30 ft | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | 3 rounds | | Save | Will | Tear apart time and space surrounding a creature, causing the creature to temporarily split into two different versions of itself. One is clearly insubstantial, almost like a ghost, and gets yanked into a space of your choosing within range. Targeting this severed spirit, in all ways, is treated as though you were affecting the original creature, using all of its statistics. Persistent effects can still only effect once per turn, and AoE effects that target both still only do one instance of damage, but it gives the creature Disadvantage on its save. The spirit cannot be moved. It cannot be affected by anything other than HP damage, which is redirected to the original target of this spell. It cannot use any abilities and the original creature cannot activate its own abilities through its spirit. The target of the spell is tethered, and cannot ever be more than 120 ft from its spirit. If it moves farther, the spell ends.

entries.title: Borrowed Time
entries.content: Level 3 God Mode Tags: Recharge Action: Free | Range | - | | -------------- | ---- | | Target/AoE | Self | | Duration | - | | Save | - | Borrow some time from your future self. Gain an additional swift action, but you lose your swift action next turn. You can choose to Mana Burn 3 to not consume your swift action next turn. Can only be used once a turn.

entries.title: Fast Forward
entries.content: Level 3 God Mode Tags: Recharge Action: Standard | Range | 60 ft | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | - | | Save | - | The creature you target moves at incredible speed, allowing them to immediately take an additional turn after yours. This does not affect their position in initiative. On the creatures next turn they are dazed. The recharge tag does not apply to the caster. A creature cannot be the target of this spell for 1 minute after being affected by it. The magic of this spell is a bit unstable and can sometimes go overboard. After the daze ends, an affected creature must make a DC 8 luck check or age a number of years equal to (8-luck check result).

entries.title: Multiverse Theory
entries.content: Level 3 God Mode Tags: Companion, Recharge Action: Standard | Range | Reach | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | - | | Duration | Until Rest | | Save | - | You call out into the multiverse your own name, and you answer the call. A version of yourself from an alternate timeline appears before you to speak to you or aid you with tasks. This alternate version of you does not have access to its mana pool, is Siphoned, cannot attack and has 5 hp. The primary use of this spell is to give you a different perspective on things. It can give you a +2 bonus to skill checks, as though using the aid action, and it can do simple item interactions, such as pulling levers or lifting things. Because of how different your dimension is from theirs, they cannot perform tasks on their own. If this alternate version of yourself ever takes damage, you also take that damage, ignoring any temp hp you have. If the alternate you is out of your sight for longer than a minute, it disappears. If you cast this spell again, the previous alternate you disappears.

entries.title: Switcheroo
entries.content: Level 3 God Mode Tags: Teleportation Action: Standard | Range | 30 ft | | -------------- | -------------------------- | | Target/AoE | 2 things...its complicated | | Duration | - | | Save | Will | You can target any combination of 2 enemies, allies and unattended objects of up to roughly human size within range. You target allies and objects freely. The two targets change places. If you target an enemy (will negates). You must teleport targets into places that have enough space for them to exist in. Note - The targets need not be within range of each other, only you (the caster).

entries.title: Dimension Door
entries.content: Level 4 God Mode Tags: Teleportation, Concentration Action: Standard | Range | Reach, 120 ft | | -------------- | --------------------------- | | Target/AoE | 1 mostly solid flat surface | | Duration | 1 minute | | Save | - | Touch a mostly flat solid surface and cause a incomplete portal to appear on it. So long as you continue to concentrate, at any point after as a standard action, you can touch another solid surface within 120 feet of the original and turn the portal on. For 1 minute, creatures can walk into one portal and appear out of the other. This does not require concentration and lasts the full minute. After this time passes, the portals close and you must place them again. You can see through the portal as though it were a window leading to its destination.

entries.title: Retro Visions
entries.content: Level 4 God Mode Tags: Concentration, Recharge Action: Standard | Range | - | | -------------- | ----------------------------- | | Target/AoE | 30 ft AoE, centered on caster | | Duration | Up to 1 hour | | Save | - | You gaze into the past of the location you stand. You can make weeks, months, or even years pass by within minutes, but you always intuitively have a sense of how far back into the past are. You can see and hear events as they occurred. Things that are visually striking or loud are blips on your radar that give pause and allow you to watch in real time. Otherwise you need to have a roundabout idea of when the event happened. The radius of the spell represents how far you can move around while observing. You can freely travel (5*CL) years back into the past looking for anomalies. If you have the exact date of an event, you can go twice as far back.

entries.title: Slow Time
entries.content: Level 4 God Mode Tags: Recharge Action: Standard | Range | - | | -------------- | ------- | | Target/AoE | Self | | Duration | 1 round | | Save | - | Cause time to stop almost completely for all creatures other than you. Everything else in the universe is essentially in Stasis until this effect ends. You can spend a standard action to move an unattended object you would normally be able to manipulate (with great difficulty), but other than that, your options are limited for what to do with your extra turn to things that do not affect the rest of the world.

entries.title: Gravity Switch
