entries.content: Level 5 God Mode Tags: Concentration Action: Standard | Range | - | | -------------- | -------------------------------- | | Target/AoE | 40 ft radius, centered on caster | | Duration | - | | Save | - | Temporarily turn off the gravity in an area. Read the No Gravity section of the Gravity page for more details. Because the area is confined, the risk of floating off into infinity is very low.

entries.title: Hostile Teleportation
entries.content: Level 5 God Mode Tags: Teleportation Action: Standard | Range | 30 ft | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | - | | Save | Will | Choose any creature and teleport it anywhere within the spells range. If the creature is an enemy it also makes them clumsy 2 (will negates teleportation).

entries.title: Inner Sanctum
entries.content: Level 5 God Mode Tags: Teleportation, Concentration Action: 1 minute Focus: Tuning Fork | Range | Reach | | -------------- | ----- | | Target/AoE | - | | Duration | - | | Save | - | Create a portal that brings you to your own private dimension (aka a demiplane). The first time you go to this dimension, it is empty, and the tuning fork used as the focus attunes to this plane. Every time you cast this spell after the first, you come back to this dimension. The range, concentration and teleportation aspects of this spell refer to the portal you create to get to your inner sanctum. The portal acts as a window between the 2 dimensions, and stays open as long as you concentrate. Whenever you exit your inner sanctum, you always appear from where you entered it. The sanctum itself is a large empty void filled with a dark clay-like substance. Using your mind alone, you can form this clay into the shape of anything you like, such as furniture, statues, trees etc. This substance always has a texture of sturdy but malleable clay. It cannot create living things or complex objects like clocks, only facsimiles of such things. The substance always has a dark, almost space-like color to it. You cannot bring this substance out of your sanctum, but you can freely bring real objects in and out of it. The sanctum's dimensions are 100x100x100 ft.

entries.title: Chronobreak
entries.content: Level 6 God Mode Tags: Force, Teleportation, Recharge, Healing, Contingent Action: Instant | Range | - | | -------------- | --------------------------------------------------------- | | Target/AoE | 10 ft radius burst, centered on an afterimage...see spell | | Duration | - | | Save | Reflex | While this technique is prepared a ghostly afterimage of yourself mimics your actions and movement, but skipping a few seconds with a delay. It is Invisible unless you are in combat. At any point you can take standard actions (ie it's your turn and you aren't suffering from CC), you can choose to revert back to the time your afterimage represents. You return back to the position you were in at the beginning of your last turn. When you do, you burst in magical force, dealing 7d8+CL (31+CL) force damage to all enemies (reflex halves). You also restore 3d8+CL (13+CL) hp and cleanse all non-permanent status effects. Pro Tip I recommend using a token to refer to where your afterimage is currently located. Because you can only use it during your turn, when you end your turn, you can safely update its position to where your turn started.

entries.title: God Mode
entries.content: God mode magic involves manipulating things people generally perceive as constants, such as time and distance.

entries.title: Disc of Light
entries.content: Level 1 Golden Order Tags: Light, Holy, Persistent Action: Standard | Range | - | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 30 ft line | | Duration | 1 round | | Save | - | You throw a disc of light that boomerangs back to you at the start of your next turn. Make a Ranged spell attack and compare the result to every creature within a 30 foot line. Each creature takes (2*CL) holy damage. The disc persists at the end of its range, automatically dealing its damage to creatures that move through that space. At the start of your next turn, the disc returns very quickly in a line directly back to you dealing half the damage again automatically, requiring no roll. If you spend an immediate action, you can catch the disc, allowing you to throw it again at no cost. If you do not throw it again on your next turn, it disappears. If the disc impacts solid terrain (such as a wall) on either the way out or the way back, it halts in place. The discs give off light in a 20 ft radius.

entries.title: Enhance Water
entries.content: Level 1 Golden Order Tags: Water Action: Standard | Range | Reach | | -------------- | ----------------- | | Target/AoE | 1 gallon of water | | Duration | - | | Save | - | Transform water into a mediocre alcoholic beverage such a wine, whiskey or mead.

entries.title: Epitaph of Finality
entries.content: Level 1 Golden Order Tags: Concentration Action: Swift | Range | 30 ft | | -------------- | ----------------------------- | | Target/AoE | 1 aberration, undead or fiend | | Duration | 1 minute | | Save | - | You sing out to the creature, inflicting drained equal to your CL while you concentrate. If it is defeated while this spell is active and it does not have regeneration, it is instantly and utterly consumed in holy flames, leaving behind only ashes. If it has regeneration, this spell will cause them to become dazed for one turn upon revival.

entries.title: Rejection
entries.content: Level 1 Golden Order Tags: Upcast Action: Standard | Range | - | | -------------- | -------------------------------------- | | Target/AoE | 10 ft radius burst, centered on caster | | Duration | - | | Save | Fort | You cross your arms and then enter a powerful stance as you release stored energy. Creatures in range are knocked back 10 feet and knocked down (fort reduces to 20 poise damage). If you increase the cast time to a FRA, its DC increases by 2. Upcast - Every 4 CLs, the FRA version of the spell has its DC increased by 1.

entries.title: Oath to Order
entries.content: Level 2 Golden Order Tags: Buff, Language-Dependent, Light Action: Swift | Range | Reach | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | 1 minute | | Save | - | You recite an oath with your target, bolstering their courage in the face of darkness. The target sheds light out to 20 feet, granting them a +4 bonus to +Intimidation vs Aberrations, Undead and Fiends Allies within this light get resistance to fear, darkness, and effects that inflict the Blinded or Blurred Vision status effects.

entries.title: Radiant Burst
entries.content: Level 2 Golden Order Tags: Holy, Light Action: Standard | Range | 30 ft | | -------------- | -------------------------------------------------- | | Target/AoE | 10 ft radius burst, centered on a point in the air | | Duration | 2 rounds | | Save | Reflex | You manifest a shining light and cause it to flash brightly before extinguishing. Creatures are blinded for two rounds (reflex negates). A creature can make a new save against this effect at the end of its turn. Aberrations, undead, fiends and creatures with light sensitivity take 10 holy damage (no save).

entries.title: Repelling Light
entries.content: Level 3 Golden Order Tags: Light, Concentration Action: Standard | Range | Reach | | -------------- | ------------------------------------------------ | | Target/AoE | 20 ft radius burst, centered on a point in space | | Duration | 1 minute | | Save | Will | You create a globe of bright light. Aberrations, undead, Fiends and creatures with light-sensitivity that start their turns inside or attempt to enter this zone immediately recoil, using their movement to escape the zone if possible (will negates), or suffering -2 Attack if they do not.

entries.title: Rings of Light
entries.content: Level 3 Golden Order Tags: Holy, Persistent, Light, Upcast Action: Standard | Range | - | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 30 ft cone | | Duration | 1 round | | Save | Reflex | You throw many radiant rings that deal 4d8+CL (18+CL) holy damage (reflex halves). The rings persist at the end of the cone, forming a line that automatically deals their damage to creatures that move through their spaces. At the start of your next turn, the rings return very quickly directly back to you in a straight line, dealing half the damage again automatically (no save). If any of the rings impact solid terrain (such as a wall) on either the way out or the way back, they halt in place. Any that don’t continue on their usual path. The discs give off light in a 20 ft radius.

entries.title: Wrath of Gold
entries.content: Level 3 Golden Order Tags: Holy Action: Standard | Range | - | | -------------- | -------------------------------------- | | Target/AoE | 10 ft radius burst, centered on caster | | Duration | - | | Save | Fort | You cross your arms and then enter a powerful stance as you release stored energy. Creatures in range are knocked back 10 feet, knocked down and take 4d8+CL (18+CL) holy damage (fort halves dmg and negates knock down/knockback).

entries.title: Banishment
entries.content: Level 4 Golden Order Tags: - Action: Standard | Range | 30 ft | | -------------- | ----------------------------- | | Target/AoE | 1 aberration, undead or fiend | | Duration | - | | Save | Will | You point towards a creature and send it back from whence it came (will negates), with the effect differing slightly depending on what you target. You can only use banishment on a creature who your CL exceeds their LvL by at least 8, or it is a minion. Aberration: The creature is sent back to its original planet. If it did not have an original planet, it gets transported to the moon. Undead: It is immediately Entombed in the ground underneath it. It can Breakout as a FRA, but the DC is increased by 5. Fiend: The creature is sent back to The Demon Realm.

entries.title: Deific Presence
entries.content: Level 5 Golden Order Tags: Concentration, Holy Action: Standard | Range | - | | -------------- | -------------------------------------- | | Target/AoE | 20 ft radius burst, centered on caster | | Duration | 3 rounds | | Save | Reflex | You assume a position akin to prayer before you throw your arms to the side and assume the pose of deific power. You radiate intense waves of holy energy that ramp up over time, damaging all enemies within 20 ft. You move at -15 speed while casting this spell. You must spend a standard action each round to continue concentrating. Round 1 - 5d6+CL (17+CL) holy damage (reflex halves). Round 2 - 5d8+CL (22+CL) and increases the DC by 4. Round 3 - 5d10+CL (27+CL) and no longer has a save. Any creature that fails its save (or automatically on round 3) versus this spell is staggered for 1 round.

entries.title: Threnody of Vengeance
entries.content: Level 5 Golden Order Tags: Buff, Concentration Action: Immediate | Range | 60 ft | | -------------- | -------------- | | Target/AoE | 1 ally | | Duration | Up to 3 rounds | | Save | - | Note: Maintaining concentration on this spell consumes your swift actions. You cast this spell in response to an ally being dominated, frightened, defeated, or killed. The ally is stunned for as long as this spell persists, but a golden flaming duplicate of themselves emerges from their space, able to act in their stead. The ally controls the copy, and still consumes its resources if the clone uses any. The copy has half of their maximum hit points, has no negative conditions copied over, and is taunted by whatever caused them to be the target of this spell. If the effect is not a result of a particular creature, or the original creature is defeated, it is instead taunted by the nearest enemy. If the stunned condition is removed, the ally is no longer dominated/frightened/defeated/slain, the copy is slain, or the ally wills it to end at any point, the spell ends.

entries.title: Elden Memes
entries.content: Level 6 Golden Order Tags: Holy, Concentration Action: FRA | Range | 60 ft | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | 3 rounds | | Save | Reflex | You create a condensed ball of divine energy and release it into the world. Every round on your turn, the ball of light gently floats towards a target you designate at the time of casting at a speed of 30 feet. If the ball gets within 30 feet of the original target, it starts to gently circle around them clockwise instead of moving towards them. All enemies within 30 feet of the ball at the end of its movement each turn automatically take (CL) holy damage from projectiles that rapidly fire in all directions around it. If the original target is ever defeated, then a new target can be selected as an instant action. On the 3rd round, the ball advances rapidly towards the original target and explodes in their space. If the original target is dead, unconscious or has managed to get more than 300 feet away, it instead explodes immediately. The explosion deals 7d8+CL (31+CL) holy damage (reflex halves) in a 20 ft radius to all enemies.

entries.title: Golden Order
entries.content: Golden order spells are focused around unleashing divine power in the form of holy spells and punishing the wicked.

entries.title: Blessing of Goom
entries.content: Level 1 Goomshroom Tags: Prepared Action: - | Range | - | | -------------- | --- | | Target/AoE | - | | Duration | - | | Save | - | You exude an aura that allows creatures to exist in worlds they are unaccustomed to. Every creature that can see you (or sense you) gains the amphibious quality, allowing them to comfortably adapt to either land or sea, no matter which they normally prefer. Sea creatures gain a 30 ft land speed and land creatures gain a 30 ft swim speed. This quality persists for as long as they stay near you, but it does not immediately disappear. The boon persists for (10*CL) minutes after the creature cannot see you. Most places of worship dedicated to Shroomlette are persistently affected by this aura.

entries.title: Bubble Break
entries.content: Level 1 Goomshroom Tags: Concentration, Water Action: Standard | Range | 30 ft | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | 3 rounds | | Save | Reflex | You blow a big bubble. Affected creature is trapped inside of a bubble for 3 rounds (reflex negates). The bubble is completely indestructible and cannot be popped, moved or altered in any way from the inside. Trapped creatures are free to take any actions they please, the only restriction being that they cannot affect creatures outside of the bubble. They can use Teleportation to escape or use the reprieve to heal and buff. The reverse is also true: Creatures outside of the bubble cannot affect creatures inside of the bubble without first popping it. Bubbles can only be popped by taking 1 pierce damage. Because of the defensive properties of the bubble, hitting allies with it to protect them is a viable strategy. Allies do not need to roll a reflex save. They can choose to be affected by the spell or not, even while defeated.

entries.title: Bubble Buddy
entries.content: Level 1 Goomshroom Tags: Concentration, Water Action: Standard | Range | Reach | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | - | | Duration | 10 minutes | | Save | - | You blow a bubble in the shape of a friend. It floats gently in the air or water behind you at a static distance of 10 ft. It cannot be popped unless it takes piercing damage from a direct attack. Gives all nearby allies +2 happiness. Bubble buddy has nothing but the best intentions but often somehow finds a way to sour the mood. At any point while bubble buddy exists, you can send it into a social situation. People will generally treat bubble buddy as a real person, but it does not speak much back, only communicating vaguely through subtle item interactions. Over the course of a minute, bubble buddy will quickly inconvenience people to show what a bad possible outcome is for interacting with this specific person or type of person. Such as spilling a dwarf's drink, or poking someone very sensitive to touch. If you allow it, bubbly buddy will continue interacting with people all around a social setting, such as a party, a tavern etc and ruin the mood. Eventually, people will turn on the buddy (and the caster if they saw you cast it, see you concentrating etc).

entries.title: Bubble
entries.content: Level 1 Goomshroom Tags: Water, Concentration Action: Standard | Range | Reach | | -------------- | ---------------------------------------------------- | | Target/AoE | Creatures or objects that can fit in a 5x5x5ft space | | Duration | - | | Save | - | Blow a bubble large enough to carry the target(s) of the spell. The bubble can carry any amount of weight, and can even hold sharp objects without popping. The bubble trails behind you, matching your speed, automatically avoiding obstacles and bouncing against surfaces. You can toggle whether the bubble follows you on and off as a free action. The only way the bubble can be popped is ceasing concentration, dispel magic or a creature spending a standard action to poke the bubble. Upcast - Every 2 CLs, increase the dimensions of the bubble by 1 ft (6x6x6, 7x7x7 etc)

entries.title: Goo Gang
entries.content: Level 1 Goomshroom Tags: Figment, Concentration Action: Swift | Range | 60 ft | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | 1 minute | | Save | - | You create 3 slimy copies of yourself that relentlessly follow a creature of your choosing (even into areas you couldn’t go, such as into the air). While they persist, they each take up a single space adjacent to the creature the most optimally to provide flanking. If they are targeted with a hostile attack, spell or take any damage, they disappear. Their movement is elusive. These duplicates are treated as though they have all +Teamwork Feats.

entries.title: Gooball
entries.content: Level 1 Goomshroom Tags: Concentration Action: Swift | Range | 30 ft | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | 1 minute | | Save | - | Your throat swells as your mouth fills with bile. You spit a glob of goo at a creature as a ranged attack roll. Their speed is reduced by 15. A creature can remove this goo automatically as a standard action, or they can Breakout with athletics. Upcast - If your CL is at least 8... Remove the concentration tag.

entries.title: Message in a Bottle
entries.content: Level 1 Goomshroom Tags: Teleportation, Water Action: Standard | Range | Infinite | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | - | | Save | - | You take a bottle and you think of somebody that you have met personally and know by name you place it into a source of water: A bucket, a lake, a toilet, as long as the bottle can be submerged, it counts. This bottle disappears and then appears near the creature you thought of and floats towards them in a bubble. If the creature is near no suitable water source, then it only appears when the creature gets nearby one. After (presumably) reading the message, the creature can write their own message and send the bottle back to you. Anything that can reasonably fit into a tiny bottle can also be included. This spell does not function across planes. This spell does not require line of sight.

entries.title: Mud Buddy
entries.content: Level 1 Goomshroom Tags: Earth, Water, Companion, Mana Burn Action: Standard | Range | Reach | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | - | | Duration | Until Rest | | Save | - | You sculpt mud into a more friendly shape, and your new buddy does his best to aid you. Mud buddy is an elemental that shares all of your ability scores, AC and saves. He has half of your max hp and poise. He shares your level, but is always treated as a minion. Mud buddy cannot wield weapons, and his only form of attack is a single +Combat Maneuver every turn with a bonus equal to your CL. If you choose to grapple, he can only choose to Bully the creature to maintain the grapple. He has a 20 land speed and a 60 swim speed. He can Burrow through moist earth using his land speed. Outside of combat he can do simple tasks, such as physical labor. He is intelligent, but he lacks the ability to speak and has no skills. He can carry 300 lbs. When mud buddy is destroyed, or when the spell ends, the mana burn is removed (but it does not restore current mana).

entries.title: Splatter
entries.content: Level 1 Goomshroom Tags: Concentration Action: Standard | Range | 30 ft | | -------------- | ----------------------------------------------- | | Target/AoE | 10 ft radius, centered on a point on the ground | | Duration | 1 minute | | Save | - | Spit a slimy ball at the ground that splatters on impact. Creatures in the spells area at the time of casting, or that walk into the spells area are affected by it. Moving out and then back into the spell can affect the creature multiple times. Choose one: Greasy - Creatures are knocked down (reflex/+Acrobatics negates). Treat the grease as a slippery surface. Gooey - Creatures are entangled (fort negates). Athletics as a swift action to remove the goo. Treat the goo as a sticky surface.

entries.title: Stick Together
entries.content: Level 1 Goomshroom Tags: Prepared Action: - | Range | - | | -------------- | --- | | Target/AoE | - | | Duration | - | | Save | - | Your skin oozes a gooey substance. Whenever you touch a willing creature (free action), your initiative now matches theirs. This does not give you an additional turn, but you can use any movement you have left to ride into battle with the touched creature. Simply by touching them, you can allow a creature of any size to mount you as though you were appropriately sized. You ignore their weight as though it were your own. Any effects that create forced movement automatically moves all attached creatures if you are affected, and have no effect on mounted creatures if you aren't affected. If you attach to multiple creatures, you all must choose one creature's initiative to attach to. You can also use the carry action without making allies clumsy. By applying a solvent or making an athletics check (spell dc) as a standard action you can be forcefully separated. The caster can choose to release stuck creatures at any time as a free action.

entries.title: Mushroom Dance
entries.content: Level 2 Goomshroom Tags: - Action: 3 rounds | Range | Reach | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | - | | Save | - | Choose an adjacent creature to start dancing around. If you remain adjacent to the creature for the entire cast time, you learn about their lifestyle by gleaning one of three general categories. Sin - They kill, lie, cheat, steal or deal with demons/undead Neutral - They have no strong tendencies towards sin or virtue, or roughly equal measures of both Virtuous - They are honest. They save the lives of innocents and lend aid to the weak and downtrodden "Mushroom dance. Mushroom dance. What could it mean?"

entries.title: Nap Time
entries.content: Level 2 Goomshroom Tags: - Action: Standard | Range | 30 ft | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | 3 rounds | | Save | Will | You inflict a wave of drowsiness on a creature, causing it to fall asleep (will reduces to Drowsy).

entries.title: Osmosis
entries.content: Level 2 Goomshroom Tags: Concentration Action: Standard | Range | Reach | | -------------- | -------------- | | Target/AoE | 1 written text | | Duration | - | | Save | - | As long as you maintain concentration and contact with a body of written text, you can continue to absorb information from it. You can effectively summarize a book without even opening it at a rate of 10 standard pages a minute, even if you don't understand it's language. If the text is encoded, you only interpret its literal meaning. This spell allows you to get the gist of anything written in a secret language.

entries.title: Overflow
entries.content: Level 2 Goomshroom Tags: Water, Concentration Action: Standard | Range | 60 ft | | -------------- | -------------------------------------------------------------- | | Target/AoE | One 5ft diameter hemisphere, centered on a point on the ground | | Duration | 1 minute | | Save | - | You cause a hemisphere of water to suddenly form in an area. This water has no inherently negative effects, but Aquatic Combat can be a problem for some and a boon for others. Upcast - Every 4 CLs, the diameter of the hemisphere increases 10 ft.

entries.title: Snail Trail
entries.content: Level 2 Goomshroom Tags: Buff Action: Swift | Range | - | | -------------- | -------- | | Target/AoE | - | | Duration | 1 minute | | Save | - | You become grounded and start leaving behind a slimy trail wherever you move. Any spaces you move are treated as slippery surface. Any allies that move through these spaces instead have their speed boosted once by 10 for that turn. When the spell ends, the surfaces dry up.

entries.title: To the Rescue!
entries.content: Level 2 Goomshroom Tags: Healing, Elusive Action: FRA | Range | - | | -------------- | ------- | | Target/AoE | Self | | Duration | 1 round | | Save | - | Your body oozes with a soothing and sticky goo. Take the carry action and increase your speed by 20 this turn. You ignore carried creatures' weight as though it were your own and do not damage you allies' poise. Any creature carried recovers CL hp. You can rescue up to 2 allies. At the end of your turn, they detach in an adjacent space of your choosing, or in your possession. If a creature is directly preventing an ally from moving, such as when being grappled, then you cannot rescue them. For situations like being stuck in a web, a suitable check (like a Breakout) can be rolled to rescue.

entries.title: Aqueous Orb
entries.content: Level 3 Goomshroom Tags: Water, Concentration, Persistent, Upcast Action: Standard | Range | 30 ft | | -------------- | -------- | | Target/AoE | - | | Duration | 3 rounds | | Save | Reflex | You open a portal to the elemental planes to generate a large size (10x10 ft) orb of water. Immediately upon casting the spell, and as a swift action each turn, you can move the orb up to 25 ft in a straight line. If the orb moves through a creature's space, then it is carried along for the ride and made wet (reflex negates). Creatures that are huge get Advantage, and massive creatures are immune. When picked up or at the end of each turn it is carried, creatures take 4d8+CL (18+CL) poise damage and are made clumsy 2. Creatures can Breakout as a swift action. Aquatic and amphibious creatures make this check with Advantage. Upcast - Every 4 CLs, increase the speed of the water orb by 5.

entries.title: Bubble Breath
entries.content: Level 3 Goomshroom Tags: Water, Concentration Action: Standard | Range | - | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 30 ft cone | | Duration | 3 rounds | | Save | Reflex | You blow a bunch of bubbles. Affected creatures are trapped inside of a bubble for 3 rounds (reflex negates). The bubble is completely indestructible and cannot be popped, moved or altered in any way from the inside. Trapped creatures are free to take any actions they please, the only restriction being that they cannot affect creatures outside of the bubble. They can use teleportation to escape or use the reprieve to heal and buff. The reverse is also true: Creatures outside of the bubble cannot affect creatures inside of the bubble without first popping it. Bubbles can only be popped by taking 1 pierce damage. Because of the defensive properties of the bubble, hitting allies with it to protect them is a viable strategy. Allies do not need to roll a reflex save. They can choose to be affected by the spell or not, even while defeated.

entries.title: Dog Pile
entries.content: Level 3 Goomshroom Tags: Elusive Action: Standard | Range | 60 ft | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | 1 round | | Save | Reflex | Cover the ground underneath your foe in sticky goo, entangling them for 1 round (reflex reduces to -15 speed). The goo lashes out and yanks your allies closer. Any allies can choose to move 30 ft closer to a creature targeted by this spell as an instant action.

entries.title: Rain Dance
entries.content: Level 3 Goomshroom Tags: Recharge, Weather Action: Standard | Range | - | | -------------- | --------------------------------- | | Target/AoE | 1 mile radius, centered on caster | | Duration | 1 hour | | Save | - | You dance a jig. After you complete your dance, clouds roll in and it starts to lightly rain after 1 minute. After the spell ends, the weather returns back to what it was before casting. All weather inducing spells do not function underground.

entries.title: Serenity
entries.content: Level 4 Goomshroom Tags: - Action: Standard | Range | - | | -------------- | -------------------------------------- | | Target/AoE | 30 ft radius burst, centered on caster | | Duration | 3 rounds | | Save | Will | You compel the enemies around you to cease fighting. Enemies are pacified (will negates). They get a new save against this effect each round. If you or one of your allies ally harms a pacified enemy, the effect ends on that enemy.

entries.title: That's All Folks!
entries.content: Level 4 Goomshroom Tags: Elusive Action: Standard | Range | 30 ft | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | - | | Save | Reflex? | Your staff grows to comically large size to move a creature to any space adjacent to you. If the creature is an enemy, it also becomes Clumsy 2 (reflex negates forced movement).

entries.title: Fairy Ring Retreat
entries.content: Level 6 Goomshroom Tags: Teleportation Action: 1 minute | Range | Reach | | -------------- | ----- | | Target/AoE | - | | Duration | - | | Save | - | You conjure up a Demiplane that can be accessed from a single entrance on the plane from which the spell was cast. The entry point looks like a circle of toadstools enclosing a 10ft circle. The inside is a demiplane in a one mile radius. Only those you designate can enter through the portal. You can designate a creature by carving its name into a special tree inside of the meadow. As a standard action you can banish a creature from your dimension. Once a visitor has passed through the entry point, they find themselves in an idyllic twilight meadow decorated with mushrooms surrounded by an impassable grove. The atmosphere is clean, fresh, and warm. The caster can configure the meadow into any shape desires with rolling hills and flowing rivers. The place is comfortable and temperate. The trees can provide enough food to sustain 20 people a day. A staff of 10 spectral animal or fey-like servants wait upon all who enter. They can perform simple tasks and can go anywhere in the meadow. Since the place can be entered only through its special portal, outside conditions do not affect the meadow, nor do conditions inside it pass to the plane beyond. A caster can only have one instance of this spell active at once. If they cast the spell again, it only moves the portal. Because this is a physical tangible location, things can be brought in and out of the portal. Like all extra-dimensional spaces, creatures can use plane shift (wild card 4) to teleport directly into the plane.

entries.title: Goomshroom
entries.content: The Shroomlette is an entity that represents the bond between gooms, a breed of squishy draconic creatures, and shroomkin, a race of people with close ties to fey and mushrooms. These two groups live in tandem with each other with one main goal: increase the quantity of happiness in the world. The tactics they use to do so is to subdue creatures that decrease happiness and physically change the world around them to make it a better place to live. Shroomlette spells either inspire teamwork or incapacitate creatures in some way, often through the manipulation of water. Includes many oddities mimicking the special abilities of gooms and shrooms.

entries.title: Dark Lure
entries.content: Level 1 Moogen Tags: Subtle Action: Standard | Range | 30 ft | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | 1 round | | Save | Will | A nearly invisible whip of shadows emerges from your staff and wraps around a target. The target is pulled towards you in a subtle way that makes it feel like it is of their own volition. At the start of their next turn, they spend all of their movement to move closer to you and cannot move away, then they can take their turn as normal. The DC increases by 4 if the target is DD. If the caster is defeated by the time the target's turn comes, the target is still lured.

entries.title: Imagination
entries.content: Level 1 Moogen Tags: Figment, Concentration Action: Standard | Range | 60 ft | | -------------- | ------------------------ | | Target/AoE | - | | Duration | Concentration + 1 minute | | Save | Will | You create an illusory object or creature that to all senses appears real. The size of what you create is limited to a 5x5x5 ft cube, but other than that, there are few limitations. You can create a fire, and it (seems to) gives off heat. You can create a dog and it bounces around in its space and barks. You can create a door that creaks as it swings on its broken hinges. When you initially cast the spell, you decide a type of behavior that your imaginary creation exhibits, and change it to suit your needs. Maybe you want your person that you made to dance, but then the party you're at the music stops. You can spend a standard action concentrating on the spell (as long as you have line of sight to your imagination) to have it change behaviors to instead bow before a king. You cannot change what you imagine, but you can change what your imagination does. Your imagination isn't limited to the laws of physics, so you can have it do incredibly unusual things, like having a person swim through air or a rock doing flips. However, when creatures see unusual stimuli like that, they get a save to disbelieve it. If someone points out it’s a fake, other creatures automatically see through it and it appears translucent to them. When used in combat, creatures may waste their time attacking the imaginary creature, but instead of rolling attacks or the imagination rolling saves, the attacking creature rolls a save. Failed saves indicate they miss or the creature resists the attack. Passed saves indicate they see through the ruse, and they can communicate this to their allies, making them automatically disbelieve it, causing the illusion to appear translucent to all. The "concentration" part of the duration allows you to indefinitely maintain this imagination as long as you concentrate each turn as a standard action. You must have line of sight to the imagination to concentrate on it. If you do not concentrate on the spell for 1 minute, it disappears. Upcast - Every 2 CLs, increase the maximum size of the illusions dimensions by 2 ft (7x7x7, 9x9x9 etc). If your CL is at least 12... The duration also changes to permanent, no longer requiring concentration. Dispel magic automatically succeeds against permanent imaginations.

entries.title: Living Shadow
entries.content: Level 1 Moogen Tags: Concentration, Figment Action: Swift | Range | 0 ft | | -------------- | -------- | | Target/AoE | - | | Duration | 1 minute | | Save | - | Your shadow detaches and forms a copy of you in your current space. It looks like you, but made of a shadowy mist with your eyes. It is stationary and mimics your attacks/gestures. You can use this shadow as the origin point for your spells and attacks. It can also make AoOs. You still must have line of sight to the target of your attacks/spells. As a swift action, you can teleport to this shadow if it is within 30 ft of you, ending the spell. This is a Teleportation effect.

entries.title: Nightcrawler
entries.content: Level 1 Moogen Tags: Buff Action: Swift | Range | Reach | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | 10 minutes | | Save | - | You gain nightvision. While in an area of Dim Light or Darkness, you turn into a dark silhouette version of yourself, with only your eyes remaining the same. This is a Glamer effect. If you are exposed to bright light, your form slowly returns back to normal over 3 rounds (~20 seconds). Returning back to darkness turns you back into a silhouette. You can toggle this shadow form off/on if you want yourself to be seen. While a silhouette, you get a +2 bonus on +Disguise and +Stealth.

entries.title: Shadow Weapon
entries.content: Level 1 Moogen Tags: Frost Action: Swift | Range | - | | -------------- | -------------- | | Target/AoE | Held weapon(s) | | Duration | 10 minutes | | Save | - | You transform a held weapon such that it appears to be made out of complete darkness, absorbing the light around it. You can also choose to transform your staff into another weapon to dual wield, making you unable to cast further spells. You can transform it back as a free action. If the weapon leaves your hands for longer than 1 round, it reverts back to its original state. Shadow weapons deal frost damage instead of their standard damage type. When you feint a creature while wielding them, they take (CL) frost damage.

entries.title: Vanish
entries.content: Level 1 Moogen Tags: Glamer Action: Swift | Range | - | | -------------- | ------ | | Target/AoE | Self | | Duration | 1 turn | | Save | - | Functions as Invisibility but only lasts until the end of turn.

entries.title: Ventriloquism
entries.content: Level 1 Moogen Tags: Prepared Action - | Range | - | | -------------- | --- | | Target/AoE | - | | Duration | - | | Save | - | You can cause your voice to sound as though it is originating from a location you can see within 30 ft of you whenever you speak.

entries.title: Wave of Darkness
entries.content: Level 1 Moogen Tags: Dark, Concentration, Upcast Action: Swift | Range | - | | -------------- | ----------------------------------------------- | | Target/AoE | 20 ft line, 10 ft tall, originating from caster | | Duration | 1 minute | | Save | Fort | You swipe at the air with your staff and a dark cloud washes over the area in front of you. The area is in total darkness while the spell persists. This also coats the casters space(s) in darkness. You can increase the cast time of this spell to a standard action to have it deal 2d8+CL (9+CL) cold dmg when you initially create it (fort halves). This also gives the spell the Frost tag. Upcast - Every 2 CLs, increase the distance of the line by 5 feet.

entries.title: Alone
entries.content: Level 2 Moogen Tags: Mind-Affecting, Upcast Action: Standard | Range | 30 ft | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | 3 rounds | | Save | Will | You cause the target creature to be alone. All of the creatures allies and neutral parties disappear to all the senses for the target. They are unable to interact with allies directly or target them with specific effects. They can't use anything that requires teamwork like flanking, using buff abilities, +Teamwork Feats etc. The benefits of such effects immediately end. They might be able to infer the position of their allies based off of how their enemies are acting. When a creature that possesses companions is targeted by this spell, they are unable to effectively coordinate with them. Their companions temporarily lose the teamwork feats and their commander's charisma bonus to attack while this spell persists. This also applies to individual companions targeted by this spell. Upcast - If your CL is at least 8... You can target an additional creature.

entries.title: Cloud of Darkness
entries.content: Level 2 Moogen Tags: Dark Action: Standard | Range | Reach | | -------------- | ----------------------------------------------- | | Target/AoE | 20 ft radius, centered on a point on the ground | | Duration | 1 minute | | Save | - | A cloud of black mist emerges from your fingertips. This mist absorbs all natural light and leaves the area where it covers in complete Darkness. You can use the spell to Dispel spells with the light tag. If you succeed, the darkness spell consumes the light and takes hold.

entries.title: Dead Silent
entries.content: Level 2 Moogen Tags: Concentration Action: Standard | Range | 60 ft | | -------------- | ----------------------------------------------------------------- | | Target/AoE | 20 ft radius, centered on a pointCan target self or an object | | Duration | 1 minute | | Save | - | Sound cannot be created in or enter the area of this spell. Creatures with the area are Silenced. Certain abilities dependent on sound like bardic performance, spell casting and abilities that deal sonic damage are all completely disabled. If you cast the spell on yourself, then it stays anchored to you, but it changes to a 10-foot radius and gains the buff tag.

entries.title: Hellscape
entries.content: Level 2 Moogen Tags: Mind-Affecting, Curse, Glamer, Psychic, Upcast Action: Standard | Range | 30 ft | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | - | | Save | Will | You alter a target's perception, causing it to perceive the world around it as though it were made entirely out of flesh, blood and viscera (will negates). It is shaken 2 while the curse persists. If it interacts with the environment, such as opening a door or climbing a tree, the shaken penalty increases by 1. If the creature is shaken 4 and has its shaken penalty increased through any means, it instead takes 2d8 (9) psychic damage. To remove the curse you must hug a child. Upcast - If your CL is at least 8... You can target an additional creature.

entries.title: Imaginary Friend
entries.content: Level 2 Moogen Tags: Companion, Mana Burn, Figment, Psychic Action: Standard | Range | Reach | | -------------- | ----- | | Target/AoE | - | | Duration | - | | Save | Will | A shadowy copy of yourself splits from your body. It follows you around and attacks your enemies. If you are proficient in +Stealth then it shares your stealth bonus. An imaginary friend shares all of your ability scores, AC, movement speed(s) and saves. It has half of your max hp and 20+CL Poise. It shares your LvL, but is always treated as a minion. It's only form of attack is single swipe using whatever weapon you are currently wielding. It is not a real attack, so instead of rolling an Attack Roll it deals 2d8 (9) psychic damage (will halves). Every turn it exists in Light levels brighter than dim light, it takes 10 true damage. Doesn't Threaten. You can choose to burn any amount of mana, increasing the shadows damage by 2 for each mana. The burn from this spell is removed if it is Defeated, but mana is not restored.

entries.title: Nearsighted
entries.content: Level 2 Moogen Tags: Dark, Upcast Action: Standard | Range | 30 ft | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | 3 rounds | | Save | Will | You cause a shadowy mist to cover a creatures eyes and reduce their vision range to 15 ft (will negates). All attacks made against the creature from beyond this range are made as though the target was DD. This effect only inhibits sighted creatures. Upcast - If your CL is at least 8... You can target an additional creature.

entries.title: Shadow Puppets
entries.content: Level 2 Moogen Tags: Subtle, Concentration, Figment Action: Standard | Range | 30 ft | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | - | | Save | Will | By holding your hands in the air and making some silly hand gestures, you can create sinister shadows along the ground and walls. As long as you concentrate, you can continue to make these innocuous shadow puppets for entertainment and such. Any creature proficient in arcana immediately gets a check to Identify Active Spell (DC 17) if they can see the puppet show. At any point (including immediately when you cast the spell) you can cause the shadows to come to life and take a bite or otherwise attack a creature. Even if you play with the shadows a bit and delay the attack, it still requires a standard action. The creature takes 3d8+CL (13+CL) slash or pierce damage and is frightened for one round (will halves damage and negates frightened). If a creature successfully identifies the spell during a show and either they are the target or they warn the creature that is, they get advantage on their saving throw. If the creature is unaware of the danger the shadow puppets hold and they are the target of the spell later, they have disadvantage on their saving throw. Both of these situations can only happen if the caster chooses to delay the negative effects of the spell. Tl;dr - You can cast the spell as a standard to play with shadows or attack. If you decided to play with the shadows for a bit, you must still spend a standard action to use the attack. Playing with the shadows can just be for flavor, or it can be a risky method to enhance its power against those not trained in arcana.

entries.title: Afterimage
entries.content: Level 3 Moogen Tags: Glamer, Figment Action: Swift | Range | - | | -------------- | -------- | | Target/AoE | Self | | Duration | See text | | Save | Will | Functions as Invisibility but only lasts until the end of your turn. In addition, you leave behind an illusory copy of yourself in your current position that repeats a simple type of movement you perform right before vanishing. This can be something like shadowboxing or crouching while looking around. This figment lasts for 1 round before disappearing. If a creature sees you use this technique, they know something is up. If they don’t see you use it, they treat it as the real you (will negates). A creature can identify your afterimages if they have seen one on another occasion.

entries.title: Encroaching Darkness
entries.content: Level 3 Moogen Tags: Dark, Concentration Action: Standard | Range | Reach | | -------------- | ----------------------------------------------- | | Target/AoE | 20 ft radius, centered on a point on the ground | | Duration | 1 minute | | Save | - | A cloud of black mist emerges from your fingertips. This mist absorbs all natural light and leaves the area where it covers in complete Darkness. At the end of each of your turns, the darkness spreads an additional 10 ft. You can use the spell effectively as dispel magic against a spell with the light tag. If you succeed, the dark spell consumes the light and takes hold.

entries.title: Eyes Everywhere
entries.content: Level 3 Moogen Tags: Subtle, Scrying Action: Standard | Range | Reach | | -------------- | ----- | | Target/AoE | - | | Duration | - | | Save | - | You pluck one of your eyes from your head and seal the empty eyelid. After, you place the plucked eye onto a surface. It melds into that surface and closes. By placing your hand over your other eye(s), you can open the plucked eye and gaze/hear through it instead of where your body is. By forcefully opening the sealed eye, you end this spell. If a creature pokes the eye, whether its open or closed, the spell ends. Otherwise, it lasts indefinitely. They eye appears as Moogen, The Murderer's eye instead of yours. Whenever the eye is open, creatures present can roll +Perception to notice it each day. The DC is either your spell DC, or 15+(your +Stealth bonus).

entries.title: Gutwrench
entries.content: Level 3 Moogen Tags: Mind-Affecting Action: Standard | Range | 30 ft | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | - | | Save | Will | Inflict a creature with a staggering pain in their stomach. When they look down, they see a blade inflicting a horrible wound upon them, either emerging from their stomach, or grazing their waist. What they see is what they believe, and what they believe manifests into reality. The creature takes 4d8+CL (18+CL) pierce damage and causes them to bleed d6 damage (will halves damage and negates bleed). The first turn a creature is bleeding from this spell, they are also effectively silenced as they cough up blood.

entries.title: Illusory Wall
entries.content: Level 3 Moogen Tags: Figment, Upcast Action: Standard | Range | Reach | | -------------- | -------- | | Target/AoE | 10x10 ft | | Duration | - | | Save | - | You create a wall, floor or ceiling of any type that can appear to be made of anything. It blends seamlessly with the nearby terrain to appear as natural as possible. If you cast a new illusory wall, the previous one disappears. If the wall would take any damage, it quickly fades. If a creature attempts to move through the wall or otherwise interact with it meaningfully, it quickly fades. Upcast - If your CL is at least 12... Previous illusory walls do not disappear when a new one is cast. You cannot chain cast illusory walls to make a bigger wall.

entries.title: Shadow Tears
entries.content: Level 3 Moogen Tags: Dark Action: Standard | Range | 30 ft | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | - | | Save | Will | The target is blinded and leaves behind a trail of darkness wherever they walk (will reduces blinded to Blurred Vision). While impaired by this spell, the space the creature occupies and every space they move into is occupied by a cloud of Darkness that extends 10 ft above the creature (aka increased based on size). After the creature moves 60 ft, the spell ends.

entries.title: Death Mark
entries.content: Level 4 Moogen Tags: Curse Action: Standard | Range | 60 ft | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | - | | Save | Will | A red mark appears along the creatures neck(s) resembling a bloody wound (will negates). They gain weakness 2 to all damage. As an immediate action over any distance, you can "pop" the mark, removing the curse and dealing 5d8+CL (23+CL) true damage. This curse is removed by killing (not defeat, killing) another creature of at least small size.

entries.title: Nightmare
entries.content: Level 4 Moogen Tags: Fear Action: Standard | Range | Unlimited | | -------------- | ------------------- | | Target/AoE | 1 sleeping creature | | Duration | - | | Save | Will | When you cast this spell, you fall into a catatonic state until your target falls asleep. You can choose to leave this state if you feel they are taking too long. When it falls asleep, it's dreams are plagued by horrific imagery of your choosing. When the creature wakes up from this dream, it is --drained 10 and Exhausted (will negates). This spell has no mechanical effect against a creature that is already drained, but you can still haunt their dreams if you want. If you know the creature well enough to know about some deep-seated fear that they have, the creature has Disadvantage on their saving throw. If the target is also subject to the Dream spell in the same night, they have advantage on their save. If they are subject to a dream council, then they are immune to this spell for that night.

entries.title: Piercing Gaze
entries.content: Level 4 Moogen Tags: Curse, Scrying Action: Standard | Range | 60 ft | | -------------- | ----------------------------------------------- | | Target/AoE | 10 ft radius, centered on a point on the ground | | Duration | - | | Save | Reflex | Close one of your eyes and cause a much larger illusory copy of it to open on the ground. It swells before bursting in a cloud of sharp fragments, dealing 5d8+CL (23+CL) pierce damage and applying a curse (reflex halves dmg and negates curse). While a creature is cursed with your piercing gaze, a tattoo of your eye appears on their back. You see their aura as a glowing outline around their person, even through Total Cover. You get a +8 bonus to +Perception against them and on survival checks to track them. At any point in the future, you can close your eye again (standard action) in the future to open an obvious illusory copy of your eye above a creature cursed with your piercing gaze. You can watch them through this eye indefinitely. If they attempt to move or cover the eye, it evades barriers attacks etc in order to keep line of sight on the cursed creature. This curse is removed by spending an hour to write your own eulogy, then burying it that night.

entries.title: Umbral Trespass
entries.content: Level 4 Moogen Tags: Elusive, Recharge Action: Standard | Range | Reach | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | 1 rounds | | Save | - | Fade away into shadowy mist and flow into the target of the spell. You disappear and enter stasis while you observe the world from the creature's PoV. On your next turn as a free action, you leave the creature's body in a violent slash, dealing 5d8+CL (22+CL) slash or pierce damage (fort halves) and dashing 15 ft away from the creature. This spell cannot be cast again for 1 minute.

entries.title: Darkvault
entries.content: Level 5 Moogen Tags: Teleportation Action: Swift | Range | 60 ft | | -------------- | ----- | | Target/AoE | Self | | Duration | - | | Save | - | Note: This spell can only be cast while you Hide. Teleport to a location of Dim Light or Darkness.

entries.title: Mirage
entries.content: Level 5 Moogen Tags: Figment Action: Standard | Range | - | | -------------- | --------------------------------- | | Target/AoE | 1 mile radius, centered on caster | | Duration | - | | Save | Will | You affect a wide area to completely change its appearance into something else. You can create an oasis in a desert, a house on a hill or make your house look like a flat piece of land. Creatures typically don't get a save to disbelieve the illusion unless something tips them off: bumping into a wall that shouldn't be there or drinking from a pool of water that holds only sand. The less suspicious and out of place the mirage is, the less likely creatures get a will save to see through it. Casting mirage a second time removes the previous one.

entries.title: Shadow Projection
entries.content: Level 5 Moogen Tags: Figment, Upcast, Dismissible, Scrying Action: Standard | Range | 300 ft | | -------------- | ------ | | Target/AoE | - | | Duration | 1 hour | | Save | - | You create an illusory duplicate that is shaped like you but it's almost entirely black, save for its eyes. You project this shadow to a location within the spells range that you can see. While occupying this shadow, you can speak and move around freely in this new illusory body. You can cast spells, but you cannot physically interact with objects otherwise. If the shadow is ever exposed to bright light, then it disappears. If it ever takes +HP damage, is Poise broken or fails a saving throw, then you also take the damage and it disappears. It uses all of your statistics to determine its defenses. Upcast - If your CL is at least 20... You no longer need to be able to see the position you initially project your shadow to, though you have to at least seen the place before. The spells range changes to unlimited.

entries.title: Invisibility
entries.content: Level 6 Moogen Tags: Glamer, Buff Action: Standard | Range | - | | -------------- | -------------------- | | Target/AoE | Self | | Duration | Until rest, see text | | Save | - | You appear to vanish from thin air. You gain Total Concealment, automatically take the hide action and get a +4 bonus on +Stealth checks while invisible. Objects that you carry turn invisible. This spell ends when you attack or otherwise take some form of aggressive action, like casting a spell on an enemy, or creating a dangerous Persistent effect. Certain environmental conditions can aid in seeing where this creature is. The presence of water or snow can give a better idea of their position. Inflicting a bleed effect can give you a trail of where they have been. Air that is dense from some kind of particle like dust, or actively throwing something like a bag of flour at the creature can also give you an idea of the creature's position. Regardless of whether or not you know what space the creature is, they still maintain their total concealment.

entries.title: Night's Veil
entries.content: Level 6 Moogen Tags: Dark, Recharge, Teleportation Action: Swift | Range | - | | -------------- | -------------------------------- | | Target/AoE | 60 ft radius, centered on caster | | Duration | - | | Save | - | All enemies immediately become nearsighted by a shadowy mist that covers their eyes, reducing their vision range to 15 ft. All attacks made against a nearsighted creature from beyond this range are made as though the target was DD. This effect only inhibits sighted creatures. You can choose to teleport just outside of a creature's vision range and hide as part of casting this spell. The effect persists until the end of your next turn.

entries.title: Moogen
entries.content: Moogen, The Murderer isn’t so much a creature as she is an idea. She is handily replaced by anyone who can outwit her, kill her, then take her place. She is a demon that exists in the shadows, content to play with the affairs of others (usually mortals). She regularly invites mortals into her loving arms as pawns in some kind of scheme, always ready with a knife to their back if they don’t play along. Moogen spells assist in turning off the lights, stealth, assassination and misdirection.

entries.title: Bush
entries.content: Level 1 Earth Mother Tags: - Action: Swift | Range | 30 ft | | -------------- | ------------------ | | Target/AoE | 1 unoccupied space | | Duration | 1 minute | | Save | - | You cause a bunch of tall grass to spring up. This space is overgrown and is considered difficult terrain. It also provides Cover to any attacks made into or through it. Despite being only a 5x5x5 ft patch of dense brush, a creature of an size can fit inside of it. You can take the hide action in or behind this bush as a free action the turn you cast this spell. The bush withers and fades after 1 minute, or 3 rounds if the environment couldn't otherwise sustain it. Dealing any slashing or fire damage to it destroys the bush.

entries.title: Hibernate
entries.content: Level 1 Earth Mother Tags: - Action: Standard | Range | Reach | | -------------- | ------------------------------ | | Target/AoE | 1 willing or defeated creature | | Duration | 24 hours | | Save | - | You cause a creature to enter a catatonic state akin to a deep sleep. Nothing short of taking damage can awaken the creature from its slumber. The creature gains the benefit of resting and is staggered for 1 minute after waking up if it slept the full duration.

entries.title: Natural Geomancy
entries.content: Level 1 Mother Earth Tags: - Action: 1 minute | Range | Reach | | -------------- | ------------------------------------- | | Target/AoE | One plant, or 10x10ft area of terrain | | Duration | 48 hours | | Save | - | For the duration of this spell, you get a mental ping whenever anything happens to the targeted plant or plot of terrain. You are informed what kind of interaction happened, such as whether it was trampled, touched, clipped, watered, etc. no matter how insignificant the interaction. You're also aware of the environmental conditions they are experiencing, such as approximate temperature, humidity, and even noise level. For animate plants, you gain a +2 bonus to +Nature checks to determine their health and needs, and can identify such mentally and remotely. This spell does not grant visual stimuli.

entries.title: Pet Check
entries.content: Level 1 Earth Mother Tags: Mind-Affecting Action: Standard | Range | Reach | | -------------- | --------------------- | | Target/AoE | 1 beast(ish) creature | | Duration | Varies | | Save | - | You reach over to a creature and pat its head. If it resembles an animal, even superficially, it is dazed On-hit for 1 turn. If it is a defeated creature that matches this description, it gets the time out condition for 1 hour. Tamed animals (such as beast companions) can be brought back from pet heaven with a counter pet as a swift action.

entries.title: Pollinate
entries.content: Level 1 Earth Mother Tags: Poison, upcast Action: Standard | Range | 30 ft | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | - | | Save | Fort | Shower a foe with a thick cloud of toxic plant dust. Creature takes d6+CL (3+CL) poison damage. The powder also has an additional effect (fort negates). Choose One: Poison Powder - Creature takes an additional (3+CL) poison damage at the end of its turns (fort ends effect). Rage Powder - Creature is taunted by you for one round. Upcast - If your CL is at least 8, gain the following options. Sleep Powder - Creature is put Asleep (fort reduces to Drowsy). Stun Spore - Creature is dazed for 1 turn. Deadly Poison Powder - Creature takes an additional 2d6+CL (7+CL) poison damage at the end of its turns (fort save after damage is taken ends effect).

entries.title: Speak with Animals
entries.content: Level 1 Earth Mother Tags: Prepared Action: - | Range | - | | -------------- | --- | | Target/AoE | - | | Duration | - | | Save | - | You can speak with Beasts as though you share a common language. They are able to much better articulate their feelings as though they possessed the intellect of a simple humanoid, but their instincts, desires and attitude toward you remain largely the same.

entries.title: Tree Shape
entries.content: Level 1 Earth Mother Tags: poly, true Action: Standard | Range | - | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | Self | | Duration | Until Rest | | Save | - | Transform into a young living tree, a large shrub or dead tree. The type of tree, as well as its appearance, is under your control. While in tree form, you can observe the world around you just as if you were in your normal form. You can dismiss tree shape as a free action. You get a +10 bonus to +Stealth/+Disguise while in tree form and can use either skill to evade detection, otherwise people will think something is fishy about this tree. You cannot move or take any actions while in tree form, but you can speak.

entries.title: Vine Whip
entries.content: Level 1 Earth Mother Tags: Prepared Action: - | Range | - | | -------------- | --- | | Target/AoE | - | | Duration | - | | Save | - | Two long and supple green vines grow from your body. You can use these vines to hold and manipulate objects within 15 ft, but not wield equipment, such as weapons, shields or staves. These function as whips, but they are considered natural attacks and deal d6 crush damage.

entries.title: Wild Growth
entries.content: Level 1 Earth Mother Tags: - Action: Standard | Range | 60 ft | | -------------- | ----------------------------------------------- | | Target/AoE | 20 ft radius, centered on a point on the ground | | Duration | - | | Save | - | Enemies within the spell's area have plants suddenly grow in the chinks of their armor and around their feet, tangling their joints. They have their speed reduced by 15. The plants can be destroyed by dealing 1 slashing or fire damage to them, or 10 damage of any other type.

entries.title: Ants in your Pants
entries.content: Level 2 Mother Earth Tags: - Action: Standard | Range | 30 ft | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | 3 rounds | | Save | Reflex | You launch a stream of ants that get your opponent MOVING (reflex reduces effect to only damage for 1 round). The target takes (CL) pierce damage at the start of their turn. They must start each of their turns by moving 10 ft in a random direction. Being immersed or drenched in water, taking any AoE damage or something else suitable can reduce the duration of this spell or remove the ants completely. The ants automatically disperse if the foe is defeated.
entries.path: Techniques/Magical Techniques/Mother Earth/level-2/Ants in your Pants.md

entries.title: Arboreal Army
entries.content: Level 2 Mother Earth Tags: Concentration, Upcast Action: Standard | Range | - | | -------------- | ---------------------------------------------------------------- | | Target/AoE | 20 ft radius, centered on a point on the ground, or yourself | | Duration | 1 minute | | Save | - | All the nearby plants snap to attention, ready to receive orders. As a swift action each turn, you can command a nearby inanimate plant to Bully a nearby creature by bending its trunk or swinging its branches. Its bonus is your CL. It gets Advantage if the creature is currently inside of the attacking tree, bush etc. The spell name assumes trees, but it can be any type of vegetation, even the grass someone stands in. What the Reach of the plant is, is based on its size. Trees are generally pretty tall, giving them ~15 feet of reach while bushes, tall grass and such have much less. Upcast - If your CL is at least 8... You can target 2 creatures to bully as part of the same action.

entries.title: Fairy Dust
entries.content: Level 2 Mother Earth Tags: - Action: Standard | Range | 30 ft | | -------------- | ----------------------------------------------- | | Target/AoE | 5 ft radius, centered on a point in the air | | Duration | Varies | | Save | See Text | You borrow some fairy dust from the fey wilds and toss it at your enemy, with a variety of effects. Choose One: - Sparkles - Coat creatures in brilliant sparkly particles. Attacks made against a creature covered in sparkles have Seeking. Sparkly creatures have a -10 stealth penalty. - Flashy - The dust sparkles so brightly that it blinds creatures for 1 minute (reflex reduces to blurred vision). At the end of a creature's turn, they can make an additional save to reduce the condition. Blind>blurred vision>normal. - Rainbow pattern - Targets are fascinated for 1 minute (will negates).

entries.title: Fetch
entries.content: Level 2 Mother Earth Tags: Mind-Affecting, Concentration Action: Standard Spell Focus: 1 Stick, Ball or Similar Object | Range | 30 ft | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | Duration | | Save | Will | You wiggle an object at a creature in range and toss it to a space within 30 feet of it and you. The creature must spend all of its actions to retrieve this object and bring it back to you (will negates). If you ever get more than 30 feet away from the object, you are no longer visible to the target or the creature successfully brings it back to you, the spell ends. If there is something that impedes the creature's movement, it can reasonably spend its actions dealing with this obstacle (a wall of sheep, creature is grappled etc). If the creature does not retrieve the item after the first turn, then it gets an additional save at the end of each of its turn to shake off the compulsion to fetch. This spell’s DC is 2 higher when targeting Beasts.

entries.title: Nourish
entries.content: Level 2 Mother Earth Tags: - Action: Standard | Range | Details Vary | | -------------- | ------------ | | Target/AoE | Vegetation | | Duration | - | | Save | - | You infuse plants with life, with a variety of effects. Choose one: - Cultivate (recharge) - You cause a single dying plant to become vibrant, putting it on the correct path for future growth. If you Mana Burn, you can even accelerate its growth one stage. Seed>seedling>sapling>adult. If you target creatures that are Plants, you can instead grant them 5+CL Temp HP. This gives the spell the Healing tag. - Fertilize (recharge) - Tracts of land become more habitable for plants, enriching soil and removing contaminants, assuring future growth. You target 1 square mile. Contaminators might not be too happy… - Constrict - An enemy within 30 ft must roll a reflex save or be entangled. Creature can spend a standard action to breakout.

entries.title: Power of the Sun
entries.content: Level 2 Mother Earth Tags: Psychic, Fear, Dismissible, Persistent, Upcast Action: Standard | Range | 30 ft | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | 1 hour | | Save | will | You temporarily instill great fear of the sun to a creature. Every turn the creature starts its turn in an area lit with sunlight or moves into a sun-lit area, it takes 2d6 (7) psychic damage and is shaken 1. Upcast - If your CL is at least 8... You can target an additional creature.
entries.path: Techniques/Magical Techniques/Mother Earth/level-2/Power of the Sun.md

entries.title: Queen Bee
entries.content: Level 2 Mother Earth Tags: Buff Action: Swift | Range | - | | -------------- | -------- | | Target/AoE | Self | | Duration | 1 minute | | Save | - | You summon a swarm of bees that intuitively follow your orders without need for speech. The bees won’t enter water. You must maintain a tether to them using the swarm almost like an additional limb that if separated, immediately disappears. You take a -5 penalty to +Stealth checks and you have a hover speed of 30. The bees hover around you and can perform a few sets of tasks... - Interact (action varies) - The bees can perform tasks with a high degree of precision such as picking up objects and opening doors. They can perform any task you could perform with your hands (including skills like SoH) at a range of 20 feet - Sting (standard) Venom - Automatically deal (2+CL) pierce damage to a single creature within 10 feet. They are also staggered for 1 round (fort negates). - Protect (immediate) - The bees move to block an attack, giving you a +4 bonus to ac or +4 bonus to a reflex save. This subtracts 5 rounds from the duration of the spell

entries.title: Wall of Sheep
entries.content: Level 2 Mother Earth Tags: Concentration, Upcast Action: Standard | Range | 60 ft | | -------------- | -------------------------------- | | Target/AoE | A wall 20 ft high and 20 ft wide | | Duration | 1 minute | | Save | - | You summon a flock of sheep that quickly pile up on top of each other to form a fluffy impassable barrier. If you summon the wall in a space occupied by a creature, the creature can choose which side of the wall they end up on. The sheep are completely impervious to all forms of attack unless it is a +Combat Maneuver. The wall has 20 poise. When poise broken, a 5x5 section of the wall falls apart and the sheep that occupied that space disappear. If the creature who broke through the wall was larger, the hole is also large enough for them to fit (10x10 large, 15x15 huge etc). In order to interact with the wall, it requires maneuvering through the unruly sheep. You must beat the casters spell DC to balance on or climb the wall. Upcast - Every 4 CLs, increase one of the dimensions of the wall 5 ft.

entries.title: Floristry
entries.content: Level 3 Mother Earth Tags: Companion, Upcast Action: Standard | Range | 30 ft | | -------------- | --------------------- | | Target/AoE | A point on the ground | | Duration | 1 minute | | Save | - | You cause a vibrant thorn spitter to sprout from the ground. It does not have access to any special attacks. It mindlessly shoots your enemies for the spells duration, focusing a target you choose when you cast, or the nearest creature if the first target leaves the flowers range. It loses 10 hp each turn. When it is defeated, it wilts and crumbles to dust. If the flower is summoned in an area that otherwise wouldn’t sustain it, such as underground or in stone, it loses 25 hp at the end of each of its turn. Upcast - If your CL is at least 8... The flower gains access to its special attacks.

entries.title: Forest's Curse
entries.content: Level 3 Mother Earth Tags: Curse Action: Standard | Range | 30 ft | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | - | | Save | - | You curse a foe to wander aimlessly and suffer while in forested terrain. They take a -10 penalty to survival checks made to navigate in forest/jungle type terrain. They also lose poison resistance if they have it. In order to remove this curse, the creature must plant 3 new trees in 3 different locations.

entries.title: Mad Monkeys
entries.content: Level 3 Mother Earth Tags: Companion, sonic Action: Standard | Range | 30 ft | | -------------- | -------- | | Target/AoE | - | | Duration | 1 minute | | Save | - | ???

entries.title: Oaken Summons
entries.content: Level 3 Mother Earth Tags: Companion, Healing, Recharge Action: Standard | Range | 30 ft | | -------------- | -------- | | Target/AoE | - | | Duration | 1 minute | | Save | - | You grow bark on the exterior of your skin and to summon a treant to your aid. Gain (3*CL) temp hp when you cast this spell. The treant understands druidic and does its best to aid you. When you lose this temp hp, the treant disappears. This spell can only be cast 1/minute.

entries.title: Persistent Pranksters
entries.content: Level 3 Mother Earth Tags: Concentration Action: Standard | Range | 30 ft | | -------------- | -------- | | Target/AoE | - | | Duration | 1 minute | | Save | - | You summon a group of playful fairies that fly around the battlefield and bother your enemies. They do not have any hp, but they do have 25+CL poise. If they are ever poise broken, they disappear. On your turn they can fly at a speed of 30 feet and make a +Combat Maneuver against a creature. The result of the combat maneuver is always 20+CL. You can direct them to focus on specific creatures.

entries.title: Sunny Day
entries.content: Level 3 Mother Earth Tags: Recharge, Weather Action: 1 minute | Range | - | | -------------- | --------------------------------- | | Target/AoE | 1 mile radius, centered on caster | | Duration | 1 hour | | Save | - | The clouds part and the sun shines brightly. All plant creatures in the area gain +2 Attack and FH 1. You cannot cast this spell at night.

entries.title: Leech Seed
entries.content: Level 4 Mother Earth Tags: Healing, Necrotic, Concentration Action: Standard EffectRange30 ftTarget1 CreatureDuration1 minuteSaveReflex Shower a foe with seeds that take root inside of their skin (reflex negates). At the end of your turn, they take (5+CL) necrotic damage and you recover hp equal to the damage if you are within 30 ft. As an immediate action, you can divert the flow of energy to bestow this healing upon another creature within 30 ft of you. If neither you nor an ally is within 30 ft of the seeded creature, the damage does not occur.

entries.title: Solar Power
entries.content: Level 4 Mother Earth Tags: Fire, Recharge Action: Swift | Range | Details Vary | | -------------- | ------------ | | Target/AoE | - | | Duration | - | | Save | - | Special: This spell can only be cast during the day with access to the open sky. During the initial turn you cast this spell, you accumulate energy from the sun. On the following turn, choose one to do as a standard action… Solar Blade - Make a melee attack with a +2 bonus to Attack. It does 5d10+CL (22+CL) fire damage. Solar Beam - Target a 60 ft line that is 15 ft wide with 5d8+CL (17+CL) fire damage (reflex halves). The DC is 2 higher. Rather than damage plants, it invigorates them, curing fatigue. If you are unable to take actions on the following turn, you lose the charge and the mana. This spell cannot be cast in any turn you fire a solar beam or attack with a solar blade.

entries.title: String Shot
entries.content: Level 4 Mother Earth Tags: - Action: Standard | Range | 10 ft | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | - | | Save | Fort | Shoot a precise string of webbing/vines at a creature. They are entangled and you may slam them against the ground into any position within the spells range to deal 5d6+CL (17+CL) crush damage (fort negates damage and repositioning effect). Creature can remove this automatically as a swift action or Breakout as a swift action to remove entangled.

entries.title: Voice of the Forest
entries.content: Level 4 Mother Earth Tags: Upcast, Scrying Action: 10 minutes | Range | - | | -------------- | ---------------------------------- | | Target/AoE | 10 mile radius, centered on caster | | Duration | - | | Save | - | Note: This spell can only be cast in a densely forested area (such as a rainforest or woodland). With special training, you can learn to cast it in other areas where life is plentiful, like coral reefs. You enter a trance while you slowly become one with nature over the cast time. Once you have completed the cast time, your spirit separates from your body and it is free to wander and explore. There is no limit on on how long you can remain in this trance, but staying in for many hours leaves your body hungry and tired. While in spirit form you have a sixth sense for detecting water sources and when the forest is being significantly damaged within the spells area. Someone cutting down a tree isn't enough to trigger this, but a large scale lumber organization cutting away is. When you detect one of these things, you can appear overhead to observe. Other creatures cannot see you unless they can also see invisible creatures or ghosts. At any point, you can decide to speak. You can make your voice soft or loud and you can make it seem to emanate all around the area, giving you advantage on +Intimidation. You can also cause any of the nearby creatures to exhibit any behavior natural to them, such as being completely silent, making noise or perching overhead. They won't engage with dangerous situations at your request. Upcast - If your CL is at least 16... The AoE of the spell increases to 100 miles.
entries.path: Techniques/Magical Techniques/Mother Earth/level-4/Voice of the Forest.md

entries.title: Rebirth
entries.content: Level 5 Mother Earth Tags: - Action: 1 minute Material: 5k worth of rare herbs and spices | Range | Reach | | -------------- | ------------------ | | Target/AoE | 1 willing creature | | Duration | - | | Save | - | This spell can be used by creatures hoping to change themselves. After the cast time completes, the creature falls unconscious to dream about its new self as a cocoon forms around them. 24 hours pass and they awaken in their new form. The creature can change its race, its gender and its physical appearance to its liking. The creature has complete control over all features such as racial traits, height, age, skin color etc as long as it falls within reasonable parameters for the race. If the cocoon is destroyed, the spell fails and the creature inside is killed.

entries.title: Savage Roar
entries.content: Level 5 Mother Earth Tags: Mind-Affecting Action: Standard | Range | - | | -------------- | ------------------------------------------------ | | Target/AoE | All allies in a 30 ft radius, centered on caster | | Duration | - | | Save | - | Let out a powerful roar to inspire savagery and anger in your allies. All allied creatures make a melee attack against a creature within reach. Beasts and any creature that can understand druidic get a +4 to Attack.

entries.title: Solar Eclipse
entries.content: Level 6 Mother Earth Tags: Light, Concentration, Recharge, Weather Action: 1 minute | Range | - | | -------------- | --------------------------------- | | Target/AoE | 5 mile radius, centered on caster | | Duration | 5 minutes | | Save | Reflex | You alter the composition of the heavens in such a way to mimic the effect of a solar eclipse. All creatures caught in the radius of the spell when it is first cast without proper eye protection are blinded for the duration of the spell (reflex reduces to Blurred Vision). Creatures in the spells radius take a -4 penalty on +Perception even if they aren't blinded. What constitutes protection either covers the eyes completely, or are glasses specifically designed to block the powerful light of the eclipse. The caster can create a pair of these glasses for 100g. Solar eclipse ends automatically if Lunar Eclipse is cast in its range, cancelling each other out.

entries.title: Mother Earth
entries.content: The oldest of all the deities and the creator goddess. Mother Earth is interested in the constant struggle between nature and those who would seek its destruction or exploitation.
