The proliferation of life and balance between all living things are what her followers preach. Mother Earth spells primarily manipulate plants, animals and other aspects of nature to aid those who seek to protect it.

entries.title: Blue Attack
entries.content: Level 1 Nack Tags: Upcast, Blue Action: Standard | Range | 30 ft | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | - | | Save | - | You cause a creature to turn blue. Their skin is turned blue and objects on their person have a blue tinge to them. This blueness is automatically removed by any dispel effect. Upcast - If your CL is at least 8... You can make the creature any color, giving the spell the appropriate color tag.

entries.title: Foxdie
entries.content: Level 1 Nack Tags: - Action: Standard | Range | 30 ft | | -------------- | -------- | | Target/AoE | - | | Duration | 1 minute | | Save | - | You summon a relatively average looking fox at a point you can see. At your command, you can cause it to make noises typical of a fox. After which, it explodes violently in a tiny fiery mushroom cloud. This does not cause damage to anybody or anything, nor does it dirty anything. If you do not cause it to make noise, it disappears within 1 minute.

entries.title: Pants
entries.content: Level 1 Nack Tags: - Action: Standard | Range | 30 ft | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | - | | Save | - | You undo belts, buttons and zippers on a creature's pants as they are forcefully removed and folded into a pile next to them. This spell does not work when used against targets wearing heavy armor.

entries.title: X-ray
entries.content: Level 1 Nack Tags: Buff Action: Swift | Range | - | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | Self | | Duration | 10 minutes | | Save | - | While this spell is active your eyes gain and unusual swirly quality to them that overlaps over your usual features. The spell allows you to see through clothing/armor while it is worn by a creature.

entries.title: Big Head Mode
entries.content: Level 2 Nack Tags: poly, chimeric Action: Standard | Range | 30 ft | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | 10 minutes | | Save | Fort | You increase a creatures head to be double its original size, doing little more than inconveniencing and embarrassing them (fort negates). A creature cannot be the target of this effect more than once each day.

entries.title: Form of Waifu
entries.content: Level 3 Nack Tags: poly, true, Buff. Dismissible Action: Standard | Range | - | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | Self | | Duration | Until Rest | | Save | - | You transform into a cute Anime girl/boy. You have exceptionally large eyes, wacky hair and abnormal colors. Your voice also changes accordingly. You can speak and understand manganese while transformed.

entries.title: Pornportions
entries.content: Level 3 Nack Tags: poly, chimeric Action: Standard | Range | 30 ft | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | Until Rest | | Save | Fort | You cause a creature to have incredibly exaggerated proportions, focusing primarily on the sex characteristics. Women get incredibly curvy or impossibly thin, men get enormous members, or you can mix and match features of the creature to match a particular taste. This spell cannot give creatures parts they do not have, only alter the ones they do. Get Advantage on sex checks...If you roll that kind of thing.

entries.title: Kaijumorph
entries.content: Level 4 Nack Tags Concentration Action: Standard | Range | - | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | Self | | Duration | 10 minutes | | Save | - | You grow to be 100 ft tall, proportions changing as appropriate. This does not give you extra carry weight, strength, or destructive capabilities. It does not even increase your reach. You still possess the same exact weight. If you are targeted with a harmful effect, take damage or cease concentration, you immediately shrink back to your normal size.

entries.title: Power Word Fun
entries.content: Level 5 Nack Tags: - Action: Standard | Range | - | | -------------- | -------------------------------- | | Target/AoE | 30 ft radius, centered on caster | | Duration | 1 round | | Save | - | Special: This spell can only be cast while the caster is deprived of a standard action or otherwise unable to cast spells. You temporarily and partially negate CC on yourself and nearby creatures. For creatures who are stunned, dazed, in stasis, in time out etc. This spell does not end the cc, but it allows creatures who are affected by them to do anything that could reasonably be considered "not mechanically beneficial" such as singing, dancing, juggling (unless these actions could somehow be mechanically beneficial) or casting a Nack spell. This does not allow movement, attacks, defensive features etc. that you would normally be deprived of. This is a meme. If you try to anyway, you are put in time out until combat ends. Any creature in range, regardless if they are CC'd, adds extra flair in all their actions, or emotes like they're in a video game. Even if they try not to, they can't help but bob their head and tap their feet. The caster can immediately use any other Nack spell as a free action.

entries.title: Awaken
entries.content: Level 6 Nack Tags: Recharge Action: Standard | Range | Reach | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | - | | Save | - | You give a plant or animal sentience. Its intelligence increases to +0. If it is a plant, it gains a 30ft speed and the ability to uproot without killing itself. Creatures gain big goofy eyes and a mouth to speak with. They learn common. What happens after that is largely based up to it. Certain types of creatures may have certain mannerisms. Predators tend to be more aggressive, for instance. Beavers are more industrious. They can look upon their past and present with great clarity, recognizing mistreatment and caring. This spell has a 1 week cooldown.

entries.title: Nack
entries.content: Special: Nack spells cannot be learned via technique points. They can only be learned by finding books containing their knowledge. When these books are read, you gain the spell as an at-will innate technique, and the book vanishes. Since the spell level is mostly irrelevant, it mostly just refers to the rarity. Nack is a mysterious mage who uses his mastery of magic in order to create mostly useless and niche magic. He also has enough free time to hide these books all over the world in secluded places. Very few of the spells are as powerful as one might expect of a mage, but they are usually interesting, quirky and fun. A mage with mastery over Nack spells is not more powerful because of it, but they're probably more fun to have at parties.

entries.title: Blight
entries.content: Level 1 Necromancy Tags: Necrotic, Upcast Action: Standard | Range | 30 ft | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | 1 minute | | Save | Fort | You briefly allow a creature to experience the joy of decomposition. They take 2d8+CL (9+CL) necrotic damage and are sickened 2 (fort halves dmg and negates sickened). Upcast - Every 4 CLs, target an additional creature.

entries.title: Bone Shaker
entries.content: Level 1 Necromancy Tags: Necrotic Action: Standard | Range | 30 ft | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | - | | Save | Varies | Note: The spell cannot target creatures that are BONELESS. A successful monster lore check against a creature reveals if it has bones. The spell's effect varies depending on what you target. Living Creature - The creature takes 2d8+CL (9+CL) necrotic damage and is staggered for one round (fort haves damage and negates stagger). Willing or Mindless Undead - The creature spends an immediate action to make an attack against a creature within reach or move 30 feet in a direction of your choosing. Unwilling Undead - Functions as willing undead (will negates)

entries.title: Call of the Grave
entries.content: Level 1 Necromancy Tags: Upcast, Earth, Concentration Action: Standard | Range | 60 ft | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | - | | Save | Reflex | Cause several arms to erupt from the ground and grab onto a creature. The creature is entangled (reflex negates). The hands share your AC, and have poise equal to their AC. On-hit, when the hands are poise broken, or with a successful Breakout as a standard action (DC=their AC) they retreat back into the ground. Upcast - Every 4 CLs, target an additional creature in range.

entries.title: Decomposition
entries.content: Level 1 Necromancy Tags: - Action: Standard | Range | 30 ft | | -------------- | ----------------------- | | Target/AoE | 12 corpses, or 1 undead | | Duration | - | | Save | - | You cause a group of corpses to rapidly experience decomposition, turning in them into skeletons almost instantly. Perfect for cleanly storing in your closet. If cast on an undead creature, they instead take 2d6+CL (7+CL) true dmg. This can happen accidentally if you happen to target an undead buried amongst corpses. If you target multiple undead accidentally, 1 randomly takes the damage.

entries.title: Grasping Corpse
entries.content: Level 1 Necromancy Tags: - Action: Standard | Range | 30 ft | | -------------- | -------- | | Target/AoE | 1 corpse | | Duration | - | | Save | - | A corpse reaches out and attempts to Topple or Shove a creature within the natural reach it had in life. The attack bonus the corpse uses is your CL. The target is DD for this maneuver. When used out of combat, this has the subtle tag.

entries.title: Grave Robber
entries.content: Level 1 Necromancy Tags: Prepared Action - | Range | - | | -------------- | --- | | Target/AoE | - | | Duration | - | | Save | - | You gain an innate sense for when corpses are nearby. You can sense them buried up to 30 feet underground. You can read the text written on tombstones and similar things, even if the text has long since faded. If you can see a corpse, you know what its name was in life. As a standard action, you can reach into the ground and pull out an entire corpse if it is not inside of a container of some sort. Undead creatures have a visible aura around them unless they are your LvL or higher.

entries.title: Halt Undead
entries.content: Level 1 Necromancy Tags: - Action: Standard | Range | 30 ft | | -------------- | -------- | | Target/AoE | 1 undead | | Duration | 3 rounds | | Save | Will | You command an undead creature to bend to your will, and you will it to stand still. It is entangled (will negates). An intelligent undead creature gets a new save at the end of each of its turns. If an undead companion is affected by this spell, you can aid them if they are within 30 ft to free them, barking a new command.

entries.title: Life Transfer
entries.content: Level 1 Necromancy Tags: Healing Action: Standard | Range | Reach | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | - | | Save | - | You transfer fundamental life energy between yourself and the target. Choose one. Heal You can inflict drained upon yourself in order to heal the target. You become drained, up to your CL and you heal double that in +HP to the target, or remove an equal amount of drain from the target. Harm Alternatively, you can Mana Burn to inflict drained stacks you possess onto another creature. This requires an attack roll and removes up to CL drain from yourself to inflict it on your target on-hit. If you miss, you do not mana burn. You must be drained to use this variant of the spell.

entries.title: Mr Skeltal
entries.content: Level 1 Necromancy Tags: Companion] Action: Standard Focus: 1 instrument | Range | Reach | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 corpse | | Duration | 10 minutes | | Save | - | Raise a skeleton from a corpse whose only calling is to jam. Give it the instrument used as the focus of this spell and it will play it with a bonus of (CL+2) whenever you ask. When not playing, it follows you around. If you give the skeleton a trumpet, its bonus increases to (CL+4). Doot.

entries.title: Animate Dead
entries.content: Level 2 Necromancy Tags: Companion Action: 3 rounds | Range | Reach | | -------------- | -------- | | Target/AoE | 1 corpse | | Duration | - | | Save | - | You lay your hand on a corpse, reanimating it with profane power into a zombie, or tearing the skeleton from its body. The creature is mindless, but it does understand your orders. It will protect you when you are in danger or carry out simple manual labor. Animated dead act on your turn in initiative, meaning they are automatically surprised if you are. If given no orders, they mindlessly follow you. Defeated Undead, Constructs, and Elementals cannot be targeted by animate dead. If a creature has multiple types and includes one of these types, it cannot be targeted by animate dead. You Mana Burn equal to the number of total Levels of undead you control with animate dead (minimum 1 per undead). When these undead are defeated, you lose this burn, but mana is not restored. First, choose one of the following Skeleton - Weakness (crush 2) Zombie - Weakness (slash 2) The spell has complex rules on how this changes the creatures stats. | Level | The creatures LvL is set to 1/3 your level upon creation (minimum 0). | | ---------------- | --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | | Ability Scores | The creature loses its INT score. It's STR and DEX remain the same. It's remaining stats are set to +0. | | Skills | The creature loses all of its skills. It shares your perception bonus. | | Feats | The creature loses all of its feats. | | Defensive Traits | The creature loses all of its defensive traits other than resistance, immunity and DR. It gains Resistance to necrotic damage and +4 bonus to saves against effects to control it. The first time it is defeated, it is instead reduced to 1 hp unless it is defeated by holy damage. | | Attacks | The creature maintains all of its natural attacks, but not any multiattack options. It can wield weapons if it wielded them in life. | | Offense Traits | Lose all offense traits unless it is marked as a special attack and is not a technique. | | Other Traits | Keep swim/climb/land speed. Gain nightvision. Lose everything else. | Special: The spell is going to be cast on a wide variety of creatures, some of which don't exactly fit the mold. Certain features you may want to get rid of and keep something from the creature. Some features might be too powerful on certain creatures and should be removed. DM discretion. Ex. The creature is blind and senses only using tremorsense. Keep the tremorsense, don't give night vision. Special: If you die, your undead act instinctively, usually attacking whatever is close at hand at random (including your allies). Special: You can create multiple companion creatures of the same type with this technique.

entries.title: Bone Cage
entries.content: Level 2 Necromancy Tags: Buff Action: Swift | Range | 30 ft | | -------------- | -------- | | Target/AoE | 1 corpse | | Duration | 1 minute | | Save | - | Note: The spell cannot target creatures that are BONELESS. A successful monster lore check against a creature reveals if it has bones. You tear the bones out of a corpse and use them to shield yourself. You get +2 AC. If a creature poise breaks you, it can choose to break this bone armor instead of the usual effects.

entries.title: Gloom Bolt
entries.content: Level 2 Necromancy Tags: Necrotic, Upcast Action: Standard | Range | 30 ft | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | - | | Save | - | You shoot a ray of necrotic energy that interferes with the creature's vision. Make a Ranged Spell Attack that deals 3d8+CL (13+CL) necrotic damage and blinds On-hit for 1 round. Upcast - Every 4 CLs, fire an additional ray at a different creature.

entries.title: Skeleton Crew
entries.content: Level 2 Necromancy Tags: Action: 1 minute Material: 1 skull of a race | Range | - | | -------------- | -------- | | Target/AoE | - | | Duration | 24 hours | | Save | - | Speak aloud a specific task and channel your energy into a skull. At the end of the duration, the skull disintegrates. Around you emerges several skeletons from the ground. The exact number varies, but cannot be more that a dozen. Depending on the task you asked of the skeleton, you are granted the bare minimum number of simple laborers that are required to do things like operate a ship or move many small objects. They dutifully perform the task they were commanded when the spell was cast. When the job is complete or the spell ends, they crumble to dust. The skeletons effectively have -1 in all of their Ability Scores and no Skill Proficiency. They cannot perform the Aid action or aid in combat at all. If they take damage, they clatter into pieces and reform after 1 round, unless that damage was Holy damage.

entries.title: Spectral Hand
entries.content: Level 2 Necromancy Tags: Prepared Action: - | Range | - | | -------------- | --- | | Target/AoE | - | | Duration | - | | Save | - | You summon an ghostly bloodied hand that you can used to deliver melee attacking spells from a range. Spell attacks with a range of reach gain a range of 30 ft. You can make these attacks as melee attacks or ranged attacks. Defaults to melee. The hand ambiently floats around you when not in use, but you can choose to pocket it if you don't want creatures to see it.

entries.title: Asphyxiate
entries.content: Level 3 Necromancy Tags: Concentration Action: Standard | Range | 30 ft | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | 3 rounds | | Save | Fort | Note: Because this is a concentration spell, it requires you hold your staff. Because it also detaches a hand, it requires you also have a free hand. One of your hands detaches and flies over to a creature to choke it and lift it into the air (fort negates). They take 2d6+CL (7+CL) crush damage. The creature is silenced, entangled, cannot ingest consumables and takes the same damage again at the end of each of its turns as long as you stay within 30 ft of them. If the target passes its save, you move more than 30 ft away from the target, or the spells duration expires your hand flies back and reattaches automatically. Your hand can be targeted using all of your statistics, but it has Cover.

entries.title: Corpse Explosion
entries.content: Level 3 Necromancy Tags: Necrotic, Upcast Action: Varies | Range | 30/60 ft | | -------------- | -------------------------- | | Target/AoE | 1 corpse5/10 ft radius | | Duration | - | | Save | Reflex | The effect, range and cast time of this varies depending on what you target. Allied Undead (Immediate) - You can cast this freely on any undead you control, even in response to one being destroyed. The creature bloats and cracks before bursting, dealing 3d8+CL (13+CL) necrotic damage (reflex halves). This kills the undead. A Corpse (Standard) - You can cast this spell on any corpse. Its range increases to 60 ft, its AoE increases to 10 ft but its cast time increases to a standard action. Upcast - If your CL is at least 12... You set off a chain reaction, causing all corpses in the spell's AoE to also explode, and the corpses they effect and so on. A creature can still only be damaged by a single explosion.

entries.title: Corpse Transposition
entries.content: Level 3 Necromancy Tags: Teleportation Action: Swift | Range | 30 ft | | -------------- | --------------------------------- | | Target/AoE | 1 corpse, or 1 undead you control | | Duration | - | | Save | - | Briefly vanish in a pool of blood before exploding violently out of the target corpse/minion. If you targeted an allied undead, this kills the undead.

entries.title: Drain Soul
entries.content: Level 3 Necromancy Tags: Healing Action: Standard | Range | 30 ft | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | - | | Save | Fort | You borrow a piece of creature's soul. They are drained 5+CL (fort reduces drain to an equal amount of necrotic damage). You regain 10 hp.

entries.title: Going Ghost
entries.content: Level 3 Necromancy Tags: Upcast Action: Standard | Range | - | | -------------- | ------ | | Target/AoE | Self | | Duration | 1 Turn | | Save | - | Turn Incorporeal until the end of your turn. Upcast - If your CL is at least 12... Instead turn incorporeal until the end of your next turn.

entries.title: Unholy Frenzy
entries.content: Level 3 Necromancy Tags: - Action: Standard | Range | - | | -------------- | -------------------------------- | | Target/AoE | 30 ft radius, centered on caster | | Duration | - | | Save | - | Give your undead companions within the spells area a +4 bonus to Attack this turn. Choose one specific creature within range of the spell. All undead under your control rush this target down, moving up to it and making a Simple Attack. If the undead can make ranged attacks, it need not move. This is in addition to whatever actions they take on their turn.

entries.title: Corpse Possession
entries.content: Level 4 Necromancy Tags: Scrying, Upcast, possession Action: 1 minute | Range | Reach | | -------------- | -------- | | Target/AoE | 1 corpse | | Duration | - | | Save | - | This spell spell functions as animate dead, but changes as follows. It raises the creature as a zombie version of itself. Upon completion, your spirit leaves your body and inhabits the zombified corpse. You can inhabit this corpse indefinitely, and speak through it in the creatures voice, your own, or a raspy mixture of the two. You can choose to no longer inhabit the corpse at any time, returning back to your body and causing the magic animating it to leave. This kills the zombie. While you animate this corpse, any other undead you have animated enter a coma, and reanimate once you return. Upcast - If your CL is at least 12... You can choose to animate the corpses of 3 similar creatures at once, such as members of a town guard.

entries.title: Haunted
entries.content: Level 4 Necromancy Tags: Scrying, Subtle, possession Action: Standard | Range | 30 ft | | -------------- | -------------------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature or object | | Duration | 1 hour | | Save | Will | Take a creature or an object for a ride. Detach your spirit from your body, causing it to look like you are napping or have your head in the clouds. Attach your freed spirit to a creature or object within range (will negates against creatures). If the object is worn or possessed by a creature (ha), then you are effectively targeting the creature and it still gets a save. If you are successful, you can swap between using your own senses and the senses of what you are attached to. The creature remains unaware of your presence unless you make it known. You can telekinetically move objects within 30 ft around while haunting. Objects weighing less than 5 pounds can be tossed and objects under 100 lbs can be slowly dragged. You can also telepathically speak to the creature, making your voice sound vague and ghost-like or your own voice. A creature with arcana or +Religion recognizes the moving objects or voices as a possession with a DC 14 check. By uttering a prayer or drinking Holy Water, the spell immediately ends. You can also choose to end it willingly at any time.

entries.title: Vile Vigor
entries.content: Level 4 Necromancy Tags: Mana Burn, Healing Action: Standard | Range | 30 ft | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | - | | Save | - | You can remove practically any non-Permanent Status ailment at the cost of your own magic. You mana burn to remove it, increasing in amount based on the status ailment. 1 - Minor Status - Asleep, bleed, blurred vision, charmed, entangled, fatigued, fascinated, grounded, knocked down, shaken/sicken/clumsy stacks, frosty, wet. 2 - Major Status - Bone chilled, ablaze, blinded, confused, envenomed, frightened, staggered, silenced, taunt. 3 - Extreme Status - Dazed, pacified, stun, stasis. You can change the mana burn into drain to cast this spell as a swift action.

entries.title: Final Hour
entries.content: Level 5 Necromancy Tags: Buff, Curse Action: Swift | Range | 60 ft | | -------------- | ---------------- | | Target/AoE | 1 willing undead | | Duration | 2 rounds | | Save | - | A surge of necrotic energy imbues an undead creature, giving it a very noticeable aura. It takes a -5 penalty to +Stealth and becomes Invincible. It is afflicted with a curse that destroys it at the end of its second turn.

entries.title: Shackles of Pain
entries.content: Level 5 Necromancy Tags: Concentration Action: Standard | Range | Reach | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | 1 minute | | Save | Will | You share your pain with another creature, represented by ethereal shackles that connect you two (will negates). While within 60 ft of this creature, you take half damage, and the other half of the damage is transferred to it as true damage. If the creature leaves this range, the shackle breaks. Spaces moving away from the caster are considered Difficult Terrain to the target.

entries.title: Beyond Death
entries.content: Level 6 Necromancy Tags: Prepared, Recharge Action: - | Range | - | | -------------- | --- | | Target/AoE | - | | Duration | - | | Save | - | When you are defeated or killed, you can choose to spend 6 mana to enter a ghost state. While in this state, you can freely speak, use Supernatural abilities and cast spells, but your speed is 0 and you cannot make Weapon Attacks, Natural Attacks or Unarmed Attacks. At the end of your next turn, your spirit reunites with your body and this effect ends. Your ghost remains tethered to your body. You cannot move on your own without the aid of magic, but other creatures can physically move your body to adjust the position of your ghost. This effect can only happen once each day.

entries.title: Possess Body
entries.content: Level 6 Necromancy Tags: Concentration, Recharge, possession Action: Standard | Range | 30 ft | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | - | | Save | Will | You turn incorporeal and siphon into a creatures mouth to take control of their body (will reduces effect to Staggered for 1 round). On each of your subsequent turns, you can play as that creature using all of its abilities and statistics except hp. In order to use activated abilities, you must have seen the creature use them, or succeed on a +Monster Lore check (DC 15+lvl of creature). If you do not, then you must spend 1 week to accommodate yourself to the new body. Creatures under your control like summons or undead still recognize you as their master. When you are defeated, dispelled etc, you appear in a space adjacent to the possessed creature and are staggered for 1 round and the creature is drained 15. If cast on a defeated creature, there is no save. Because the spell uses your vitality to sustain the creature, you can immediately stand up and start fighting. You get a plus +8 bonus to +Disguise checks to pretend to be this creature. You can swap between your voice and the creatures voice at will. The creature you possess is still aware of everything you do through its own senses but obviously cannot act on it. The spell cannot be cast again until you rest in your real body. When you rest while possessing a creature, you regain your hp, the body gains all of the other benefits from resting.

entries.title: Skelepathy
entries.content: Level 6 Necromancy Tags: Concentration, Recharge Action: Standard | Range | 30 ft | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | 1 minute | | Save | - | Note: The spell cannot target creatures that are BONELESS. A successful +Monster Lore check against a creature reveals if it has bones. Speak directly to a creature's skeleton, setting it free from the tyranny of its fleshy host. This spell functions as animate dead, but with a few bonuses… * You can target creatures that aren't dead (including undead, but not undead that are only bones) * Its level is set to the level of the creature the spell is cast on * Its max HP is the current HP of the creature at time of casting * It has the +Profession (dance, trumpet) skill (bonus=CL+4)

entries.title: Necromancy
entries.content: Necromancy Necromancy spells are about manipulating the dead and inflicting dead, often via necrotic damage.

entries.title: Blazing Palm
entries.content: Level 1 Prismancy Tags: Fire Action: Standard | Range | 60 ft | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | - | | Save | - | You fire a shining ray to melt your foe. Roll a ranged attack that deals 2d8+CL (9+CL) fire damage. On a hit applies glowing for 1 round.

entries.title: Sacred Flames
entries.content: Level 1 Prismancy Tags: Prepared Action: - | Range | - | | -------------- | --- | | Target/AoE | - | | Duration | - | | Save | - | Your heat is infused with holy light. Whenever you cast a spell that does fire damage, its damage counts as fire and holy. The spell's tags change as appropriate.

entries.title: Flame of Destiny
entries.content: Level 2 Prismancy Tags: Light Action: 1 minute | Range | Reach | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | - | | Duration | Until Rest | | Save | - | You create a stationary bonfire whose flames move in slow motion, and illuminate an area of 100ft. It can be put out like any standard fire. By resting next to the fire and gazing into its flames for at least 10 minutes, your deity shows you visions of a prominent creature that it wants you to defeat or apprehend. This creature is always a similar level to you, and is a leader of some sort at the forefront of operations in opposition to your deity: a necromancer, bandit chief, cult leader etc. This creature is also somewhat close by in terms of proximity, only targeting creatures you can realistically find within a week of travel using your current means of transportation.

entries.title: Solar Flare
entries.content: Level 2 Prismancy Tags: Light, Fire, Recharge Action: Standard | Range | - | | -------------- | -------------------------------- | | Target/AoE | 60 ft radius, centered on caster | | Duration | - | | Save | Reflex | Close your eyes and unleash a blast of solar energy that deals (CL) fire damage to all other creatures and blind them for 1 round (reflex negates). If you have High Ground, the DC is 2 higher.

entries.title: Blazing Beam
entries.content: Level 3 Prismancy Tags: Fire, Upcast Action: Standard | Range | 30 ft | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | - | | Save | - | Fire a beam that magnetizes to Glowing creatures. Make a Ranged Attack. The target takes 4d8+CL (18+CL) fire damage. If they are not glowing, they begin glowing. If they already are glowing, this attack has Seeking and deals an additional 10 damage. This removes the glowing. Upcast - Every 2 CLs, increase the spells range by 5 ft.

entries.title: Radiance
entries.content: Level 3 Prismancy Tags: Light Actions: Standard | Range | Reach | | -------------- | -------------------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature or object | | Duration | Until Rest | | Save | - | You cause the target of the spell to emanate an exceptionally bright light. The area within 60 ft of the target is bathed in bright light. You can use the spell effectively as dispel magic against a spell with the dark tag. If you succeed, the light spell consumes the dark.

entries.title: Plasma Blade
entries.content: Level 4 Prismancy Tags: Buff, Fire, Light Action: Swift | Range | - | | -------------- | --------------------------------- | | Target/AoE | Held melee slash or pierce weapon | | Duration | 1 minute | | Save | - | Imbue a weapon in hand with searing light, changing its damage to d6+CL (3+CL) Fire damage. It becomes weightless. It gives off bright light within 20 feet. As part of casting this spell, you may make a simple Spell Attack with this weapon. Every turn after, you can make another simple attack as a swift action. If you make any additional attacks with it, it consumes an additional 4 mana with each swing. Apply glowing for 1 round On-hit with this weapon. If the plasma blade leaves your possession, this spell ends after one round.

entries.title: Prismatic Body
entries.content: Level 4 Prismancy Tags: Buff, Light, Fire Action: Swift | Range | - | | -------------- | -------- | | Target/AoE | Self | | Duration | 1 minute | | Save | - | You become a being of pure light, allowing you to move through glass and obstacles that do not block light (such as wire fences) freely. You shed light in a 20-foot area. This form can be suppressed while in areas of magical darkness, but you automatically attempt to dispel any such area at the start of your turns. Sighted creatures that attack you are considered to have blurred vision against you, and creatures that successfully Melee Attack you or that Grapple you are set ablaze (reflex negates). No matter how many attacks a creature makes, they cannot be forced to make multiple saves a turn.

entries.title: Rainbow Beam
entries.content: Level 5 Prismancy Tags: Light, Fire Action: Standard | Range | - | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 60 ft line | | Duration | - | | Save | Reflex | Fire a rainbow that deals 6d8+CL (27+CL) fire damage and applies Glowing to enemies (reflex halves dmg). If the enemy was already glowing, they instead have Disadvantage on all d20 rolls for 1 round. Instead of harming allies, it grants them a Lucky Rainbow - visible as an aura around them. They may consume this rainbow to Reroll any one attack, save, skill check or ability check within a minute, after which it disappears. A creature may only have one Lucky Rainbow on them at a time. It lasts one minute. Also creates bright light in its area for a round.

entries.title: Purge
entries.content: Level 6 Prismancy Tags: Light, Fire, Concentration, Persistent Action: Standard | Range | - | | -------------- | ---------------------- | | Target/AoE | 60 ft line, 15 ft high | | Duration | 3 rounds | | Save | Reflex | You fire a beam of purifying light, dealing 7d8+CL (31+CL) fire damage and blinding everything it hits for one round (reflex halves dmg and negates blind). This automatically destroys objects of solid or lesser toughness, and if it's enough to break them, it continues past them. This damage area is persistent, and creatures that enter it must save against the damage. Fiends and undead creatures that fail their saves are set ablaze. You may not move while concentrating on this spell. At the start of your next two turns, the damage occurs again, and you may sweep the beam up to 45 degrees to target a new line and everything between the two lines that gets caught in the sweep. The sweep area is not persistent, but the new line is. Turn 1: Line Turn 2: Sweep, new line Turn 3: Sweep, new line Turn 4: Spell ends at the start of your turn

entries.title: Prismancy
entries.content: The prismancy tree is all about inflicting a unique status effect called glowing. This status effect can be consumed by spells in this tree to trigger bonus effects. Prismancy spells deal fire damage and light up the battlefield.

entries.title: Astrology
entries.content: Level 1 Psionics Tags: Recharge Action: 1 minute Material: 1 scroll or parchment | Range | Reach | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | - | | Save | - | Note: In order to cast this spell, you must know the target's date of birth, and have access to the night sky. When the spell is complete, you convert a scroll or parchment into a Horoscope. The target can read the Horoscope to gain insight into some of the strengths and failings they may have within the next 24 hours. As long as they have the horoscope on their person, they may add 2 to the natural die roll on any skill check. This cannot exceed the natural 20 limit of a d20. After they use this benefit, the horoscope disappears. A creature that cannot read cannot benefit from their Horoscope. A creature may only benefit from Astrology once per day.

entries.title: Dream
entries.content: Level 1 Psionics Tags: Buff Action: Standard | Range | Infinite | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | 30 minutes | | Save | - | You enter a trance like state as you try to intercept the thoughts of a specific named sleeping creature. You can remain in this trance as long as you'd like, waiting for the target creature to fall asleep. When they do, the spells duration begins and you appear in their dreams. You can make conversation with them, but the creature is under no compulsion to speak with you and can handily boot you out of their dreams. While interacting with a creature in a dream, you get a +2 bonus to skill checks. Note: Creatures like elves with the trance racial feature always realize when they're being contacted by a dream spell. They can take a moment to center themselves, enter trance and allow the spell to take hold.

entries.title: Levitate
entries.content: Level 1 Psionics Tags: Prepared Action: - | Range | - | | -------------- | --- | | Target/AoE | - | | Duration | - | | Save | - | You decide gravity isn't your thing. You gain a hover speed equal to your land speed.

entries.title: Mind Crush
entries.content: Level 1 Psionics Tags: Mind-Affecting, Psychic, Upcast Action: Standard | Range | 30 ft | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 Creature | | Duration | - | | Save | Will | You overload a creatures brain with information, giving them a hell of a headache. They take 2d8+CL (9+CL) psychic damage (will halves). Upcast - Every 4 CLs, the spell deals (CL) damage again at the end of their turn (will halves).

entries.title: Mind Link
entries.content: Level 1 Psionics Tags: Mind-Affecting Action: Standard | Range | Reach | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | - | | Save | - | With a touch, communicate a vast quantity of information by showing the target brief memories and psychic impressions. You can communicate the broad strokes of an experience you had, including important locations, people, events and feelings. The experience must be shorter than 1 hour. Casting on an unwilling creature requires an attack roll.

entries.title: Psychic Reading
entries.content: Level 1 Psionics Tags: Mind-Affecting, Subtle, Concentration Action: Standard | Range | 30 ft | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | 3 rounds | | Save | - | You focus on a creature's aura to learn more information about them. Roll a CL check, DC 10+(creature's LvL). If you succeed, you can learn information from their aura, and even more by concentrating. Every round you learn a piece of information about it from the following list (caster's choice). * Sexual Orientation * Race/Species * Gender * Level * Native Language * What city/sanctuary they consider "home" * Age You can only cast this spell on a given creature once per day.

entries.title: Sending
entries.content: Level 1 Psionics Tags: - Action: Standard | Range | Infinite | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | - | | Save | - | You deliver a message to a creature over any distance. In order to communicate with a creature, you must have met them, and you must know their name. When you cast the spell, you telepathically communicate simple ideas that require no more than two sentences to convey (Monsters are attacking the north gate. How do we respond?). Your target can immediately reply with the same restrictions. If your message is too complex or too long, the creature is dead, or the creature is on another plane then it gets lost in the ether and the caster takes 1 psychic damage. You can only cast sending on a particular creature once each day unless you mana burn 1 each cast. Upcast - If your CL is at least 8... Add 1 mana Burn to instead have a telepathic conversation with this creature that either of you can cut off at any moment. The spells duration is increased to 10 minutes.

entries.title: Concentrated Blast
entries.content: Level 2 Psionics Tags: Force Action: Standard | Range | 60 ft | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | - | | Save | - | Note: This spell can only be cast when concentrating on something. Release your mind from the strain of concentration, channeling this raw mental energy into a projectile you launch at a target within range. Make a Ranged Attack that deals 3d10+CL (16+CL) psychic damage. This spell immediately ends the spell you were concentrating on, immediately restoring the ended ability's mana cost (if it had one). If you are concentrating on multiple spells at once, you can end both spells to restore more mana.

entries.title: Cull the Weak
entries.content: Level 2 Psionics Tags: Prepared, Psychic Action: - | Range | - | | -------------- | --- | | Target/AoE | - | | Duration | - | | Save | - | You sense weakness in your enemies. Whenever a creature lives with 1 hp, you know. You can spend an instant action to deal 2 psychic damage to them. You can only do this to an individual once each minute.

entries.title: Detect Thoughts
entries.content: Level 2 Psionics Tags: Concentration, Mind-Affecting, Subtle Action: Standard | Range | 30 ft | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | 10 minutes | | Save | Will | Every turn as a standard action you can scan a creature you can see. You can read the surface thoughts of the creature for as long as you desire (will negates), requiring no additional action. The spell gives you the mental capacity to have a conversation with the creature and hear its thoughts at the same time. The creature gets no save if they are Helpless.

entries.title: Memory Lapse
entries.content: Level 2 Psionics Tags: Mind-Affecting, Subtle Action: Standard | Range | 30 ft | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | - | | Save | Will | You cause a target to forget the events that have transpired in the past 2 rounds of combat (aka last 12 seconds). Certain details may cause them to recall what you did during that time, such as seeing you in a restricted area, or an ally reminding them.

entries.title: Share Memory
entries.content: Level 2 Psionics Tags: Mind-Affecting, Concentration Action: Standard | Range | Reach | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | - | | Save | Will | With a touch, you can tap into your targets memories (will negates) or your own, decided when you initiate mental contact. In any case, both parties see what is being viewed. The memory is limited to one minute duration. If gazing into another creatures memories, you must specify the type of memory or specific memory you want to look at. Against a helpless creature, this has no save. If you cannot maintain physical contact, the spell ends.

entries.title: Dream Council
entries.content: Level 3 Psionics Tags: Buff Action: Standard | Range | Infinite | | -------------- | ------------------ | | Target/AoE | Up to 10 creatures | | Duration | 30 minutes | | Save | - | You enter a trance like state as you try to intercept the thoughts of up to 10 specific named sleeping creatures. You can remain in this trance as long as you'd like, waiting for the target creature(s) to fall asleep. When they do, you and any creatures you specify enter a shared dream space where you can make conversation with them. The creatures are under no compulsion to speak with you and can leave the dream space at any time. Using the spell typically requires coordination beforehand in order to get everybody to attend the council. The duration of the spell starts when you contact at least one creature. While interacting with a creature in a dream, you get a +2 bonus to skill checks.

entries.title: Mirror Realm
entries.content: Level 3 Psionics Tags: Scrying Action: Standard Focus: 1 roughly person-sized mirror | Range | 30 ft | | -------------- | ------------------- | | Target/AoE | 1 mirror/1 creature | | Duration | 24 hours, 1 minute | | Save | Will | This spell has two functions, trapping for combat and hosteling for shenanigans. In either case, you must target a mirror. When you do so, the contents of the mirror are set in stone and cease to reflect reality, instead creating its own little world that resembles what it reflected. Hosteling You cast this version on a mirror in order to create an extradimensional space with some interesting quirks. The space itself is a copy of everything within a 30ft distance from the mirror. This means the mirror realm can capture entire rooms, including things that are hidden from line of sight (such as behind furniture) This allows your extradimensional space to contain furniture for instance. No effects can come in or out of the mirror realm, but both sides can see what is on the other side of the mirror, barring any kind of physical obstructions that would prevent sight (such as drapery). By tapping on the mirror from either side you can cause the noise to carry over. On casting the spell you can include a password that needs to be spoken in order to walk into the mirror (no action). This password can be changed with 1 minute of concentration from the caster. You can also update the mirror's appearance to keep it inconspicuous should the environment change drastically. The caster can go blind and deaf temporarily to project their senses into the mirror realm at will indefinitely. Objects cannot be brought out, nor can objects be brought in aside from what the average humanoid can reasonably carry on their person. Any such objects left behind are shunted out, along with any creatures, if the mirror is destroyed or the spell ends. Can be made permanent using 2,000g worth of powdered rare metals as an addition material component during casting Trapping When casting the trapping form, you must target a creature AND an appropriately sized mirror (both of which need to be in range of you, but not each other). If the creature fails its save, it is immediately sucked into the mirror (with a similar setting as the aforementioned hosteling effect). No other creature can enter the mirror realm without another casting of this spell. This does not prevent it from taking actions, but it can no longer interact with anything outside of the mirror realm, nor can any creature interact with the trapped individual. The target is stranded. They can see out of the mirror by standing next to it. The only way they can escape is by having an ally destroy the mirror, or by waiting for 1 minute. In either case, the creature appears in a random space within 15 feet of the mirror's line of sight.

entries.title: Telekinetic Charge
entries.content: Level 3 Psionics Tags: Elusive, Upcast Action: Standard | Range | 30 ft | | -------------- | ------ | | Target/AoE | 1 Ally | | Duration | - | | Save | - | Lift an ally, including yourself, into the air using telekinesis and fling them anywhere within reach of the spell. If they are within Reach of an enemy at the end of the movement, they can make a simple Melee Attack. Upcast - Every 4 CLs, increase the range of the spell by 5 ft.

entries.title: Telekinetic Lift
entries.content: Level 3 Psionics Tags: Prepared Upcast Action: - | Range | - | | -------------- | --- | | Target/AoE | - | | Duration | - | | Save | - | You exert your psychic power to manipulate heavy unattended objects within 30 ft. You can lift objects weighing up to (100*CL) pounds, having them float in the air around you. Lifting objects with this spell has the concentration tag, but otherwise does not restrict your movement, occupy your hands etc. As a standard action, you can drop an object weighing a few hundred pounds on a creature to deal 2d8+CL (9+CL) damage (reflex halves). The damage type varies depending on what you drop, usually crush. Upcast - If your CL is at least 12... Increase carrying capacity to (1000 x CL) lbs. Dropped objects in the thousands of pounds deal 4d8+CL (18+CL) damage. If your CL is at least 20... Increase carrying capacity to (10,000 x CL) lbs. Dropped objects in the thousands of pounds deal 6d8+CL (27+CL) damage.

entries.title: Telekinetic Maneuver
entries.content: Level 3 Psionics Tags: Buff Action: Standard | Range | - | | -------------- | -------- | | Target/AoE | Self | | Duration | 1 minute | | Save | - | As part of casting the spell and as a standard action for the spells duration, you can perform a +Combat Maneuver using (CL+3) as your bonus. Some maneuvers work slightly differently as noted below. Drag - Move the creature to another position within 20 ft, up to 20 ft. Grapple - While grappling, this spell also has the concentration tag. Instead of dealing the damage of a held weapon, you instead deal 2d6+CL (7+CL) crush dmg each turn. You must spend your standard action to do this each turn or the grapple ends. Your speed is not 0 while grappling. You do not need to pull the target adjacent to you. Any damage you take while concentrating also deals poise damage. If poise broken or moved farther than 30 ft from the creature, this effect ends.

entries.title: The Stars Align
entries.content: Level 3 Psionics Tags: Prepared, Recharge Action: - | Range | - | | -------------- | --- | | Target/AoE | - | | Duration | - | | Save | - | You can foresee events, but you do not know when they will occur. The first time each day you roll serendipity or a luck check of some kind, you add +4 to this check.

entries.title: Malleable Memory
entries.content: Level 4 Psionics Tags: Mind-Affecting, Concentration Action: Standard | Range | Reach | | -------------- | ---------------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | Up to 10 minutes | | Save | Will | You root around in the targets head, removing things and adding things to their memories. This spell has 2 functions. Alter Memories - You can change details about memories, or add entirely new ones. Remove Memories - You can completely remove memories of events. In either case, you have to have at least a basic idea of what you're looking for (when they saw me break into that house, watching their spouse die in front of them). The spell can get very precise in its ability to alter memories, allowing you to remove specific items or creatures, but otherwise maintain everything else. The duration of the spell is equal to the amount of memory that you want to change. 2 minutes of fighting you want to erase? 2 minutes of concentration. For alterations that total longer than 5 minutes (including multiple strings of casts around the same time), the creature will fight to remember things that were altered or removed. When presented with contradictory evidence or otherwise prompted to think about these heavily modified memories, they get an additional save against the effect to restore their original memories. A creature that is Helpless does not get an initial save. When you take damage or if the target moves out of reach, the spell ends.

entries.title: Memory Movie
entries.content: Level 4 Psionics Tags: Mind-Affecting, Concentration Action: Standard | Range | Reach | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | 10 minutes | | Save | Will | Tap into a creature’s memories and display them on a small screen so nearby creatures can also see what you experience. Memories are viewed from the target’s perspective, so if they have impaired or inferior senses, so do you when you view the memory. You must decide what specific memory or type of memory to view (ie. first kiss, 20th birthday party). You view the memory in real time and you have the ability to skip ahead and rewind minutes at a time to better pinpoint important moments. When cast on yourself or a willing creature, the duration increases to 1 hour and you can freely change what memories you look at on a whim, allowing for improved curation. Creatures that are Helpless do not get a save against this spell. When you take damage or if the target moves more than 30 feet away from you, the spell ends. Cannot view magically altered memories, such as those created or manipulated by Malleable Memory, or those eliminated by the River Styx.

entries.title: Glimpse of Truth
entries.content: Level 5 Psionics Tags: - Action: Swift | Range | - | | -------------- | ------- | | Target/AoE | Self | | Duration | 1 round | | Save | - | You see everything as it truly is. - You automatically disbelieve all illusions, such as figments, patterns and glamers - If a creature is under the effects of a polymorph effect, you can see the creature's true form - You can see Invisible creatures - You gain Darkvision

entries.title: Telekinetic Thrust
entries.content: Level 5 Psionics Tags: - Action: Standard | Range | 60 ft | | -------------- | ------ | | Target/AoE | Varies | | Duration | - | | Save | Varies | You can perform one of the following actions, manipulating matter with your mind. | Name | Effect | | --------- | ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | | Toss | Briefly take hold of a creature's body (fort reduces to 20 Poise damage) and throw them across the battlefield. You move them 30 ft and they take CL crush damage. | | Crumple | Briefly take hold of a creature's body (fort reduces to 20 Poise damage) and slam them against the ground. They are knocked down and take 5d8+CL (22+CL) crush damage | | Artillery | Lift large objects or numerous small objects by breaking stone off of walls, shattering branches into needles etc.Toss these objects at your foes. Creatures within range in a 10 ft radius take 5d8+CL (22+CL) physical damage (reflex halves) based on the objects that you threw. | | Maneuver | Functions as telekinetic maneuver, but with a bonus of (5+CL). Cannot grapple. |

entries.title: Tabula Rasa
entries.content: Level 6 Psionics Tags: Mind-Affecting Action: 1 minute Material: 1 bucket of Lead Paint | Range | Reach | | -------------- | ----------------------- | | Target/AoE | 1 Helpless creature | | Duration | - | | Save | - | Force the lead paint used as a material component to cycle through the creatures circulatory system, with the highest concentrations settling in the creature's brain and the rest being vomited out. You completely remove all memories a creature has, making them a blank slate. This includes people they knew, events they experienced and locations around the world. If it can fall under the category of knowledge, they forget it. They still understand basic mechanics of the world, like gravity, temperature etc. As a result of this complete mind wipe, the creature will not know basic things about their own life, such as their family, their name or "how they act." At first they will likely not express very strong emotions or opinions of things as they reshape their ideas on them. Occasionally minor details from the creature's subconscious will emerge, but without context, they will likely be written off as dreams. This effect cannot be removed through conventional means, such as Dispel or +Medicine. It requires a complex series of tasks related to the creature's past. To even begin the process, the creature must be exposed to... A person of significance - This doesn't need to be a specific person, but most people have at least one person they are close to: A lover, a child, a teacher, a priest etc. They must have a conversation with this person. An event of significance - Nonspecific. They must go to the scene where something major happened in their life, such as a near-death experience, a place where a great tragedy they experienced happened or a remote place they went on a pilgramage to when they were younger. An object of significance - Nonspecific. They must witness an object of great significance to them, such as an artist's magnum opus is on display, or a warriors Legendary Weapon. With each step, the creature's hallucinations and dreams will become more vivid and memorable, potentially providing clues to the next step in the process. With all three, you can finally perform a medical procedure to remove the lead from their brain, requiring a DC 30 first aid check. Failure makes the effects of this spell irreversible outside of GM Magic.

entries.title: Telekinesis
entries.content: Level 6 Psionics Tags: Buff Action: Standard | Range | 60 ft | | -------------- | -------- | | Target/AoE | Varies | | Duration | 1 minute | | Save | Varies | You exert your psychic power to such an extent that you are able to manipulate heavy objects and toss creatures around against their will. Your eyes glow and you emit a constant repulsive force pushing away loose objects nearby. For the duration of the spell, you gain a hover speed equal to your land speed. You can use this speed to fly during your turn as a free action. Upon casting the spell, and every turn after as a standard action, you can perform one of the following actions. | Name | Effect | | ------------------- | ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | | Toss | Briefly take hold of a creature's body (fort reduces to 20 Poise damage) and throw them across the battlefield. You move them 30 ft and they take CL crush damage. | | Crumple | Briefly take hold of a creature's body (fort reduces to 20 Poise damage) and slam them against the ground. They are knocked down and take 5d8+CL (22+CL) crush damage | | Artillery | Lift large objects or numerous small objects by breaking stone off of walls, shattering branches into needles etc.Toss these objects at your foes. Creatures within range in a 10 ft radius take 5d8+CL (22+CL) physical damage (reflex halves) based on the objects that you threw. | | Maneuver | Functions as telekinetic maneuver, but with a bonus of (8+CL). | | Repulsion Force | Unleash all of the spell's energy at once for one final blast. All creatures within 10 ft of you take 7d8+CL (31+CL) force damage and are pushed 60 feet away from you (fort halves damage and push distance). Repulsion immediately ends telekinesis. |

entries.title: Psionics
entries.content: The psionics tree is something that has been developed piecemeal over long periods of time, culminating into its current form under the guidance of an entity by the name of Santa. The psionics tree uses psychic powers to gather information and out maneuver foes before the battles even begin. If it does come down to a fight, you can crush foes' minds or toss them around with telekinesis. Long distance communication is easy with spells like dream and sending. Creatures won't be able to keep secrets from you with access to spells like detect thoughts and memory movie.

entries.title: Blazing Bulwark
entries.content: Level 1 Pyromancy Tags: Fire Action: Immediate | Range | - | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | - | | Save | Reflex | Special: Must be wielding a shield to cast As part of casting the spell, take the Block or Shields Up action. The attacker is set ablaze (reflex negates).

entries.title: Bouncing Blast
entries.content: Level 1 Pyromancy Tags: Fire, Upcast Action: Standard | Range | 60 ft | | -------------- | ----------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature? | | Duration | - | | Save | - | You toss a mote of flame that hungers for more if it successfully consumes its target. Make a Ranged Spell Attack against a creature that deals 2d8+CL (9+CL) fire damage. If it defeats the creature, it make another attack that deals the same damage to another creature of your choosing within 30 ft of the target. This can continue indefinitely. Upcast - For every 2 CLs, gain +1 attack.

entries.title: Forbidden Flame
entries.content: Level 1 Pyromancy Tags: Fire Action: Standard | Range | 60 ft | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | - | | Save | - | Convert all of your mana into heat with a spark. Cause the air to explode in a creatures face, dealing 2d8+CL (9+CL) fire damage. You automatically spend all of your mana when you use this technique. For each mana spent beyond the first, increase the spells CL by 1.

entries.title: Hot Streak
entries.content: Level 1 Pyromancy Tags: Buff Action: Swift | Range | - | | -------------- | -------- | | Target/AoE | Self | | Duration | 1 minute | | Save | - | Supercharge your staves, decreasing the mana cost of all abilities with the fire tag by 1, but increasing the mana cost of all other mana expenditure by 2.

entries.title: Pillar of Flame
entries.content: Level 1 Pyromancy Tags: Fire, Concentration, Upcast, Persistent Action: Standard | Range | 60 ft | | -------------- | -------------------- | | Target/AoE | One Space, 30ft high | | Duration | 1 minute | | Save | Reflex | Ignite a circle on the ground and cause a pillar of flame to erupt from it. Creatures in the area of the pillar take 2d8+CL (9+CL) fire damage. Upcast - Every 4 CLs, create an additional pillar.

entries.title: Self Immolation
entries.content: Level 1 Pyromancy Tags: Fire, Buff, Persistent, Upcast Action: Swift | Range | - | | -------------- | -------- | | Target/AoE | Self | | Duration | 1 minute | | Save | - | You light yourself on fire and the fire hungers for things to burn. At the end of your turn, you take 3 fire damage. Whenever a creature is within 5 ft of you, they take 3 fire damage. Your land speed increases by 5 ft. Upcast - Every 2 CLs, increase the damage taken and dealt by 1. Every 4 CLs, increase your speed by 5.

entries.title: Soulfire
entries.content: Level 1 Pyromancy Tags: Fire, Upcast Action: Standard | Range | 60 ft | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | - | | Save | Reflex | Your mana ignites and you release this uncontainable energy at an enemy. The target takes 2d8+CL (9+CL) fire damage and are set ablaze (reflex halves damage and negates ablaze). Your Memory decreases by 1, forcing you to choose a technique to forget. If that spell was currently active as a buff or concentration effect, it immediately ends. This debuff ends when you rest. Upcast - Every 2 CLs, increase range by 5 ft. Pro Tip: For creatures with innate techniques, consider rendering one of their at will abilities inaccessible.

entries.title: Boiling Blood
entries.content: Level 2 Pyromancy Tags: Concentration, Fire Action: Standard | Range | 60 ft | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | 3 rounds | | Save | Fort | Ignite a creatures insides, making them convulse in pain. They are staggered and take (CL) fire damage each round at the start of its turn (fort negates stagger). At the end of each turn, save again. Creatures that are already ablaze take a -4 penalty to their save.

entries.title: Flame Cleanse Me
entries.content: Level 2 Pyromancy Tags: Healing Action: Swift | Range | - | | -------------- | ---- | | Target/AoE | Self | | Duration | - | | Save | - | You hold a flame to your chest that burns away your ailments. You take 5 True Damage and remove any non-Permanent Status from yourself.

entries.title: Backfire
entries.content: Level 3 Pyromancy Tags: Fire Action: Standard | Range | 60 ft | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | - | | Save | - | This spell functions exactly like dispel magic, except when you successfully counterspell or dispel a buff, the creature you target takes 4d8+CL (18+CL) fire damage.

entries.title: Fire and Brimstone
entries.content: Level 3 Pyromancy Tags: Fire, Persistent, Concentration Action: Standard | Range | - | | -------------- | ------------- | | Target/AoE | Infinite Line | | Duration | 3 rounds | | Save | Reflex | The flames of hell are unleashed through a portal you open up. A line of hellfire that continues until it hits a solid object deals 3d8+CL (13+CL) fire damage to creatures within. The portal remains open for 3 rounds, continuing to damage creatures that move through the flames. Fire created by this spell ignores fire resistance. This spell has great potential for destruction considering its immense AoE and the fact it persists for several rounds, potentially burning holes through creatures and structures alike.

entries.title: Fire Blast
entries.content: Level 3 Pyromancy Tags: Fire, Upcast Action: Standard | Range | 30 ft | | -------------- | --------------------------------------------- | | Target/AoE | 5 ft radius, centered on a point on a surface | | Duration | - | | Save | Reflex | You throw an enormous ball of fire that attaches to something, then explodes forcefully, dealing 4d8+CL (18+CL) fire damage and knocking down creatures struck (reflex halves dmg and negates knock down). You can target one specific creature with a ranged spell attack. If you land it, the creature's space is the center of the explosion, and the DC is 2 higher for that creature. If you miss, the fire falls directly down and then explodes when it first impacts a surface. This also destroys flammable undergrowth, sends small objects flying, starts fires, disperses atmospheric conditions, and otherwise causes the effects one would expect from a fiery explosion. Upcast - Every 2 CLs, increase range by 5 ft. Every 4 CLs, increase the explosion radius by 5.

entries.title: Hellfire
entries.content: Level 3 Pyromancy Tags: Fire Action: Standard | Range | - | | -------------- | -------------------------------- | | Target/AoE | 20 ft radius, centered on caster | | Duration | 1 minute | | Save | Reflex | Temporarily borrow some fire from the demon realm, burning yourself in the process. You explode violently, dealing 4d8+CL (18+CL) fire damage and setting creatures ablaze (reflex halves dmg and negates ablaze). This spell and the fires it causes ignore fire resistance. The area of the spell is scorched for 1 minute, causing the land speed of any fiends walking inside of it to increase by 20 for 1 round. You yourself take (CL) fire damage from the burst, and ignore being set ablaze.

entries.title: Fire Snake
entries.content: Level 4 Pyromancy Tags: Persistent, Concentration, Fire, Upcast Action: Standard | Range | - | | -------------- | --------------------------------- | | Target/AoE | 30 ft line, 10 ft tall (see text) | | Duration | 3 rounds | | Save | Reflex | Cause a flaming serpent to erupt from your staff. It moves along the ground 30 feet, capable of bending around obstacles and terrain. It continues to occupy that 30 feet of space, burning any that it passes through, or that pass through it. Creatures engulfed by the fiery serpent take 5d8+CL (23+CL) fire damage (reflex halves). As a standard action on subsequent turns, you can move the snake another 30 feet. Upcast- If your CL is at least 12... As a swift action on subsequent turns, you can move the snake another 30 feet.

entries.title: Wall of Fire
entries.content: Level 4 Pyromancy Tags: Persistent, Concentration, Fire, Upcast Action: Standard | Range | 60 ft | | -------------- | ------------------------------------------ | | Target/AoE | 30 ft line or 5 ft radius circle, See text | | Duration | - | | Save | Reflex | Cause a wall of flame to ignite within range. The wall is 20 ft high and 5 ft wide. The line, does not need to originate from you, allowing you great creativity in placement. The line must be in one continuous direction, or in a circular formation. It can move along changes in elevation, so long as that elevation is not taller than the wall itself. Creatures inside of the wall when cast, or that move through it take 5d8+CL (23+CL) fire damage (reflex halves). Upcast - Every 2 CLs, increase the length of the line and range by 10 ft. Every 30 additional ft can increase the radius of the circle by 5 ft.

entries.title: Inferno Sphere
entries.content: Level 5 Pyromancy Tags: Buff, Fire, Persistent Action: Standard | Range | - | | -------------- | ------------------------------------- | | Target/AoE | 15 ft radius aura, centered on caster | | Duration | 1 minute | | Save | - | The area around you is pelted with a whirling storm of flame. All creatures (except you) within 15 feet are instantly and persistently set ablaze. Creatures that start their turns in range or move into range take (CL) fire damage. Your speed is reduced to by 15 while buffed by this spell.

entries.title: Pyromancy
entries.content: Pyromancy is primarily about blasting creatures with fire damage using single target attacks and AoE effects. Many spells in the pyromancy tree gain significant benefits from being Upcast.

entries.title: Charming Gaze
entries.content: Level 1 Shira Tags: Charm, Subtle Action: Standard | Range | 30 ft | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | Varies | | Save | Will | You lock your eyes onto a target and make them Charmed (will negates). If you're currently engaged in combat with the creature, the spells duration is 3 rounds. If you are not, the spell's duration is 8 hours. Entering combat against them shortens the remaining duration to 3 rounds.

entries.title: Dance With Me!
entries.content: Level 1 Shira Tags: Charm, Elusive Action: Standard | Range | Reach | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | 1 round | | Save | Will | You extend your hand to a creature and offer to dance. You immediately move 15 ft in a direction of your choosing and the creature is Charmed by you during its next turn. It cannot move while tangled in your routine, but it can otherwise act normally (will reduces effect to 15 speed penalty). Unique: If you have the +Profession (dance) skill, then you can move 30 ft in a direction of your choosing on a failed save.

entries.title: Darting Duplicate
entries.content: Level 1 Shira Tags: Figment, Subtle Action: Swift | Range | - | | -------------- | -------- | | Target/AoE | - | | Duration | 3 rounds | | Save | Will | An illusory duplicate of yourself leaves your square, which moves at up to your speed each round and takes a path of your choosing. It can go around corners if you know where to turn to not hit terrain or creatures. It cannot replicate any actions besides moving and smiling smugly. Creatures that are threatening you when you cast this spell must make an AoO on the duplicate (will negates). If the duplicate enters a creature's space or impassable terrain, any creature that witnesses it instantly disbelieves it. A creature that identifies your spell when you cast it instantly disbelieves it.

entries.title: Lip Service
entries.content: Level 1 Shira Tags: Mind-Affecting, Subtle, Prepared Action: - | Range | - | | -------------- | --- | | Target/AoE | - | | Duration | - | | Save | - | You can make a creature think you said something you didn’t. You can implant simple ideas that require no more than two sentences to convey (I think your hat looks lovely. Where did you get it?) into their head that they think that you said in the middle of a conversation, while masking what you actually said during the few seconds it would take to speak. In essence you can speak to different people at the same time and one of them hears different things than the others.

entries.title: Role-playing
entries.content: Level 1 Shira Tags: Glamer Action: Standard | Range | Reach | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | 1 hour | | Save | - | You instantly Craft Disguise and apply it to the target creature.

entries.title: Tongues
entries.content: Level 1 Shira Tags: Buff Action: Standard | Range | Reach | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | 1 hour | | Save | - | Creature can speak and understand all spoken non-secret Languages. Has no effect on written text.

entries.title: Unspoken Name
entries.content: Level 1 Shira Tags: Recharge Action: Standard | Range | Self | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 mile | | Duration | Until Rest | | Save | - | When you cast this spell, designate a word, phrase, or name. If a creature within 1 mile of you uses that word, phrase, or name to refer to you, you immediately learn that creature’s name, appearance, and location. This discharges the spell.

entries.title: Command
entries.content: Level 2 Shira Tags: Language-Dependent, Mind-Affecting, Upcast Action: Standard | Range | 30 ft | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | 1 round | | Save | Will | You give the subject a single command, which it obeys to the best of its ability at its earliest opportunity (will negates). You may select from the following options. The spell specifies if their actions provoke AoOs. The creature still gets its turn. Approach - On its turn, the subject moves directly towards you 30 ft, provoking AoOs Drop It - On its turn, the subject drops whatever it is holding. It can’t pick up any dropped item on the same turn it drops it. Kneel - The subject is knocked down. Begone - On its turn, the subject moves 30 ft directly away from you, provoking AoOs. Praise Me - The subject babbles on about your greatness, effectively making them Silenced for 1 round. If the subject can’t carry out your command on its next turn, it defaults to kneel. Upcast - If your CL is at least 8... The spell gains the subtle tag. When used out of combat, the spell gets new effects. - Minion creatures do not get a saving throw. - The effects of the spell last 3 turns instead of 1. Creatures under the effects of the spell cannot perform hostile actions towards you or your allies while affected.

entries.title: Sense Motives
entries.content: Level 2 Shira Tags: Prepared Action: - | Range | - | | -------------- | --- | | Target/AoE | - | | Duration | - | | Save | - You gain a +4 bonus to +Insight checks. Whenever you glean something using insight, you can transfer the knowledge you gain to any creature you can see telepathically, effectively treating it as though they had also succeeded in using insight.

entries.title: Stage Fright
entries.content: Level 2 Shira Tags: Fear, Psychic Action: Standard | Range | 30 ft | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | 1 minute | | Save | Will | The fear of failure looms over the target creature (will negates). They take a -2 penalty to Attack and opposed skill checks. Whenever they graze, miss or fail an opposed skill check they initiated, they take d6+CL (3+CL) psychic damage. Outside of combat this gains the subtle tag and gives creatures disadvantage on their next skill check made in front of a crowd. Its duration changes to 24 hours. Once they roll the check, the spell ends.

entries.title: Stunt Double
entries.content: Level 2 Shira Tags: Glamer, Buff Action: Standard Action | Range | Reach | | -------------- | ----------------------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature of your size | | Duration | 1 hour | | Save | Will | You instantly Craft Disguise and apply it to the target creature that causes them to appear identical to you. While standing adjacent to a creature that looks identical to you, attacks and targeted spells roll to randomly target among everyone (will save per attempt negates, passing this save causes an attacker to be immune to the same cast of the spell).

entries.title: Tongue Twister
entries.content: Level 2 Shira Tags: Mind-Affecting Action: Standard | Range | 30 ft | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | 3 rounds | | Save | Will | You add an extra load to all mental actions related to a creature’s speaking, causing their speech to be slowed and slurred (will negates). In order to speak at all, the creature must spend a swift action instead of a free action (ex sharing information with +Monster Lore). In order to cast a spell that normally requires a swift action, the creature must spend a standard action. In order to cast a spell that normally requires a standard action, the creature must spend a FRA. This increase in action cost can reasonably apply to any other actions based on speech as well.

entries.title: Bandwagon
entries.content: Level 3 Shira Tags: Mind-Affecting, Subtle Action: Standard | Range | 30 ft | | -------------- | ---------------------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature?...see text | | Duration | - | | Save | Will | Convince a creature to perform a very specific action (will negates). Specifically something you or another creature has done in this creatures presence within the last few minutes. For example, you could take a drink from a wine glass and then compel another creature to drink from theirs. If the activity caused any form of obvious harm, social repercussions (like getting naked in a public space) or similar consequences to the creature that initially performed it, the spell fizzles.

entries.title: Overstimulate
entries.content: Level 3 Shira Tags: Mind-Affecting Action: Standard | Range | 30 ft | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | 3 rounds | | Save | Will | You flood the creatures senses with stimuli, overloading them (will negates). They have -15 speed, blurred vision and any +blindsense they have is disabled. They have weakness 2 to all damage. An affected creature can make an additional save at the end of each of their turns. If wet, this additional save is made with advantage.

entries.title: The Hand that Feeds
entries.content: Level 3 Shira Tags: Mind-Affecting, Upcast Action: Standard | Range | 30 ft | | -------------- | -------------------- | | Target/AoE | 1 companion creature | | Duration | 1 rounds | | Save | Will | You bring forth all of the negative memories and feelings a companion has for its leader. The target companion is taunted by its leader for 1 round (will negates). It does not use any recharge abilities while taunted in this way. This ability removes all other taunt effects currently affecting the companion creature if the spell is successful. Upcast - Every 4 CLs, you can target an additional companion creature.

entries.title: Venomous Promise
entries.content: Level 3 Shira Tags: Poison, Subtle, Scrying Action: Standard | Range | 30 ft | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | - | | Save | - | Your words are poison, but they don't know that. Whenever you share information and get a creature to promise not to tell anybody (or something to that effect), you can infect the creature with a venomous promise. From that point after, if they share any information related to what they promised about, they succumb to the effects of the spell. They are immediately envenomed. You are aware of when this happens, who triggered it and what they said and can immediately begin scrying, sensing through the creature that broke the agreement. You can do this for up to 10 minutes. At any point during the scrying, including when it ends, you can deal 40 poison damage to the creature. This damage is nonlethal and does not immediately kill them (though the venom might).

entries.title: Domination
entries.content: Level 4 Shira Tags: Charm, Concentration, Recharge Action: Standard | Range | 30 ft | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | 1 minute | | Save | Will | You link your mind with a creature and enforce your will upon it.
