For the duration of the spell the creature is Dominated (will reduces effect to staggered 1 round). You can telepathically give orders to the dominated creature. They must follow these orders unless they are very obviously self-harming (ex. KYS NOW). For all intents and purposes, this creature is considered your ally as long as they are dominated. The creature holds back and cannot use any special attacks, or cast any spells that are level 2 or higher. At the end of each turn, the creature gets a new save against the effect. The spell ends if any of your allies harm the target (including you). This spell can only be cast 1/minute.

entries.title: Order 66
entries.content: Level 4 Shira Tags: Charm, Contingent, Language-Dependent Action: 1 minute | Range | Reach | | -------------- | ----------------------------- | | Target/AoE | 1 willing or helpless creaure | | Duration | 1 month, 1 minute | | Save | - | You plant subconscious cues into a helpless or willing target. After completing the cast time, you cause the target to forget you cast this spell. At any point during the following month, you can trigger the true effects of this spell by speaking a passphrase in a manner where the target can clearly hear you as a standard action. For 1 minute the creature is Dominated, aiding you in combat, attacking your enemies as you direct them. Once this effect is triggered, the contingency ends. The contingent aspect of this spell applies to the caster, not the target creature. A tattoo of the number 66 appears somewhere on the creatures skin where it is visible. If covered, it moves position until it is not. If completely covered, the spell ends. The spell leaves behind subtle cues, allowing those trained in +Insight to realize the creature is affected by this spell (caster's DC+4). Creatures only ever get 1 check to realize this enchantment is in place. Upcast - If your CL is at least 12... The duration of the subconscious order is permanent.

entries.title: Authority
entries.content: Level 5 Shira Tags: Charm, Language-Dependent, Concentration, Upcast Action: 1 minute | Range | See Text | | -------------- | --------------------------------------------- | | Target/AoE | All creatures, other than those you designate | | Duration | - | | Save | Will | You link the minds of all creatures with intelligence higher than -2 that can hear the sound of your voice and see you. For the duration of the cast time, you must speak and stand relatively still. What you talk about during the minute cast time is of little importance, all that matters is that you speak. You automatically catch the attention of every creature if nobody is under duress for the duration of the cast time. At the end of the cast time, all minion creatures are automatically charmed by you. For non minions (will negates). A creature of your lvl or higher needs not make a save at all. After the minute, you can move around, ensnaring more people in your speech as long as you continue speaking. While charmed, creatures will follow you around and agree with basically everything you have to say. You can parade them around, have them protest, have them clap at your performances etc. They will not avoid actively engaging in obviously dangerous activities, like jumping off cliffs, attacking people or walking into a war zone. Stopping the spell or playing beautiful music can break this spell's effect. The +Profession DC to do so is the spell's DC+5. Upcast - If your CL is at least 20... The crowd will engage in any acts of violence suggested without hesitation.

entries.title: Sympathy
entries.content: Level 5 Shira Tags: Prepared Action: - | Range | - | | -------------- | --- | | Target/AoE | - | | Duration | - | | Save | - | Any creature that damages you is Charmed by you until the start of their next turn. Note: This spell is purposefully designed to interrupt turns. Take this into consideration when determining how it interacts with Multiattack or special abilities that require multiple instances of damage.

entries.title: Thrall
entries.content: Level 6 Shira Tags: Charm, Companion Cast Time: 1 minute | Range | Reach | | -------------- | ------------------- | | Target/AoE | 1 helpless creature | | Duration | - | | Save | - | Worm your way deep into a creature's psyche and take control of their body. Functions as Domination, but must be cast on a or helpless creature. The domination lasts indefinitely. The creature does not receive new saves and must be freed through other means, magical or otherwise. Thrall is considered a Permanent Status. If a friend, ally, respected superior, family member etc spends a standard action to sway the creature, it gets a will save against the effect with Disadvantage. If at least three creatures spend their turn doing this at once, the save is not at disadvantage. Certain types of people, such as people related to the controlled creature's destiny or true love can give a creature advantage on their save. Uniquely, creatures enthralled do not gain the companion boost to attack unless they are a Minion.

entries.title: Shira
entries.content: Shira When you try and figure out who the most attractive lady is at a party, it's often a question of who is second best, for whenever you get a closer look at #1, it's Shira. People submit to the Cataclysm for strength, and Moogen for stealth, but this demon lord prefers subterfuge. She often exists among mortals, playing along with the politics and wars for fun. Being the least abrasive and the most approachable, Shira is the demon lord the most mortals find intertwined in their life, often not knowing that they deal with a demon. Shira spells focus on deceit as well as mental domination of both overt and subtle varieties.

entries.title: Blood Biography
entries.content: Level 1 Vampirism Tags: - Action: 1 minute | Range | Reach | | -------------- | ----------- | | Target/AoE | Fresh Blood | | Duration | - | | Save | - | You learn about a creature through bloodshed. The blood that is the target of the spell changes shape to form text in a language you understand. You can place the text on a surface of your choosing, such as a piece of paper in your position. If you don't choose then it forms on the surface the blood was on, or at your feet. The bloody message contains the following. | Who are you? | What the creature's name is | | ------------------------- | ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | | What are you? | Race/species, gender, profession etc. | | How was your blood shed? | A brief summary of how the wound was inflicted, including who did it, provided the creature knows | | When was your blood shed? | Gives a date and time of day to the best of creatures knowledge |

entries.title: Bloodbath
entries.content: Level 1 Vampirism Tags: - Action: Standard | Range | - | | -------------- | ------------------------------------- | | Target/AoE | 15 ft radius aura, centered on caster | | Duration | - | | Save | - | As part of casting the spell, you cut yourself with a held object taking d6 (3) bleed damage immediately and every turn after at the start of your turn. Whenever you take this damage, nearby enemies also start bleeding for the same amount. You can choose to stop bleeding as an instant action, ending the spell.

entries.title: Family
entries.content: Level 1 Vampirism Tags: - Action: Standard Material: Fresh blood of 2 creatures | Range | - | | -------------- | --- | | Target/AoE | - | | Duration | - | | Save | - | Take the blood of two creatures and mix them together. The blood then reacts depending on the relation between the two creatures. Unrelated: The 2 blood samples violently explode away from each other. This indicates that the two creatures have no relation to one another. Related: The 2 blood samples remain together. This indicates that the two creatures share a distant ancestry, at least 6 generations back. Closely Related: The 2 blood samples fuse and glow. This indicates the creatures share a close ancestry, or have some other blood ties, such as being converted by the same vampire family.

entries.title: Just a Prick
entries.content: Level 1 Vampirism Tags: - Action: Standard | Range | Reach | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | - | | Save | - | A slashing or piercing weapon in your possession turns red. You can do one of the following. - Extract Subtle - Extract a small vial of the creature's blood. The creature rolls a +Perception check, either opposed to your DC or +Sleight of Hand roll (your choice). If they fail their roll, the spell to goes unnoticed, even if other creatures are present. - Exsanguinate - Make a Melee Attack that causes the target to bleed d6 damage On-hit

entries.title: Summon Swarm
entries.content: Level 1 Vampirism Tags: Concentration Action: Standard | Range | 30 ft | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | - | | Save | - | Summon a swarm of bloodthirsty flying beasts to immediately fly over and harry a creature. The creature takes 2d8+CL (9+CL) pierce damage (reflex halves). While you concentrate, the swarm persists, giving the creature Blurred Vision. If the swarm takes any damage or is the target of a direct attack, it disperses.

entries.title: Vampiric Drain
entries.content: Level 1 Vampirism Tags: Concentration, Healing Action: Standard | Range | 30 ft | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | - | | Save | - | Launch a glowing red projectile at an enemy as a melee or Ranged Spell Attack. The creature takes 2d8+CL (9+CL) True Damage and On-hit begins Bleeding for d6 damage. You also form a tether to this creature that prevents the bleed from ending. This tether is broken if the creature moves more than 30 ft away from you. You heal equal to half the +HP damage you deal as part of this spell, including the bleed damage. Special: If you are a vampire, this has the Overheal tag.

entries.title: Bloody Barrier
entries.content: Level 2 Vampirism Tags: Healing Action: Swift | Range | - | | -------------- | -------- | | Target/AoE | Self | | Duration | 3 rounds | | Save | - | Take any amount of True Damage. Convert this value into Temp HP.

entries.title: Mist Form
entries.content: Level 2 Vampirism Tags: poly, true, Buff Action: Standard | Range | - | | -------------- | ---- | | Target/AoE | Self | | Duration | - | | Save | - | You transform into an amorphous mist of an unusual color indefinitely. The cloud of mist is about a 5 ft cube in volume. Creatures must roll +Perception against your DC or +Stealth to realize this mist is potentially dangerous if it is clearly visible. Certain circumstances can cause the perception check to be waived, such as hiding on the surface of water, or other locations frequented by mist. Creatures automatically know something is up if they see you transform. While in mist form you can perform no actions other than flying at a speed of 30 or dismissing mist form as a free action. You gain no defensive benefits while in mist form. If you take damage or fail a saving throw, you immediately leave mist form and are staggered for 1 round. As a vapor, you can travel through very thin spaces, such as air vents pipes and such. Particularly small holes such as keyholes are still possible, but require a FRA. You are also more susceptible to wind. Moving with a slight breeze is of no issue, but moving during a storm is impossible. You take a -4 penalty saves vs air effects.

entries.title: Vampiric Blood
entries.content: Level 2 Vampirism Tags: Healing Action: Standard | Range | 30 ft | | -------------- | --------------- | | Target/AoE | 1 bloody corpse | | Duration | - | | Save | - | You drain the blood from a recently deceased creature and use its life force to bolster yourself and a chosen ally within range. You restore 2d6+CL (7+CL) +HP and grant the same amount to the chosen ally. The same corpse cannot be targeted multiple times with this spell.

entries.title: Vampiric Touch
entries.content: Level 2 Vampirism Tags: Necrotic, Healing, Buff, Concentration Action: Swift | Range | - | | -------------- | ---- | | Target/AoE | Self | | Duration | - | | Save | - | Your hand or staff gains a sinister glow. As long as you concentrate, you can make a melee Spell Attack as a standard action or as an AoO that deals 3d8+CL (13+CL) necrotic damage. You regain half of this damage as +HP.

entries.title: Aura Sense
entries.content: Level 3 Vampirism Tags: Mana Burn Action: Swift | Range | - | | -------------- | --- | | Target/AoE | - | | Duration | - | | Save | - | You can sense the aura of creatures within 20 ft of you, even through solid barriers (unless the barrier contains Lead). This aura manifests as a colorful glow, revealing to you the creatures size and type (ie large Undead).

entries.title: Blood Ties
entries.content: Level 3 Vampirism Tags: poly, true Action: Standard Material: A vial of blood from a race | Range | - | | -------------- | -------- | | Target/AoE | Self | | Duration | 24 hours | | Save | - | You drink the vial of blood, transforming you into a copy of the creature you drink from. Your physical appearance changes to match theirs and you can swap between the creature’s voice and your own. You get a +4 bonus to +Disguise to appear as this creature. You can change your appearance between your own and the creatures as a swift action.

entries.title: Misty Escape
entries.content: Level 3 Vampirism Tags: poly, true, Instant Action: Instant | Range | - | | -------------- | ---- | | Target/AoE | Self | | Duration | - | | Save | - | Special: This spell can only be cast in response to being Defeated. Briefly transform into mist and fly 30 ft. You reform in your new position.

entries.title: Swarm's Advance
entries.content: Level 3 Vampirism Tags: poly, true Action: Standard | Range | - | | -------------- | ------ | | Target/AoE | Self | | Duration | 1 turn | | Save | - | Immediately Disengage. For remainder of your turn, you transform into a swarm of ravenous beasts that can Fly, like bats or crows. You can move directly through other creatures. When you do the creature is Drained for 3d6+CL (10+CL) hp and staggered for 1 round (fort changes the drain to True Damage, halves it and negates the stagger).

entries.title: Defy Gravity
entries.content: Level 6 Vampirism Tags: Prepared Action: - | Range | - | | -------------- | --- | | Target/AoE | - | | Duration | - | | Save | - | If you can defy death, why not gravity? Gain a Fly speed equal to your Land Speed.

entries.title: Vampirism
entries.content: Vampires are creatures that have cheated death through complex arcane rituals. Their price was in blood. In order to exist, they must drink the blood of intelligent creatures. Their transformation also comes with a large number of idiosyncrasies. It is through these unique circumstances that 3 of the original vampires made new magics to aid them in circumventing these new challenges. Each spell cast still has a piece of them. Vampirism spells deal in unique effects that are traditionally ascribed to vampires. They also user clever ways to manipulate blood. Each spell is attributed to a specific vampire, mostly for flavor reasons. - Senketula - The eldest brother and the one most concerned with eternal life. His spells are largely focused on becoming a superior being through a multitude of various abilities. - Lovacious - The partner of Senketula most concerned with power over others. Her spells are largely focused on manipulation. - Vrykul - The youngest brother most concerned with raw power. His spells are largely focused on using blood as a weapon to be used against the living.

entries.title: Boasting Taunt
entries.content: Level 1 Warfare Tags: - Actions: Standard | Range | 30 ft | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | 3 rounds | | Save | Will | Goad a creature within 30 ft of you into attacking you. They are taunted for three rounds (will negates). At the end of each turn, they are allowed to make another save to shake off the taunt.

entries.title: Break Free
entries.content: Level 1 Warfare Tags: - Action: Swift | Range | - | | -------------- | ---- | | Target/AoE | Self | | Duration | - | | Save | - | Gain +4 bonus to your next attack against a creature grappling you or an ally this round. This bonus increases to +8 if you shove the enemy.

entries.title: Bull Rush
entries.content: Level 1 Warfare Tags: Upcast Action: Special Attack | Range | Reach | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | - | | Save | - | Shove a creature with a +4 bonus. If successful, you can continue to move in a straight line while pushing them for 10 ft, then push them your shove distance. If you impact another creature along your movement, you can attempt to shove them too. If you fail, your movement is halted. You and the original creature you rushed stop adjacent to the target you failed to shove. Upcast - Increase the distance you "carry" the target by 5 ft per mana spent before shoving.

entries.title: Cripple
entries.content: Level 1 Warfare Tags: Upcast Action: Special Attack | Range | Reach | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | Until Rest | | Save | - | Make a melee attack. On-hit the creatures speed is reduced by 15 for 1 round. Upcast - For each additional mana spent, increase damage by d8.

entries.title: Reckless Charge
entries.content: Level 1 Warfare Tags: - Action: FRA, Special Attack | Range | Reach | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | - | | Save | - | Core Rules, How to Play/Actions/Common Actions/Full Round Actions/Charge while pushing your body to its limit. You can move through difficult terrain and get +2 Attack, but take 3 true damage after any attack(s) are resolved.

entries.title: Second Wind
entries.content: Level 1 Warfare Tags: Healing, Air Action: Swift | Range | - | | -------------- | ---- | | Target/AoE | Self | | Duration | - | | Save | - | Take a deep breath, for it might just be your last. Spend all of your remaining mana to gain 5+(2x mana spent) temp hp.

entries.title: Surge
entries.content: Level 1 Warfare Tags: Upcast Action: Swift | Range | - | | -------------- | ------- | | Target/AoE | Self | | Duration | 1 round | | Save | - | Push beyond your usual physical limitations. Choose one of the following benefits. - Increase your Land Speed, Swim and Climb speeds by 10 - Take the Jump action any number of times this round and increase its distance by 10. If jumping has a bonus effect for you, it only happens once. Upcast - For every additional mana spent, choose an additional benefit. The same effects stack.

entries.title: Weapon Toss
entries.content: Level 1 Warfare Tags: Su Action: Special Attack | Range | Thrown | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | Until Rest | | Save | - | Toss your weapon, temporarily giving it the thrown property. If it is a piercing weapon, the foe is Entangled On-hit. The creature can breakout to remove it as a swift action, or remove it automatically by spending a standard action. When you throw the weapon, a copy of it appears in your hand, hit or miss. The weapon you throw disappears on a miss or after it is removed.

entries.title: Blitz
entries.content: Level 2 Warfare Tags: - Action: Special Attack | Range | Reach | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | - | | Save | - | Consume the entirety of a creature's attention with a quick flurry of attacks. The creature has blurred vision against creatures other than you until the start of your next turn.

entries.title: Brace Yourself
entries.content: Level 2 Warfare Tags: - Action: Standard | Range | - | | -------------- | ------------------------------ | | Target/AoE | 20 ft radius, centered on user | | Duration | 1 round | | Save | Will | Shout at nearby enemies, goading them into attacking you, then take a defensive position. Taunt all enemies within 20 ft of you for 1 round (will negates) and take the total defense action.

entries.title: Colossal Smash
entries.content: Level 2 Warfare Tags: Earth Action: Special Attack | Range | - | | -------------- | ------------------------------ | | Target/AoE | 20 ft radius, centered on user | | Duration | - | | Save | - | Make a topple attack with a +4 bonus. Apply the result to against all creatures touching the ground within 20 ft. All creatures knocked down from this effect also take an additional 2d6 (7) crush damage.

entries.title: Headbutt
entries.content: Level 2 Warfare Tags: - Action: Special Attack | Range | Reach | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | 1 round | | Save | Fort | Butt heads with a foe. You deal an additional d8 (4) damage and your foe is dazed On-hit for one round (fort negates). You also must save against this effect.

entries.title: Thick of the Fight
entries.content: Level 2 Warfare Tags: Buff Action: Swift | Range | - | | -------------- | -------- | | Target/AoE | Self | | Duration | 1 minute | | Save | - | Being outnumbered only makes you more excited. While threatened by 2 or more enemies, gain +2 Attack. Does not stack with Flanking.

entries.title: Awesome Blow
entries.content: Level 3 Warfare Tags: - Action: Special Attack | Range | Reach | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | - | | Save | - | Roll a shove attack. If successful, deal damage with a bonus 2d8 (9), shove and inflict Knockdown.

entries.title: New Heights
entries.content: Level 3 Warfare Tags: - Action: Standard | Range | 60 ft | | -------------- | ------------------------------ | | Target/AoE | 10 ft radius, centered on self | | Duration | - | | Save | - | Choose a location within 60 feet of you and leap 120 feet into the air. You linger in the air until the start of your next turn, at which point you land at your destination. Any creatures that happen to be with 10 ft of you at your destination take 30 Poise damage.

entries.title: Targeted
entries.content: Level 3 Warfare Tags: Concentration, Su Action: Standard | Range | - | | -------------- | ------------------------------------------- | | Target/AoE | Self20 ft radius aura, centered on user | | Duration | 1 minute | | Save | Will | A prototypical target appears on your back, and on your head. Enemies are taunted by you (will negates). Taunted creatures get an additional save at the end of their turn. Mindless creatures and creatures with -2 or less INT take a -2 penalty to their save. Even if they aren't taunted, creatures in the aura take a -10 penalty to +Perception checks versus anything that isn’t the targeted creature. A creature that is affected by this technique cannot be taunted by it again for 1 minute.

entries.title: Taste Fear
entries.content: Level 3 Warfare Tags: Buff Action: Swift | Range | - | | -------------- | -------- | | Target/AoE | Self | | Duration | 1 minute | | Save | - | You see the frightened and shaken conditions as palpable auras around creatures. You treat creatures as though they have weakness to slash, pierce and crush damage equal to their shaken penalty. Frightened creatures have weakness 4, as though they were shaken 4.

entries.title: Unga Bunga
entries.content: Level 3 Warfare Tags: Earth Action: Standard | Range | Thrown | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | - | | Save | - | Special: You must have a free hand to use this technique. Dig your hands into the ground and lift an enormous chunk of earth, then throw it at an enemy. It deals 4d8+LvL (18+LvL) and the creature is made Clumsy 1 On-hit. This attack counts as a +Siege Weapon.

entries.title: Warcry
entries.content: Level 3 Warfare Tags: Fear Action: Standard | Range | - | | -------------- | ------------------------------ | | Target/AoE | 20 ft radius, centered on user | | Duration | 1 round | | Save | Will (see text) | Lift your weapon into the air and let out a battle cry. Enemies of a lower LvL than you are frightened for 1 round. Enemies of your level or higher are frightened for 1 round (will reduces to shaken 1). After a creature is the target of this technique, it cannot be affected by it again for 1 minute.

entries.title: Storm of Steel
entries.content: Level 4 Warfare Tags: Concentration Action: Standard | Range | Reach | | -------------- | ----------- | | Target/AoE | All enemies | | Duration | 1 round | | Save | - | Start rapidly spinning and make a Simple Attack against all foes within your reach. You cannot move after initiating this technique. Until the start of your next turn, you have +2 AC. Any foes within your reach at the start of your next turn are automatically attacked again.

entries.title: Martial Challenge
entries.content: Level 6 Warfare Tags: Recharge, Buff, Su Action: Standard | Range | - | | -------------- | ---------------------------------------------------------- | | Target/AoE | Self + All enemies30 ft radius burst, centered on user | | Duration | 1 round | | Save | Reflex | Swing your weapon around you with such force that it flings all nearby enemies away from you. All enemies within 30 ft take 10d8 (45) slashing damage and are pushed directly away from you until they are 35 feet away from you (reflex halves damage and negates push back). You can decide to not push one target in particular. After the swipe, a visible barrier forms around you. Until the start of your next turn, you are immune to all damage that does not originate from a creature within 30 feet of you.

entries.title: Warfare
entries.content: The generic martial attacks that every warrior worth their salt knows.

entries.title: Amnesia
entries.content: Level 1 Arc Tags: - Action: Special Attack | Range | - | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | 1 minute | | Save | - | You hit a creature in the head hard enough to cause it to forget its own training. On hit the creature forgets a technique of your choosing. In order to remove a specific technique, you must have seen the technique get used, hear about a specific creature's technique from someone who has seen it or succeed on a +Monster Lore check against the creature to reveal its offense traits. For creatures with class levels that prepare techniques this can be a bit awkward since they can swap techniques so you're gonna have to play it by ear. If you don't have a specific technique in mind, the creature forgets one of its highest tier techniques known if it prepares them, or a 1/day innate technique (that it hasn't used yet) if it doesn't. Move down the list until you get something that fits, with the idea being remove most important and powerful tech first. A creature with Amnesia can spend a standard action to try and remember the technique. Martial techniques require a DC 5 INT Ability Check check while magical techniques require a DC 20 INT check.

entries.title: Dismantle
entries.content: Level 1 Arc Tags: Su, Upcast Action: Standard | Range | Reach | | -------------- | --------------- | | Target/AoE | A 10x10 ft wall | | Duration | - | | Save | - | You create a transparent but clearly visible wall that partially unweaves magic that passes through it. Any spell or supernatural (Su) effect that passes through the wall has its Attack bonus and DC decreased by 2. If an ability requires going through the barrier to have Line of Effect, it is considered to be "going through" the barrier for targeted spells without projectiles like Charming Gaze or effects with an aura (like Targeted). You can also choose to form the barrier into a hemisphere centered on you with a radius equal to half the walls dimensions. Upcast - Per each additional mana spent, increase the dimensions of the wall by 10 ft (20x20, 30x30 etc)

entries.title: Down to Earth
entries.content: Level 1 Arc Tags: Su, Upcast Action: Special Attack | Range | - | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | - | | Save | - | You infuse your weapon with the ability to tangle a creatures wings or the magic that holds it afloat in the air. Make a weapon attack that applies grounded for 1 round. Upcast - For each additional mana spent, increase damage by d8 (4). At 3 mana, this debuff gains the curse effect. The curse only ends when the creature consumes a creature known to fly, even if only sparingly, such as a chicken, or its egg.

entries.title: Mana Drain
entries.content: Level 1 Arc Tags: Su, Buff, Upcast Action: Swift | Range | - | | -------------- | -------- | | Target/AoE | Self | | Duration | 1 minute | | Save | - | You radiate a 10 ft aura that drains the mana from living things. Every time a creature spends mana within this aura, it spends an additional point of mana. If the ability costs no mana, such as an innate spell, its CL is reduced by 2. Upcast 4 - Double the penalties of the aura (+2 mana expenditure, -4 CL for innate spells).

entries.title: Pressure
entries.content: Level 1 Arc Tags: - Action: Immediate | Range | Reach | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | - | | Save | Will | Cause a caster to falter in the final moment of its casting with annoying distractions or a sinister gaze. The DC of the Spell the creature casts decreases by 2 (will negates).

entries.title: Silencing Strike
entries.content: Level 1 Arc Tags: Upcast Action: Special Attack | Range | - | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | 1 round | | Save | Fort | Strike at a creatures throat in order to silence them for 1 round (fort negates). Upcast - For each additional mana spent, increase damage by d8 (4).

entries.title: Crumble Magic Minion
entries.content: Level 2 Arc Tags: Su, Upcast Action: Special Attack | Range | - | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | - | | Save | - | If you land this attack against a magically created companion creature, such as an undead or a summoned creature, you automatically deal the attack's damage as True Damage to the creature that created the effect too if they are within 100 ft of you. In the case of a creature summoned by a Summoning Contract, it damages whoever summoned them, not the real body of the creature being summoned. Upcast - For each additional mana spent, increase damage by d8 (4). If you spend at least 3 mana, the attack damages all the companion creatures, in addition to their creator/summoner.

entries.title: Dispelling Strike
entries.content: Level 2 Arc Tags: Su, Upcast, Force Action: Special Attack | Range | - | | -------------- | ---------------------------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature or magical effect | | Duration | - | | Save | - | Roll an attack roll in place of a Dispel check against a magical effect you can attack. If it is attached to a creature, the attack only effects the spell, not the creature. If you successfully dispel the effect, the caster takes 2d8+lvl (9+lvl) force damage. Upcast - For each additional mana spent, increase damage by d8 (4).

entries.title: Mana Scorch
entries.content: Level 2 Arc Tags: Su, Curse, Upcast Action: Standard | Range | 60 ft | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | - | | Save | Will | You weaken the creatures connection to the mana of the universe. They Mana Burn 2 and lose an additional 2 mana (will negates mana burn). Mana Scorch curses can stack. Against a creature with only innate techniques, it instead removes a 1/day spell of up to 2nd level until the curse is lifted. By not casting a spell for a full 24 hours, the curse ends. Upcast - Increase mana burn and mana loss by 1 per mana spent. Or increase the level of 1/day spell that can be consumed by 1 per mana spent.

entries.title: Psionic Backlash
entries.content: Level 2 Arc Tags: Su, Psychic Action: Immediate | Range | 60 ft | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | - | | Save | - | When you hear magic words or see magic at play, you can respond by making the creature's mana manipulation unstable. They take d6 (3) psychic damage for each point of mana they spend (or would spend with innate casting).

entries.title: Superstitious
entries.content: Level 2 Arc Tags: Prepared, Su Action: Standard | Range | - | | -------------- | --- | | Target/AoE | - | | Duration | - | | Save | - | You see magical auras around mages constantly. You learn the highest level spell a creature can cast by focusing on them as a standard action. You automatically get a check to see a creature’s true form or to see the true nature of a Figment (will save vs their DC). If you strike a creature disguising their true form, they revert back to it (will negates).

entries.title: Arcana Theft
entries.content: Level 3 Arc Tags: Su Action: Special Attack | Range | - | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | - | | Save | - | Make an Attack against a creature and steal their magic away from them. If they are currently affected by a buff spell, you take it away from them On-hit. You remove the buff from them and grant it to yourself or an ally within 30 ft.

entries.title: Blood Price
entries.content: Level 3 Arc Tags: Su, Curse Action: Standard | Range | 30 ft | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | - | | Save | Will | Inflict a curse that is particularly annoying to mages (will negates). Whenever the cursed creature casts a spell, it becomes Drained equal to the spell level. The drain happens after the effects of the spell. By not casting a spell for a full day, the curse ends.

entries.title: Teleblock
entries.content: Level 3 Arc Tags: Su Action: Immediate | Range | 60 ft | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | 1 minute | | Save | Will | When a creature attempts to teleport and you successfully identify the effect (via +Monster Lore or Identify Spell Being Cast), you can block it automatically. The creature is also anchored (will negates).

entries.title: Teleportation Trap
entries.content: Level 3 Arc Tags: Su, Sigil, Upcast Action: 3 rounds | Range | Reach | | -------------- | --------------------------------------------- | | Target/AoE | A spot on a flat continuous surface120 ft | | Duration | 24 hours | | Save | - | When you place this sigil, you must designate a location within its AoE on a surface visible from where it is placed. Unlike most other sigils, a teleportation trap is not triggered by moving within a certain radius of it. A creature that teleports within 120 feet of the sigil, even without direct line of effect, is immediately affected by the trap and teleported to this predesignated location instead of their intended destination (will reduces effect to clumsy 1). If you place a Teleportation Trap while you already have one active, the previous one disappears. Upcast 6 - The sigil becomes permanent and its AoE increases to 300 ft.

entries.title: Trace Teleportation
entries.content: Level 3 Arc Tags: Su, Prepared Action: - | Range | - | | -------------- | --- | | Target/AoE | - | | Duration | - | | Save | - | You gain a 6th sense allowing you to detect when a Teleportation effect has happened in the area recently. Such spots appear as silhouettes of portals. While adjacent to such a space, you can inspect it more closely to over a few minutes to glean further details. You can automatically tell the distance and direction of the teleportation effect. If the effect teleported the creature to another plane, you know what plane instead of the distance. You can roll an arcana check (DC 10+CL of the effect, or 10+the creatures level for non spell effects) to gaze into this pseudo portal to see exactly where the creature teleported to, as though looking through a window to their destination. You see it as it currently is, not as it looked when they went, using your full visual acuity. If you are capable of getting to this destination while the same use of this ability persists, you need not make further checks to see any chain of teleportation that may have occurred from the same caster.

entries.title: Siphoning Sigil
entries.content: Level 4 Arc Tags: Su, Sigil Action: 3 rounds | Range | Reach | | -------------- | ------------------------------------- | | Target/AoE | 20 ft radius, centered around a point | | Duration | Until Rest | | Save | Will | You inscribe a anti-magic rune on the surface of an object. Whenever a creature of at least small or larger size enters this area, the sigil triggers. All creatures within 20 ft of the sigil are siphoned (will negates). At the end of each round, creatures get a new save against this effect.

entries.title: Trigger Word
entries.content: Level 4 Arc Tags: - Action: Immediate | Range | Reach | | -------------- | ----- | | Target/AoE | - | | Duration | - | | Save | Fort | You have trained your body to react to magic words with violence. When an enemy you threaten casts a spell, make a Simple Attack against them. On-hit the spell fizzles (fort negates).

entries.title: Call of Hades
entries.content: Level 5 Arc Tags: Su, Curse Action: Special Attack | Range | - | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | - | | Save | - |

entries.title: Covetous Aura
entries.content: Level 5 Arc Tags: Su, Buff Action: Standard | Range | - | | -------------- | ------------------------------------- | | Target/AoE | Self20 ft radius, anchored on you | | Duration | - | | Save | - | Whenever a creature uses a supernatural ability or spell on one of its allies within the aura, you can decide to become the target of the effect as an immediate action. For AoE effects (like Healer's channel energy), you can only steal the effect from one target. Unless you identify it with +Monster Lore or Identify Spell Being Cast, you're gambling. Any effect that requires a saving throw that you steal (like a Blight) you automatically fail.

entries.title: Highway Patrol
entries.content: Level 6 Arc Tags: Su, Buff Action: Swift | Range | 60 ft | | -------------- | -------- | | Target/AoE | Self | | Duration | 1 minute | | Save | Will | You are a master at negating teleportation, but why not play along a little? Every time a creature within 60 ft of you teleports, you can redirect them to another position within 60 ft of you as an instant action and cause them to become clumsy 2 (will negates redirection).

entries.title: Arc
entries.content: The techniques designed to combat and negate magic, including both spells and Supernatural abilities.

entries.title: Bloodletting
entries.content: Level 1 Barbarism Tags: Recharge Action: Free | Range | Reach | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | - | | Save | - | Shed your own blood, taking 5 true damage and offering it to the gods. They repay you by granting you 1 mana. You can only use bloodletting once a turn.

entries.title: Carnage
entries.content: Level 1 Barbarism Tags: Buff Action: Instant | Range | - | | -------------- | -------- | | Target/AoE | Self | | Duration | 1 minute | | Save | - | The more blood that flows from battle, the more you are pushed forward with reckless abandon. When you defeat an enemy you can activate this buff, you take a -1 penalty to AC and get a +2 bonus to Attack. The next 2 times you defeat an enemy, you get this benefit again. Note: You cannot receive another buff effect or end this buff while under the effects of Carnage.

entries.title: Fore!
entries.content: Level 1 Barbarism Tags: Upcast Action: Special Attack | Range | Reach | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | - | | Save | - | Note: This special attack can only be initiated against a knocked down target. On-hit launch it 20 ft in any direction with a slight parabola to knock them over obstacles. The creature remains knocked down in it's new position. Upcast - For each additional mana spent, increase damage by d8 (4).

entries.title: Head On
entries.content: Level 1 Barbarism Tags: Upcast Action: Immediate | Range | - | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | - | | Save | - | When you are hit by a Melee Attack, you take it head on, literally. Slam your head directly into the attack to make a bully attack against the foe. Upcast 3 - Instead make a disarm attack

entries.title: Put Me In!
entries.content: Level 1 Barbarism Tags: Upcast Tags: Special Attack | Range | Reach | | -------------- | ------------------------------ | | Target/AoE | 1 willing or helpless creature | | Duration | - | | Save | - | Set an ally to 1 poise and throw them into combat. You can throw them up to 20 ft, including into the air. Upcast - For each additional mana you spend, you can throw your ally an additional 10 ft.

entries.title: War Paint
entries.content: Level 1 Barbarism Tags: Buff Action: Swift | Range | Reach | | -------------- | -------- | | Target/AoE | Self | | Duration | 1 minute | | Save | - | Wipe the blood, sludge or ectoplasm off of a creature and apply it to yourself to get yourself in the mood for battle. You must initially target a defeated creature or yourself if you are below 10 hp. After you apply the blood to yourself, gain +15 speed, a +4 bonus to +Intimidation checks. When you crit, you deal an additional 5 damage.

entries.title: Foe Toss
entries.content: Level 2 Barbarism Tags: Upcast Action: Special Attack | Range | Reach | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | - | | Save | - | Note - This technique requires Extraordinary Strength. Make a grapple attack. Instead of grappling them, you make a bonus thrown weapon attack using the poise broken creature as ammunition. Can only be thrown in the first range increment. The attack always deals full damage to the poise broken creature. If you graze the secondary target, it does not change the damage against the initial target. If you crit, both targets are both crit. All creatures affected take an additional d8 (4) damage. If you are already grappling the creature when you initiate the attack, you don't need to grapple them again and can instead skip straight to the thrown attack. Upcast - For each additional mana spent, increase damage by d8 (4).

entries.title: Spartan Kick
entries.content: Level 2 Barbarism Tags: - Action: Special Attack | Range | Reach | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | - | | Save | - | A swift kick in the abdomen sends your opponent reeling backwards. Make a shove attack with a +4 bonus that deals damage and pushes back an additional 5 ft on a successful poise break. If the opponent was clumsy or knocked down, they take double fall damage (6 damage per 10 ft).

entries.title: Technology
entries.content: Level 2 Barbarism Tags: Prepared Action: - | Range | - | | -------------- | --- | | Target/AoE | - | | Duration | - | | Save | - | You can activate things using the +Athletics skill that normally require another skill. This could mean twisting the doorknob off of a door to open it, forcing open a book that requires a password gleaned through arcana or activating a portal that normally required +Planes. This usually involves damaging or breaking the object. "We aren't cavemen: We have technology!"

entries.title: Ups and Downs
entries.content: Level 2 Barbarism Tags: Upcast Action: Special Attack | Range | Reach | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | - | | Save | - | On hit deal an additional d8 (4) damage and smash a creature into the ground, or throw them directly up into a low roof within 10 ft. In either case, the creature is entangled until they breakout as a swift action. If you throw the creature into a roof, they are also unable to see and interact with the floor below until they escape. Upcast - For each additional mana spent, increase damage by d8 (4).

entries.title: Blood Armor
entries.content: Level 3 Barbarism Tags: Buff Action: Swift | Range | - | | -------------- | -------- | | Target/AoE | Self | | Duration | 1 minute | | Save | - | Special: Can only be used while below 50% hp or bleeding. Bathe in your own blood. While below 50% hp or if you took bleed damage this turn, gain +2 AC. If you stop bleeding, or heal above 50% hp, the buff remains, but you lose the AC bonus until you meet the techniques requirements. If you are below 10 hp, gain +4 AC.

entries.title: Cart
entries.content: Level 3 Barbarism Tags: Su, Prepared Action: - | Range | - | | -------------- | --- | | Target/AoE | - | | Duration | - | | Save | - | You manifest a cart of your own design as a standard action. Every time you manifest this cart, it is the same cart. The cart is capable of holding a dozen or so people and has an Extradimensional Space with 8 inventory slots. You can cause this cart to vanish back to the cart realm as a standard action. While attached to and dragging your cart, your land speed doubles for overland travel. To you, the contents within the cart are completely weightless. To anybody else, it weighs 2k lbs. The cart lasts indefinitely, but disappears while you don’t have this technique memorized. Anything placed inside of the card when it disappears are deposited onto the ground.

entries.title: Exist
entries.content: Level 3 Barbarism Tags: - Action: Instant | Range | 60 ft | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | - | | Save | Will | As part of the initiative roll you can choose a creature within range. That creature is taunted (will negates). To that creature, your very existence infuriates them and you must be stopped at all cost. At the end of each of their turns, they get a new save to end the effect. If you are at or below 50% hp when this ability triggers, increase the DC by 2. If on subsequent turns, you take no actions on your turn other than movement, the DC increases by 2. If this creature is defeated, then you may choose a new creature to affect with this ability (no action required, happens immediately).

entries.title: Flash Attack
entries.content: Level 3 Barbarism Tags: Su, Teleportation, Force, Upcast Action: Free | Range | 30 ft | | -------------- | ------------------ | | Target/AoE | A threatened space | | Duration | - | | Save | - | You can teleport 30 ft, as long as you appear in a threatened space. Any creatures you threaten take 2d8 (9) force damage and an equal amount of poise damage. After you activate this ability, your turn immediately ends.

entries.title: Forget Me Stick
entries.content: Level 3 Barbarism Tags: Upcast Action: Special Attack | Range | Reach | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | - | | Save | - | Note: You need to defeat the creature on the same turn that you land this attack for it to have its effect. The creature is never killed by your attacks this turn. You deal an additional 2d8 (9) damage. The target forgets anything that happened while defeated, and anything that happened a minute before being defeated. Upcast - For each additional mana spent, increase damage by d8 (4).

entries.title: Revenge
entries.content: Level 3 Barbarism Tags: Elusive Action: Immediate | Range | Reach | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | - | | Save | - | Make a simple melee attack against a creature that did +HP damage to you. If they are not within reach, you can move your speed to get within reach of them instead of attacking.

entries.title: Firmly Grasp It
entries.content: Level 4 Barbarism Tags: - Action: Special Attack | Range | Reach | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | - | | Save | - | Make a disarm attack with a +4 bonus. Instead of knocking the weapon out of the creatures hand, you violently stab it into the creature's hand, dealing 3d8 (13) additional damage. The creature cannot use that hand or weapon until the weapon is removed as a standard action via Breakout or first aid.

entries.title: Most Annoying Sound
entries.content: Level 4 Barbarism Tags: Sonic Action: Special Attack | Range | Reach | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | - | | Save | - | Screech into your enemies ear to confound them with a horrific noise. Make a grapple attack with a +4 bonus. Gain a constrict that deals 3d8 (13) sonic damage while it persists. The grappled creature is also confused.

entries.title: Walk Around
entries.content: Level 4 Barbarism Tags: Mind-Affecting, Concentration Action: FRA | Range | 60 ft | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | - | | Save | Will | You can walk around. You spend all of your actions moving and doing nothing else, ending your movement at some point within 30 feet of where you started walking around. Naturally this behavior befuddles the creatures around you. All enemies within 60 feet of this initial starting point are confused (will adds 4 to d10 roll). The DC is 2 higher for creatures that AoO you as part of this movement. You may continue spending your turns walking around to continue confusing new creatures as long as you want, the same creature cannot be confused more than once. This has no effect on creatures not engaged in combat with you.

entries.title: Armed Robbery
entries.content: Level 5 Barbarism Tags: - Action: Special Attack | Range | Reach | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | - | | Save | Fort | Make a grapple or disarm attack with a +4 bonus. If successful, instead of the usual effects, tear off your opponents arm causing, them to bleed 2d6 (7) damage and be drained 5 (fort removes drain/bleed and reduces "disarm" to dislocated arm, which deals 5 True Damage to you every time you use it, such as to attack with a weapon in that hand, cast a spell with a staff in that hand or take a shield action with a shield in that hand. First aid can fix this condition). If you successfully disarm or grapple, make a Simple Attack against them with their own arm as a free action. This counts as a light weapon. If your hands are already full, you can choose to sheathe or drop weapons/items in order to make this extra attack.

entries.title: Man Drop
entries.content: Level 5 Barbarism Tags: Recharge, Earth Tags: FRA | Range | 120 ft | | -------------- | ----------------------------------------------- | | Target/AoE | 30 ft radius, centered on a point on the ground | | Duration | - | | Save | Fort | Leap with incredible strength 300 ft into the air and crash down onto an area. Creatures within 30 ft of your landing position take 6d8+lvl (27+lvl) crush damage and are staggered for 1 minute (fort halves damage and reduces stagger to 1 round). Creatures get a new save against the stagger effect at the end of each of their turns. Usable 1/combat.

entries.title: Undying Rage
entries.content: Level 6 Barbarism Tags: Contingent, Prepared Action: - | Range | - | | -------------- | --- | | Target/AoE | - | | Duration | - | | Save | - | Your eyes glow and your resting emotional state is angry. The first time you are defeated and the condition is not negated or delayed by another feature, such as ferocity or Diehard you can choose to activate this contingency. You become completely immune to death/defeat. Any hp damage in excess of your current hp is instead converted into Drained and increased by 5 (22 damage? 27 drain. 1 damage? 6 drain). When your drain matches your max hp, you instantly die. When combat ends, or as an instant action, you can choose to end the effects of this technique. You are defeated and unconscious until you are no longer drained. Your +HP can be increased through Healing effects during the combat, decreasing how quickly the drain accumulates, but you are always defeated after the effects of this technique wear off, regardless of your current hp.

entries.title: Barbarism
entries.content: 💢 Barbarism Techniques that use raw strength to perform ridiculous and unorthodox feats. Barbarism also rewards you for putting yourself in danger and hurting yourself.

entries.title: Bear Arms
entries.content: Level 1 Beastmode Tags: Prepared Action: - | Range | - | | -------------- | --- | | Target/AoE | - | | Duration | - | | Save | - | While this technique is prepared, your arms get coated in a thick fur and your fingers get claws at their ends, granting you a Natural Attack. The claw attacks deal d8 slash damage, or d10 if your hands are empty. They have the CM (disarm) and CM (grapple) weapon properties. If you already had claws, these qualities are only in addition to what you already had. AKA, cannot decrease your claw dmg. While wielding a Gun, you get DR 20 vs disarm attacks. You can make grapple and disarm attacks as AoOs with your bear arms, as though you you possessed the Maneuver Versatility feat. You gain a multi-attack option: Bear Rights - Make 2 attacks with your bear claws.

entries.title: Bestial Claw
entries.content: Level 1 Beastmode Tags: Upcast Action: Standard | Range | - | | -------------- | ------------------------------------------------- | | Target/AoE | 15 ft radius centered on useror20 ft cone | | Duration | - | | Save | Reflex | Dig your claws into the ground and unleash a cone of sharp claw shaped shockwaves dealing 2d8+lvl (9+lvl) slashing damage (reflex halves). Creatures take an equal amount of poise damage. Upcast - Every point of additional mana spent on this ability increases the damage by d8 (4).

entries.title: Frenzied Leap
entries.content: Level 1 Beastmode Tags: Upcast, Earth Action: Swift | Range | - | | -------------- | ----------------------------------------- | | Target/AoE | 10 ft radius, centered on a landing point | | Duration | - | | Save | - | Take the Jump action and crash upon your foes with a shockwave. Creatures within 10 ft of your landing position (or your natural reach) are clumsy 1. Upcast - For each additional mana spent, increase your jump distance by 5.

entries.title: Lick
entries.content: Level 1 Beastmode Tags: Upcast Action: Special Attack | Range | 15 ft | | -------------- | ------ | | Target/AoE | Self | | Duration | 1 turn | | Save | - | Your tongue grows in size and strength to attack a creature. You can use it to make melee attacks with an additional 15 ft of reach for the remainder of your turn. Upcast - For each additional mana spent, increase the reach by an additional 15 ft.

entries.title: Pack Attack
entries.content: Level 1 Beastmode Tags: - Action: Special Attack | Range | Reach | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | - | | Save | - | Keep up the pressure on an opponent by making it appear like many copies of you are attacking it at once. On-hit, an ally (other than yourself) has advantage on their next attack against the target in the next round.

entries.title: Pouch
entries.content: Level 1 Beastmode Tags: Prepared Action: - | Range | - | | -------------- | --- | | Target/AoE | - | | Duration | - | | Save | - | While you have this technique prepared you have a single large pouch in your skin, or other methods of storage on the exterior of your body. You gain an extra 100 carry weight and natural pockets to place things in. You can use the pouches to conceal items with advantage.

entries.title: Shells Up
entries.content: Level 1 Beastmode Tags: poly, chimeric, Prepared | Range | Reach | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | - | | Save | - | While this technique is prepared, you have a large shell on your back. You cannot be flanked. By spending 1 mana when you take the total defense action, you can slip into your shell completely. This prevents you from taking any instant or immediate actions, but increases the the defense granted by the action to DRA 4.

entries.title: Venomous Strike
entries.content: Level 1 Beastmode Tags: - Action: Special Attack | Range | Reach | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | - | | Save | Fort | Grow a large stinger, or long fangs to sink into an enemy. On hit they are envenomed (fort negates).

entries.title: Jaws of the Beast
entries.content: Level 2 Beastmode Tags: Upcast Action: Special Attack | Range | Reach | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | - | | Save | - | Grow massive powerful jaws and take a chomp your opponent with a Melee Attack. It deals an additional d8 (4) damage and you latch onto them On-hit. Until the start of your next turn, you stay adjacent to this target as it now needs to drag you along for the ride. You can decide which space you end adjacent to them after the creature moves. Anything that prevents you from moving prevents the other creature from moving as well (such as being entangled. If you are poise broken you detach. Upcast - For each additional mana spent, increase damage by d8 (4).

entries.title: Kindred
entries.content: Level 2 Beastmode Tags: poly, true, Mana Burn, Dismissible Action: Standard | Range | - | | -------------- | -------- | | Target/AoE | Self | | Duration | 1 minute | | Save | - | Transform into a beast creature you can see. You do not copy their appearance exactly, only their species. You gain the creature's senses, movement types and natural attacks, but nothing else. A pattern appears in your fur/scales etc that matches the symbol of Mother Earth. How others of the species react to you depends on the species. Some creatures are territorial, others are social and others don't care. If you mana burn you can increase the duration to 10 minutes.

entries.title: Predatory Instincts
entries.content: Level 2 Beastmode Tags: Buff Action: Swift | Range | - | | -------------- | -------- | | Target/AoE | Self | | Duration | 1 minute | | Save | - | You can instinctively tell when a creature is a lower level than you just by looking at them. You get a +2 bonus to melee damage rolls against said creatures. If the creature is a minion, you can tell, and this damage bonus increases to +4.

entries.title: Rapid Recovery
entries.content: Level 2 Beastmode Tags: Prepared, Healing Action: - | Range | - | | -------------- | --- | | Target/AoE | - | | Duration | - | | Save | - | You can detach and regenerate lost limbs/organs, and in general recover much faster. You can cause pieces of your body to detach as a free action, such as your hands or legs. Basically anything that isn't your head or your torso. When you do so, you are drained 3. If you are able to re-attach this limb, you recover the drain. You recover 2 stacks of drained every days instead of 1, as though receiving long term care (stacks). A lost limb/organ regrows within 3 days. When you are defeated, you automatically regain 1 hit point after 10 minutes. As a swift action, you can heal 10 hp, regrow a limb instantly and make yourself drained 5.

entries.title: Rend Vision
entries.content: Level 2 Beastmode Tags: Upcast Action: Special Attack | Range | Reach | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | - | | Save | - | Grow a beak and poke at a creature's eyes. On-hit the creature is Blinded for 1 round.

entries.title: Sniffer
entries.content: Level 2 Beastmode Tags: Prepared Action: - | Range | Reach | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | - | | Save | - | You enhance your sense of smell, giving you blindsense (Scent, 10 ft).

entries.title: Blood Spurt
entries.content: Level 3 Beastmode Tags: - Action: Immediate | Range | Reach | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | - | | Save | Reflex | While you are bleeding, or whenever a creature within your natural reach deals slashing or piercing damage, you can respond by squirting some of your blood at them. You take 2 true damage and the target is blinded for 1 round (reflex reduces to blurred vision).

entries.title: Chameleon
entries.content: Level 3 Beastmode Tags: Prepared Action: - | Range | - | | -------------- | --- | | Target/AoE | - | | Duration | - | | Save | - | You gain the camouflage monster quality. You can turn this quality on or off as a free action 1/turn.

entries.title: Feast
entries.content: Level 3 Beastmode Tags: Healing, Upcast Action: Special Attack | Range | Reach | | -------------- | -------------------------------------------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature, living defeated or recently dead | | Duration | - | | Save | - | Grow rows of jagged teeth, unhinge your jaw and take a meaty bite out of a creature, dealing an additional 2d8 (9) dmg. If after the attack is resolved, the creature is defeated or dead, gain (2*lvl) temp hp. Upcast - For each additional mana spent, increase damage by d8 (4).

entries.title: Octolock
entries.content: Level 3 Beastmode Tags: - Action: Special Attack | Range | Reach | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | - | | Save | - | Grow several tentacles and make a grapple attack with a +4 bonus. While grappled in this way, attacks against the target get a +4 bonus, you have resistance to poise damage and you constrict them for 3d6 (10) damage each turn, including the turn you initiate it.

entries.title: Return to Monke
entries.content: Level 3 Beastmode Tags: poly, true Action: Standard | Range | - | | -------------- | ---- | | Target/AoE | Self | | Duration | - | | Save | - | Assume the form of a tiny monkey indefinitely. You can exit this transformation as a standard action. While in this form, you gain the following traits from the Polymorph List Speed - Climb Smol - Tiny Prehensile - Tail Attack - Bite (P) Bother While in this form, you gain 2 abilities. Both usable as a standard action. One of Us (poly, true) - While in monkey form, you reach over and touch a creature with your tiny monkey hands. The creature also turns into a tiny monkey (fort reduces to stagger 1 round). Ohhh Banana Mind-Affecting - You procure a shiny golden banana that hovers in the air for 1 minute. All creatures you turned into a monkey are automatically fascinated. Other monkey/ape-like creatures are fascinated (will negates).

entries.title: Unseen Predator
entries.content: Level 3 Beastmode Tags: - Action: Special Attack | Range | 30 ft | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | - | | Save | - | Special - This technique can only be used while you hide. Leap up to 30 ft, also giving a bonus jump action. You appear suddenly next to the creature and make a melee attack against them that deals an additional 2d8 (9) dmg. If the target fails its +Perception against your stealth, instead deal 3d8 (13) additional dmg.

entries.title: Death Roll
entries.content: Level 4 Beastmode Tags: - Action: Special Attack | Range | Reach | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | - | | Save | - | Note: Can only be used against a grappled or knocked down creature. You chomp down onto a creature with excessive force and spin them around. If the creature is grappled, they are knocked down and take an additional 3d8 (13) damage and are made clumsy 2. If they are knocked down, you initiate a grapple, they take an additional 3d8 (13) damage and are made clumsy 2. In either case, they are also Held Down. If the target is neither grappled nor knocked down, you can attempt one such maneuver as a free action on hit. When you maintain a grapple against a creature after using this technique against them without the grapple ever being broken, they are made clumsy 2.

entries.title: Peacocking
entries.content: Level 4 Beastmode Tags: Mind-Affecting Actions: Swift Action | Range | Reach | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | - | | Save | - | You grow an elaborate and colorful set of feathers, patterned wings or a wide hood like that of a snake to temporarily entrance your enemy. The creature you direct this display towards becomes fascinated for 1 round (will negates). You cannot use this technique against a creature you have attacked this round.

entries.title: Devour
entries.content: Level 5 Beastmode Tags: - Action: Special Attack EffectTarget1 creatureRangeReach This move functions differently based on whether you target an ally or an enemy. Enemy Against a creature you are grappling, this attack automatically works. If not already grappling, roll a grapple attack with a +4 bonus. If successful, you swallow the creature whole. While devoured, the creature inside is in stasis. You gain access to the following special attack. Spit Up - Spit out a devoured creature, hurling them up to 30 feet. The creature takes 6d8+lvl (27+lvl) crush damage and is knocked down. Creatures within 5 ft of the impact location are also knocked down (reflex negates). If you do not use spit up on the following turn, the target is disgorged with no negative effects at the end of that turn. Ally Devour a willing ally, giving them Total Cover. They can hang out inside your stomach indefinitely, hearing muffled versions of things happening outside. As a free action, they can exit your stomach. If you become sickened, you automatically vomit them out.

entries.title: Hive Mind
entries.content: Level 5 Beastmode Tags: Prepared Action: - | Range | - | | -------------- | --- | | Target/AoE | - | | Duration | - | | Save | - | You establish a connection to an ally with 1 minute of intimate contact, adding them to your hive mind. While part of the hive mind, you are able to speak telepathically with them. You can choose to telepathically communicate with one, some or all members. All members of the hive also get an intuitive sense of each member's direction and distance. You can form a hive mind with a number of creatures equal to your LvL. If you ever stop preparing this technique, your hive mind disappears.

entries.title: Blood Hunt
entries.content: Level 6 Beastmode Tags: Prepared Action: - | Range | Reach | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | - | | Save | - | While this technique is prepared, you can smell everything as long as it bleeds. You gain the Shirshu Elite Tracker and Sightless Blindsense traits. These only function against wounded creatures, or against creatures whose blood you have smelled before. You see a faint misty red trail leading directly to whatever you track, automatically succeeding on survival checks to track creatures whose blood you have smelled before.

entries.title: Wallop
entries.content: Level 6 Beastmode Tags: Recharge Action: Standard | Range | - | | -------------- | ------------------------------------------------- | | Target/AoE | 10 ft radius, centered on caster or natural reach | | Duration | - | | Save | Fort | Grow long bestial arms to scoop up your foes and toss them in a specific direction. Choose a direction, then make a shove attack with a +8 bonus and apply it to against all creatures within range. Creatures successfully shoved are moved 20 ft in the direction you chose. If they impact solid terrain, they take 7d8+lvl (31+lvl) damage and are stunned for one round (fort reduces stun to daze).

entries.title: Beastmode
entries.content: The techniques surrounding using natural attacks, and briefly transforming into animals. All beastmode features are supernatural. As a reminder, ALL special attacks have the martial tag, even if it is not listed.

entries.title: 5G
entries.content: Level 1 Cataclysm Tags: Buff Action: Swift Action | Range | - | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | Self | | Duration | 10 minutes | | Save | - | Increase the effects of gravity on your body, causing you to stay firmly planted on the ground, sometimes to your detriment. You cannot hover or Fly. You gain Advantage on any save that would physically move you from your position or knock you down. Creatures have Disadvantage on attacks made against you that would move you from your position or knock you down. If used underwater, you sink to the bottom 60 ft per round.

entries.title: Quake
entries.content: Level 1 Cataclysm Tags: Prepared, Earth Action: - | Range | - | | -------------- | --- | | Target/AoE | - | | Duration | - | | Save | - | You drastically increase the weight of your footsteps, causing each one to echo and the ground to shake. You gain a +2 bonus to +Intimidation and creatures get a +10 bonus to +Perception to detect you. The bonus to intimidation increases to +4 if you wear heavy armor.

entries.title: Roar
entries.content: Level 1 Cataclysm Tags: Fear, Sonic, Upcast Action: Standard | Range | - | | -------------- | ------------------------------------------------- | | Target/AoE | 10 ft radius, centered on caster or natural reach | | Duration | - | | Save | - | You roar loudly, sounding more monster than man. Creatures within the range take d6+lvl (3+lvl) sonic damage. They are frightened for one round (will negates). Upcast - For each additional mana spent, increase damage by d6 (3).

entries.title: Sonic Boom
entries.content: Level 1 Cataclysm Tags: Sonic, Upcast Action: Standard | Range | Reach | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 15 ft cone | | Duration | - | | Save | Fort | You clap your hands together with violent force. Creatures in the area take 2d8+lvl (9+lvl) sonic damage and are pushed back 10 ft (fort halves damage negates pushback). Upcast - For each additional mana spent, increase damage by d8 (4).

entries.title: Thunder Stomp
entries.content: Level 1 Cataclysm Tags: Earth, Upcast Action: Special Attack | Range | 30 ft | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | - | | Save | - | Special: You and your target must be touching the ground to use this technique. Counts as a Melee Attack You smash the ground violently, causing a shockwave under the target. Roll a topple attack with a +4 bonus. If successful, the creature takes full damage instead of graze damage as they fall onto sharpened ground. Upcast - For each additional mana spent, increase the range by 15 ft.

entries.title: Training Arc
entries.content: Level 1 Cataclysm Tags: Su, Upcast Action: Special Attack | Range | Reach | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | 1 minute | | Save | - | Charge your Melee Attack so it leaves behind a lingering effect, causing the target to experience the gravity of a larger planet. On-hit the target is grounded and is affected as though under the effects of Tier 1 High Gravity. As a swift action, you can end the grounded debuff and pull the creature 30 ft closer to you. Upcast - For each additional mana spent, you can pull the creature an additional 15 ft. If you spend at least 3 mana, the creature is affected as per T2 High Gravity. If you spend at least 6 mana, the creatures is affected as per T3 High Gravity

entries.title: Crater
entries.content: Level 2 Cataclysm Tags: Earth, Upcast Action: Special Attack | Range | Reach | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | - | | Save | - | Special: You must have High Ground on your opponent to use this technique. A jump is sufficient to meet this criteria. Slam your opponent with such force that the ground underneath you cracks and splinters upwards, dealing an additional d8 (4) dmg. On-hit, a 10 ft radius circular wall of earth forms with you and your opponent at the center inside. The wall is 20 ft tall on the inside and sloped on the outside. Any creatures in spaces where the wall forms are shunted away. A creature can break through the wall with Brute Force as a standard action. You can attempt to break through it as a free action (1/turn) with the same check. If you or your opponent is larger than medium, than the walls radius increases by 5ft per size category above medium. If you or the target leave the arena, the wall crumbles. Upcast - For each additional point of mana spent, deal an additional d8 (4) dmg and increase the DC to destroying the wall by 2.

entries.title: Ferocious Howl
entries.content: Level 2 Cataclysm Tags: Sonic, Fear, Upcast Action: Standard | Range | Thrown | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | - | | Save | Will | Shout at your enemy to create a sonic projectile and scare them off. Make a thrown attack that deals 3d8+lvl (13+lvl) sonic damage. The target is frightened for one round (will reduces to shaken 1). Upcast - Every point of additional mana spent on this ability increases the damage by d8 (4). If you spend at least 3 mana, its range increases to Short If you spend at least 5, Long.

entries.title: Fist of the Cataclysm
entries.content: Level 2 Cataclysm Tags: Upcast Action: Varies | Range | 30 ft | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | - | | Save | Reflex? | Call upon your fiendish patron and punch the ground. An enormous fiendish fist appears above your target and slams down upon them. This can have 2 different effects... Attack Make a melee special attack. It has greatly increased range, deals an additional d8 (4) dmg and an equal amount of poise damage. If this poise breaks, it inflicts Knockdown. If the creature was flying, they are sent down to the ground, taking fall damage, in addition any other effects On-hit. Save Let the patron do all the work as a standard action. The targeted creature takes 3d8+lvl (13+lvl) crush damage and is sent down to the ground if flying, taking fall damage (reflex halves dmg and negates knocking out of the air). The target also takes poise damage equal to damage dealt. If this poise breaks, it knocks the creature down. Upcast - Deals an additional d8 (4) damage per mana spent. If you spend at least 4 mana, the technique's range increases to 60 ft.

entries.title: Gift of the Cataclysm
entries.content: Level 2 Cataclysm Swift: Buff Action: Swift | Range | - | | -------------- | -------- | | Target/AoE | Self | | Duration | 1 minute | | Save | - | Your devotion manifests into gifts from your fiendish patron. Get a +2 bonus to +Athletics checks and damage made with unarmed attacks and natural attacks. As part of using this technique, you must make a DC 15 check to Brute Force destroy a nearby or handheld object. If you fail, the buff immediately ends.

entries.title: Gut Check
entries.content: Level 2 Cataclysm Tags: Upcast Action: Special Attack | Range | Reach | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | - | | Save | Fort? | You make an unarmed strike or natural attack against a creature, aiming straight for the abdomen while shouting "GUT CHECK." The attack does an additional d8 (4) dmg and On-hit if the creature has just swallowed something recently, they vomit it out, negating its benefits or drawbacks. Also ends pregnancies (fort negates). Upcast - If you spend at least 3 mana, the creature is also sickened 1, and cannot consume anything without getting rid of the sickened first.

entries.title: Earth Shatter
entries.content: Level 3 Cataclysm Tags: Earth, Upcast Action: Standard | Range | - | | -------------- | -------------------------------------------------------------- | | Target/AoE | 60 ft line, 30 ft cone or 15 ft radius burst, centered on user | | Duration | - | | Save | - | Note: You must be touching the ground to cast this spell. You smash the ground violently, causing it to crack and crumble under your strength. The area becomes difficult terrain. Creatures on the ground or hovering in the area take 4d8+lvl (18+lvl) crush damage and are knocked down (reflex halves damage and negates knock down). Upcast - For each additional mana spent, increase damage by d8 (4).

entries.title: Fracture
entries.content: Level 3 Cataclysm Tags: Action: Special Attack | Range | Reach | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | - | | Save | Fort | On-hit or after grappling a foe, crack a creature's bones in one of their limbs in order to impede them and cause great pain. The creature takes 2d8 (9) true damage and has one of their limbs rendered useless (fort turns damaged limb into Staggered for 1 round). Arm - Creature is unable to use arm Leg - Creatures speed is reduced by 15. Clumsy 1 permanently. Wing - Creature is unable to fly. Note: Other limbs can be selected, disabling natural attacks like tentacles and such. These are just the most common examples. The damaged limb can be healed with a DC 25 +Medicine check, taking 1 minute.

entries.title: Gravity Well
entries.content: Level 3 Cataclysm Tags: Su, Concentration Action: Standard | Range | - | | -------------- | ------------------------------------- | | Target/AoE | 60 ft radius aura, anchored to caster | | Duration | 1 minute | | Save | Fort? | Flex so hard you exert a weak gravitational force around you. All creatures within 60 ft are grounded and affected by T2 High Gravity. This debuff persists for the rest of the affected creature's turn after leaving the area. As a swift action, you can end the effect and pull all creatures within range 30 ft closer to you (fort negates).

entries.title: Shockwave
entries.content: Level 3 Cataclysm Tags: Buff, Earth Action: Swift | Range | - | | -------------- | -------- | | Target/AoE | Self | | Duration | 1 minute | | Save | - | You empower yourself with thunder thighs. You can take the jump action as part of using this technique. Whenever you take the jump action, creatures on the ground within reach of your destination are staggered for 1 round (fort negates). Creatures that were already staggered are knocked down (fort negates).

entries.title: Wasteland
entries.content: Level 3 Cataclysm Tags: Su, Sigil, Curse, Upcast Action: 1 minute | Range | Reach | | -------------- | --------------------------------- | | Target/AoE | 1,000 ft burst, centered on sigil | | Duration | - | | Save | - | You use the ink to inscribe the mark of The Cataclysm on a flat surface. Over the course of a week, the curse will spread over the area of the spell. Plants will wither, soil will turn to sand or dust, water sources will dry up and wildlife will perish. In general, the natural terrain suffers until it is converted into uninhabitable wasteland over the course of a few months, and a toxic volcanic wasteland over a year. To remove the curse, a creature must spend 200g of summoner's ink or normal ink made with holy water to write a brief poem or prayer in druidic in a circle around the mark of the Cataclysm. Depending on how long the mark was present, it may take years for the land to recover without assistance. Using this technique removes any previous instances you use. Upcast 5 - AoE increases to 1 mile Upcast 6 - AoE increases to 5 miles.

entries.title: Clapped
entries.content: Level 4 Cataclysm Tags: Su Action: Standard | Range | 15 ft or reach | | -------------- | -------------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | - | | Save | Fort | You call forth a portion of your fiendish patron to crush your enemies. Two muscular arms overlap your own as you clap a foe within range. Make two melee unarmed attacks against a creature with a +2 bonus to Attack. Each attack deals 18 crush damage. Creatures hit by at least one attack are staggered for 1 round On-hit. Creatures hit by both strikes are dazed for 1 round on-hit (fort reduces to Staggered).

entries.title: Power Lifter
entries.content: Level 4 Cataclysm Tags: Su, Prepared Action: - | Range | - | | -------------- | --- | | Target/AoE | - | | Duration | - | | Save | - | The Cataclysm infuses you with the power of LIFT, drastically increasing your carrying capacity. Multiply your carry weight by 2,000. The following special attack can be used at will. Heavy Artillery - You can throw an object weighing at least 1 ton to deal 3d12+Str (16+str) dmg, defaulting to crush dmg. This counts as a +Siege Weapon.

entries.title: Pulverize
