entries.content: Level 4 Cataclysm Tags: Earth Action: Special Attack | Range | - | | -------------- | ------- | | Target/AoE | Reach | | Duration | 1 round | | Save | - | Note: You must be touching the ground to cast this spell. Tenderize the ground to send your foes flying. Roll to Topple all foes within your reach with a +4 bonus. Compare the result of the attack to the Poise of all enemies. Against all enemies you successfully topple, the creatures are knocked into the air for 1 round. While airborne, the creature has a speed of zero and creatures get a +4 bonus to Attack against them. Anything that removes Knockdown can also pull the creature out of the air. At the start of your next turn, the creatures fall and are Knocked Down.

entries.title: Disintegration
entries.content: Level 5 Cataclysm Tags: - Action: Special Attack | Range | Reach | | -------------- | -------------------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature or object | | Duration | 3 rounds | | Save | Fort | Attack with such violent force that the target is evaporated. Roll a melee attack. On-hit the target starts to disintegrate (fort reduced duration to 1 round). Disintegrating creatures take 3d6 (10) true damage at the start of each turn and are Staggered. Creatures defeated by this damage are turned to dust. If you target an object, you can evaporate a 5x5x5 ft cube matter of solid or lesser toughness, turning it to dust. Tougher objects sustain heavy damage in the same area.

entries.title: Roar of the Cataclysm
entries.content: Level 5 Cataclysm Tags: Fear, Sonic, Su Action: Standard | Range | - | | -------------- | ------------------------------ | | Target/AoE | 30 ft radius, centered on user | | Duration | - | | Save | Will? | You call forth a portion of your fiendish patron to strike fear into the hearts of your enemies. Its visage overlaps your own as you let out a monstrous roar. Creatures within 30 feet of you take 6d6 (21) sonic damage. They are also frightened for 1 minute (will reduces frightened to shaken 1). Each round at the end of their turn, creatures can roll another save to reduce the frightened condition to shaken 1.

entries.title: Calamity
entries.content: Level 6 Cataclysm Tags: Recharge, Elusive Action: 2 rounds Material: 1 scale of The Cataclysm | Range | 120 ft | | -------------- | ---------------- | | Target/AoE | It's complicated | | Duration | - | | Save | Fort | You call forth the infinite reserves of strength possessed by your fiendish patron to lay waste to the area around you. It requires a standard action to initiate this technique and you immediately leap 5,000 feet into the air. You are still targetable through normal means, but the distance makes most forms of attack impossible. Until the start of your next turn you charge energy and gain momentum as you plummet towards the ground. To onlookers you look like a meteor rapidly approaching. As a standard action on your next turn, you decide the area you want to unleash this gathered momentum and energy. Choose a 60 ft line in the technique's range. All but the sturdiest objects (adamantine toughness+) within 30 feet of this line are immediately evaporated by your impact, turning to dust. Creatures within 30 feet of this line take 50 crush damage, are knocked out of the area and are staggered for 1 minute (fort halves the damage). New save every round to end stagger. You end the movement granted by this technique at the end of this line and your turn ends. The area within 30 feet on either side of this line becomes a pit of roiling liquid Lava that persists for weeks, or even longer depending on environmental conditions. This lava is only enough to partially submerge creatures. This technique is anything but subtle and leaves a lot to be desired when using it as a surprise attack. The impact creates an incredibly powerful shockwave that people might mistake for an earthquake. Objects such as buildings, trees and roads close by to the where this technique is cast are damaged by being in the vicinity of this impact, even if they aren't in the lava crater.

entries.title: Gravity Storm
entries.content: Level 6 Cataclysm Tags: Su Recharge Action: Standard | Range | - | | -------------- | ---------------------------- | | Target/AoE | 60 ft aura, centered on user | | Duration | 1 minute | | Save | - | You channel your power such that it forces everything nearby to bend to your might. You passively exert a tangible gravitational pull to everything within 60 ft, causing loose objects weighing less than 100 lbs to immediately be pulled into the storm, throwing them into an orbit around you. Loose objects weighing between 100 and 1000 lbs are slowly dragged towards you. The movement of any enemy within 60 ft of you that is moving farther away from you is considered difficult terrain. All creatures within the aura are Grounded. As part of using this technique, and at the start of every turn as a free action, you can choose to exert this force, pulling all creatures in range 10 ft closer to you. At the end of each of your turns, if a creature is within your natural reach, it must roll a DC 20 +Athletics check or buckle under its own weight, causing it to take 4d6 (14) crush dmg and gain Clumsy 1.

entries.title: Cataclysm
entries.content: Caldera, the Cataclysm is one of the 3 primary Demon Lords of Nack. She respects raw physical strength over all else. Her followers regularly engage in contests to prove who has the most. People fear to speak her name or draw her ire and have the cataclysm fall upon them. She has reached the pinnacle of physical strength, giving her the ability to control gravity itself and literally bend physics to her will. Cataclysm spells are centered around increasing and utilizing raw physical strength, manipulating gravity, causing immense destruction and being incredibly loud.

entries.title: Artillery
entries.content: Level 1 Marksman Tags: Prepared Action: - | Range | - | | -------------- | --- | | Target/AoE | - | | Duration | - | | Save | - | All ranged weapons you wield become Long range weapons. If it already is a long range weapon, increase the range increments by 20. You cannot benefit from this technique if you move more than 10 ft during your turn. If you benefit from this range increase before you move, your movement is reduced to 10 ft (applying speed debuffs like Knockdown to this new 10 speed).

entries.title: Butterfingers
entries.content: Level 1 Marksman Tags: - Action: Special Attack | Range | - | | -------------- | ------------------ | | Target/AoE | 1 creature or item | | Duration | - | | Save | - | Make a Ranged disarm attack with a +4 bonus. If successful, the disarmed item continues flying along with the projectile until it lands, either in a surface, or in the ground at the end of its range. Attacking from different angles can cause different behaviors, like with High Ground it won't go particularly far. It requires a swift action to yank it free. You can also use this technique against unattended objects for a similar effect.

entries.title: Curved Shot
entries.content: Level 1 Marksman Tags: Upcast Tags: Special Attack | Range | - | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | - | | Save | - | Ignore Cover, but not Improved Cover or Total Cover, for one ranged attack. Upcast - For each additional mana spent, increase damage by d8 (4).

entries.title: Dive
entries.content: Level 1 Marksman Tags: Elusive Action: Free | Range | 10 ft | | -------------- | ----- | | Target/AoE | - | | Duration | - | | Save | - | Move 10 feet and get Knocked Down until the start of your next turn.

entries.title: Empty Quiver
entries.content: Level 1 Marksman Tags: - Action: Special Attack | Range | Reach | | -------------- | ----- | | Target/AoE | - | | Duration | - | | Save | - | Slam your ranged weapon into an opponent and catch them off guard. Your weapon deals damage as a weapon of its handedness (2h 2d8, 1h d8) and has the light property for this attack. Your movement is elusive against this target this turn.

entries.title: Flying Arrow
entries.content: Level 1 Marksman Tags: Su Action: Special Attack | Range | - | | -------------- | ----------- | | Target/AoE | 2 creatures | | Duration | - | | Save | - | Make a ranged attack against a creature that gains a mind of its own. It ignores all conventional rules of weaponry and continues to follow where you aim your weapon until it strikes an additional creature within 15 ft of the original. Secondary attacks ignore range increment penalties if the first did. Upcast - For each additional mana spent, deal an additional d8 (4) dmg or the projectile flies to attack an additional target.

entries.title: Headshot
entries.content: Level 1 Marksman Tags: - Action: Special Attack | Range | 120 ft | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | - | | Save | - | Carefully line up a shot on a creature you specify. A red laser appears on their head, giving you a -10 penalty to +Stealth. At the start of your next turn, shoot them as a free action with a +10 bonus to Attack and a bonus 2d8 (9) damage. If the creature takes Total Cover or you are otherwise made unable to fire, this attack fails. This shot you take has effectively infinite range, only the initial targeting requires the creature be within 120 ft.

entries.title: Pin Down
entries.content: Level 1 Marksman Tags: - Action: Special Attack | Range | - | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | - | | Save | - | Hit your opponent with a projectile in such a way to pin them to the ground or a wall. They are entangled On-hit until they spend a swift action to remove it.

entries.title: Eagle Eye
entries.content: Level 2 Marksman Tags: Prepared Action: - | Range | - | | -------------- | --- | | Target/AoE | - | | Duration | - | | Save | - | You gain a +4 bonus to +Perception. You can see incredibly small details incredible distances, like a mouse running through a field hundreds of feet away.

entries.title: Lights Out
entries.content: Level 2 Marksman Tags: Upcast Action: Special Attack | Range | - | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | - | | Save | - | Make a ranged attack, dealing an additional d10 (5) dmg. If this attack is enough to defeat the target, regain the mana cost of this ability and reload your weapon. Upcast - For each additional mana spent, deal an additional d10 dmg.

entries.title: Long Shot
entries.content: Level 2 Marksman Tags: Upcast Action: Special Attack | Range | - | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | - | | Save | - | Make a ranged attack, adding 20 range and d8 (4) dmg. If you graze the target, you instead miss completely. Upcast - For each additional mana spent, deal an additional d8 (4) dmg and add an additional 10 range.

entries.title: Piercing Shot
entries.content: Level 2 Marksman Tags: Upcast Action: Standard | Range | - | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 60 ft line | | Duration | - | | Save | Reflex | Fire a single powerful shot, targeting a 60-ft line in front of you and dealing 3d8+lvl (13+lvl) pierce damage (reflex halves). If you increase the action of this ability to a FRA, gain +2 to its DC. This technique automatically loads your weapon, and it automatically reloads it again after use. Upcast - For each additional mana spent, deal an additional d8 (4) dmg and increase the line by 10 ft.

entries.title: Shot From the Air
entries.content: Level 2 Marksman Tags: Upcast Action: Standard | Range | - | | -------------- | ------------------- | | Target/AoE | 1 Ranged Attack | | Duration | - | | Save | - | Prepare yourself for incoming fire. When a ranged attack enters the first range increment of a ranged weapon you currently wield, fire at it. If your attack roll meets or exceeds theirs, the attack is negated. Upcast 4 - Usable as an immediate action.

entries.title: Tumble
entries.content: Level 2 Marksman Tags: Elusive Action: Free | Range | 10 ft | | -------------- | ----- | | Target/AoE | - | | Duration | - | | Save | - | Move 10 feet.

entries.title: Called Shot
entries.content: Level 3 Marksman Tags: - Action: Special Attack | Range | Reach | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | - | | Save | - | Fire an arrow that deals an additional 2d8 (9) damage and embed it into a key spot on the targets body on hit with a variety of effects. Hand - Creatures suffers a -2 penalty to Attack using weapons/casting spells through that hand while the arrow remains. Leg - Creatures land speed is reduced by 15 and it cannot dash, jump or Core Rules, How to Play/Actions/Common Actions/Full Round Actions/Charge while the arrow remains. Etc - You can target other regions of a creature's body, such as their jaw, or a tentacle to apply the -2 attack penalty to that attack specifically, or a wing/fin to restrict the movement of a swimming or flying creature. The arrow can be removed as a standard action without issue. It can be removed as a swift action by taking 2d8 (9) true damage. If you have +Medicine proficiency, removing as a swift action deals no damage.

entries.title: Gravity Bow
entries.content: Level 3 Marksman Tags: Upcast Action: Special Attack | Range | - | | -------------- | ------------------------------------------------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature10 ft radius around target creature | | Duration | - | | Save | Fort? | Fire a single powerful shot at a creature that crashes on impact. The target takes an additional 2d8 (9) damage and is pushed back 10 ft On-hit. Creatures within 10 ft of the impact zone are also knocked back 10 ft away from the target creature (fort negates). This attack is considered to be from a +Siege Weapon. Upcast - For each additional mana spent, increase the knockback distance of both effects by 5 ft.

entries.title: Named Bullet
entries.content: Level 3 Marksman Tags: Mana Burn, Su Action: 1 minute | Range | - | | -------------- | --------------------- | | Target/AoE | 1 piece of ammunition | | Duration | - | | Save | - | Hold a piece of ammunition (not just a bullet) in your hand and infuse it with your conviction to defeat a specific enemy. You must know the creatures name. If you use an incorrect name, when you fire the shot, it has no added effect. You get a +10 bonus to attack with a piece of ammunition affected by named bullet that strikes its intended target. While this ammunition holds this power, you are afflicted with mana burn 3 until you use the bullet, even if you rest. You can spend 1 minute to diffuse the power of this ammunition, removing the effects of named bullet from it and removing the mana burn. You can do this regardless of distance from it. You cannot diffuse a named bullet's power after you have already fired it.

entries.title: Rain of Arrows
entries.content: Level 3 Marksman Tags: Su, Persistent, Upcast Action: Standard Action | Range | 60 ft | | -------------- | ------------------------------------------------------- | | Target/AoE | 5 ft radius cylinder, centered on a point on the ground | | Duration | 1 round | | Save | Reflex | Fire a single powerful shot directly up into the air, when it falls it splits into many projectiles. The area is considered difficult terrain until the projectiles cease. Creatures in the area takes 4d8+LvL (18+LvL) damage (reflex halves). Upcast - For each additional mana spent, deal an additional d8 (4) dmg and increase the duration of the effect by 1 round.

entries.title: Reactive Shot
entries.content: Level 3 Marksman Tags: Su, Concentration Action: Standard | Range | 60 ft | | -------------- | ----------------------------------------------- | | Target/AoE | 10 ft radius, centered on a point on the ground | | Duration | 1 round | | Save | - | Mark an area with a glowing circle and take aim. Until the end of your next turn, you can automatically make a simple Ranged Attack against any creature that moves into, within or out of the area, only firing a shot 1/turn. Such attacks deal an additional d8 (4) dmg. The attacks must still be within range of a ranged weapon you wield, and you must have a method of reloading after each shot.

entries.title: Snatch
entries.content: Level 4 Marksman Tags: Su Action: Immediate | Range | - | | -------------- | ---------------------------------------------------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature targeting you with a ranged weapon attack | | Duration | - | | Save | - | When attacked by a ranged projectile weapon, roll a Reflex save against the creatures DC. If you succeed, you negate the attack entirely. If you are wielding a ranged weapon, transform the projectile into something that fits it and then fire/throw it back as an instant action. Particularly odd weapons (like the Ray Gun) require a near exact matching weapon to fire back.

entries.title: Fan the Hammer
entries.content: Level 5 Marksman Tags: Recharge Action: Standard | Range | - | | -------------- | --- | | Target/AoE | - | | Duration | - | | Save | - | Use a reload weapon to make 6 simple attacks at a -5 penalty. The weapon becomes unusable until repaired, costing 10% of its cost.

entries.title: level-6
entries.content: Level 6

entries.title: Marksman
entries.content: The techniques surrounding using ranged weapons. Many marksman special attacks require using ranged weapons. As such, they use the weapon you wield's range.

entries.title: Avenging Wrath
entries.content: Level 1 Protector Tags: - Action: Immediate | Range | Reach | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | - | | Save | - | Whenever an ally (other than you) takes damage or succumbs to a negative status effect as a result of an enemy, you can make a simple melee attack against that enemy.

entries.title: Bond of Protection
entries.content: Level 1 Protector Tags: Su, Dismissible Action: Standard | Range | Reach | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 ally | | Duration | Until Rest | | Save | - | You siphon your allies' pain into your own body with this bond. You take half of their +HP damage as True Damage (with odd damage numbers, round down). This technique can defeat you. You cannot take more damage than you have hp (ie if you have 1 hp and your bond takes 100 dmg, they take 99, you take 1). The damage redirected to you is considered self-inflicted damage for effects that trigger "when damaged by an enemy." If you do not have line of sight to your ally, or if you are more than 100 ft away for more than 3 rounds, the bond is temporarily suppressed until such conditions are met.

entries.title: Boost!
entries.content: Level 1 Protector Tags: - Action: Instant | Range | - | | -------------- | --- | | Target/AoE | - | | Duration | - | | Save | - | An ally can walk into a space you occupy to use a shield you wield as a springboard. You give them a jump action with additional movement and height equal to your natural reach. If they are a larger size than you, then you need to possess exceptional strength or carry weight to do this.

entries.title: It's Time to Duel!
entries.content: Level 1 Protector Tags: - Action: Swift | Range | 30 ft | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | 1 minute | | Save | Will | You issue a challenge towards the target to engage in an honorable duel. You and the target are taunted by each other until they deal damage to you, you deal damage to them, or the spell ends.

entries.title: Noble Sacrifice
entries.content: Level 1 Protector Tags: Elusive Action: Immediate | Range | 30 ft | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | - | | Save | - | When a creature harms another within 30 ft, you can immediately move adjacent to the ally, become the new target of the effect, and automatically get hit by the attack. If you use this technique against an effect that also targets you or includes you in its area, you suffer the effects for both yourself and the target you spared, potentially taking damage or suffering other consequences twice.

entries.title: Sanctuary
entries.content: Level 1 Protector Tags: Su Action: Standard | Range | 30 ft | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | 1 round | | Save | - | Affected creature cannot be targeted by harmful effects such as spells or attacks. The creature can still be affected by things that are AoE, they just can't be directly affected by hostile actions. If the target takes aggressive actions, the effect ends. A creature who has been affected by this technique cannot have it used on them again for 1 round.

entries.title: Shield Brother
entries.content: Level 1 Protector Tags: Elusive Action: Instant | Range | - | | -------------- | ------ | | Target/AoE | 1 ally | | Duration | - | | Save | - | You can move 10 ft closer to an ally. If that puts them within your natural reach, you can use a shield action on them. You can also move 10 ft while using Tank Up to help protect as an immediate action, though you cannot change the direction you are facing.

entries.title: Bouncing Bulwark
entries.content: Level 2 Protector Tags: - Action: Immediate | Range | - | | -------------- | ----------------------------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature attacking in melee | | Duration | - | | Save | Fort | Special: You must be wielding a shield to use this technique. As part of using the technique, take the Block action. If the foe attacked with a melee weapon, they are made clumsy 2 (fort halves).

entries.title: Crossed the Line
entries.content: Level 2 Protector Tags: Su, Concentration Action: Standard | Range | - | | -------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------ | | Target/AoE | 30 ft line on the ground, both ends of which must be within 30 ft of you | | Duration | 10 minutes | | Save | - | You create a visible line on the ground within that serves as a warning for your enemies. When an enemy steps into a space your line is in, or otherwise "crosses" it, you can move 30 ft closer to them elusive and make an AoO against them as an instant action, as though they moved out of your threatened spaces. Even if you run out of AoOs, you can still take the movement as often as enemies walk through the line.

entries.title: Elemental Barrier
entries.content: Level 2 Protector Tags: Buff, Su Action: Standard | Range | - | | -------------- | --------------------------------------- | | Target/AoE | 10 ft radius aura, centered on user | | Duration | - | | Save | 1 minute | You brace yourself against incoming elemental damage. Choose a damage type (other than true, slash, crush or pierce). Any ally within 10 feet of you gains resistance to that damage type. Multiple creatures using elemental barrier can overlap to grant more resistances.

entries.title: Shield Slam
entries.content: Level 2 Protector Tags: - Action: Special Attack | Range | Reach | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | - | | Save | - | Special: This special attack can be made as an attack of opportunity. When doing so, it doesn't consume the special attack on your turn. Slam your opponent with a shield adding d8 (4) dmg and one of the following on-hit effects. - Inflict clumsy 2 - Reduce a creatures speed to 0 until the start of their next turn - Apply grounded for 1 turn

entries.title: Barrier
entries.content: Level 3 Protector Tags: Su, Concentration Action: Standard | Range | 30 ft | | -------------- | ------------- | | Target/AoE | 20x20 ft wall | | Duration | 3 rounds | | Save | - | Erect a transparent barrier that blocks movement and Line of Effect. These effects only apply to enemies and allies can freely attack and move through the barrier. The barrier can be harmed, and has 5+(3*LvL) hp. It can also be broken with Brute Force (DC 30). When its hp is depleted or a creature otherwise breaks it, the barrier shatters completely. Unless the ability/attack in question is a siege weapons or it specifically mentions it destroys structures/barriers, like Calamity, the entirety of the attack is negated. In such cases, these attacks can target creatures on the other side of a barrier, but must deal enough damage to break through it to actually harm their intended target. TL;DR - If the ability doesn't mention the ability to destroy structures, then pretend it is a real wall. Even if it shatters as a result of the attack, attacks and AoE effects without a duration are halted along this barrier and do not "spill over" when the barrier is broken.

entries.title: Forbidden
entries.content: Level 3 Protector Tags: Su, Concentration Action: Standard | Range | 60 ft | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 30 ft line | | Duration | 3 rounds | | Save | Will | Mark a 30 ft line along the ground within range. A line of transparent symbols or shields appears to mark that area. If any creature walks through the barrier or tries to travel over or under it, their movement is halted and they are unable to pass through for 1 round (will negates). This line must be placed horizontally, parallel to the ground.

entries.title: Protection Prayer
entries.content: Level 3 Protector Tags: Prepared, Su Action: - | Range | - | | -------------- | --- | | Target/AoE | - | | Duration | - | | Save | - | Pray to Niv the Protector for protection from your enemies. At the start of each day, choose an elemental damage type to gain resistance to.

entries.title: Self-Sacrifice
entries.content: Level 3 Protector Tags: Su Action: Immediate | Range | 60 ft | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | - | | Save | - | When a creature in range is hit by an attack or fails a saving throw, you can use this technique to transfer the wounds, as well as any other effects, to you instead of the target. You are affected as if you were hit by the attack or failed the saving throw, taking all the damage and suffering all of the adverse effects. Any Resistance, DR etc you have are applied normally, but you cannot otherwise reduce or negate the damage or effects in any way. If you use this technique against an effect that also targets you or includes you in its area, you suffer the effects for both yourself and the target you spared, potentially taking damage or suffering other consequences twice.

entries.title: Peace Bound
entries.content: Level 4 Protector Tags: Su Action: Swift | Range | 30 ft | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | - | | Save | Will | You cause a creature to internally struggle when harming creatures (will negates). Whenever it deals damage, it deals half damage. Whenever it inflicts a harmful effect that doesn't deal damage, the DC is decreased by 4. The caster also suffers this debuff while the technique persists. This effect ends if the creature spends 1 round doing nothing.

entries.title: Shield Hero
entries.content: Level 4 Protector Tags: Prepared, Su Action: - | Range | - | | -------------- | --- | | Target/AoE | - | | Duration | - | | Save | - | You can cause phantom shields to appear in between your allies and incoming attacks. You can use shield actions on any allies within 60 ft of you. You gain a new shield action. Shield Heroism (immediate) - Reduce the damage of an incoming effect by your LvL. Note: For tower shield's tank up action, you can choose to provide the cover from any position within 60 ft of you in any direction.

entries.title: Blessing of the Protector
entries.content: Level 5 Protector Tags: Healing, Recharge, Mana Burn Action: Standard | Range | Reach | | -------------- | -------- | | Target/AoE | 1 ally | | Duration | 1 minute | | Save | - | Bestow a protective barrier on your ally. They gain Divine Shield and 30 Temp HP.

entries.title: Shine
entries.content: Level 5 Protector Tags: Su Action: Immediate | Range | - | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | - | | Save | - | This ability can only be activated in response to being targeted by ranged attack. Automatically negate it and have them reroll the attack, targeting themselves with the full effect.

entries.title: Guardian Angel
entries.content: Level 6 Protector Tags: Buff, Light, Su Action: Standard | Range | - | | -------------- | ---------------------------------------- | | Target/AoE | Self30 ft aura, centered on user | | Duration | 1 minute | | Save | - | You radiate bright light within 30 ft and a tether forms between you and any allies in the aura. You take half the damage for any ally within this aura, applying any DR and resistance you have as normal. For odd numbers, you knock off a point, lucky you.

entries.title: Stand United
entries.content: Level 6 Protector Tags: Healing, Recharge, Concentration, Teleportation, Su Action: Immediate | Range | Unlimited | | -------------- | --------- | | Target/AoE | 1 ally | | Duration | 1 minute | | Save | - | In response to an ally being harmed you can immediately grant them 30 temporary hp, increasing to 50 if they are below half hp. You must continue to actively concentrate on this ability to maintain this temp hp. If you maintain concentration for 1 full round, you can teleport adjacent to this ally as an instant action. This ability can be used over any distance, however, you must still have some means of knowing when an ally is within danger, such as Sending or Hive Mind.

entries.title: Protector
entries.content: Niv the Protector is renowned for traveling alongside heroes of the past and making sure they live until the next encounter. Her followers strive to keep the best of the world alive, even at the cost of themselves. The Protector's techniques are focused on zone control, increasing the durability of you and your allies or taking hits for them. Many of their techniques are instant or immediate actions.

entries.title: Courage
entries.content: Level 1 Pupper Tags: Prepared, Healing Action: - | Range | - | | -------------- | --- | | Target/AoE | - | | Duration | - | | Save | - | You hold yourself with such confidence that your mind has no choice but to follow suite. You get advantage on saving throws against Fear effects. When you pass a save against such an effect, you and allies that can see you gain 5 temp hp. If you fail a save against a fear effect, or otherwise become Shaken or Frightened, this technique's effect is suppressed for 1 minute.

entries.title: Fired Up
entries.content: Level 1 Pupper Tags: Fire, Healing Action: Swift | Range | Reach | | -------------- | ------ | | Target/AoE | 1 ally | | Duration | - | | Save | - | You coat your hand in fire and deal 2 fire damage to an ally (other than yourself) as you slap it on the back. You can remove any condition that can reasonably be melted away, such as getting entangled by Pin Down or the creature is Frosty.

entries.title: Gold Pine Resin
entries.content: Level 1 Pupper Tags: Buff, Holy, Upcast Action: Swift | Range | Reach | | -------------- | --------------------------------------------- | | Target/AoE | 1 weapon or 2 light weapons | | Duration | 1 minute | | Save | - | Coat your weapon(s), unarmed attacks or natural attacks in syrup that possesses a golden radiance. These buffed attacks deal entirely Holy damage, its usual damage, or both, whichever is most beneficial. Upcast 3 - Whenever you strike a Minion undead with this weapon, it is instantly destroyed (will negates). If destroyed, it is also treated as though it was doused in Holy Water.

entries.title: Long Stride
entries.content: Level 1 Pupper Tags: Prepared Action: - | Range | - | | -------------- | --- | | Target/AoE | - | | Duration | - | | Save | - | While this technique is prepared, you move with a spring in your step and a sense of urgency. You get a +10 bonus to your land speed while in combat.

entries.title: Persevere
entries.content: Level 1 Pupper Tags: Prepared Action: - | Range | - | | -------------- | --- | | Target/AoE | - | | Duration | - | | Save | - | You start each day ready for anything. You get a +4 bonus to the first saving throw you make. This ability refreshes after 1 minute out of combat. You can confer this bonus to another creature by touching it as a standard action. When the ability refreshes, it refreshes on you.

entries.title: Sprint
entries.content: Level 1 Pupper Tags: - Action: FRA | Range | - | | -------------- | --- | | Target/AoE | - | | Duration | - | | Save | - | Get down on all fours and take the Core Rules, How to Play/Actions/Common Actions/Full Round Actions/Charge action with 4x speed instead of x2. Ignore difficult terrain.

entries.title: Bladed Dash
entries.content: Level 2 Pupper Tags: Su, Teleportation Action: Special Attack | Range | - | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 30 ft line | | Duration | - | | Save | - | Rapidly teleport forward in small increments, briefly leaving behind colorful afterimages. Move in one direction 30 ft. You can make a melee attack against a single creature that is within your Reach at any point along this line.

entries.title: Burst of Speed
entries.content: Level 2 Pupper Tags: - Action: Swift | Range | - | | -------------- | ------- | | Target/AoE | Self | | Duration | 1 round | | Save | - | The thrill of battle pushes you forward. Increase your speed by 20 this round. Your movement is Elusive. If you do not end your turn threatened by an enemy, you become fatigued.

entries.title: Inheritor's Smite
entries.content: Level 2 Pupper Tags: Holy, Upcast Action: Special Attack | Range | - | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | - | | Save | - | Your attack does an additional d10 (5) holy damage. If the creature has weakness to holy damage, it also takes the attacks damage as poise damage. If this poise breaks them, they are knocked down. Upcast - For each additional mana spent, increase damage by d10 (5).

entries.title: Warpath
entries.content: Level 2 Pupper Tags: Buff Action: Swift | Range | - | | -------------- | -------- | | Target/AoE | Self | | Duration | 1 minute | | Save | - | Your momentum empowers you. You deal 1 additional damage per 4 spaces (20 ft) you moved this turn on your first melee attack you make during your turn. Distance you teleport or fall does not increase your damage.

entries.title: Crash
entries.content: Level 3 Pupper Tags: - Action: Immediate | Range | - | | -------------- | -------- | | Target/AoE | 1 create | | Duration | - | | Save | - | When a creature moves into melee range of an ally within 30 ft of you, you can immediately Core Rules, How to Play/Actions/Common Actions/Full Round Actions/Charge to intercept them. You make a single +Combat Maneuver attack against them. If you poise break them, instead of the usual effect, reduce their speed is zero until the start of their next turn just outside of the ally's reach. Your speed is 0 on your next turn.

entries.title: Exploit Weakness
entries.content: Level 3 Pupper Tags: Elusive Action: Immediate | Range | 30 ft | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | - | | Save | - | When an enemy suffers from a negative status effect that restricts their actions or movement, such as if they are entangled, staggered or dazed, move to threaten them, unless your speed is 0. You can choose any position around them.

entries.title: Haste
entries.content: Level 3 Pupper Tags: Su, Buff Action: Standard | Range | - | | -------------- | -------------------------------------------- | | Target/AoE | All allies60 ft radius, centered on user | | Duration | 10 minutes | | Save | - | Create a brief figment of a cute pupper to fill your allies with determination. Affected creatures have their speed increased by 20.

entries.title: Pounce
entries.content: Level 3 Pupper Tags: Upcast, Pounce Action: FRA, Special Attack | Range | - | | -------------- | --- | | Target/AoE | - | | Duration | - | | Save | - | Take the Core Rules, How to Play/Actions/Common Actions/Full Round Actions/Charge action. After the charge is resolved, make an additional charge against a foe you have not attacked this round, making only a single simple melee attack against them. You turn after making the first attack. You can jump once as a free action during this charge. Upcast 5 - 2 additional charges against a foe you have not attacked this round instead of 1, making only a single simple attack.

entries.title: Quick Attack
entries.content: Level 3 Pupper Tags: - Action: Immediate | Range | Reach | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | - | | Save | - | Make a simple melee attack.

entries.title: Unbreakable Advance
entries.content: Level 3 Pupper Tags: Prepared Action: - | Range | - | | -------------- | --- | | Target/AoE | - | | Duration | - | | Save | - | You are protected as long as you are on the move. You gain the following benefits while in combat. * You take no penalty to AC from taking the Core Rules, How to Play/Actions/Common Actions/Full Round Actions/Charge action. * You ignore difficult terrain. * During your turn you are immune to damage and Poise damage, unless it is from a damage over time effect, like bleed. This effect ends for the current combat until you do not move at least 10 ft on your turn. It returns at the start of the next combat.

entries.title: Bladed Decimation
entries.content: Level 4 Pupper Tags: Teleportation, Su Action: Standard | Range | - | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 30 ft line | | Duration | - | | Save | - | Rapidly teleport forward in small increments, briefly leaving behind after images. Move in one direction 30 ft. You can attack ANY creature that is within your reach at any point along this line. Deal an extra 3d8 (13) dmg on all your attacks.

entries.title: Flash Forward
entries.content: Level 4 Pupper Tags: Teleportation Action: FRA, Special Attack | Range | - | | -------------- | --- | | Target/AoE | - | | Duration | - | | Save | - | Core Rules, How to Play/Actions/Common Actions/Full Round Actions/Charge with a twist: You teleport back to your starting position at the end of your turn. The first attack you land during this charge deals an additional 3d8 (13) dmg.

entries.title: Swords Dance
entries.content: Level 5 Pupper Tags: Su, Buff Action: Swift | Range | - | | -------------- | -------- | | Target/AoE | Self | | Duration | 3 rounds | | Save | - | Create 3 copies of a held melee weapon, natural attack or Unarmed Attack that float around your head. While these persist, gain +2 Attack. As part of casting using this technique, and as a swift action each subsequent turn, you can make a simple melee attack with that weapon and consume a copy. This attack functions exactly like making a simple attack with the weapon normally, but deals an additional d8 (4) dmg.

entries.title: Extreme Speed
entries.content: Level 6 Pupper Tags: Recharge, Elusive Action: Swift | Range | - | | -------------- | --- | | Target/AoE | - | | Duration | - | | Save | - | Move to somewhere you have line of sight to.

entries.title: Pupper
entries.content: Cinder Tourneau is an influential adventurer that lived through not one, but two different world crises while fighting to stop it. Once upon a time she had the blood of fiends run through her veins but has since been transformed by a mad scientist and retired. Even when she was a child she would charge at foes many times her size without fear by the side of her parents. The memory of this cute pupper still inspires people to this day to fight greater evils. Pupper techniques are focused on providing useful combat buffs, aggression, speed and putting you straight into the action to slap people in melee.

entries.title: Backstab
entries.content: Level 1 Scoundrel Tags: Elusive Action: Special Attack | Range | Reach | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | - | | Save | - | Dash to the direct opposite side of a creature you threaten and make an attack. They are DD for this attack, or both attacks if Dual Wielding. Cannot be used if your speed is zero, or if the spot opposite of the creature is occupied.

entries.title: Fan of Knives
entries.content: Level 1 Scoundrel Tags: Prepared Action: - | Range | - | | -------------- | --- | | Target/AoE | - | | Duration | - | | Save | - | You always have 2 non-magical light weapons on your person with the thrown property. They are in your voluminous hair, fat folds or keistered in less comfortable places...You can draw these weapons as a free action any number of times each turn if your hands are empty. Gain access to the following special attack, usable any number of times per combat. Fan of Knives - Throw up to 3 knives at up to 3 creatures within 10 feet of each other. Ignore attack penalties from attacking creatures in the second range increment. You also always have a thief's tool kit in your back pocket, in the form of a single lockpick.

entries.title: Heart Seeker
entries.content: Level 1 Scoundrel Tags: Su Action: Swift | Range | - | | -------------- | ---- | | Target/AoE | Self | | Duration | - | | Save | - | Take the hide action. While hiding, you can feel the pulsing heartbeat of your foes. Gain +blindsense (Lifesense 10 ft) until you exit stealth.

entries.title: Kidnap
entries.content: Level 1 Scoundrel Tags: - Action: Special Attack | Range | Reach | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | - | | Save | - | Make a drag attack with a +4 bonus. If successful, dash as a free action.

entries.title: Pocket Sand
entries.content: Level 1 Scoundrel Tags: - Action: Special Attack | Range | Reach | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | - | | Save | - | Gain a +4 bonus to your next dirty trick. It blinds for 1 round instead of its usual effect.

entries.title: Poison Jab
entries.content: Level 1 Scoundrel Tags: Recharge Action: Free | Range | - | | -------------- | ---------------- | | Target/AoE | 1 wielded weapon | | Duration | - | | Save | - | Apply a Toxin to your weapon. Usable 1/turn.

entries.title: Terminal Isolation
entries.content: Level 1 Scoundrel Tags: Upcast Action: Special Attack | Range | Reach | | -------------- | --------------------- | | Target/AoE | 1 "isolated" creature | | Duration | - | | Save | - | Note: This technique can only be used against an isolated creature. A creature is considered isolated when... * It does not have an ally within 15 ft. * It is not flanking with an ally Strike at an isolated creature with a melee attack, adding d8 (4) dmg. Upcast - For each additional mana spent, deal an additional d8 (4) damage.

entries.title: Twist the Knife
entries.content: Level 1 Scoundrel Tags: Elusive, Upcast Action: Immediate | Range | Reach | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | - | | Save | - | If after your melee attack is resolved, if your opponent has 5 or less +HP, you can tell. You can finish them off, automatically dealing 5 True Damage, and then move 20 ft. This technique treats Temp HP as hp to determine the execute threshold. Upcast - Increase the true damage by 5 per additional mana spent, also allowing you to detect if a creature you strike falls below this higher threshold.

entries.title: Blur
entries.content: Level 2 Scoundrel Tags: - Action: Free | Range | - | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | Self | | Duration | Until Rest | | Save | - | Immediately hide. While hiding, your speed increases by 20.

entries.title: Denied
entries.content: Level 2 Scoundrel Tags: - Action: Immediate | Range | Reach | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | - | | Save | - | When a creature attempts to manipulate an item, such as drinking a potion or opening a door, stop them. You automatically slap the item out of their hands onto the ground, jam the door or otherwise prevent the creature from utilizing equipment that can't be used to make attacks or cast spells.

entries.title: Feign Defeat
entries.content: Level 2 Scoundrel Tags: - Action: Immediate | Range | - | | -------------- | ------- | | Target/AoE | Self | | Duration | 1 round | | Save | - | Note: Can only be used while at or below 50% hp, and only in response to taking damage. Inflict Knockdown on yourself and roll +Disguise/+Deception with a +2 bonus. The nearest creature rolls +Perception against you to determine if you're down for the count and everybody else takes their assessment as fact. You lose the knockdown status at the start of your next turn and your next attack against a creature makes them DD. This ability only works once each combat. Creatures that have seen you do it in other combats get advantage on their perception.

entries.title: Adrenaline Burst
entries.content: Level 3 Scoundrel Tags: Recharge Action: Free | Range | - | | -------------- | ---- | | Target/AoE | Self | | Duration | - | | Save | - | Note: You cannot use this ability while fatigued. Take a standard action. You are fatigued when your turn ends. You take a -2 penalty to AC until this fatigue wears off.

entries.title: Already Dead
entries.content: Level 3 Scoundrel Tags: Teleportation Action: Free | Range | 30 ft | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | - | | Save | - | Teleport adjacent to an enemy within 30 ft.

entries.title: Garrote
entries.content: Level 3 Scoundrel Tags: - Action: Special Attack | Range | Reach | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | - | | Save | - | Make a grapple attack with a +4 bonus that also makes them bleed for 2d6 (7) if successful. While grappled your target is also silenced and cannot remove the bleed. You do not need to spend any actions to maintain this grapple. Your drag attacks automatically succeed against them while grappled. This resets the creatures poise.

entries.title: Shadow Step
entries.content: Level 3 Scoundrel Tags: Su, Teleportation Action: Free | Range | - | | -------------- | ------------- | | Target/AoE | Current space | | Duration | 1 round | | Save | - | Note: This ability must be used in space of Dim Light or Darkness. Place a symbol on the ground. You can teleport back to this spot as an immediate action at any point until the start of your next turn. If no creatures have line of sight of you when you teleport back, immediately hide.

entries.title: Assassinate
entries.content: Level 4 Scoundrel Tags: - Action: Special Attack | Range | Reach | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | - | | Save | Fort | Make an attack roll against a DD creature. The effect varies depending on how much hp the target has remaining. Not Full HP - Staggers them for 1 round (fort negates) and deals an additional 3d8 (13) damage. Full HP - Daze them for 1 round and deal an additional 4d8 (18) damage.

entries.title: Bullet Time
entries.content: Level 4 Scoundrel Tags: Elusive Action: Instant | Range | - | | -------------- | ------- | | Target/AoE | Self | | Duration | 1 round | | Save | - | Note: Cannot be used while fatigued. You react instantaneously to the unseen, giving you a +8 bonus to +Perception and a +4 bonus to AC for 1 round. Each time an attack is made against you during this time, you can move 5 feet. After bullet time ends you are fatigued.

entries.title: Preparation
entries.content: Level 4 Scoundrel Tags: Teleportation Action: Standard | Range | - | | -------------- | ------- | | Target/AoE | Self | | Duration | 1 round | | Save | - | Enter a defensive stance, giving you +4 AC, +4 +Perception for 1 round and resetting your poise. When an attack made by a creature you can see misses you or fails to break your poise, you can choose to lose these bonuses to teleport within 5 feet of them and strike them with a melee attack. They are DD for this attack and take an additional 3d8 (13) dmg.

entries.title: Achilles Heel
entries.content: Level 5 Scoundrel Tags: - Action: Special Attack | Range | Reach | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | 3 rounds | | Save | Fort | Strike at a creature's tendons dealing an additional 4d8 (18) dmg and applying a unique Status (fort negates). For every 5 feet they move, they take 2 True Damage. If the target is DD, this has no save. Certain effects like teleportation, telekinetic movement or anything else not based on physical locomotion can bypass this effect. This wound can be healed with a DC 25 first aid check, or by succeeding on a DC 25 CL check with a healing spell/effect.

entries.title: Alpha Strike
entries.content: Level 6 Scoundrel Tags: Recharge, Teleportation Action: Immediate | Range | - | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 30 ft | | Duration | 1 creature | | Save | - | You can choose to vanish when affected by any type of effect originating from a creature that you can see within range. At the end of the target's turn, you rapidly teleport and make melee attacks against them and up to 3 other creatures within 30 ft, each dealing an additional 4d6 (14) dmg. You end this flurry adjacent to original target. Note - The 4d6 bonus damage only gets added once per creature, even when Dual Wielding.

entries.title: Scoundrel
entries.content: The techniques surrounding using underhanded tactics. High in mobility and utility.

entries.title: Template Move
entries.content: Level 1 Unarmed Tags: - Action: AoO | Range | Reach | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | - | | Save | - | When a creature provokes an AoO from movement, you can make a simple Unarmed Attack against them. On-hit, their speed is reduced to zero.

entries.title: Template
entries.content: Template The techniques surrounding using underhanded tactics. High in mobility and utility.

entries.title: Clothesline
entries.content: Level 1 Unarmed Tags: - Action: AoO | Range | Reach | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | - | | Save | - | When a creature provokes an AoO from movement, you can make a simple Unarmed Attack against them. On-hit, their speed is reduced to zero.

entries.title: Defensive Spin
entries.content: Level 1 Unarmed Tags: - Action: Special Attack | Range | Reach | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | - | | Save | - | Make an melee Unarmed Attack attack. Hit or miss, gain +2 AC for 1 round and make your movement Elusive against this target.

entries.title: Focus Punch
entries.content: Level 1 Unarmed Tags: - Action: Free (also consumes your 1/rnd Special Attack for the round you activate it) | Range | Reach | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | - | | Save | - | Focus your energy into a mighty punch. For 1 round you take a -10 penalty to +Stealth from you powering up. If you do not take +HP damage or get poise broken by the start of your next turn, you can make an unarmed strike with +10 Attack that deals an additional (2*LvL) dmg at any point during your turn as a free action.

entries.title: Improvise
entries.content: Level 1 Unarmed Tags: - Action: Immediate | Range | Reach | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | - | | Save | - | Scramble to find something to take the hit for you against an incoming attack. Decrease their Attack by 2 and the object breaks. They maintain this -2 attack penalty as their weapon gets stuck in the object. They can remove it as a swift action. Note: Must have a free hand to use this ability. There must also be suitable object with which to block the attack, such as a piece of furniture.

entries.title: Sky Uppercut
entries.content: Level 1 Unarmed Tags: Elusive, Upcast Tags: Special Attack EffectRange60 ftTarget1 creature Note: You must be on the ground to use this ability. As part of using this technique, you can leap 60 ft into the air directly up and make a melee Unarmed Attack. You are immune to fall damage during the turn you use this technique. You knock the creature into the air 10 ft, dealing fall damage. If you can fly, you can choose to stay airborne at the peak of your leap. If you have glide, you can use it to adjust your landing location. If your opponent has either of these qualities, they ignore the fall damage if they can use them. Upcast - For each additional mana spent, knock the creature 10 ft higher into the air.

entries.title: Sucker Punch
entries.content: Level 1 Unarmed Tags: Upcast Action: Special Attack | Range | Reach | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | - | | Save | - | This functions as though you automatically succeeded on Sucker Punch (P). Make an unarmed strike against an unassuming creature. They are DD for this attack. Upcast - For each additional mana spent, increase damage by d8 (4).

entries.title: Wake-Up Slap
entries.content: Level 1 Unarmed Tags: Healing Action: Swift | Range | Reach | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | - | | Save | - | Help an ally snap out of it with the back of your hand. Deal 1 true damage and immediately wake them up from Sleeping or free them from Fascination. If they are confused, add 2 to their rolls. If they are charmed or frightened, they get a new save against the effect.

entries.title: Body Slam
entries.content: Leve 2 Unarmed Tags: - Action: Special Attack | Range | Reach | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | - | | Save | - | Note: This attack must be performed from above the target or combined with a jump action. Crash onto your foe. This unarmed attack inflicts Knockdown on you and your target and deals an additional d8 (4) dmg. If the target is already knocked down, it is instead staggered and takes an additional 3d8 (13) dmg. Upcast - For each additional mana spent, increase damage by d8 (4).

entries.title: Close Combat
entries.content: Level 2 Unarmed Tags: Prepared Action: - | Range | - | | -------------- | --- | | Target/AoE | - | | Duration | - | | Save | - | You have mastered the art of getting up close and personal to an uncomfortable degree. You can enter the spaces of creatures that are your size or smaller and keep up the pressure by using elbow and knee strikes. This costs 30 ft of movement, and makes it so your enemy is unable to effectively Attack you. They have Disadvantage on attacks made against you while you share their space. You have disadvantage on any attacks that aren't unarmed attacks. This has no effect against creatures that are larger than you. Leaving a space occupied by a creature no longer Provokes for you, regardless of the enemy's size.

entries.title: Drop Kick
entries.content: Level 2 Unarmed Tags: Upcast Action: Special Attack | Range | Reach | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | - | | Save | - | Jump into the air and kick your foe with both legs at full force. They take an additional d8 (4) damage. If they are not clumsy, they become clumsy 1 On-hit. If they are clumsy, then you can choose to make them knocked down On-hit instead of making them more clumsy. Upcast - For each additional mana spent, increase damage by d8 (4).

entries.title: Nice Catch
entries.content: Level 2 Unarmed Tags: - Action: Immediate | Range | Reach | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | - | | Save | - | When a creature targets you with a melee attack using a manufactured weapon (sword, spear etc.), you can opt to grab their weapon mid swing. Roll an opposed attack roll. If you meet or exceed their roll, you successfully negate their attack and grab their weapon, rendering them unable to use it for further attacks. While the weapon is in hand, you lose access to the hand. You and your opponent cannot move away from each other without letting go of the weapon. If you are poise broken, or otherwise moved out of reach, you let go of the weapon.

entries.title: Toe Smasher
entries.content: Level 2 Unarmed Tags: - Action: Special Attack | Range | Reach | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | - | | Save | - | On-hit smush a creature's toes to limit their movement and deal an additional d8 (4) dmg. They cannot move farther away from you for 1 round. If you are poise broken or forcefully moved out of reach, this effect ends. stagger

entries.title: Axe Kick
entries.content: Level 3 Unarmed Tags: - Action: Special Attack | Range | Reach | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | - | | Save | - | Jump into the air and bring your heel down upon your target's shoulder...Or something close to it at least. This Unarmed Attack deals an additional d8 (4) damage and breaks your the bones leading to your opponents arm (fort reduces to sickened 1). While their bone is broken, every time they use the arm, such as using a shield action, making a Natural Attack or casting a spell using a held Staff Component, they take d8 (4) True Damage and become sickened 1. This effect can be removed with first aid.

entries.title: Crush Joints
entries.content: Level 3 Unarmed Tags: - Action: Special Attack | Range | Reach | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | - | | Save | - | Bend your foe in ways that cause permanent damage and strike at vulnerable joints. The creature is made clumsy 2 On-hit. The target cannot remove clumsy stacks until it receives first aid.

entries.title: Pummel
entries.content: Level 3 Unarmed Tags: Prepared Action: - | Range | - | | -------------- | --- | | Target/AoE | - | | Duration | - | | Save | - | On-hit with a unarmed attack, apply a unique Status to the foe. Your unarmed attacks beyond the first that applied this status ignore DR and deal 2 bonus damage for the remainder of attacks this combat.

entries.title: Resonating Strike
entries.content: Level 3 Unarmed Tags: Elusive, Sonic Action: Special Attack | Range | Thrown and 60 ft | | -------------- | -------------------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | - | | Save | - | Unleash a sonic blast at a creature as though using a thrown weapon attack that deals your Unarmed Attack damage as sonic damage. This attack has Seeking. On-hit, as long as that creature stays within 60 ft of you, you know it's exact position and gain seeking against it until the end of your next turn. At any point before the end of your next turn, you can spend an immediate action to dash to their location and to make an simple unarmed strike against them. They must be within 60 ft and you must have line of effect.

entries.title: Hammer Fist
entries.content: Level 4 Unarmed Tags: - Action: Special Attack | Range | Reach | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | - | | Save | Will | Grasp your two hands together and bring them down upon your foe. This Unarmed Attack deals an additional 3d8 (13) crush damage and makes the opponent Confused On-hit (will adds 4 to confusion rolls).

entries.title: Heavy Hitter
entries.content: Level 4 Unarmed Tags: Recharge Action: Standard | Range | Reach | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | - | | Save | - | Start charging up a powerful unarmed attack, immediately gaining resistance to all damage and taking a -10 penalty to +Stealth from the coalescing power. At the start of your next turn, unleash this attack. If no creatures are within reach, you whiff. Otherwise, you gain +10 to attack, deal an additional 20 damage and send your opponent flying 60 ft away from you On-hit. If they impact solid terrain, they become entangled in it (Breakout as a swift action). You cannot use this technique on consecutive turns.

entries.title: Nunchaku
entries.content: Level 4 Unarmed Tags: - Action: Special Attack | Range | Reach | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | - | | Save | - | Note - You must have 2 free hands to initiate this technique (unless already grappling, then just 1). Against larger creatures, this requires extraordinary strength Make a grapple attack against a creature with a +4 bonus. If successful, immediately start spinning them around like they are a weapon. If you were already grappling the creature, you can benefit from this immediately, requiring no additional grapple attack. Your target immediately becomes sickened 2. Until the start of your next turn, you can make melee attacks using this creature. Functions as 2h improvised weapon (granting 2d8 base damage) and an unarmed strike for expanded synergy. You make a simple attack immediately when you succeed in initiating this grapple (or when you already started grappling). Each attack that you make automatically deals damage to the grappled creature as though you had hit them, even if you miss. If you crit, then you crit the grappled creature as well. If you are still grappling the creature by the start of your next turn, your wild swinging ends and they are made sickened 2 again. Note 2 - Making something "count as x" is always weird. Does it work with z? The main thing you should as is does it work with x OR y. It always functions using the most advantageous features of both (ie how unarmed strikes come with the Finesse property).

entries.title: Ora Aura
entries.content: Level 5 Unarmed Tags: Buff Action: Free | Range | - | | -------------- | -------- | | Target/AoE | Self | | Duration | 1 minute | | Save | - | Rapidly unleash a flurry of punches in all directions all the time. A creature that moves into, out of or ends their turn in your natural reach is automatically attacked with an unarmed strike as an instant action, though only once per turn.

entries.title: Roundhouse
entries.content: Level 5 Unarmed Tags: - Action: Special Attack | Range | Reach | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | - | | Save | - | Make a shove attack against a creature with a +8 bonus. If the shove is successful, they are shoved 30 ft. If the shoved creature impacts a creature or terrain, their movement is halted and they both take 6d8+lvl (27+lvl) crush dmg and are knocked down.

entries.title: Five-Finger Death Punch
entries.content: Level 6 Unarmed Tags: Concentration, Recharge Action: | Range | Reach | | -------------- | ---------- | | Target/AoE | 1 creature | | Duration | 24 hours | | Save | Fort | Note: You can only activate this technique On-hit after landing an unarmed strike Creature feels their heart stop and gain a stacking debuff (fort changes to Staggered 1 round). For every 5 feet they move on their own, they gain a stack of doom, dying when they reach 5. Wears off after 24 hours.

entries.title: Super Sandwich
entries.content: Level 6 Unarmed Tags: Buff, Healing, Recharge, Teleportation Action: 1 round | Range | - | | -------------- | -------- | | Target/AoE | Self | | Duration | 1 minute | | Save | - | Note: You must decide to use this ability at the start of your turn, and can perform no other actions. During this turn you shout incredibly loudly and charge your power, creatures cannot exist within 10 ft of you, and are automatically pushed directly away if they try. You are also unstoppable. Once the charging is complete, you immediately regain this abilities mana cost and lose the unstoppable and pushback aura. You have a persistent glowing yellow aura around you and the following benefits…. * You can fly and cannot be made clumsy * You can teleport instead of moving * You gain 30 extra speed * You gain 30 temp hp * Multiattack: Make 3 unarmed attacks

entries.title: Unarmed
entries.content: The techniques surrounding using your own body as your weapon, often involving punches, kicks, stomps, knees and more.

entries.title: Casting Components
entries.content: All spells have some kind of visual effect associated with their casting before the effect occurs. Magic circles shining fingers and eyes, words manifesting into physical objects and circling the caster are all means to easily identify when a creature is casting a spell. The only exception to this being spells with the Subtle tag. All spells have a verbal component. Verbal components cannot be whispered, and you must speak them clearly. Anything that prevents the mage from speaking prevents them from casting, such as being silenced. These rules apply to Innate Casting. \--- All spells have a Staff Component. Disarming a mage of their staff prevents them from casting using it. Any spell with a material component has an item with a price associated with that is consumed on use. Anything with a focus component has an item with a price associated that is NOT consumed on use. These rules do not apply to innate casting.

entries.title: Staff Component
entries.content: Staves, Seals, Wands etc. In general the staff component serves much the same function no matter its shape, but there are some small differences. Staves - Staves are usually long and sturdy pieces of wood. Most of the magical components of the staff are attached to the end of it. Staves can universally be used as weapons. Seals - Seals have an enormous amount of variety to them. But they are typically compact: Some small handheld object, often of spiritual significance. Seals are ineffective unless they are the only thing occupying the hand. Wands - Wands are usually small pieces of wood about in the rough shape of a pencil, but usually a bit larger. Wands come pre-built in with a cantrip. Other sufficiently magical things can potentially be used as magical foci with their own unique benefits such as books giving access to more spells. Dual wielding these items gives +1 CL. Some seal examples...

entries.title: Caster Level
entries.content: Caster level (CL) is typically equal to the creature's level, though certain effects can change it. CL determines the effectiveness of many spells. This stat is also relevant in resolving what happens when casting goes head to head with each other (such as with dispel magic), when using healing to staunch bleeding or when light and Dark magic meet. If dual wielding spell focuses, get +1 CL. All boosts to CL affect +Cantrips, even if they normally only affect specific types of spells.

entries.title: Fizzle
entries.content: By default, spells have a 100% chance of being cast, but certain things can cause spell failure. When you fail to cast a spell, the resource used to cast it is consumed. A spell failing is usually shortened to "fizzles."

entries.title: Spell
entries.content: Spellcasting is a general title that applies to a specific type of magical effect, with specific rules. Spells do not encompass all magic, but it is the most common type. Spells are specifically anything that falls under the magical techniques section.

entries.title: Weather
entries.content: Certain high level spells manipulate the weather in drastic ways. If multiple casters attempt to cast different spells that affect the weather, the creature with the higher CL always wins. In the event where the caster tries to interfere with weather that is supernaturally powerful (created by a complex ritual, associated with cursed terrain etc), the DM should assign the effect an effective CL. All weather inducing spells do not function underground.

entries.title: Innate Technique
entries.content: Some techniques can be granted outside of the standard progression, such as things gained from race, class, magic item, specialized training, or some kind of boon granted by another creature. Usually quite limited in scope and much more common on monsters. Innate techniques do not take up memory slots and are always memorized. Innate techniques grant creatures the ability to use a specific set of techniques. Spells do not require the staff/seal component that other casting typically requires. If a spell has a material or focus component, that is also ignored with innate casting. By default, creatures with innate techniques can use their techniques an unlimited number of times. Number values are included next to techniques that have limited uses per day. Mana Burn still applies to innately casted spells, but in addition to reducing mana, it removes your ability to use that technique until you rest.

entries.title: Technique Progression
entries.content: In general, classes get access to a few technique trees. Techniques are separated into six levels, requiring 6 points of investment in order to reach the highest tier. At every even level, you get a technique point you can invest in any form of technique. For every point you invest, you get access to a new level of technique. There are some limitations. You cannot invest all of your technique points into the techniques your class specializes in to get access to high level abilities extremely early. Technique levels have a hard character level requirement, as shown below… | Technique Level (and points required) | Character Level | | ------------------------------------- | --------------- | | 1 | 1 | | 2 | 3 | | 3 | 5 | | 4 | 7 | | 5 | 9 | | 6 | 11 |

entries.title: Technique Rules
entries.content: Progression in this game is broken up into 3 main distinct categories: Class features, feats and techniques. This section is dedicated to techniques. Techniques use a point system to represent how invested you are in a specific technique, from 1 to 6. Techniques are often things that you use in combat, such as special attacks and spells.

entries.title: Astral Infusion
entries.content: Level 1 Ligma Tags: Force, Healing Action: Standard | Range | 60 ft | | -------------- | ----------------------------------------------- | | Target/AoE | 10 ft radius, centered on a point on the ground | | Duration | - | | Save | Reflex | A mote of energy resembling a shining star lands on this spot, dealing 2d8+CL (9+CL) force damage to all enemies (reflex halves). Some of the affected creatures' energy is absorbed and you may divert that energy to an ally within range. The ally restores hp equal to the (3 x number of creatures damaged by the spell).
entries.path: Techniques/Z Tech with no home/Astral Infusion.md

entries.title: Vengeance
entries.content: Level 1 Ligma Tags: Buff, Recharge Action: Swift | Range | - | | -------------- | -------- | | Target/AoE | Self | | Duration | 1 minute | | Save | - | You reflect 75% of the next instance of +HP damage you take as true damage. The DC to Identify Spell Being Cast is much easier for Vengeance due to its distinct visual effect of a skull appearing over your head, making the DC 8. This spell has a 1 minute cooldown.

entries.title: Technique Tree Completion Status
entries.content: My goal for each technique tree is to have at least 6, 5, 4, 3, 2, 1 techniques available at level 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6 for a total of at least 21. This will inform the formatting of this tally. In particular Warfare and Academy will likely end up with more tech due to their more general nature. Also Frogg Saran (T), because I love chaos. Here's a graph to showcase the data, mostly for me for organizational purposes, but can also help you decide if you want to invest in a tree. | Tech Tree | Level 1 | Level 2 | Level 3 | Level 4 | Level 5 | Level 6 | | ----------------------------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------ | ----------------------------------------------- | ----------------------------------------------- | ----------------------------------------------- | ----------------------------------------------- | ----------------------------------------------- | | Academy | 10 | 4 | 2 | 2 | 0 | 0 | | Alchemy | 7 | 5 | 4 | 2 | 1 | 0 | | Arcane | 9 | 3 | 6 | 3 | 3 | 2 | | Brazzeria | 7 | 6 | 4 | 4 | 1 | 1 | | Clairvoyance (T) | 6 | 5 | 6 | 1 | 1 | 1 | | Corruption | 8 | 5 | 4 | 3 | 2 | 1 | | Cryomancy | 7 | 5 | 5 | 1 | 0 | 0 | | Frogg Saran (T) | 8 | 7 | 5 | 3 | 3 | 3 | | God Mode | 5 | 4 | 4 | 3 | 3 | 1 | | Golden Order | 4 | 2 | 3 | 1 | 2 | 1 | | Goomshroom | 10 | 6 | 4 | 2 | 0 | 1 | | Moogen | 8 | 7 | 6 | 4 | 3 | 2 | | Mother Earth | 9 | 8 | 6 | 4 | 2 | 1 | | Nack (special) | 4 | 1 | 2 | 1 | 1 | 1 | | Necromancy | 9 | 5 | 6 | 3 | 2 | 3 | | Prismancy | 2 | 2 | 2 | 2 | 1 | 1 | | Psionics | 7 | 5 | 6 | 2 | 2 | 2 | | Pyromancy | 6 | 3 | 4 | 2 | 1 | 0 | | Shira | 7 | 5 | 4 | 2 | 2 | 1 | | Vampirism | 6 | 4 | 4 | 0 | 0 | 1 | | MARTIAL TECH | | | | | | | | Warfare | 8 | 5 | 6 | 1 | 0 | 1 | | Arc | 6 | 5 | 5 | 2 | 2 | 1 | | Barbarism | 6 | 4 | 6 | 3 | 2 | 1 | | Beastmode | 8 | 6 | 6 | 2 | 2 | 2 | | Cataclysm | 6 | 5 | 5 | 3 | 2 | 2 | | Marksman | 8 | 6 | 5 | 1 | 1 | 0 | | Protector | 7 | 4 | 4 | 2 | 2 | 2 | | Techniques/Martial Techniques/Pupper/Pupper | 6? | 4 | 6 | 2 | 1 | 1 | | Scoundrel | 8 | 3 | 4 | 3 | 1 | 1 | | Unarmed | 7 | 5 | 4 | 1 | 2 | 2 | Dev notes - Alchemy - Most of the alchemy techniques are weird. Should make a few general ones. Arcane - Should have more attack rolls

entries.title: Home Page
entries.content: What is Nick Nacks? !NICK NACKS showcase n logo.png Nick Nacks is my very own fantasy tabletop role-playing game (TTRPG). My biggest sources of inspiration are Pathfinder 1e and Divinity Original Sin 2. Most of the rules in Nick Nacks are centered around combat. I expect you to be traveling through dangerous wilderness, delving into dungeons and stealing treasure from dragons. Some rules, such as Skills and +Minigames, allow you to resolve actions outside of combat. The +Chase and Drinking Contest and D420 are examples of such things. Where I think Nick Nacks shines is its customization options for players and GMs alike. Instead of having traditional spell lists, I made techniques for both martials and mages, each with their own group loosely centered around a theme such as Pyromancy, unarmed fighting or necromancy. Anybody can specialize in any list using a pool of limited points. This means a large degree of depth and complexity, with lots of potential builds. I have plans to make far, far more classes, subclasses, bestiary creatures, feats and more!
